|ddl|
|---|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: APACHEIISCORE
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "APACHEIISCORE" (
    "PATIENT_ID" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "VISIT_ID" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "SCORING_DATE_TIME" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "SCORING_METHOD" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "SCORING_VALUE" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "DEATH_PROBABILITY" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PAT_CONDITION" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "OPERATOR" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "point_id" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "DEP_ID" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("PATIENT_ID", "VISIT_ID", "SCORING_DATE_TIME", "SCORING_METHOD", "DEP_ID")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: B02_1_患者就诊基本信息表
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "B02_1_患者就诊基本信息表" (
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_sn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_card_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "outpatient_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_times" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_datetime" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "medical_record_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "inpatient_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "hospitalization_times" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "admission_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "discharge_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "visit_doctor_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "gender" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "date_of_birth" date  /*  */,
    "occupation_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "occupation_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "nationality" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "ethnicity" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "education" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "marital_status" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "newbron_mark" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "certificate_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "certificate_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "health_card_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "health_card_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "insurance_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "insurance_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "residence_province" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "residence_city" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "residence_county" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "current_address" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "phone_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "phone_no2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "email" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "weixin" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "contact_person1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "contact_phone_no1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "contact_person2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "contact_phone_no2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "abo_blood_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "rh_blood_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "extend_data1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "extend_data2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "record_status" character varying(50)  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: B02_3_患者诊断记录
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "B02_3_患者诊断记录" (
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_sn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_card_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "medical_record_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "outpatient_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_times" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "inpatient_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "hospitalization_times" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_serial_number" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_explanation" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "confirmed_diag_mark" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "maindiag_mark" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_doctor_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "is_complication" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "create_diagnose_dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "create_diagnose_dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "tcm_disease_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "tcm_disease_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "tcm_symptom_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "tcm_symptom_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "extend_data1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "extend_data2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "record_status" character varying(50)  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ICNRIS_HISORDER
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ICNRIS_HISORDER" (
    "IID" numeric(20,0) NOT NULL  /* ID */,
    "IHISORDER_IID" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /* 在hisorder中的唯一ID */,
    "CORDER_INDEX" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /* 电子申请单编号,唯一,流水Sequence。由HIS程序写入 */,
    "CPATWL_KEY" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "ITODAY_NO" numeric(20,0)  /* 当天排队号 */,
    "CTRIGGER_DTTM" character varying(255)  /* 电子申请单时间,格式:YYYYMMDDHHMMSS */,
    "CREPLICA_DTTM" character varying(14) DEFAULT 'ANY'::character varying  /* 匹配标识,HIS每条数据都"ANY",当RIS取了这条数据后，RIS程序将"ANY"改写成取数据的时间,格式:YYYYMMDDHHMMSS */,
    "CEXAM_STATUS" character varying(2) DEFAULT '0'::character varying  /* 检查状态,HIS缺省为"0",0/1/2/3/4/5-未登记/已登记/检查中/已报告/已审核/已打印 */,
    "CPATIENT_ID" character varying(255)  /* 病人唯一标识号，可以由用户赋予具体的含义，如:病案号，门诊号，住院号，体检号，急检号，ybh */,
    "COUTPATIENT_ID" character varying(255)  /* 门诊号,根据不同的软件自行修改格式，没有就空着 */,
    "CINPATIENT_ID" character varying(255)  /* 住院号,根据不同的软件自行修改格式，没有就空着 */,
    "CPPATIENT_ID" character varying(255)  /* 体检号,根据不同的软件自行修改格式，没有就空着 */,
    "CEPATIENT_ID" character varying(255)  /* 急诊号,根据不同的软件自行修改格式，没有就空着 */,
    "CHPATIENT_ID" character varying(255)  /* 医保 号,根据不同的软件自行修改格式，没有就空着医保 号 */,
    "CNAME" character varying(255)  /* 病人姓名 */,
    "CNAME_ENG" character varying(255)  /* 英文姓名 */,
    "CSEX" character varying(255)  /* M/F/U 男/女/未知 */,
    "CAGE" character varying(255)  /* 年龄 */,
    "CAGEDW" character varying(255)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "CORDER_LEVEL" character varying(255)  /* 优先级 */,
    "DDATE_OF_BIRTH" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "CCITIZENSHIP" character varying(255)  /* 国家名称 */,
    "CNATION" character varying(255)  /* 民族 */,
    "CID_NO" character varying(255)  /* 身份证 */,
    "CMAILING_ADDRESS" character varying(255)  /* 指永久通信地址 */,
    "CE_MAIL" character varying(255)  /* 电子邮件地址 */,
    "CZIP_CODE" character varying(255)  /* 邮编 */,
    "CPHONE_NUMBER_HOME" character varying(255)  /* 家庭电话 */,
    "CWARD_NAME" character varying(255)  /* 所在病区名称 */,
    "CWARD_ROOM" character varying(255)  /* 所在病房名称 */,
    "CDEPT_CODE" character varying(255)  /* 所在住院科室代码,病人住院所属科室的代码。用于区分一个病房包含多个科室的床位的情况。病人住院登记后，将该字段置为空，在入科分配床位时，根据床位属性将该字段置为所在科室代码，转科时，由转出科室将该代码置为空 */,
    "CBED_NO" character varying(255)  /* 病床号 */,
    "CREQ_DEPT" character varying(255)  /* 申请科室,体检就填体检单位的名称 */,
    "CREQ_DOCTORID" character varying(255)  /* 申请医生编号,开单医生ID */,
    "CREQ_PHYSICIAN" character varying(255)  /* 开单医生姓名 */,
    "CCLIN_SYNP" character varying(4000)  /* 症状 */,
    "CCLIN_DIAG" character varying(4000)  /* 临床诊断，正文描述，如"发热两天/骨折等" */,
    "CPHYS_SIGN" character varying(4000)  /* 相关诊断 */,
    "CRELEVANT_DIAG" character varying(4000)  /* 注释 */,
    "CCLIN_NOTICE" character varying(4000)  /* 注意事项,此字段由执行科室填写，填入与申请项目有关的、病人需注意的事项。该项与预约日期及时间一起构成对检查申请的答复。 */,
    "DSCHEDULED_DTTM" date  /* 预约日期及时间,此字段由执行科室根据预约安排填写 */,
    "CEXAM_CLASS" character varying(255)  /* 检查类型 */,
    "CEXAM_ITEM_NO" character varying(255)  /* 检查项目编号,HIS软件定义的项目编号 */,
    "CEXAM_ITEM" character varying(255)  /* 检查项目名称,检查项目名称。如"CR胸部正侧位"，多个检查每个检查一条记录 */,
    "CCOSTS" character varying(255)  /* 检查费用 */,
    "CCOSTS_FLAG" character varying(255)  /* 检查费用类型，自费，医保 */,
    "CIMAGE_NO" character varying(255)  /* 影像号,RIS登记完成后，将分配的影像号写入此字段。也是未来在HIS中调PACS或RIS的重要参 */,
    "CREPORTDR_ID" character varying(255)  /* 报告医生ID */,
    "CREPORTDR_NAME" character varying(255)  /* 报告医生名字 */,
    "CAPPROVE_ID" character varying(255)  /* 审核医生编号 */,
    "CAPPROVE_NAME" character varying(255)  /* 审核医生名字 */,
    "CREPORT_TEXT" character varying(4000)  /* 影像所见 */,
    "CCONCLUSION" character varying(4000)  /* 影像诊断,报告写完后，"影像诊断"内容，由RIS回写 */,
    "CNOTICE" character varying(4000)  /* 注意事项,此字段由执行科室填写，填入与申请项目有关的、病人需注意的事项。该项与预约日期及时间一起构成对检查申请的答复。 */,
    "CCHECK_ROOM" character varying(255)  /* 检查房间 */,
    "CMODALITY" character varying(255)  /* 设备类型 */,
    "CACCESSION_NO" character varying(255)  /* 检查流水号 */,
    "CFSOURCE" character varying(255) DEFAULT '1'::character varying  /* 数据来源,1:门诊2:住院 */,
    "CHIS_TYPE" character varying(500)  /* his中检查类型,门诊，住院，体检，可能来自不同系统 */,
    "CHIS_ID" character varying(500)  /* his中检查的唯一ID */,
    "CHIS_KEY" character varying(500)  /* his中检查的Key，可能是访问号 */,
    "CHIS_PID" character varying(500)  /* 病人ID */,
    "CHIS_ACCESS_NO" character varying(500)  /* 病人访问号 */,
    "CHIS_ZYH" character varying(500)  /* 住院号 */,
    "CHIS_LJH" character varying(500)  /* 绿检号 */,
    "CHIS_JZH" character varying(500)  /* 急诊号 */,
    "CHIS_MZH" character varying(500)  /* 门诊号 */,
    "CHIS_TJH" character varying(500)  /* 体检号 */,
    "CHIS_SBH" character varying(500)  /* 社保号 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_0" character varying(4000)  /* 体检类别 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_1" character varying(4000)  /* 费别 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_2" character varying(4000)  /* 绿色通道标志1是0否 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_3" character varying(4000)  /* 各CHIS_ID对应的一卡通卡类型 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_4" character varying(4000)  /* 临床路径标识，0否1是 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_5" character varying(4000)  /* 危机值标识，0否1是 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_6" character varying(4000)  /* 危机值 */,
    "CHIS_TJX_7" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_TJX_8" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_TJX_9" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_ID_0" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_1" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_2" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_3" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_4" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_5" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_6" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_7" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_8" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_ID_9" character varying(500)  /* 一卡通卡号 */,
    "CHIS_KEY_0" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_1" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_2" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_3" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_4" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_5" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_6" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_7" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_8" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_KEY_9" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "IAGE" numeric(20,0)  /*  */,
    "PLACER_ORDER_ID" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CBABY_NO" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CYZH" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CZYZH" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CZLYT" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CFPH" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CZXKS" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CVISIT_NO" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CZXKSMC" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "CDZSQD1" character varying(400)  /* 临床症状 */,
    "CDZSQD2" character varying(400)  /* 体征 */,
    "CDZSQD3" character varying(400)  /* 临床诊断 */,
    "CDZSQD4" character varying(400)  /* 其他诊断 */,
    "CDZSQD5" character varying(400)  /* 主诉 */,
    "CDZSQD6" character varying(400)  /* 病史 */,
    "CDZSQD7" character varying(400)  /* 附加说明 */,
    "CDZSQD8" character varying(400)  /* 相关化验结果 */,
    "CCPBZ" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "STUDY_INSTANCE_UID" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "DSTUDY_DTTM" date  /*  */,
    "DREPORT_DTTM" date  /*  */,
    "DAPPROVE_DTTM" date  /*  */,
    "CCHECK_GROUP" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_TYPE" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CREFER_DOCTOR_ID" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CREFER_DOCTOR_NAME" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CTECHNICIAN_ID" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CTECHNICIAN_NAME" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "CSFCXRZ" character varying(4000)  /* 收费状态查询日志 */,
    "CFSOURCE1" character varying(1) DEFAULT '1'::character varying  /*  */,
    "CSYSTYPE" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "CKDYQ_ID" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CKDYQ_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_GROUP_NO" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_GROUP" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_ROOM_ID" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_ROOM" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_SCHE_DATE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_SCHE_NUM" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_DYYSJ" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CEXAM_CJCPDH" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PURPOSE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PAPATROWID" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ADMCTLOCROWID" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "EQDESC" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "REMAINNUMBER" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ROOMINDEX" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "BOOKFLAG" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "DSCHEDULED_DATE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "DSCHEDULED_TIME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "IC_CARD_ID" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CSFZT" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CFOURCES1" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CSFCXBZ" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CAGETYPE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CSZT" character varying(2)  /*  */,
    "CPAT_INFO_LIST" character varying(1000)  /* 患者信息一览 */,
    "CHIS_ORDERNO" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_REMINDER" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_SCHEDULEAPM" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_SCHEDULESTATUS" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_SCHEDULEHOSPITALCODE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_SCHEDULEHOSPITALNAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_PERFORMDEPT" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_PERFORMDEPTNAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_ICCARD" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CHIS_ALLERGY" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "CCARDNO" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "CAGEALL" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "YBSQKS" character varying(255)  /* 申请科室编码（检查互认标准值） */,
    "YBSQKSMC" character varying(255)  /* 申请科室名称（检查互认标准值） */,
    "YBZXKS" character varying(255)  /* 执行科室编码（检查互认标准值） */,
    "YBZXKSMC" character varying(255)  /* 执行科室名称（检查互认标准值） */,
    "YBSQYSZS" character varying(255)  /* 申请医生证书（检查互认标准值） */,
    "HRXMBH" character varying(255)  /* 检查项目编码（检查互认标准值） */,
    "HRXMMC" character varying(255)  /* 检查项目名称（检查互认标准值） */,
    "DYJP" character varying(255)  /* 首次胶片打印状态（1已缴费，0未缴费） */,
    "JZXH" character varying(255)  /* his就诊流水号 */,
    "ACCEPTERNO" character varying(255)  /* 危急值处理人 */,
    "RESPONETIME" character varying(255)  /* 危急值处理时间 */,
    "FEEDBACK" character varying(255)  /* 危急值内容 */,
    "ISHISNEW" character varying(255)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("IID")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: admission_record
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "admission_record" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('emr.admission_record_record_id_seq'::regclass)  /*  */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /*  */,
    "age_day" integer  /*  */,
    "dept_id" integer  /*  */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "ward_id" integer  /*  */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "record_type_id" integer  /*  */,
    "record_type_code" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "record_type_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "record_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "nation_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "birth_address" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "sex_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "profession" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "medical_history_presenter" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "marriage_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "chief_complaint_text" text  /*  */,
    "present_history_text" text  /*  */,
    "past_history_text" text  /*  */,
    "review_of_systems" text  /*  */,
    "personal_history_text" text  /*  */,
    "menorrhea_and_childbearing" text  /*  */,
    "family_history" text  /*  */,
    "temperature" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "heart_rate" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "breathe" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "overall_view" text  /*  */,
    "skin_mucosa_view" text  /*  */,
    "lymph_view" text  /*  */,
    "head_view" text  /*  */,
    "eye_view" text  /*  */,
    "ear_view" text  /*  */,
    "nose_view" text  /*  */,
    "mouth_view" text  /*  */,
    "neck_view" text  /*  */,
    "chest_view" text  /*  */,
    "lung_view" text  /*  */,
    "heart_view" text  /*  */,
    "radial_artery_view" text  /*  */,
    "peripheral_vessels_signe" text  /*  */,
    "abdominal_view" text  /*  */,
    "genitalia_view" text  /*  */,
    "spine_view" text  /*  */,
    "extremities_view" text  /*  */,
    "nerve_reflex_view" text  /*  */,
    "specialist_examination" text  /*  */,
    "auxiliary_examination" text  /*  */,
    "admission_diagnosis" text  /*  */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "create_id" integer  /*  */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "inprec_state_id" integer  /*  */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: allergy_patient_allergy
-- 注释: 病人过敏记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "allergy_patient_allergy" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "allergy_number" text NOT NULL  /* 过敏编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "allergy_class_sys_code" integer  /* 过敏类别值域 */,
    "allergy_class_code" text  /* 过敏类别编号 */,
    "allergy_class_name" text  /* 过敏类别名称 */,
    "allergy_sys_code" integer  /* 过敏源值域 */,
    "allergy_code" text  /* 过敏源编码 */,
    "allergy_name" text NOT NULL  /* 过敏源名称 */,
    "allergy_symptom_code" text  /* 过敏症状编码 */,
    "allergy_symptom_name" text  /* 过敏症状名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "allergy_patient_allergy" IS '病人过敏记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ane_chart
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ane_chart" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "patient_ward_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "complication_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_method_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_method_name" character varying(500)  /*  */,

    "premedicate_effect" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "intraoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "intraoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "postoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "postoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "operation_burtsituation_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operation_burtsituation_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "createuser_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "doctor_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "doctor_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operator_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "assistant2_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "assistant3_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "assistant4_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_assistant_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_assistant_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,

    "flowvelocity" character varying(10)  /*  */,

    "user_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "blood_product_type" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "blood_amount" integer  /*  */,

    "instrumentnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /*  */,

    "scrubnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,

    "scrubnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name4" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "operator3_name" character varying(100)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: anes_quality_control
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "anes_quality_control" (
    "OPERATION_DATE" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "OPERATINGROOM_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ISEMERGENCY" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "patient_mrn" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PATIENT_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PATIENT_SEX" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PATIENT_AGE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PREOPERATIVE_DIAGNOSIS_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PLAN_OPERATION_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PATIENT_DEPARTMENT_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PATIENT_BED_CODE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "PATIENT_NUMBER" integer  /*  */,
    "DIAGNOSIS" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "OPERATION_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ANESTHETIST_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ANESTHESIA_METHOD_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "COMPLICATION_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "OPERATOR_TOTAL_NAME" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ANESTHESIA_EFFECT" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ASA" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ID" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "ISDELETE" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ISCHECKED" character varying(255)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("ID")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: anesthesia_record
-- 注释: 麻醉记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "anesthesia_record" (
    "anesthesia_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(48) NOT NULL  /* 源麻醉记录编号  */,
    "urine_volume" numeric(12,4)  /* 尿量 */,
    "blood_lossed" numeric(12,4)  /* 出血量 */,
    "asa_grade" character varying(50)  /* asa分级 */,
    "surgical_position_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术体位代码 */,
    "surgical_position" character varying(50)  /* 手术体位 */,
    "is_fasting" character varying(50)  /* 是否术前禁食 */,
    "fore_diag_id" integer  /* 术前诊断编号 */,
    "fore_diag_code" character varying(200)  /* 术前诊断代码 */,
    "fore_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 术前诊断名称 */,
    "intend_operation_id" integer  /* 拟施手术编号 */,
    "intend_operation_code" character varying(200)  /* 拟施手术代码 */,
    "intend_operation_name" character varying(100)  /* 拟施手术名称 */,
    "during_operation_id" integer  /* 术中手术编号 */,
    "during_operation_code" character varying(200)  /* 术中手术代码 */,
    "during_operation_name" character varying(100)  /* 术中手术名称 */,
    "breath_type" character varying(50)  /* 呼吸类型名称 */,
    "drug_before_anes" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉前用药 */,
    "anes_begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 麻醉开始时间 */,
    "anes_end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 麻醉结束时间 */,
    "anesthesia_type_id" integer  /* 麻醉方式编号 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" character varying(32)  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "anes_real_duation" numeric(12,4)  /* 麻醉实际用时(小时) */,
    "anesthesia_doc_id" integer  /* 麻醉医师编号 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医师代码 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医师姓名 */,
    "go_after_operation" character varying(50)  /* 术后去向 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("anesthesia_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "anesthesia_record" IS '麻醉记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: anestheticchart
-- 注释: 麻醉记录单
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "anestheticchart" (
    "id" numeric NOT NULL  /* 自动增长列（触发器、序列实现） */,
    "createdt" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间：触发器实现（自动） */,
    "isdelete" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 删除标识：0未删除，1已删除 */,
    "isemergency" numeric  /* 是否急诊：0非急诊，1急诊 */,
    "isautocreate" numeric  /* 记录创建：0手动，1自动 */,
    "ischecked" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 审核状态：0未审核，1已审核 */,
    "isfast" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 是否禁食：0未禁食，1禁食 */,
    "isprinted" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 打印状态：0未打印，1已打印 */,
    "isstartmonitor" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 数据采集：0未开启，1已开启 */,
    "operatenotice_id" numeric  /* 标识：本地手术通知单号（一个麻醉记录单对应一个手术通知单） */,
    "operationid" character varying(100)  /* 标识：HIS系统手术单号。是指从HIS系统导入手术通知单时取得的编号，标识唯一一次手术 */,
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /* 患者信息：病人id(系统唯一标识) */,
    "patient_name" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：病人姓名 */,
    "patient_number" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：住院号（住院一次一个号，唯一号，流水号） */,
    "patient_mrn" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：病案号;病历号（一个病人一个号） */,
    "patient_sex" character varying(20)  /* 患者信息：性别 */,
    "patient_birthday" timestamp without time zone  /* 患者信息：生日 */,
    "patient_department_code" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：科室代码 */,
    "patient_department_name" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：科室名称 */,
    "patient_ward_code" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：病房编码 */,
    "patient_ward_name" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：病房名称 */,
    "patient_bed_code" character varying(200)  /* 患者信息：床位号 */,
    "patient_bed_name" character varying(200)  /* 患者信息：床位 */,
    "patient_age" numeric  /* 患者信息：年龄 */,
    "patient_ageunit" character varying(10)  /* 患者信息：年龄单位 */,
    "patient_height" numeric  /* 患者信息：身高：cm */,
    "patient_weightstring" character varying(100)  /* 患者信息：体重：描述（卧床、……） */,
    "patient_weightvalue" numeric  /* 患者信息：体重：数值 单位：kg */,
    "patient_bloodtype" character varying(20)  /* 患者信息：血型 */,
    "diagnosis" character varying(4000)  /* 患者信息：诊断 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(500)  /* 手术信息：手术名称 */,
    "plan_operation_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：拟施手术代码 */,
    "plan_operation_name" character varying(500)  /* 手术信息：拟施手术名称 */,
    "operatingroom_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：手术间 代码 */,
    "operatingroom_name" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：手术间 名称 */,
    "operationlevel_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：已施手术等级代码 */,
    "operationlevel_name" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：已施手术等级名称 */,
    "operationposition_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：手术体位代码（允许多个） */,
    "operationposition_name" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：手术体位名称（允许多个） */,
    "complication_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：合并症;并发症代码 */,
    "complication_name" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：合并症;并发症 */,
    "anesthesia_method_code" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：麻醉方法代码 */,
    "anesthesia_method_name" character varying(500)  /* 手术信息：麻醉方法名称 */,
    "anesthesia_effect" character varying(100) DEFAULT 1  /* 手术信息：麻醉效果 */,
    "pca" character varying(100)  /* 手术信息：镇痛泵型号 */,
    "asa" character varying(10)  /* 手术信息：病情分级（I、II、III、IV、V、VI） */,
    "postoperativeplace" character varying(100) DEFAULT '病房'::character varying  /* 手术信息：术后去向;病人去向 */,
    "puncturepointname" character varying(100)  /* 插管：穿刺点 */,
    "intubationmode" character varying(100)  /* 插管：方式 */,
    "cathetercaliber" character varying(100)  /* 插管：管号;口径 */,
    "insertiondepth" character varying(100)  /* 插管：深度 */,
    "premedicate_code" character varying(100)  /* 术前：用药代码 */,
    "premedicate" character varying(500)  /* 术前：用药 */,
    "premedicate_effect" character varying(100)  /* 术前：用药效果 */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /* 术前：诊断代码 */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /* 术前：诊断名称 */,
    "intraoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /* 术中：诊断代码 */,
    "intraoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /* 术中：诊断名称 */,
    "postoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /* 术后：诊断代码 */,
    "postoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /* 术后：诊断名称 */,
    "operation_burtsituation_name" character varying(100)  /* 术毕：情况 */,
    "operation_burtsituation_code" character varying(100)  /* 术毕：情况代码 */,
    "createuser_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：创建记录的用户代码 */,
    "createuser_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：创建记录的用户名称 */,
    "doctor_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：主治医生代码 */,
    "doctor_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：主治医生姓名 */,
    "operator_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术医生;施术者 代码 */,
    "operator_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术医生;施术者 姓名 */,
    "preceptor_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：指导者 代码 */,
    "preceptor_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：指导者 姓名 */,
    "assistant1_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术助手1 代码 */,
    "assistant1_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术助手1 姓名 */,
    "assistant2_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术助手2 代码 */,
    "assistant2_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术助手2 姓名 */,
    "assistant3_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术助手3 代码 */,
    "assistant3_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术助手3 姓名 */,
    "assistant4_code" character varying(50)  /* 人员：手术助手4 代码 */,
    "assistant4_name" character varying(50)  /* 人员：手术助手4 姓名 */,
    "anesthetist_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：麻醉医生 代码 */,
    "anesthetist_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：麻醉医生 姓名 */,
    "anesthetist_assistant_code" character varying(50)  /* 人员：麻醉助手 代码 */,
    "anesthetist_assistant_name" character varying(50)  /* 人员：麻醉助手 姓名 */,
    "circulatingnurse_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：巡回护士 代码 */,
    "circulatingnurse_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：巡回护士 姓名 */,
    "instrumentnurse_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：器械护士 代码 */,
    "instrumentnurse_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：器械护士 姓名 */,
    "scrubnurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 人员：洗手术士代码 */,
    "scrubnurse_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：洗手护士名称 */,
    "checker_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：审核者 代码 */,
    "checker_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：审核者 姓名 */,
    "operator_user_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：最后修改记录的用户代码 */,
    "operator_user_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：最后修改记录的用户名称 */,
    "signature" character varying(100)  /* 人员：签名 */,
    "operationdate" timestamp without time zone  /* 日期：手术日期 */,
    "accesstime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：进入手术间 */,
    "anesthesia_begintime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：麻醉开始 */,
    "operation_begintime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：手术开始 */,
    "operation_endtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：手术结束 */,
    "anesthesia_endtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：麻醉结束 */,
    "leavetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：离开手术间 */,
    "intubate_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：插管 */,
    "extubation_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：拔管 */,
    "cutskin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：切皮 */,
    "anesthesiainduction_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：麻醉诱导 */,
    "print_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：打印时间 */,
    "vs_temperaturevalue" character varying(50)  /* 生命体征：体温 */,
    "vs_pulsevalue" character varying(50)  /* 生命体征：脉搏 */,
    "vs_bloodpressurevalue" character varying(50)  /* 生命体征：血压 */,
    "vs_respvalue" character varying(50)  /* 生命体征：呼吸频率 */,
    "monitorinterval" numeric  /* 数据采集：时间间隔（从第一次采集的数据中获取） */,
    "monitoritem_code" character varying(100)  /* 监测项目：代码 */,
    "monitoritem" character varying(999)  /* 监测项目：名称 */,
    "printer_code" character varying(100)  /* 打印：打印者 代码 */,
    "printer_name" character varying(100)  /* 打印：打印者 姓名 */,
    "print_number" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 打印：打印次数 */,
    "print_pdfpath" character varying(100)  /* 打印：文件存储在服务器上的路径 */,
    "analgesicmethod" character varying(100)  /* 镇痛：镇痛方式 */,
    "venouschannel" character varying(100)  /* 镇痛：静脉通路 */,
    "medicinebagstotal" character varying(10)  /* 镇痛：药袋总量 */,
    "flowvelocity" character varying(10)  /* 镇痛：每小时流速 */,
    "pcavalue" character varying(10)  /* 镇痛：PCA量 */,
    "lockingtime" character varying(10) DEFAULT NULL::character varying  /* 镇痛：锁定时间 */,
    "pca_number" character varying(30)  /* 镇痛泵编号 */,
    "pca_pullout_operator" character varying(20)  /* 拔泵者 */,
    "pca_pullout_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 拔泵时间 */,
    "operation_plan_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 手术准备开始时间(预约时间) */,
    "pca_leavel" character varying(20) DEFAULT 'PICA'::character varying  /* 镇痛方式 */,
    "operator_total_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：所有手术医生代码集合（包括手术医生、助手、指导者） */,
    "operator_total_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：所有手术医生姓名集合（包括手术医生、助手、指导者） */,
    "patient_identity" character varying(50) DEFAULT '医保'::character varying  /* 费别：农保、职工、自费、医保 */,
    "score" character varying(10) DEFAULT 10  /* 评分 */,
    "isqualified" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 是否合格（否0，是1） */,
    "user_code" character varying(100)  /* 新建、和编辑数据的用户代码 */,
    "user_name" character varying(100)  /* 新建、和编辑数据的用户名称 */,
    "doctor_arrivaltime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：医生到达 */,
    "accesstime_recovery_room" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：进入恢复室;苏醒室 */,
    "leavetime_recovery_room" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：离开恢复室;苏醒室 */,
    "accesstime_operationarea" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：入手术区 */,
    "leavetime_operationarea" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：离开手术区 */,
    "lastedit_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：最后一次编辑 */,
    "sortno" numeric  /* 手术信息：台次 */,
    "antibiotic_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：抗生素 */,
    "handover_before" character varying(50)  /* 交班者 */,
    "handover_next" character varying(50)  /* 接班者 */,
    "handover_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 交接时间 */,
    "antibiotic_reason" character varying(200)  /* 使用抗生素原因 */,
    "preoperative_info" character varying(200)  /* 术前特殊情况 */,
    "handover_info" character varying(200)  /* 交接班内容 */,
    "notice_transfer_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：通知接人入手术区时间 */,
    "leaveroom1" character varying(20)  /* 离室情况1 */,
    "leaveroom2" character varying(20)  /* 离室情况2 */,
    "leaveroom3" character varying(20)  /* 离室情况3 */,
    "comeroom" character varying(20)  /* 入室情况 */,
    "classification" character varying(20)  /* 切口分类 */,
    "anesthesia_kind_code" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉方法大类编码 */,
    "anesthesia_kind_name" character varying(500)  /* 麻醉方法大类名称 */,
    "operatingdept_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术科室代码 */,
    "operatingdept_name" character varying(100)  /* 手术科室名称 */,
    "anesthesiologists" character varying(10)  /* 手术信息：麻醉分级（I、II、III、IV） */,
    "istwo_plan_operation" numeric  /* 非计划二次手术：0否；1是 */,
    "ischanged_anesthesia" numeric  /* 术中麻醉方式更改：0否；1是 */,
    "isheart_operation" numeric  /* 是否心脏手术 */,
    "using_ecmo" numeric  /* 是否使用体外循环机 */,
    "plan_anesthesia_method_name" character varying(500)  /* 拟施麻醉方法 */,
    "operationcategories_name" character varying(150)  /* 手术类别编码名称 */,
    "antibacterial_name" character varying(150)  /* I类切口使用抗菌药物情况  */,
    "preservative_name" character varying(150)  /* I类切口使用抗菌药物情况之预防用药情况  */,
    "operationcategories_code" character varying(10)  /* 手术类别编码 */,
    "antibacterial_code" character varying(10)  /* I类切口使用抗菌药物情况编码 */,
    "preservative_code" character varying(10)  /* I类切口使用抗菌药物情况之预防用药情况编码 */,
    "antibacterial_order" character varying(500)  /* 抗菌药医嘱信息 */,
    "cleaningstaff" character varying(100)  /* 清洁人员 */,
    "sterilization_begintime" timestamp without time zone  /* 消毒起始时间 */,
    "sterilization_endtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 消毒结束时间 */,
    "anesthetic_template_code" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉单模板编码 */,
    "change_ac_cause_name" character varying(200)  /* 变更麻醉方法原因 */,
    "change_ac_cause_code" character varying(100)  /* 变更麻醉方法原因编码 */,
    "aortic_clamping_begin" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：主动脉阻断开始 */,
    "aortic_clamping_end" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：主动脉阻断结束 */,
    "cpb_begin" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：体外循环开始 */,
    "cpb_end" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：体外循环结束 */,
    "blood_go_where" character varying(100)  /* 剩血去向 */,
    "blood_product_type" character varying(100)  /* 血制品类型 */,
    "blood_amount" numeric  /* 剩血量 */,
    "blood_go_where2" character varying(100)  /* 剩血去向2 */,
    "blood_product_type2" character varying(100)  /* 血制品类型2 */,
    "blood_amount2" numeric  /* 剩血量2 */,
    "transfusion_cause_name" character varying(200)  /* 输血原因名称 */,
    "transfusion_cause_code" character varying(50)  /* 输血原因编码 */,
    "postoperative_analgesia" character varying(50)  /* 有无术后镇痛：有；无； */,
    "operator_other" character varying(200)  /* 其他手术医生 */,
    "anesthetist_other" character varying(200)  /* 其他麻醉医生 */,
    "circulatingnurse_other" character varying(200)  /* 其他巡回护士 */,
    "instrumentnurse_other" character varying(200)  /* 其他器械护士 */,
    "verifying_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：三方核查时间 */,
    "bp_flag" numeric DEFAULT '-1'::integer  /* 血压采集设置标志 */,
    "difficult_airway" numeric  /* 是否困难气道 */,
    "roarcover_endtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：拔出喉罩 */,
    "roarcover_begintime" timestamp without time zone  /* 时间：置入喉罩 */,
    "perfusion_doctor" character varying(200)  /* 灌注医师姓名 */,
    "circulating_anesthetist_code" character varying(100)  /* 巡台麻醉医师编码 */,
    "circulating_anesthetist_name" character varying(100)  /* 巡台麻醉医师姓名 */,
    "plan_recovery_blood" character varying(50)  /* 未按计划使用回收自体血 */,
    "plan_storage__blood" character varying(50)  /* 未按计划使用存储式自体血 */,
    "allergy" character varying(100)  /* 过敏史 */,
    "anesthetist_code1" character varying(50)  /* 主麻编码 */,
    "anesthetist_name1" character varying(100)  /* 主麻姓名 */,
    "anesthetist_code2" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生1编码 */,
    "anesthetist_name2" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉医生1姓名 */,
    "anesthetist_code3" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生2编码 */,
    "anesthetist_name3" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉医生2姓名 */,
    "anesthetist_code4" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生3编码 */,
    "anesthetist_name4" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉医生3姓名 */,
    "anesthetist_code5" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生4编码 */,
    "anesthetist_name5" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉医生4姓名 */,
    "instrumentnurse_code1" character varying(50)  /* 器械护士1编码 */,
    "instrumentnurse_name1" character varying(100)  /* 器械护士1姓名 */,
    "instrumentnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /* 器械护士2编码 */,
    "instrumentnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /* 器械护士2姓名 */,
    "instrumentnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /* 器械护士3编码 */,
    "instrumentnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /* 器械护士3姓名 */,
    "instrumentnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /* 器械护士4编码 */,
    "instrumentnurse_name4" character varying(100)  /* 器械护士4姓名 */,
    "circulatingnurse_code1" character varying(50)  /* 巡回护士1编码 */,
    "circulatingnurse_name1" character varying(100)  /* 巡回护士1姓名 */,
    "circulatingnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /* 巡回护士2编码 */,
    "circulatingnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /* 巡回护士2姓名 */,
    "circulatingnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /* 巡回护士3编码 */,
    "circulatingnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /* 巡回护士3姓名 */,
    "scrubnurse_code1" character varying(50)  /* 洗手护士1编码 */,
    "scrubnurse_name1" character varying(100)  /* 洗手护士1姓名 */,
    "scrubnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /* 洗手护士2编码 */,
    "scrubnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /* 洗手护士2姓名 */,
    "scrubnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /* 洗手护士3编码 */,
    "scrubnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /* 洗手护士3姓名 */,
    "scrubnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /* 洗手护士4编码 */,
    "scrubnurse_name4" character varying(100)  /* 洗手护士4名称 */,
    "scrubnurse_other" character varying(200)  /* 其他洗手护士 */,
    "poison_anaesthetic" character varying(200)  /* 毒麻药信息 */,
    "patient_num_count" numeric  /* 住院次数 */,
    "time_checked" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "patient_visit_no" character varying(100)  /* 患者就诊号 */,
    "patient_rh" character varying(10)  /* 患者RH血型 */,
    "scheduling_id" character varying(100)  /* 排班ID */,
    "isconfirm" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 手术确认：0未确认，1已确认 */,
    "operation_type" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 手术类型：0住院手术、1日间手术 */,
    "circulatingnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /* 巡回护士4编码 */,
    "circulatingnurse_name4" character varying(100)  /* 巡回护士4姓名 */,
    "operator2_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术医生2;施术者 代码 */,
    "operator2_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术医生2;施术者 姓名 */,
    "operator3_code" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术医生3;施术者 代码 */,
    "operator3_name" character varying(100)  /* 人员：手术医生3;施术者 姓名 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "anestheticchart" IS '麻醉记录单';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: antibiotic_result
-- 注释: 药敏结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "antibiotic_result" (
    "antibiotic_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 药敏结果编号 */,
    "source_result_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统结果编号 */,
    "bacteria_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 细菌结果编号 */,
    "drug_id" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_code" character varying(50)  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 药品名称 */,
    "test_result_code" character varying(5) NOT NULL  /* 药敏结果代码 */,
    "test_result_name" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 药敏结果名称 */,
    "mic" character varying(50)  /* 最低抑菌浓度 */,
    "text_value" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文本结果（打印结果） */,
    "sort_no" character varying(10)  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "antibiotic_method_id" integer  /* 药敏方法编号 */,
    "antibiotic_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 药敏方法代码 */,
    "antibiotic_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 药敏方法名称 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "antibiotic_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 药敏项目（药品）森亿标准编码 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("antibiotic_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "antibiotic_result" IS '药敏结果';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: antimicrobial_drugs_purchase
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "antimicrobial_drugs_purchase" (
    "rkrq" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "ypmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "spmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "sxmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "yfgg" character varying  /*  */,
    "bfgg" character varying  /*  */,
    "rksl" integer  /*  */,
    "yfdw" character varying  /*  */,
    "lsje" numeric  /*  */,
    "cdqc" character varying  /*  */

);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: automatic_discharge_or_transfer_notice
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "automatic_discharge_or_transfer_notice" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "discharge_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 出院诊断 */,
    "other_discharge_risks" text NOT NULL  /* 其他出院风险 */,
    "new_technology_and_new_project_flag" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 新技术新项目标记 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "relationship_between_family_members_and_patient" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属与病人关系 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|

    "diagnose_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "maindiag_code1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "maindiag_name1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name5" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code5" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code6" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name6" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code7" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name7" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code8" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name8" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code9" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name9" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_code10" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "diag_name10" character varying(50)  /*  */,

    "record_status" character varying(50)  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: b14_1_门诊医嘱处方记录
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "b14_1_门诊医嘱处方记录" (
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_sn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_card_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "outpatient_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_times" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_sn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "request_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_given_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "visit_dept_code" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "visit_dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_dept_name" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "order_doctor_no" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "technical_title" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "job_title" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "executive_dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "executive_dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "prescription_class_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "prescription_class_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_class_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_class_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_item_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_item_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_group_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dose" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dose_unit" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "form" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "spec" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "frequency_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "frequency" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "administration_route" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "liquid_configuration" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "injection_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_order" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_compatibility" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "infusion_duration" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "days_of_medication" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "total_dose" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "total_dose_unit" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "num_of_orders" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "num_of_orders_unit" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "order_note" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "herbal_note" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_flag" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "manufac" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "trade_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "prescription_fee_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "prescription_status" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "prescription_fee_status" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "extend_data1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "extend_data2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "record_status" character varying(50)  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: bacteria_result
-- 注释: 细菌结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "bacteria_result" (
    "bacteria_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "source_result_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统结果编号 */,
    "bacteria_id" integer  /* 细菌项目编号 */,
    "bacteria_code" character varying(50)  /* 细菌项目代码 */,
    "bacteria_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 细菌项目名称 */,
    "colony_counting" character varying(20)  /* 菌落计数 */,
    "text_value" character varying(500)  /* 文本结果（打印结果） */,
    "sort_no" character varying(10)  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "is_positive" boolean  /* 是否阳性 */,
    "antibiotic_method_id" integer  /* 药敏方法编号 */,
    "antibiotic_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 药敏方法代码 */,
    "antibiotic_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 药敏方法名称 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "bacteria_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 微生物检验小项森亿标准编码 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("bacteria_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "bacteria_result" IS '细菌结果';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: badness_incident_report
-- 注释: 不良事件报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "badness_incident_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "nurse_level_id" integer  /* 护理级别编号 */,
    "nurse_level_code" character varying(50)  /* 护理级别代码 */,
    "nurse_level_name" character varying(20)  /* 护理级别名称 */,
    "class_id" integer  /* 不良事件类别编号 */,
    "class_code" character varying(50)  /* 不良事件类别代码 */,
    "class_name" character varying(20)  /* 不良事件类别名称 */,
    "report_state_id" integer  /* 上报状态编号 */,
    "report_state_code" character varying(50)  /* 上报状态代码 */,
    "report_state_name" character varying(10)  /* 上报状态名称 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 上报时间 */,
    "report_dept_id" integer  /* 上报科室编号 */,
    "report_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 上报科室代码 */,
    "report_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 上报科室名称 */,
    "report_ward_id" integer  /* 上报病区编号 */,
    "report_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 上报病区代码 */,
    "report_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 上报病区名称 */,
    "report_nurse_id" integer  /* 床位护士编号 */,
    "report_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位护士代码 */,
    "report_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 床位护士姓名 */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 责任护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "happen_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 发生时间 */,
    "happen_address" character varying(100)  /* 发生地点 */,
    "happen_reason" text  /* 发生原因 */,
    "note" text  /* 事件描述 */,
    "nursing_method" text  /* 护理措施及处理方法 */,
    "head_nurse_id" integer  /* 护士长编号 */,
    "head_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 护士长代码 */,
    "head_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 护士长姓名 */,
    "head_nurse_record" text  /* 护士长记录 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_id" integer  /* 科护士长工号 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 科护士长代码 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 科护士长姓名 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_record" text  /* 科护士长记录 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "happen_num" integer  /* 发生次数 */,
    "harm_level" character varying(10)  /* 伤害程度 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "badness_incident_report" IS '不良事件报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: bi_outpatient_appointment
-- 注释: 门诊预约主题
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "bi_outpatient_appointment" (
    "book_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 预约编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_appointment_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统预约编号 */,
    "source_visit_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统就诊编号 */,
    "source_patient_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(10)  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20)  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" integer  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "age_group_code" character varying(10)  /* 年龄段代码 */,
    "age_group_name" character varying(10)  /* 年龄段名称 */,
    "patient_type_code" character varying(10)  /* 患者类型代码 */,
    "patient_type_name" character varying(10)  /* 患者类型名称 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(10)  /* 患者费别/结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 患者费别/结算类别名称 */,
    "address" character varying(100)  /* 病人地址 */,
    "country" character varying(50)  /* 病人所属国家 */,
    "province" character varying(50)  /* 病人所属省份 */,
    "city" character varying(50)  /* 病人所属城市 */,
    "district" character varying(50)  /* 病人所属区域 */,
    "profession_code" character varying(10)  /* 患者职业代码 */,
    "profession_name" character varying(20)  /* 患者职业名称 */,
    "book_way_code" character varying(10)  /* 预约方式代码 */,
    "book_way_name" character varying(20)  /* 预约方式名称 */,
    "book_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 预约操作时间 */,
    "appointment_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 预约就诊时间 */,
    "source_appointment_time" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统预约就诊时间段 */,
    "reg_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 挂号时间 */,
    "book_class_code" character varying(10)  /* 预约类别代码 */,
    "book_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 预约类别名称 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(10)  /* 预约科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(20)  /* 预约科室名称 */,
    "doc_code" character varying(10)  /* 预约医生代码 */,
    "doc_name" character varying(20)  /* 预约医生名称 */,
    "book_num" integer  /* 预约次数 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "bi_outpatient_appointment" IS '门诊预约主题';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: biobank_patient_sample
-- 注释: 患者样本信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "biobank_patient_sample" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_sample_number" text  /* 样本编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sample_group_no" text  /* 样本组序号 */,
    "sample_class_sys_code" integer  /* 样本类别字典 */,
    "sample_class_code" text  /* 样本类别编码 */,
    "sample_class_name" text  /* 样本类别名称 */,
    "sample_sys_code" integer  /* 样本字典 */,
    "sample_code" text  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" text  /* 样本名称 */,
    "qty" text  /* 数量 */,
    "remained_qty" text  /* 剩余数量 */,
    "description" text  /* 样本描述 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 部门字典 */,
    "create_oper_code" text  /* 建档者代码 */,
    "create_oper_name" text  /* 建档者姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "sample_oper_code" text  /* 样本采集者代码 */,
    "sample_oper_name" text  /* 建档者姓名 */,
    "sample_time" text  /* 样本采集时间 */,
    "sample_dept_code" text  /* 样本采集科室代码 */,
    "sample_dept_name" text  /* 样本采集科室名称 */,
    "update_time" text  /* 更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" text NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "unit_code" text  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" text  /* 单位名称 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "biobank_patient_sample" IS '患者样本信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: biobank_patient_simple_location
-- 注释: 患者样本存放位置
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "biobank_patient_simple_location" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序列，自增号 */,
    "patient_sample_number" text  /* 患者样本编号  */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "sample_location_number" text  /* 源系统样本位置编号  */,
    "location" text  /* 标本存放位置 */,
    "box_laction_sys_code" integer  /* 盒子位置字典 */,
    "box_laction_code" text  /* 盒子位置代码 */,
    "box_laction_name" text  /* 盒子位置名称 */,
    "box_coordinate" text  /* 盒子坐标点 */,
    "rfid_tag" text  /* rfid标签 */,
    "barcode_tag" text  /* 盒子条码号 */,
    "update_time" text  /* 更新时间 */,
    "output_time" text  /* 领用时间 */,
    "is_valid" text NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "biobank_patient_simple_location" IS '患者样本存放位置';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: biobank_sample_class
-- 注释: 样本类别字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "biobank_sample_class" (
    "sample_class_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 样本类别编号，自增号 */,
    "sample_class_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 样本类别代码 */,
    "sample_class_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 样本类别名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "std_class_id" integer  /* 基准分类编号 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("sample_class_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "biobank_sample_class" IS '样本类别字典';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: biobank_simple_location
-- 注释: 样本存放位置字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "biobank_simple_location" (
    "location_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 样本存放位置编号，自增号 */,
    "location_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 样本存放位置代码 */,
    "location_name" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 样本存放位置名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "parent_location_id" integer  /* 上级位置编号 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "biobank_simple_location" IS '样本存放位置字典';
