|-- ========================================
-- 表名: blood_apply
-- 注释: 输血申请单
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "blood_apply" (
    "blood_apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增列 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_blood_apply_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始输血申请单编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_code" character varying(1)  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" character varying(10)  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "transfusion_aim" character varying(100)  /* 输血目的 */,
    "transfusion_plan_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 预定输血日期 */,
    "apply_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 申请日期 */,
    "apply_user_id" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 申请人标识 */,
    "creation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "creation_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 创建人标识 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 最后修改人标识 */,
    "audit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "audit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 审核人标识 */,
    "audit_remark" character varying(500)  /* 审核备注 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型，默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "height" character varying(10)  /* 身高 */,
    "weight" character varying(10)  /* 体重 */,
    "pressure_high" character varying(10)  /* 收缩压 */,
    "pressure_low" character varying(10)  /* 舒张压 */,
    "temperature" character varying(10)  /* 体温 */,
    "pulse" character varying(10)  /* 脉搏 */,
    "blood_mark" boolean  /* 采血标记 */,
    "blood_place" character varying(200)  /* 输血地点 */,
    "blood_nature" character varying(200)  /* 输血性质 */,
    "is_urgent" boolean  /* 加急标志 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(200)  /* 病史信息 */,
    "blood_history" character varying(200)  /* 输血史 */,
    "blood_reaction_history" character varying(1000)  /* 输血反应史 */,
    "allergy_history" character varying(1000)  /* 药物过敏史 */,
    "gravidity" character varying(30)  /* 孕次 */,
    "parity" character varying(10)  /* 产次 */,
    "blood_volume" character varying(10)  /* 输血量 */,
    "blood_volume_unit" character varying(10)  /* 输血单位 */,
    "apply_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请用血项目名称 */,
    "apply_number" integer  /* 申请数量 */,
    "use_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 用血时间 */,
    "sign_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 签收时间 */,
    "match_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 配血时间 */,
    "bloodlette_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 发血时间 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_state" character varying(10)  /* 申请状态 */,
    "sign_state" character varying(10)  /* 签收状态 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("blood_apply_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "blood_apply" IS '输血申请单';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: blood_cases
-- 注释: 输血病案表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "blood_cases" (
    "blood_cases_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增列 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_blood_cases_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的病案编号 */,
    "blood_apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */,
    "first_blood_transfusion_sttime" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 第一袋血输血开始时间 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "creation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "creation_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 创建人标识 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 最后修改人标识 */,
    "audit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "audit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 审核人标识 */,
    "audit_remark" character varying(500)  /* 审核备注 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型，默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("blood_cases_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "blood_cases" IS '输血病案表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: blood_match_record
-- 注释: 配血记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "blood_match_record" (
    "blood_match_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增列 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_blood_match_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始配血记录编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /* 患者ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /* 患者ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_code" character varying(1)  /* 患者RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" character varying(10)  /* 患者RH血型名称 */,
    "blood_bag_abo_code" character varying(1)  /* 血袋ABO血型代码 */,
    "blood_bag_abo_name" character varying(10)  /* 血袋ABO血型名称 */,
    "blood_bag_rh_code" character varying(1)  /* 血袋RH血型代码 */,
    "blood_bag_rh_name" character varying(10)  /* 血袋RH血型名称 */,
    "blood_pro_comp" character varying(100)  /* 血制品成分 */,
    "blood_bag_number" character varying(30)  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "blood_bag_effect_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 血袋有效日期 */,
    "match_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 配血时间 */,
    "blood_trans_type" character varying(50)  /* 输血类型 */,
    "match_method" character varying(50)  /* 配血方法 */,
    "apply_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 申请人标识 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "match_doc_id" integer  /* 配血医生编号 */,
    "match_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 配血医生代码 */,
    "match_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 配血医生名称 */,
    "confirm_doc_id" integer  /* 审核医生编号 */,
    "confirm_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核医生代码 */,
    "confirm_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核医生名称 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_internal_qc" boolean  /* 是否室内质控 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("blood_match_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "blood_match_record" IS '配血记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: blood_reaction
-- 注释: 输血不良反应报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "blood_reaction" (
    "blood_reaction_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增列 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_blood_reaction_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的编号 */,
    "blood_apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */,
    "blood_bag_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "adverse_reaction" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 不良反应现象 */,
    "cause" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 原因 */,
    "reaction_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 不良反应发生时间 */,
    "report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "report_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 报告人标识 */,
    "report_dept_id" integer  /* 报告科室编号 */,
    "report_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告科室代码 */,
    "report_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 报告科室名称 */,
    "report_ward_id" integer  /* 报告病区编号 */,
    "report_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告病区代码 */,
    "report_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 报告病区名称 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型，默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "blood_pro_comp" character varying(100)  /* 血制品成分 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("blood_reaction_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "blood_reaction" IS '输血不良反应报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: blood_transfusion_record
-- 注释: 用血记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "blood_transfusion_record" (
    "blood_transfusion_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据序号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_code" character varying(1)  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" character varying(10)  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "transfusion_history_flag" boolean  /* 输血史标志 */,
    "transfusion_nature_id" integer  /* 输血性质编号 */,
    "transfusion_nature_code" character varying(50)  /* 输血性质代码 */,
    "transfusion_nature_name" character varying(20)  /* 输血性质名称 */,
    "transfusion_aim" character varying(100)  /* 输血目的 */,
    "apply_abo_code" character varying(1)  /* 申请ABO血型代码 */,
    "apply_abo_name" character varying(10)  /* 申请ABO血型名称 */,
    "apply_rh_code" character varying(1)  /* 申请RH血型代码 */,
    "apply_rh_name" character varying(10)  /* 申请RH血型名称 */,
    "blood_type_id" integer  /* 血液成分编号 */,
    "blood_type_code" character varying(50)  /* 输血成分代码 */,
    "blood_type_name" character varying(30)  /* 血液成分名称 */,
    "transfusion_num" smallint  /* 输血次数 */,
    "blood_bag_id" character varying(50)  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "transfusion_amount" character varying(10)  /* 输血量 */,
    "transfusion_amount_unit" character varying(10)  /* 输血量单位 */,
    "transfusion_process_record" text  /* 输血过程记录 */,
    "transfusion_time" date  /* 输血日期 */,
    "transfusion_reaction_flag" smallint  /* 输血反应 */,
    "transfusion_reaction_type" character varying(20)  /* 输血反应类型 */,
    "transfusion_reaction_note" text  /* 输血反应描述 */,
    "sign_doc_id" integer  /* 签名医生编号 */,
    "sign_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 签名医生代码 */,
    "sign_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 签名医生姓名 */,
    "sign_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 签名时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "blood_apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("blood_transfusion_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "blood_transfusion_record" IS '用血记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: blood_transfusion_therapy_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "blood_transfusion_therapy_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "current_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 当前诊断 */,
    "blood_transfusion_purpose" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 输血目的 */,
    "blood_transfusion_component" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 输血成分 */,
    "blood_transfusion_application_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单号 */,
    "blood_transfusion_history" text NOT NULL  /* 输血史 */,
    "is_patient_agree_with_medical_measures" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 患者是否同意医疗措施标记 0:否 ; 1:是  ;  */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|

);

,

);

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cardiac_catheterization_and_treatment_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cardiac_catheterization_and_treatment_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "current_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 当前诊断 */,
    "planned_interventional_examination_or_operation_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 拟行介入检查(手术)术名称 */,
    "other_intraoperative_injuries" text NOT NULL  /* 术中损伤其他情况 */,
    "medical_accidents_and_other_complications" text NOT NULL  /* 医疗意外及并发症其他情况 */,
    "alternative_diagnosis_and_treatment" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 可替代的诊疗方式 */,
    "is_patient_agree_with_medical_measures" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 患者是否同意医疗措施标记 0:否 ; 1:是   */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "patient_guardian_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者监护人签名 */,
    "patient_guardian_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者监护人签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_tel" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属联系电话 */,
    "patient_family_id_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属身份证号 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_baby
-- 注释: 病案婴儿表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_baby" (
    "case_baby_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "baby_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 婴儿姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "height" integer  /* 身长 (单位 cm) */,
    "weight" integer  /* 体重 (单位 g) */,
    "delivery_mode_code" integer  /* 分娩方式编号 */,
    "delivery_mode_name" character varying(10)  /* 分娩方式名称 */,
    "birth_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 出生时间 */,
    "birth_weight" integer  /* 出生体重 (单位 g) */,
    "in_weight" integer  /* 入院体重 (单位 g) */,
    "father_name" character varying(50)  /* 父亲姓名 */,
    "father_idno" character varying(20)  /* 父亲身份证号 */,
    "mother_name" character varying(50)  /* 母亲姓名 */,
    "mother_idno" character varying(20)  /* 母亲身份证号 */,
    "fetus_num" smallint  /* 胎次 */,
    "parity_num" smallint  /* 产次 */,
    "ch" boolean  /* CH 甲低 */,
    "pku" boolean  /* PKU */,
    "listening" boolean  /* 听力 */,
    "cah" boolean  /* CAH */,
    "g6pd" boolean  /* G6PD */,
    "is_die" boolean  /* 七日死亡 */,
    "die_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 死亡时间 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断代码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("case_baby_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_baby" IS '病案婴儿表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_baby_ct
-- 注释: 病案婴儿变更表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_baby_ct" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "case_baby_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案婴儿编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "baby_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 婴儿姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "height" integer  /* 身长 (单位 cm) */,
    "weight" integer  /* 体重 (单位 g) */,
    "delivery_mode_code" integer  /* 分娩方式编号 */,
    "delivery_mode_name" character varying(10)  /* 分娩方式名称 */,
    "birth_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 出生时间 */,
    "birth_weight" integer  /* 出生体重 (单位 g) */,
    "in_weight" integer  /* 入院体重 (单位 g) */,
    "father_name" character varying(50)  /* 父亲姓名 */,
    "father_idno" character varying(20)  /* 父亲身份证号 */,
    "mother_name" character varying(50)  /* 母亲姓名 */,
    "mother_idno" character varying(20)  /* 母亲身份证号 */,
    "fetus_num" smallint  /* 胎次 */,
    "parity_num" smallint  /* 产次 */,
    "ch" boolean  /* CH 甲低 */,
    "pku" boolean  /* PKU */,
    "listening" boolean  /* 听力 */,
    "cah" boolean  /* CAH */,
    "g6pd" boolean  /* G6PD */,
    "is_die" boolean  /* 七日死亡 */,
    "die_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 死亡时间 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断代码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "opt_type" character varying(10)  /* 操作类型 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_baby_ct" IS '病案婴儿变更表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_base
-- 注释: 病案首页
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_base" (
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_case_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统病案号 */,
    "health_card_no" character varying(20)  /* 健康卡号 */,
    "medical_payment_id" integer  /* 医疗付费方式编号 */,
    "medical_payment_code" character varying(20)  /* 医疗付费式代码 */,
    "medical_payment_name" character varying(20)  /* 医疗付费方式名称 */,
    "in_num" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院次数 */,
    "case_no" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 病案号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "country_code" character varying(3)  /* 国籍代码 */,
    "country_name" character varying(50)  /* 国籍名称 */,
    "birth_address" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址 */,
    "birth_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 出生地址行政区代码 */,
    "birth_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "birth_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "birth_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址县（区） */,
    "birth_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "birth_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "birth_address_house_no" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-门牌号码 */,
    "native_place" character varying(20)  /* 籍贯 */,
    "nation_code" character varying(2)  /* 民族代码 */,
    "nation_name" character varying(50)  /* 民族名称 */,
    "idno" character varying(50)  /* 身份证号 */,
    "profession_id" integer  /* 职业编号 */,
    "profession_code" character varying(50)  /* 职业代码 */,
    "profession" character varying(50)  /* 职业 */,
    "marriage_code" character varying(2)  /* 婚姻状况 */,
    "marriage_name" character varying(20)  /* 婚姻名称 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */,
    "home_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 家庭地址行政区代码 */,
    "home_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "home_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "home_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-县（区） */,
    "home_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "home_address_vllage" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "home_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-门牌号码 */,
    "home_phone" character varying(20)  /* 家庭电话 */,
    "home_zip" character varying(6)  /* 家庭邮编 */,
    "account_address" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址 */,
    "account_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 户口地址行政区代码 */,
    "account_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "account_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "account_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-县（区） */,
    "account_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "account_address_vllage" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "account_address_house_no" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-门牌号码 */,
    "work_address" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址 */,
    "work_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 工作单位行政区代码 */,
    "work_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "work_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "work_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-县（区） */,
    "work_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "work_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "work_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-门牌号码 */,
    "work_phone" character varying(20)  /* 工作单位电话 */,
    "work_zip" character varying(6)  /* 工作单位邮编 */,
    "contact_name" character varying(50)  /* 联系人姓名 */,
    "contact_relation_id" integer  /* 联系人关系编号 */,
    "contact_relation_code" character varying(10)  /* 联系人关系代码 */,
    "contact_relation_name" character varying(20)  /* 联系人关系名称 */,
    "contact_phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系人电话 */,
    "contact_address" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址 */,
    "contact_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 联系人地址行政区代码 */,
    "contact_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "contact_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "contact_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-县（区） */,
    "contact_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "contact_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "contact_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-门牌号码 */,
    "contact_zip" character varying(6)  /* 联系邮编 */,
    "in_source_id" integer  /* 入院途径编号 */,
    "in_source_code" character varying(10)  /* 入院途径代码 */,
    "in_source_name" character varying(10)  /* 入院途径名称 */,
    "come_from" character varying(100)  /* 转来医院 */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院时间 */,
    "in_diag_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院确诊日期 */,
    "in_state" character varying(10)  /* 入院病情 */,
    "in_dept_id" integer  /* 入院科室编号 */,
    "in_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院科室代码 */,
    "in_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 入院科室名称 */,
    "in_ward_id" integer  /* 入院病区编号 */,
    "in_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院病区代码 */,
    "in_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 入院病区名称 */,
    "shift_depts" character varying(200)  /* 转科信息 */,
    "out_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 出院时间 */,
    "out_dept_id" integer  /* 出院科室编号 */,
    "out_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 出院科室代码 */,
    "out_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 出院科室名称 */,
    "out_ward_id" integer  /* 出院病区编号 */,
    "out_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 出院病区代码 */,
    "out_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 出院病区名称 */,
    "in_days" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院天数 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 门诊诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 门诊诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 门诊诊断名称 */,
    "in_diag_id" integer  /* 入院诊断编号 */,
    "in_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院诊断代码 */,
    "in_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 入院诊断名称 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "allergy_flag" boolean  /* 药物过敏 */,
    "allergy_name1" character varying(50)  /* 过敏药物名称1 */,
    "allergy_name2" character varying(50)  /* 过敏药物名称2 */,
    "allergy_name3" character varying(50)  /* 过敏药物名称3 */,
    "dead_date" date  /* 死亡日期 */,
    "dead_reason" character varying(50)  /* 死亡原因 */,
    "body_check" boolean  /* 死亡尸检 */,
    "dead_kind" character varying(20)  /* 死亡种类 */,
    "body_anotomize" character varying(20)  /* 尸体解剖号 */,
    "salvage_num" numeric(12,4)  /* 抢救次数 */,
    "succ_num" numeric(12,4)  /* 成功次数 */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_code" character varying(1)  /* rh血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" character varying(10)  /* rh血型名称 */,
    "reaction_blood" smallint  /* 输血反应 */,
    "syphilis_screening" smallint  /* 妊娠梅毒筛查 */,
    "postpartum_hemorrhage" smallint  /* 产后出血 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_id" character varying(6)  /* 科主任编号 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 科主任代码 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 科主任名称 */,
    "director_doc_id" integer  /* 主任（副主任）医师编号 */,
    "director_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主任（副主任）医师代码 */,
    "director_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主任（副主任）医师姓名 */,
    "attending_doc_id" integer  /* 主治医师编号 */,
    "attending_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主治医师代码 */,
    "attending_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主治医师姓名 */,
    "resident_id" integer  /* 住院医师编号 */,
    "resident_code" character varying(50)  /* 住院医师代码 */,
    "resident_name" character varying(50)  /* 住院医师姓名 */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 责任护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "refresher_doc_id" integer  /* 进修医师编号 */,
    "refresher_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 进修医师代码 */,
    "refresher_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 进修医生名称 */,
    "graduate_doc_id" integer  /* 研究生实习医师编号 */,
    "graduate_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 研究生实习医师代码 */,
    "graduate_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 研究生实习医师名称 */,
    "practice_doc_id" integer  /* 实习医师编号 */,
    "practice_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 实习医师代码 */,
    "practice_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 实习医师名称 */,
    "coding_oper_id" integer  /* 编码员编号 */,
    "coding_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 编码员代码 */,
    "coding_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 编码员姓名 */,
    "case_quality" character varying(2)  /* 病案质量 */,
    "qc_doc_id" integer  /* 质控医师编号 */,
    "qc_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 质控医师代码 */,
    "qc_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 质控医师名称 */,
    "qc_nurse_id" integer  /* 质控护士编号 */,
    "qc_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 质控护士代码 */,
    "qc_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 质控护士名称 */,
    "check_date" date  /* 检查时间 */,
    "out_way_code" character varying(10)  /* 离院方式代码 */,
    "out_way_name" character varying(20)  /* 离院方式名称 */,
    "accept_hospital" character varying(100)  /* 转院 拟接收医疗机构名称 */,
    "again_in_hospital" smallint  /* 是否有出院31天内再住院计划 */,
    "again_in_purpose" character varying(100)  /* 再住院目的 */,
    "pre_coma_day" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几天 */,
    "pre_coma_hour" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几小时 */,
    "pre_coma_minute" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几分钟 */,
    "after_coma_day" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几天 */,
    "after_coma_hour" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几小时 */,
    "after_coma_minute" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几分钟 */,
    "is_complication" boolean  /* 有无并发症 */,
    "complication_id" integer  /* 并发症编号 */,
    "complication_code" character varying(20)  /* 并发症编码 */,
    "complication_came" character varying(50)  /* 并发症名称 */,
    "therapy_type" character varying(4)  /* （中医病案专有）治疗类别 */,
    "clinical_path" character varying(1)  /* （中医病案专有）实施临床路径(1. 中医  2. 西医  3 否) */,
    "use_cnmedicine" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）使用医疗机构中药制剂 */,
    "use_cnequipment" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）使用中医诊疗设备 */,
    "use_cntech" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）使用中医诊疗技术 */,
    "use_dialectic" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）辨证施护 */,
    "in_total_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用总费用 */,
    "in_selfpay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用自付金额 */,
    "in_selffinance_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用自费金额 */,
    "in_other_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用其它支付 */,
    "service_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类一般医疗服务费 */,
    "service_cndialectic_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医辨证论治费 */,
    "service_cndialectic_hzcost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医辨证论治会诊费 */,
    "service_operation_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类一般治疗操作费 */,
    "service_care_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类护理费 */,
    "service_other_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类其他费用 */,
    "diagnose_pathology_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类病理诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_lab_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类实验室诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_pacs_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类影像学诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_clinical_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类临床诊断项目费 */,
    "treat_non_operate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类非手术治疗项目费 */,
    "treat_physical_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类临床物理治疗费 */,
    "treat_operate_all_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类手术治疗费 */,
    "treat_anesthesia_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类麻醉费 */,
    "treat_operate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类手术费 */,
    "rehabilitation_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 康复类康复费 */,
    "cntreat_all_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 中医类中医治疗费 */,
    "cndiagnose_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医诊断 */,
    "cntreat_out_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医外治 */,
    "cntreat_bone_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医骨伤 */,
    "cntreat_acupuncture_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的针刺与灸法 */,
    "cntreat_manipulate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医推拿治疗 */,
    "cntreat_anorectal_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医肛肠治疗 */,
    "cntreat_special_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医特殊治疗 */,
    "cnother_all_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医其他 */,
    "cnother_special_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中药特殊调配加工 */,
    "cnother_dialectic_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）辨证施膳 */,
    "west_medicine_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 西药类西药费 */,
    "west_medicine_anti_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 西药类抗菌药物费用 */,
    "cnmedicine_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 中药类中成药费 */,
    "cnmedicine_org_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）医疗机构中药制剂费 */,
    "cnmedicine_herbs_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 中药类中草药费 */,
    "blood_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类血费 */,
    "blood_albumin_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类白蛋白类制品费 */,
    "blood_globulin_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类球蛋白类制品费 */,
    "blood_clotting_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类凝血因子类制品费 */,
    "blood_cell_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类细胞因子类制品费 */,
    "material_treat_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 耗材类治疗用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "material_operate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 耗材类手术用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "other_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 其他类其他费 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "extend4" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段4 */,
    "extend5" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段5 */,
    "extend6" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段6 */,
    "extend7" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段7 */,
    "extend8" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段8 */,
    "extend9" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段9 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "account_address_zip" character varying(6)  /* 户口地址-邮编 */,
    "material_check_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 耗材类检查用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "case_state_code" character varying(10)  /* 病案状态代码 */,
    "case_state_name" character varying(20)  /* 病案状态名称 */,
    "submit_id" integer  /* 提交员编号 */,
    "submit_code" character varying(10)  /* 提交员代码 */,
    "submit_name" character varying(20)  /* 提交员姓名 */,
    "submit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 提交日期 */,
    "signin_id" integer  /* 签收员编号 */,
    "signin_code" character varying(10)  /* 签收员代码 */,
    "signin_name" character varying(20)  /* 签收员姓名 */,
    "signin_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 签收日期 */,
    "shelve_id" integer  /* 归档员编号 */,
    "shelve_code" character varying(10)  /* 归档员代码 */,
    "shelve_name" character varying(20)  /* 归档员姓名 */,
    "shelve_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 归档日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源库更新时间戳 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,0 不显示 1web 2exe */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* 病案调阅地址 */,
    "cm_clinic_diag_id" integer  /* （中医病案专有）中医门诊诊断编号 */,
    "cm_clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* （中医病案专有）中医门诊诊断代码 */,
    "cm_clinic_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* （中医病案专有）中医门诊诊断名称 */,
    "case_type" character varying(1) DEFAULT 0  /* 病案首页类型，0 西医病案首页,1 中医病案首页 */,
    "extend10" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend11" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend12" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend13" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend14" character varying(100)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_base" IS '病案首页';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_base_ct
-- 注释: 病案首页变更表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_base_ct" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_case_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统病案号 */,
    "health_card_no" character varying(20)  /* 健康卡号 */,
    "medical_payment_id" integer  /* 医疗付费方式编号 */,
    "medical_payment_code" character varying(20)  /* 医疗付费式代码 */,
    "medical_payment_name" character varying(20)  /* 医疗付费方式名称 */,
    "in_num" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院次数 */,
    "case_no" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 病案号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "country_code" character varying(3)  /* 国籍代码 */,
    "country_name" character varying(50)  /* 国籍名称 */,
    "birth_address" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址 */,
    "birth_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 出生地址行政区代码 */,
    "birth_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "birth_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "birth_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址县（区） */,
    "birth_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "birth_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "birth_address_house_no" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-门牌号码 */,
    "native_place" character varying(20)  /* 籍贯 */,
    "nation_code" character varying(2)  /* 民族代码 */,
    "nation_name" character varying(50)  /* 民族名称 */,
    "idno" character varying(50)  /* 身份证号 */,
    "profession_id" integer  /* 职业编号 */,
    "profession_code" character varying(50)  /* 职业代码 */,
    "profession" character varying(50)  /* 职业 */,
    "marriage_code" character varying(2)  /* 婚姻状况 */,
    "marriage_name" character varying(20)  /* 婚姻名称 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */,
    "home_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 家庭地址行政区代码 */,
    "home_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "home_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "home_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-县（区） */,
    "home_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "home_address_vllage" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "home_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-门牌号码 */,
    "home_phone" character varying(20)  /* 家庭电话 */,
    "home_zip" character varying(6)  /* 家庭邮编 */,
    "account_address" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址 */,
    "account_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 户口地址行政区代码 */,
    "account_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "account_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "account_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-县（区） */,
    "account_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "account_address_vllage" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "account_address_house_no" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-门牌号码 */,
    "work_address" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址 */,
    "work_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 工作单位行政区代码 */,
    "work_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "work_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "work_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-县（区） */,
    "work_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "work_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "work_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-门牌号码 */,
    "work_phone" character varying(20)  /* 工作单位电话 */,
    "work_zip" character varying(6)  /* 工作单位邮编 */,
    "contact_name" character varying(50)  /* 联系人姓名 */,
    "contact_relation_id" integer  /* 联系人关系编号 */,
    "contact_relation_code" character varying(10)  /* 联系人关系代码 */,
    "contact_relation_name" character varying(20)  /* 联系人关系名称 */,
    "contact_phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系人电话 */,
    "contact_address" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址 */,
    "contact_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 联系人地址行政区代码 */,
    "contact_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "contact_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "contact_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-县（区） */,
    "contact_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "contact_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "contact_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-门牌号码 */,
    "contact_zip" character varying(6)  /* 联系邮编 */,
    "in_source_id" integer  /* 入院途径编号 */,
    "in_source_code" character varying(10)  /* 入院途径代码 */,
    "in_source_name" character varying(10)  /* 入院途径名称 */,
    "come_from" character varying(100)  /* 转来医院 */,
    "in_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 入院时间 */,
    "in_diag_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 入院确诊日期 */,
    "in_state" character varying(10)  /* 入院病情 */,
    "in_dept_id" integer  /* 入院科室编号 */,
    "in_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院科室代码 */,
    "in_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 入院科室名称 */,
    "in_ward_id" integer  /* 入院病区编号 */,
    "in_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院病区代码 */,
    "in_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 入院病区名称 */,
    "shift_depts" character varying(200)  /* 转科信息 */,
    "out_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 出院时间 */,
    "out_dept_id" integer  /* 出院科室编号 */,
    "out_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 出院科室代码 */,
    "out_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 出院科室名称 */,
    "out_ward_id" integer  /* 出院病区编号 */,
    "out_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 出院病区代码 */,
    "out_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 出院病区名称 */,
    "in_days" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院天数 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 门诊诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 门诊诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 门诊诊断名称 */,
    "in_diag_id" integer  /* 入院诊断编号 */,
    "in_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院诊断代码 */,
    "in_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 入院诊断名称 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "allergy_flag" boolean  /* 药物过敏 */,
    "allergy_name1" character varying(50)  /* 过敏药物名称1 */,
    "allergy_name2" character varying(50)  /* 过敏药物名称2 */,
    "allergy_name3" character varying(50)  /* 过敏药物名称3 */,
    "dead_date" date  /* 死亡日期 */,
    "dead_reason" character varying(50)  /* 死亡原因 */,
    "body_check" boolean  /* 死亡尸检 */,
    "dead_kind" character varying(20)  /* 死亡种类 */,
    "body_anotomize" character varying(20)  /* 尸体解剖号 */,
    "salvage_num" numeric(12,4)  /* 抢救次数 */,
    "succ_num" numeric(12,4)  /* 成功次数 */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_code" character varying(1)  /* rh血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" character varying(10)  /* rh血型名称 */,
    "reaction_blood" smallint  /* 输血反应 */,
    "syphilis_screening" smallint  /* 妊娠梅毒筛查 */,
    "postpartum_hemorrhage" smallint  /* 产后出血 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_id" character varying(6)  /* 科主任编号 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 科主任代码 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 科主任名称 */,
    "director_doc_id" integer  /* 主任（副主任）医师编号 */,
    "director_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主任（副主任）医师代码 */,
    "director_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主任（副主任）医师姓名 */,
    "attending_doc_id" integer  /* 主治医师编号 */,
    "attending_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主治医师代码 */,
    "attending_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主治医师姓名 */,
    "resident_id" integer  /* 住院医师编号 */,
    "resident_code" character varying(50)  /* 住院医师代码 */,
    "resident_name" character varying(50)  /* 住院医师姓名 */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 责任护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "refresher_doc_id" integer  /* 进修医师编号 */,
    "refresher_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 进修医师代码 */,
    "refresher_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 进修医生名称 */,
    "graduate_doc_id" integer  /* 研究生实习医师编号 */,
    "graduate_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 研究生实习医师代码 */,
    "graduate_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 研究生实习医师名称 */,
    "practice_doc_id" integer  /* 实习医师编号 */,
    "practice_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 实习医师代码 */,
    "practice_doc_name" character varying(10)  /* 实习医师名称 */,
    "coding_oper_id" integer  /* 编码员编号 */,
    "coding_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 编码员代码 */,
    "coding_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 编码员姓名 */,
    "case_quality" character varying(2)  /* 病案质量 */,
    "qc_doc_id" integer  /* 质控医师编号 */,
    "qc_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 质控医师代码 */,
    "qc_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 质控医师名称 */,
    "qc_nurse_id" integer  /* 质控护士编号 */,
    "qc_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 质控护士代码 */,
    "qc_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 质控护士名称 */,
    "check_date" date  /* 检查时间 */,
    "out_way_code" character varying(10)  /* 离院方式代码 */,
    "out_way_name" character varying(20)  /* 离院方式名称 */,
    "accept_hospital" character varying(100)  /* 转院 拟接收医疗机构名称 */,
    "again_in_hospital" smallint  /* 是否有出院31天内再住院计划 */,
    "again_in_purpose" character varying(100)  /* 再住院目的 */,
    "pre_coma_day" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几天 */,
    "pre_coma_hour" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几小时 */,
    "pre_coma_minute" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几分钟 */,
    "after_coma_day" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几天 */,
    "after_coma_hour" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几小时 */,
    "after_coma_minute" character varying(5)  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几分钟 */,
    "is_complication" boolean  /* 有无并发症 */,
    "complication_id" integer  /* 并发症编号 */,
    "complication_code" character varying(20)  /* 并发症编码 */,
    "complication_came" character varying(50)  /* 并发症名称 */,
    "therapy_type" character varying(4)  /* （中医病案专有）治疗类别 */,
    "clinical_path" character varying(1)  /* （中医病案专有）实施临床路径(1. 中医  2. 西医  3 否) */,
    "use_cnmedicine" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）使用医疗机构中药制剂 */,
    "use_cnequipment" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）使用中医诊疗设备 */,
    "use_cntech" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）使用中医诊疗技术 */,
    "use_dialectic" boolean  /* （中医病案专有）辨证施护 */,
    "in_total_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用总费用 */,
    "in_selfpay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用自付金额 */,
    "in_selffinance_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用自费金额 */,
    "in_other_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院费用其它支付 */,
    "service_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类一般医疗服务费 */,
    "service_cndialectic_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医辨证论治费 */,
    "service_cndialectic_hzcost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医辨证论治会诊费 */,
    "service_operation_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类一般治疗操作费 */,
    "service_care_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类护理费 */,
    "service_other_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 综合医疗服务类其他费用 */,
    "diagnose_pathology_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类病理诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_lab_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类实验室诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_pacs_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类影像学诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_clinical_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 诊断类临床诊断项目费 */,
    "treat_non_operate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类非手术治疗项目费 */,
    "treat_physical_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类临床物理治疗费 */,
    "treat_operate_all_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类手术治疗费 */,
    "treat_anesthesia_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类麻醉费 */,
    "treat_operate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 治疗类手术费 */,
    "rehabilitation_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 康复类康复费 */,
    "cntreat_all_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 中医类中医治疗费 */,
    "cndiagnose_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医诊断 */,
    "cntreat_out_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医外治 */,
    "cntreat_bone_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医骨伤 */,
    "cntreat_acupuncture_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的针刺与灸法 */,
    "cntreat_manipulate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医推拿治疗 */,
    "cntreat_anorectal_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医肛肠治疗 */,
    "cntreat_special_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医特殊治疗 */,
    "cnother_all_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中医其他 */,
    "cnother_special_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）中药特殊调配加工 */,
    "cnother_dialectic_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）辨证施膳 */,
    "west_medicine_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 西药类西药费 */,
    "west_medicine_anti_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 西药类抗菌药物费用 */,
    "cnmedicine_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 中药类中成药费 */,
    "cnmedicine_org_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* （中医病案专有）医疗机构中药制剂费 */,
    "cnmedicine_herbs_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 中药类中草药费 */,
    "blood_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类血费 */,
    "blood_albumin_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类白蛋白类制品费 */,
    "blood_globulin_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类球蛋白类制品费 */,
    "blood_clotting_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类凝血因子类制品费 */,
    "blood_cell_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 血液和血液制品类细胞因子类制品费 */,
    "material_treat_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 耗材类治疗用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "material_operate_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 耗材类手术用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "other_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 其他类其他费 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "extend4" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段4 */,
    "extend5" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段5 */,
    "extend6" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段6 */,
    "extend7" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段7 */,
    "extend8" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段8 */,
    "extend9" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段9 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "account_address_zip" character varying(6)  /* 户口地址-邮编 */,
    "material_check_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 耗材类检查用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "case_state_code" character varying(10)  /* 病案状态代码 */,
    "case_state_name" character varying(20)  /* 病案状态名称 */,
    "submit_id" integer  /* 提交员编号 */,
    "submit_code" character varying(10)  /* 提交员代码 */,
    "submit_name" character varying(20)  /* 提交员姓名 */,
    "submit_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 提交日期 */,
    "signin_id" integer  /* 签收员编号 */,
    "signin_code" character varying(10)  /* 签收员代码 */,
    "signin_name" character varying(20)  /* 签收员姓名 */,
    "signin_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 签收日期 */,
    "shelve_id" integer  /* 归档员编号 */,
    "shelve_code" character varying(10)  /* 归档员代码 */,
    "shelve_name" character varying(20)  /* 归档员姓名 */,
    "shelve_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 归档日期 */,
    "opt_type" character varying(10)  /* 操作类型 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源库更新时间戳 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_base_ct" IS '病案首页变更表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_blsj
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_blsj" (
    "病案号" character varying  /*  */,
    "证件号码" character varying  /*  */,
    "姓名" character varying  /*  */,
    "住院系数" character varying  /*  */,
    "主要诊断编码" character varying  /*  */,
    "主要诊断名称" character varying  /*  */,
    "是否出院后31天再入院" character varying  /*  */,
    "入院时间" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "出院时间" timestamp without time zone  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_diagnose
-- 注释: 病案诊断表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_diagnose" (
    "case_diagnose_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "diag_class_id" integer  /* 诊断类别编号 */,
    "diag_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断类别代码 */,
    "diag_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 诊断类别名称 */,
    "main_flag" boolean  /* 主诊断 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "pathology_no" character varying(50)  /* 病理号 */,
    "in_condition_code" character varying(10)  /* 入院病情代码 */,
    "in_condition_name" character varying(20)  /* 入院病情名称 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "diag_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 诊断森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("case_diagnose_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_diagnose" IS '病案诊断表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_diagnose_ct
-- 注释: 病案诊断变更表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_diagnose_ct" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "case_diagnose_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案诊断编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "diag_class_id" integer  /* 诊断类别编号 */,
    "diag_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断类别代码 */,
    "diag_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 诊断类别名称 */,
    "main_flag" boolean  /* 主诊断 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "pathology_no" character varying(50)  /* 病理号 */,
    "in_condition_code" character varying(10)  /* 入院病情代码 */,
    "in_condition_name" character varying(20)  /* 入院病情名称 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "diag_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 诊断森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "opt_type" character varying(10)  /* 操作类型 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_diagnose_ct" IS '病案诊断变更表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_operation
-- 注释: 病案手术表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_operation" (
    "case_operation_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "operation_id" integer  /* 手术编号 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(20)  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(250) NOT NULL  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operation_level_code" character varying(3)  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" character varying(10)  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "incision_type_code" character varying(3)  /* 切口类型代码 */,
    "incision_type_name" character varying(10)  /* 切口类型名称 */,
    "incision_heal_code" character varying(3)  /* 切口愈合代码 */,
    "incision_heal_name" character varying(10)  /* 切口愈合名称 */,
    "operation_doc_id" integer  /* 手术医生编号 */,
    "operation_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生代码 */,
    "operation_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生姓名 */,
    "helper1_id" integer  /* 一助编号 */,
    "helper1_code" character varying(50)  /* 一助代码 */,
    "helper1_name" character varying(50)  /* 一助姓名 */,
    "helper2_id" integer  /* 二助编号 */,
    "helper2_code" character varying(50)  /* 二助代码 */,
    "helper2_name" character varying(50)  /* 二助姓名 */,
    "helper3_id" integer  /* 三助编号 */,
    "helper3_code" character varying(50)  /* 三助代码 */,
    "helper3_name" character varying(50)  /* 三助姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_id" integer  /* 麻醉医生编号 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生代码 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_type_id" integer  /* 麻醉方式编号 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" character varying(10)  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" character varying(30)  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "operation_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 手术时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "operation_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 手术项目森亿标准编码 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "is_main" boolean  /* 是否主手术 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "extend4" timestamp without time zone  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("case_operation_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_operation" IS '病案手术表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: case_operation_ct
-- 注释: 病案手术变更表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "case_operation_ct" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "case_operation_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案手术编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "case_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "operation_id" integer  /* 手术编号 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(20)  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(250) NOT NULL  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operation_level_code" character varying(3)  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" character varying(10)  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "incision_type_code" character varying(3)  /* 切口类型代码 */,
    "incision_type_name" character varying(10)  /* 切口类型名称 */,
    "incision_heal_code" character varying(3)  /* 切口愈合代码 */,
    "incision_heal_name" character varying(10)  /* 切口愈合名称 */,
    "operation_doc_id" integer  /* 手术医生编号 */,
    "operation_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生代码 */,
    "operation_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生姓名 */,
    "helper1_id" integer  /* 一助编号 */,
    "helper1_code" character varying(50)  /* 一助代码 */,
    "helper1_name" character varying(50)  /* 一助姓名 */,
    "helper2_id" integer  /* 二助编号 */,
    "helper2_code" character varying(50)  /* 二助代码 */,
    "helper2_name" character varying(50)  /* 二助姓名 */,
    "helper3_id" integer  /* 三助编号 */,
    "helper3_code" character varying(50)  /* 三助代码 */,
    "helper3_name" character varying(50)  /* 三助姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_id" integer  /* 麻醉医生编号 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生代码 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_type_id" integer  /* 麻醉方式编号 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" character varying(10)  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" character varying(30)  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "operation_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "operation_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 手术项目森亿标准编码 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "is_main" boolean  /* 是否主手术 */,
    "opt_type" character varying(10)  /* 操作类型 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "case_operation_ct" IS '病案手术变更表';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cases_case_baby
-- 注释: 病案婴儿表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cases_case_baby" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "case_baby_number" text NOT NULL  /* 病案婴儿编号 */,
    "case_number" text  /* 病案编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "baby_name" text  /* 婴儿姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "height" text  /* 身长 (单位 cm) */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重 (单位 g) */,
    "delivery_mode_sys_code" integer  /* 分娩方式值域 */,
    "delivery_mode_code" text  /* 分娩方式编号 */,
    "delivery_mode_name" text  /* 分娩方式名称 */,
    "birth_text" text  /* 出生时间 */,
    "birth_weight" text  /* 出生体重 (单位 g) */,
    "in_weight" text  /* 入院体重 (单位 g) */,
    "father_name" text  /* 父亲姓名 */,
    "father_idno" text  /* 父亲身份证号 */,
    "mother_name" text  /* 母亲姓名 */,
    "mother_idno" text  /* 母亲身份证号 */,
    "fetus_num" text  /* 胎次 */,
    "parity_num" text  /* 产次 */,
    "ch" text  /* CH 甲低 */,
    "pku" text  /* PKU */,
    "listening" text  /* 听力 */,
    "cah" text  /* CAH */,
    "g6pd" text  /* G6PD */,
    "is_die" text  /* 七日死亡 */,
    "die_time" text  /* 死亡时间 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "outcome_sys_code" integer  /* 病情转归值域 */,
    "outcome_code" text  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" text  /* 转归名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cases_case_baby" IS '病案婴儿表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cases_case_base
-- 注释: 病案首页
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cases_case_base" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "case_number" text NOT NULL  /* 病案编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "health_card_no" text  /* 健康卡号 */,
    "medical_payment_sys_code" integer  /* 医疗付费方式值域 */,
    "medical_payment_code" text  /* 医疗付费方式代码 */,
    "medical_payment_name" text  /* 医疗付费方式名称 */,
    "in_num" text  /* 住院次数 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" text  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "country_sys_code" integer  /* 国籍值域 */,
    "country_code" text  /* 国籍代码 */,
    "country_name" text  /* 国籍名称 */,
    "birth_address" text  /* 出生地址 */,
    "birth_address_district" text  /* 出生地址行政区代码 */,
    "birth_address_province" text  /* 出生地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "birth_address_city" text  /* 出生地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "birth_address_county" text  /* 出生地址县（区） */,
    "birth_address_township" text  /* 出生地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,

    "in_dept_code" text  /* 入院科室代码 */,
    "in_dept_name" text  /* 入院科室名称 */,

    "out_dept_name" text  /* 出院科室名称 */,
    "out_ward_code" text  /* 出院病区代码 */,
    "out_ward_name" text  /* 出院病区名称 */,

    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 门诊诊断名称 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 门诊诊断代码 */,
    "in_diag_name" text  /* 入院诊断名称 */,
    "in_diag_code" text  /* 入院诊断代码 */,
    "outcome_sys_code" integer  /* 病情转归值域 */,
    "outcome_code" text  /* 病情转归代码 */,

    "allergy_name1" text  /* 过敏药物名称1 */,
    "allergy_name2" text  /* 过敏药物名称2 */,

    "body_anotomize" text  /* 尸体解剖号 */,

    "succ_num" text  /* 成功次数 */,

    "abo_code" text  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" text  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_sys_code" integer  /* RH血型值域 */,
    "rh_code" text  /* rh血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" text  /* rh血型名称 */,

    "syphilis_screening" text  /* 妊娠梅毒筛查 */,
    "postpartum_hemorrhage" text  /* 产后出血 */,

    "dept_chief_doc_code" text  /* 科主任代码 */,
    "dept_chief_doc_name" text  /* 科主任名称 */,

    "director_doc_name" text  /* 主任（副主任）医师姓名 */,

    "attending_doc_name" text  /* 主治医师姓名 */,

    "resident_name" text  /* 住院医师姓名 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" text  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" text  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "refresher_doc_name" text  /* 进修医生名称 */,
    "refresher_doc_code" text  /* 进修医生代码 */,

    "graduate_doc_code" text  /* 研究生实习医师代码 */,
    "practice_doc_name" text  /* 实习医师名称 */,

    "coding_oper_name" text  /* 编码员姓名 */,
    "case_quality" text  /* 病案质量 */,
    "qc_doc_code" text  /* 质控医师代码 */,
    "qc_doc_name" text  /* 质控医师名称 */,
    "qc_nurse_code" text  /* 质控护士代码 */,
    "qc_nurse_name" text  /* 质控护士名称 */,
    "check_date" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "out_way_sys_code" integer  /* 离院方式值域 */,
    "out_way_code" text  /* 离院方式代码 */,
    "out_way_name" text  /* 离院方式名称 */,
    "accept_hospital" text  /* 转院 拟接收医疗机构名称 */,
    "again_in_hospital" text  /* 是否有出院31天内再住院计划 */,
    "again_in_purpose" text  /* 再住院目的 */,
    "pre_coma_day" text  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几天 */,
    "pre_coma_hour" text  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几小时 */,
    "pre_coma_minute" text  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院前几分钟 */,
    "after_coma_day" text  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几天 */,
    "after_coma_hour" text  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几小时 */,
    "after_coma_minute" text  /* 颅脑损伤患者昏迷时间入院后几分钟 */,
    "is_complication" text  /* 有无并发症 */,
    "complication_id" text  /* 并发症编号 */,
    "complication_code" text  /* 并发症编码 */,
    "complication_came" text  /* 并发症名称 */,
    "therapy_type" text  /* （中医病案专有）治疗类别 */,
    "clinical_path" text  /* （中医病案专有）实施临床路径(1. 中医  2. 西医  3 否) */,
    "use_cnmedicine" text  /* （中医病案专有）使用医疗机构中药制剂 */,
    "use_cnequipment" text  /* （中医病案专有）使用中医诊疗设备 */,
    "use_cntech" text  /* （中医病案专有）使用中医诊疗技术 */,

    "in_selffinance_cost" text  /* 住院费用自费金额 */,

    "service_cost" text  /* 综合医疗服务类一般医疗服务费 */,

    "diagnose_lab_cost" text  /* 诊断类实验室诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_pacs_cost" text  /* 诊断类影像学诊断费 */,
    "diagnose_clinical_cost" text  /* 诊断类临床诊断项目费 */,
    "treat_non_operate_cost" text  /* 治疗类非手术治疗项目费 */,
    "treat_physical_cost" text  /* 治疗类临床物理治疗费 */,
    "treat_operate_all_cost" text  /* 治疗类手术治疗费 */,
    "treat_anesthesia_cost" text  /* 治疗类麻醉费 */,
    "treat_operate_cost" text  /* 治疗类手术费 */,
    "rehabilitation_cost" text  /* 康复类康复费 */,
    "cntreat_all_cost" text  /* 中医类中医治疗费 */,
    "cndiagnose_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医诊断 */,
    "cntreat_out_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医外治 */,
    "cntreat_bone_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医骨伤 */,
    "cntreat_acupuncture_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的针刺与灸法 */,
    "cntreat_manipulate_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医推拿治疗 */,
    "cntreat_anorectal_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医肛肠治疗 */,
    "cntreat_special_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医治疗费的中医特殊治疗 */,
    "cnother_all_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医其他 */,
    "cnother_special_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）中药特殊调配加工 */,
    "cnother_dialectic_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）辨证施膳 */,
    "west_medicine_cost" text  /* 西药类西药费 */,
    "west_medicine_anti_cost" text  /* 西药类抗菌药物费用 */,
    "cnmedicine_cost" text  /* 中药类中成药费 */,
    "cnmedicine_org_cost" text  /* （中医病案专有）医疗机构中药制剂费 */,
    "cnmedicine_herbs_cost" text  /* 中药类中草药费 */,
    "blood_cost" text  /* 血液和血液制品类血费 */,
    "blood_albumin_cost" text  /* 血液和血液制品类白蛋白类制品费 */,
    "blood_globulin_cost" text  /* 血液和血液制品类球蛋白类制品费 */,
    "blood_clotting_cost" text  /* 血液和血液制品类凝血因子类制品费 */,
    "blood_cell_cost" text  /* 血液和血液制品类细胞因子类制品费 */,
    "material_treat_cost" text  /* 耗材类治疗用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "material_operate_cost" text  /* 耗材类手术用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "material_check_cost" text  /* 耗材类检查用一次性医用材料费 */,
    "other_cost" text  /* 其他类其他费 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "extend4" text  /* 扩展字段4 */,
    "extend5" text  /* 扩展字段5 */,
    "extend6" text  /* 扩展字段6 */,
    "extend7" text  /* 扩展字段7 */,
    "extend8" text  /* 扩展字段8 */,
    "extend9" text  /* 扩展字段9 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "case_state_sys_code" integer  /* 病案状态值域 */,
    "case_state_code" text  /* 病案状态代码 */,
    "case_state_name" text  /* 病案状态名称 */,
    "submit_sys_code" integer  /* 提交员值域 */,
    "submit_code" text  /* 提交员代码 */,
    "submit_name" text  /* 提交员姓名 */,
    "submit_date" text  /* 提交日期 */,
    "signin_sys_code" integer  /* 签收员值域 */,
    "signin_code" text  /* 签收员代码 */,
    "signin_name" text  /* 签收员姓名 */,
    "signin_date" text  /* 签收日期 */,
    "shelve_sys_code" integer  /* 归档员值域 */,
    "shelve_code" text  /* 归档员代码 */,
    "shelve_name" text  /* 归档员姓名 */,
    "shelve_date" text  /* 归档日期 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /*  保存源库时间戳转化的时间 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,0 不显示 1web 2exe */,
    "web_url" text  /* 病案调阅地址 */,
    "cm_clinic_diag_sys_code" integer  /* （中医病案专有）中医门诊诊断值域 */,
    "cm_clinic_diag_code" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医门诊诊断代码 */,
    "cm_clinic_diag_name" text  /* （中医病案专有）中医门诊诊断名称 */,
    "case_type" character varying(1) DEFAULT 0  /* 病案首页类型，0 西医病案首页,1 中医病案首页 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cases_case_base" IS '病案首页';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cases_case_diagnose
-- 注释: 病案诊断表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cases_case_diagnose" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "case_diagnose_number" text NOT NULL  /* 病案诊断明细编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "case_number" text  /* 病案编号 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "diag_class_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断类别值域 */,
    "diag_class_code" text  /* 诊断类别代码 */,
    "diag_class_name" text  /* 诊断类别名称 */,
    "main_flag" text  /* 主诊断 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "diag_code" text  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "pathology_no" text  /* 病理号 */,
    "in_condition_sys_code" integer  /* 入院病情值域 */,
    "in_condition_code" text  /* 入院病情代码 */,
    "in_condition_name" text  /* 入院病情名称 */,
    "outcome_sys_code" integer  /* 病情转归值域 */,
    "outcome_code" text  /* 病情转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" text  /* 病情转归名称 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cases_case_diagnose" IS '病案诊断表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cases_case_operation
-- 注释: 病案手术表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cases_case_operation" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "case_operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 病案手术编号 */,
    "case_number" text  /* 病案编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "operation_sys_code" integer  /* 手术值域 */,
    "operation_code" text  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" text  /* 手术名称 */,
    "is_main" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否主手术 */,
    "operation_level_sys_code" integer  /* 手术级别值域 */,
    "operation_level_code" text  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" text  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "incision_type_sys_code" integer  /* 切口类型值域 */,
    "incision_type_code" text  /* 切口类型代码 */,
    "incision_type_name" text  /* 切口类型名称 */,
    "incision_heal_sys_code" integer  /* 切口愈合值域 */,
    "incision_heal_code" text  /* 切口愈合代码 */,
    "incision_heal_name" text  /* 切口愈合名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "operation_doc_code" text  /* 手术医生代码 */,
    "operation_doc_name" text  /* 手术医生姓名 */,
    "helper1_code" text  /* 一助代码 */,
    "helper1_name" text  /* 一助姓名 */,
    "helper2_code" text  /* 二助代码 */,
    "helper2_name" text  /* 二助姓名 */,
    "helper3_code" text  /* 三助代码 */,
    "helper3_name" text  /* 三助姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" text  /* 麻醉医生代码 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" text  /* 麻醉医生姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_type_sys_code" integer  /* 麻醉方式值域 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" text  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" text  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "operation_time" text  /* 手术时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cases_case_operation" IS '病案手术表';
|

,
