|-- ========================================
-- 表名: check_apply
-- 注释: 检查申请单(放射、内镜、超声),[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "check_apply" (
    "apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 检查申请单编号,自增主键 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_apply_number" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 源系统申请单编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 就诊类型 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系电话 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "apply_doc_id" integer  /* 医生编号 */,
    "apply_doc_code" character varying(20)  /* 医生代码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" character varying(20)  /* 医生名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 区名称 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 科室名称 */,
    "doc_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "check_purpose" character varying(500)  /* 检查目的 */,
    "apply_class_id" integer  /* 检查类别编号 */,
    "apply_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查类别代码 */,
    "apply_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查类别名称 */,
    "apply_item_id" integer  /* 检查项目编号 */,
    "apply_item_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查项目代码 */,
    "apply_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查项目名称 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_code" character varying(20)  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "check_body" character varying(100)  /* 检查部位 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "book_no" character varying(20)  /* 预约号 */,
    "appointment_time" character varying(100)  /* 预约时间 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查日期 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "attention" character varying(500)  /* 注意事项 */,
    "is_urgent" boolean  /* 是否加急 */,
    "check_status_id" integer  /* 申请单状态编号 */,
    "check_status_code" character varying(10)  /* 申请单状态代码 */,
    "check_status_name" character varying(10)  /* 申请单状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作人编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作人代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("apply_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "check_apply" IS '检查申请单(放射、内镜、超声),[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: check_crisis

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "check_crisis" (

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: check_report
-- 注释: 体检检查报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "check_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 检查结果表编号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(80) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "phyexam_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(20)  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 图像url */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 报告状态 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "check_report" IS '体检检查报告';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_check_apply
-- 注释: 检查申请单(放射、内镜、超声),[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_check_apply" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统申请单编号 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 就诊号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 就诊类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "phone" text  /* 联系电话 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "apply_doc_code" text  /* 医生编码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" text  /* 医生名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所属病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所属科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "doc_code" text  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "doc_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编码 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "check_purpose" text  /* 检查目的 */,
    "check_class_sys_code" integer  /* 检查类别值域 */,
    "apply_class_code" text  /* 检查类别编码 */,
    "apply_class_name" text  /* 检查类别名称 */,
    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 检查项目值域 */,
    "apply_item_code" text  /* 检查项目编码 */,
    "apply_item_name" text  /* 检查项目名称 */,
    "sample_sys_code" integer  /* 样本值域 */,
    "sample_code" text  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" text  /* 样本名称 */,
    "check_body" text  /* 检查部位 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "book_no" text  /* 预约号 */,
    "appointment_time" text  /* 预约时间 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查日期 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "attention" text  /* 注意事项 */,
    "is_urgent" text  /* 是否加急 */,
    "check_status_sys_code" integer  /* 申请单状态值域 */,
    "check_status_code" text  /* 申请单状态编码 */,
    "check_status_name" text  /* 申请单状态名称 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取状态 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_check_apply" IS '检查申请单(放射、内镜、超声),[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_ecg_report
-- 注释: 心电报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_ecg_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 心电报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_sys_code" integer  /* 检查设备值域 */,
    "check_equipment_code" text  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" text  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "image_no" text  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" text  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_code" text  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_name" text  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" text  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" text  /* 医技检查号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_ecg_report" IS '心电报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_ecg_report_item
-- 注释: 心电报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_ecg_report_item" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "report_item_number" text NOT NULL  /* 报告明细序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 心电报告编号 */,
    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 项目值域 */,
    "item_code" text  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" text NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,

    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_endoscopy_report
-- 注释: 内窥镜报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_endoscopy_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 内窥镜报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_sys_code" integer  /* 检查设备值域 */,
    "check_equipment_code" text  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" text  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" text  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" text  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" text  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_code" text  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_name" text  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" text  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" text  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "biopsy_site" text  /* 活检部位 */,
    "hp_test" text  /* HP检验 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_endoscopy_report" IS '内窥镜报告';

,

);

    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "phone" text  /* 联系电话 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "apply_doc_code" text  /* 医生编码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" text  /* 医生名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所属病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所属科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编码 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断编码值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "operation_desc" text  /* 手术所见描述 */,
    "check_desc" text  /* 影像学检查结果 */,
    "sample_number" text  /* 标本数据 */,
    "sample_unit" text  /* 数量单位 */,
    "sample_body" text  /* 取材部位及组织名称 */,
    "sample_invitro_time" text  /* 标本离体时间 */,
    "check_purpose" text  /* 检查目的 */,
    "class_sys_code" integer  /* 检查类别值域 */,
    "apply_class_code" text  /* 检查类别编码 */,
    "apply_class_name" text  /* 检查类别名称 */,
    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 检查项目值域 */,
    "apply_item_code" text  /* 检查项目编码 */,
    "apply_item_name" text  /* 检查项目名称 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "barcode" text  /* 标本条码号 */,
    "sample_fixative" text  /* 标本固定液 */,
    "book_no" text  /* 预约号 */,
    "appointment_time" text  /* 预约时间 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查日期 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "confirm_time" text  /* 确认时间 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" text  /* 确认人编码 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" text  /* 确认人姓名 */,
    "send_sample_number" text  /* 送检组织数量 */,
    "send_sample_unit" text  /* 送检组织数量单位 */,
    "send_sample_body" text  /* 送检组织 */,
    "recive_time" text  /* 接收时间 */,
    "recive_doc_code" text  /* 接收人编码 */,
    "recive_doc_name" text  /* 接收人名称 */,
    "attention" text  /* 注意事项 */,
    "is_urgent" text  /* 是否加急 */,
    "in_hospital" text  /* 是否院内 */,
    "hospital_name" text  /* 医院名称 */,
    "check_status_sys_code" integer  /* 申请单状态值域 */,
    "check_status_code" text  /* 申请单状态编码 */,
    "check_status_name" text  /* 申请单状态名称 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取状态 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_pathology_apply" IS '病理申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_pathology_report
-- 注释: 病理报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_pathology_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 病理报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_sys_code" integer  /* 检查设备值域 */,
    "check_equipment_code" text  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" text  /* 检查名称 */,
    "eye_find" text  /* 肉眼所见 */,
    "microscope_find" text  /* 镜下所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" text  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" text  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" text  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_code" text  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_name" text  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" text  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" text  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "immunohistochemical_des" text  /* 免疫组化描述 */,
    "sample_receive_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 样本接收时间 */,
    "is_frozen_comp" boolean  /* 是否为冰冻报告 */,
    "is_frozen_report" boolean  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_pathology_report" IS '病理报告';
|

,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_radiology_report
-- 注释: 放射学报告
-- ========================================

    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 放射报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,

    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_sys_code" integer  /* 检查设备值域 */,
    "check_equipment_code" text  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" text  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "radiology_note" text  /* 放射学表现 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" text  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" text  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" text  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_code" text  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_name" text  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" text  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" text  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "scan_seq" text  /* 扫描序列 */,
    "scan_position" text  /* 扫描方位 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_ultrasound_report
-- 注释: 超声报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_ultrasound_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 超声报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_sys_code" integer  /* 检查设备值域 */,
    "check_equipment_code" text  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" text  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "ultrasound_note" text  /* 超声学表现 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" text  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" text  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" text  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_code" text  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_name" text  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" text  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" text  /* 医技检查号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_ultrasound_report" IS '超声报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_ultrasound_report_item
-- 注释: 超声报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_ultrasound_report_item" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "report_item_number" text NOT NULL  /* 报告明细序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 超声报告编号 */,
    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 项目值域 */,
    "item_code" text  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" text NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检查方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_sys_code" integer  /* 检查技术值域 */,
    "check_tech_code" text  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_name" text  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_sys_code" integer  /* 检查设备值域 */,
    "check_equipment_code" text  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_name" text  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_ultrasound_report_item" IS '超声报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: checks_ultrasound_result_detail
-- 注释: 超声报告结果明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "checks_ultrasound_result_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "report_item_number" text NOT NULL  /* 报告明细序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 超声报告编号 */,
    "ultrasound_item_sys_code" integer  /* 超声结果项目值域 */,
    "ultrasound_item_code" text  /* 超声结果项目代码 */,
    "ultrasound_item_name" text  /* 超声结果项目名称 */,
    "value" text  /* 结果值 */,
    "unit_sys_code" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" text  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_name" text  /* 单位名称 */,
    "reference_range" text  /* 参考范围 */,
    "reference_range_man" text  /* 参考范围（男） */,
    "reference_range_woman" text  /* 参考范围（女） */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "checks_ultrasound_result_detail" IS '超声报告结果明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: chemotherapy_drug_detail
-- 注释: 化疗用药明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chemotherapy_drug_detail" (
    "chemotherapy_drug_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 明细序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "chemotherapy_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 化疗记录编号 */,
    "drug_id" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_code" character varying(20)  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 药品名称 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "use_time" character varying(100)  /* 使用时间（文字） */,
    "standarde_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 标准剂量 */,
    "theory_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 理论剂量 */,
    "real_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 实际剂量 */,
    "dose_unit" integer  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "is_decrease" boolean  /* 是否减少量 */,
    "decrease_reason" character varying(100)  /* 减量原因 */,
    "is_postpone" boolean  /* 是否延期 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("chemotherapy_drug_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "chemotherapy_drug_detail" IS '化疗用药明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: chemotherapy_record
-- 注释: 化疗记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chemotherapy_record" (
    "chemotherapy_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 化疗记录编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "program_name" character varying(50)  /* 化疗方案 */,
    "quality_id" integer  /* 化疗性质编号 */,
    "quality_code" character varying(50)  /* 化疗性质代码 */,
    "quality_name" character varying(30)  /* 化疗性质名称 */,
    "all_period_num" smallint  /* 化疗期数 */,
    "period_num" smallint  /* 化疗周期 */,
    "program_interval_days" smallint  /* 方案间隔天数 */,
    "real_interval_days" smallint  /* 实际间隔天数 */,
    "is_radiotherapy" boolean  /* 是否同期放疗 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("chemotherapy_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "chemotherapy_record" IS '化疗记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: closed_loop_record
-- 注释: 闭环医嘱记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "closed_loop_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增Id */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊Id */,
    "order_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 记录Id，来源于药物医嘱表、非药物医嘱表、检验表、微生物表、手术记录、各类检查表  */,
    "process_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 流程code */,
    "process_node_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 节点code */,
    "process_node_name" character varying(50)  /* 节点名称 */,
    "group_id" character varying(50)  /* 组Id */,
    "child_process_name" character varying(50)  /* 子流程展示名 */,
    "expect_excute_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 预计执行时间 */,
    "excute_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 执行时间 */,
    "excute_user_id" integer  /* 执行人Id */,
    "excute_user_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行人姓名 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间 */,
    "order_class" integer NOT NULL  /* 记录类别,1 药物医嘱 2 非药物医嘱 3 检验（除微生物） 4 微生物 5 放射 6 超声 7 心电 8内窥镜 9病理 10其他检查 11 手术记录  */,
    "process_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 闭环流程ID */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "excute_dept_id" integer  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "excute_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行科室代码 */,
    "excute_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 子流程  展示序号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "closed_loop_record" IS '闭环医嘱记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: code_map
-- 注释: 通用代码对照表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "code_map" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 对照序号，自增号 */,
    "map_type" character(1) NOT NULL  /* 对照类型 */,
    "source_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 源代码（代码系统）编号 */,
    "source_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源代码 */,
    "source_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 源名称 */,
    "map_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 对照代码编号 */,
    "map_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 对照代码 */,
    "map_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 对照名称 */,
    "state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 对照状态 */,
    "relationship" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 对照关系 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "code_map" IS '通用代码对照表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: code_map_hlht
-- 注释: 互联互通标准值域映射表,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "code_map_hlht" (
    "source_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统字典 */,
    "code_sys_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统代码 */,
    "code_sys_name" character varying(50)  /* 代码系统名称 */,
    "map_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 标准数据字典编码 */,
    "map_name" character varying(50)  /* 标准数据字典名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("source_code", "code_sys_code", "map_code")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "code_map_hlht" IS '互联互通标准值域映射表,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: code_set
-- 注释: 通用代码集合
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "code_set" (
    "code_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 代码编号，自增号 */,
    "code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码 */,
    "name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 名称 */,
    "show_name" character varying(200)  /* 显示名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" integer  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 代码状态 */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /* 排序号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 操作时间 */,
    "tenant_id" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 链接地址编号 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true  /* 当前是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "code_set" IS '通用代码集合';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: code_set_hlht
-- 注释: 互联互通标准值域,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "code_set_hlht" (
    "code_sys_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统代码 */,
    "code_sys_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统名称 */,
    "code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码 */,
    "name" character varying(50)  /* 名称 */,
    "class" character varying(50)  /* 类别 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("code_sys_code", "code_sys_name", "code")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: code_system
-- 注释: 代码系统表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "code_system" (
    "code_sys_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 代码系统编号，自增号 */,
    "code_sys_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统代码 */,
    "code_sys_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 机构代码 */,
    "level_code" character varying(2)  /* 代码级别 */,
    "source_note" character varying(100)  /* 代码来源描述 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("code_sys_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "code_system" IS '代码系统表';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: consultation_apply
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "consultation_apply" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "apply_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 申请单号 */,
    "consultation_type" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊类型 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 申请时间 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "illness_summary" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 病情摘要 */,
    "consultation_purpose" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 会诊目的 */,
    "diagnose" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 诊断 */,
    "consultation_person" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊拟请人 */,
    "apply_doc_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 会诊申请医师编号 */,
    "apply_doc_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊申请医师代码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊申请医师姓名 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "auditor_id" integer  /* 文书审核人编号 */,
    "auditor_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "auditor_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书审核人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: consultation_record
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "consultation_record" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "apply_no" character varying(50)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "consultation_type" character varying(50)  /* 会诊类型 */,
    "consultation_person" character varying(50)  /* 会诊拟请人 */,
    "consultation_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 会诊时间 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "illness_summary" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 病情摘要 */,
    "consultation_purpose" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 会诊目的 */,
    "diagnose" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 诊断 */,
    "apply_doc_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 会诊申请医师编号 */,
    "apply_doc_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊申请医师代码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊申请医师姓名 */,
    "consultation_opinion" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 会诊意见 */,
    "consultation_advice" text  /* 会诊建议 */,
    "consultation__physician" text  /* 参与会诊医师 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "auditor_id" integer  /* 文书审核人编号 */,
    "auditor_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "auditor_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书审核人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(500)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 5weburl展示 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''::character varying  /* 报告类别编码 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: contagion_aids_detail
-- 注释: 传染病附卡艾滋病明细记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contagion_aids_detail" (
    "hiv_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_aids_card_id" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 源系统艾滋附卡编号 */,
    "contagion_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 传染病记录编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "parent_name" character varying(50)  /* 家长姓名 */,
    "nation_name" character varying(50)  /* 民族名称 */,
    "marriage_name" character varying(1)  /* 婚姻名称 */,
    "education" character varying(1)  /* 文化程度 */,
    "account_address" character varying(100)  /* 户籍住址 */,
    "sick_name" character varying(10)  /* 疾病名称 */,
    "inject_drugs" character varying(1)  /* 注射毒品史 */,
    "syringe_count" character varying(2)  /* 共用过注射器的人数 */,
    "non_marital" character varying(1)  /* 非婚异性性接触史 */,
    "non_marital_hc" character varying(2)  /* 非婚性行为的人数 */,
    "aids_casp" character varying(1)  /* 配偶/固定性伴阳性 */,
    "aids_msm" character varying(1)  /* 男男性行为史 */,
    "aids_msm_count" character varying(2)  /* 男男性行为人数 */,
    "outblood" character varying(1)  /* 献血(浆)史 */,
    "inblood" character varying(1)  /* 输血/血制品史 */,
    "mummasculine" character varying(1)  /* 母亲阳性 */,
    "jobexpose" character varying(1)  /* 职业暴露史 */,
    "operation_history" character varying(1)  /* 手术史 */,
    "aids_other" character varying(1)  /* 其他接触史 */,
    "aids_other_value" character varying(50)  /* 其他接触史内容 */,
    "unknown_con_his" character varying(1)  /* 不详接触史 */,
    "vd_history" character varying(1)  /* 性病史 */,
    "infection_path" character varying(1)  /* 最可能感染途径 */,
    "other_infection_path" character varying(1)  /* 其他感染路径 */,
    "samples_tested" character varying(1)  /* 检测样本来源 */,
    "other_samples_tested" character varying(1)  /* 其他检测样本来源 */,
    "samples_result" character varying(1)  /* 实验室检测及结论 */,
    "confirm_result_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认(替代策略)检测阳性日期 */,
    "confirm_result_agenc" character varying(100)  /* 确认(替代策略)检测阳性单位 */,
    "confirm_aids_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 艾滋病确诊日期 */,
    "report_unit_name" character varying(100)  /* 报告单位 */,
    "report_unit_phone" character varying(20)  /* 报告单位联系电话 */,
    "report_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告医生 */,
    "report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告日期 */,
    "memo" text  /* 备注 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("hiv_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "contagion_aids_detail" IS '传染病附卡艾滋病明细记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: contagion_hepatitis_detail
-- 注释: 传染病附卡肝炎明细记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contagion_hepatitis_detail" (
    "hepatitis_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_hp_card_id" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 源系统附卡肝炎卡号编号 */,
    "contagion_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 传染病记录编号 */,
    "hbsag_date" character varying(1)  /* HBsAg 阳性时间 */,
    "sign_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 首次出现乙肝症状和体征的时间 */,
    "sign_flag" character varying(1)  /* 首次出现乙肝症状和体征 */,
    "alt_denseness" character varying(10)  /* 谷丙转氨酶浓度 */,
    "igm_result" character varying(1)  /* 抗-HBc IgM 1:1000 检验结果 */,
    "liver_check" character varying(1)  /* 肝穿监测结果 */,
    "hbs_flag" character varying(1)  /* 恢复期血清 HBsAg 阴性,抗HBs 阳转  */,
    "contact_symptom_flag" character varying(1)  /* 密切接触者有无相同症状  */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("hepatitis_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "contagion_hepatitis_detail" IS '传染病附卡肝炎明细记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: contagion_record
-- 注释: 传染病记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contagion_record" (
    "contagion_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_card_id" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告卡编号 */,
    "report_type" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 报告类别 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "parent_name" character varying(50)  /* 家长姓名 */,
    "id_type_code" character varying(2)  /* 证件类型代码 */,
    "id_type_name" character varying(20)  /* 证件类型名称 */,
    "id_no" character varying(30)  /* 证件编号 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1)  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20)  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "work_address" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址 */,
    "contact_phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系人电话 */,
    "belong_flag" character varying(1)  /* 病人属于 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */,
    "profession_type" character varying(1)  /* 职业分类 */,
    "case_kind_one" character varying(1)  /* 病例分类一 */,
    "case_kind_two" character varying(1)  /* 病例分类二 */,
    "onset_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 发病日期 */,
    "diagnosis_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 诊断日期 */,
    "dead_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 死亡日期 */,
    "infectious_type" character varying(1)  /* 传染病类型 */,
    "infectious_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 传染病诊断代码 */,
    "relatedinfectious_name" character varying(200)  /* 订正病名 */,
    "status" character varying(1)  /* 报告状态 */,
    "cancel_reason" character varying(100)  /* 取消原因 */,
    "report_unit_name" character varying(100)  /* 报告单位名称 */,
    "report_unit_phone" character varying(20)  /* 报告单位联系电话 */,
    "report_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告医生 */,
    "report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告日期 */,
    "memo" text  /* 备注 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("contagion_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "contagion_record" IS '传染病记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cost_details
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cost_details" (
    "jlxh" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "jgid" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "zyh" character varying NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "fyrq" timestamp(0) without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "fyxh" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "fymc" character varying(120)  /*  */,
    "ypcd" bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "fysl" numeric(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "fydj" numeric(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "zjje" numeric(14,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "zfje" numeric(14,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "ysgh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "srgh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "qrgh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "fybq" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "fyks" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "zxks" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "jfrq" date NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "xmlx" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "yplx" smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "fyxm" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "jscs" smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "zfbl" numeric(4,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "yzxh" bigint  /*  */,
    "hzrq" date  /*  */,
    "yjrq" character varying(8)  /*  */,
    "zlje" numeric(14,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "zlxz" integer  /*  */,
    "yepb" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "dzbl" numeric(6,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "ytsl" numeric(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "tfgl" bigint  /*  */,
    "ztmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "jhh" bigint  /*  */,
    "wypb" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "zfflag" smallint  /*  */,
    "wzfyid" character varying(30)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("jlxh")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: crf_integration_data
-- 注释: 数据集成表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "crf_integration_data" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "source_study_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源项目编号 */,
    "source_event_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源事件编号 */,
    "source_crf_page_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源页面编号 */,
    "source_patient_id" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 标识病人唯一编号 */,
    "page_order" character varying(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 标识记录的唯一编号 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now()  /* 创建时间 */,
    "save_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 保存时间 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 更新时间 */,
    "state" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 状态 */,
    "edc_data_id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* edc数据集成ID */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "crf_integration_data" IS '数据集成表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: crf_integration_data_detail
-- 注释: 数据集成明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "crf_integration_data_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "crf_integration_data_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据集成编号 */,
    "object_id" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 控件唯一标识号 */,
    "value" text NOT NULL  /* 值 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "crf_integration_data_detail" IS '数据集成明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: crf_integration_patient
-- 注释: 数据集成患者表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "crf_integration_patient" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "study_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者ID */,
    "patient_no" character varying(5000)  /* 患者编号 */,
    "name" character varying(5000) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(5000) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "arm_id" character varying(5000)  /* 组别编号 */,
    "empi" character varying(5000)  /* 主索引号 */,
    "gender_code" character varying(5000)  /* 性别代码 */,
    "gender_name" character varying(5000)  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth" timestamp without time zone  /* 出生日期 */,
    "phone" character varying(5000)  /* 手机号码 */,
    "id_type_code" character varying(5000)  /* 证件类型代码 */,
    "id_type_name" character varying(5000)  /* 证件类型名称 */,
    "id_number" character varying(5000)  /* 证件号码 */,
    "address" character varying(5000)  /* 地址 */,
    "coonecter_name" character varying(5000)  /* 联系人姓名 */,
    "coonecter_phone" character varying(5000)  /* 联系人手机 */,
    "flag" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 标志位 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "crf_integration_patient" IS '数据集成患者表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: crf_item_map
-- 注释: 控件对照表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "crf_item_map" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "crf_item_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 控件自增号 */,
    "object_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 控件标识唯一号 */,
    "object_name" character varying(50)  /* 控件名称 */,
    "object_type" character varying(50)  /* 控件类型 */,
    "source_object_id" bigint  /* 源控件编号 */,
    "source_object_name" character varying(50)  /* 源控件名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "crf_item_map" IS '控件对照表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: crf_page_map
-- 注释: 页面对照表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "crf_page_map" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "source_crf_page_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源页面编号 */,
    "source_crf_page_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源页面名称 */,
    "crf_page_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 页面编号 */,
    "crf_page_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 页面名称 */,
    "relationship" smallint NOT NULL  /* 对照关系 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "crf_page_map" IS '页面对照表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: crf_task_data
-- 注释: 数据集成中间表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "crf_task_data" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "column_name" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 列名 */,
    "value" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 值 */,
    "flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "source_table" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 来源表名 */,
    "source_database" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 来源库名 */,
    "crf_integration_data_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据集成编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "crf_task_data" IS '数据集成中间表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: critical_illness_note
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "critical_illness_note" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "current_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 当前诊断 */,
    "relationship_between_family_members_and_patient" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属与患者关系 */,
    "is_patient_agree_with_medical_measures" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 患者是否同意医疗措施标记 0:否 ; 1:是  ;  */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_tel" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属联系电话 */,
    "patient_family_id_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属身份证号 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: critical_report_critical
-- 注释: 报告危急值
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "critical_report_critical" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "report_critical_number" text NOT NULL  /* 危急值编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "source_report_id" text  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "source_order_id" text  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "report_oper_sys_code" integer  /* 危急值发布人值域 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 危急值发布人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 危急值发布人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 危急值发布时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "critical_report_critical" IS '报告危急值';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cs_ysgzl
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cs_ysgzl" (
    "iid" bigint  /*  */,
    "cname" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "csqks" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "cbws" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "cbgzd" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "cbgysxm" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "dbgsj" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "dyysj" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "ctjx3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "cbrlx" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "cbgsj_hl7" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "cbz" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "point_id" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "croom" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "cfhl" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "visit_id" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "czkfz" character varying(200)  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_hd_evaluation_record
-- 注释: 血液透前评估表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_hd_evaluation_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号,自增 */,
    "hd_evaluation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 血透前评估单编号 */,
    "order_number" text NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "evaluation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 评估日期 */,
    "entry_mode" text  /* 入室方式 */,
    "consciousness" text  /* 意识 */,
    "body_temperature" text  /* 体温状况 */,
    "self_care_ability" text  /* 生活自理能力 */,
    "bd_pressure_status" text  /* 透前血压状况 */,
    "bd_pressure_high" text  /* 透前收缩压 */,
    "bd_pressure_low" text  /* 透前舒张压 */,
    "bd_heart_rate_status" text  /* 透前心率状况 */,
    "bd_heart_rate" text  /* 透前心率 */,
    "breathe_status" text  /* 呼吸状况 */,
    "physical_status" text  /* 体力状况 */,
    "recumbent_pos" text  /* 卧位 */,
    "appetite" text  /* 食欲 */,
    "drink_water_quantity_ctl" text  /* 饮水量控制 */,
    "sleep" text  /* 睡眠 */,
    "defecate_frequency" text  /* 大便频次（次/日） */,
    "defecate_status" text  /* 大便状态 */,
    "defecate_color" text  /* 大便颜色 */,
    "urine_volume" text  /* 尿量 */,
    "bleeding_status" text  /* 出血状况 */,
    "user_drug" text  /* 用药情况 */,
    "pd_status" text  /* 前次透析后情况 */,
    "pd_dehyd_status" text  /* 前次透析脱水情况 */,
    "pd_fistula_status" text  /* 前次透析内瘘穿刺点情况 */,
    "is_first_dialysis" boolean  /* 是否首次透析 */,
    "asnb_cathete_post" text  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-位置 */,
    "asnb_cathete_wound_appear" text  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-伤口外观 */,
    "asnb_cathete_dresse" text  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-换药 */,
    "asnb_cathete_flow" text  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-导管流量 */,
    "asnb_cathete_is_fever" text  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-有无发热 */,
    "aafa_pos" text  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-位置及术后状况 */,
    "aafa_last_dialysis_puncture" text  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-上次透析穿刺情况 */,
    "aafa_anastomosis_tactus" text  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-触诊/听诊血管杂音 */,
    "aafa_anastomosis_ripe" text  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-内瘘成熟训练 */,
    "aafa_service_life" text  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-内瘘使用年限 */,
    "health_education_method" text  /* 健康教育方式 */,
    "diet_guid" text  /* 饮食指导 */,
    "sport_guid" text  /* 运动指导 */,
    "vascular_access_guid" text  /* 血管通路指导 */,
    "anti_slip_guid" text  /* 防管路滑脱指导 */,
    "weight_manage_guid" text  /* 体重管理指导 */,
    "health_edu_recipients" text  /* 健康教育受教人 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值值域 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" text  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" text  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "duty_user_code" text  /* 责任人代码 */,
    "duty_user_name" text  /* 责任人姓名 */,
    "last_update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_hd_evaluation_record" IS '血液透前评估表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_hd_pat_record
-- 注释: 血液透析患者记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_hd_pat_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "hd_pat_rec_number" text NOT NULL  /* 血透记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "hd_rec_type" text  /* 血透记录类型 */,
    "hd_rec_class_sys_code" integer  /* 血透记录段落分类字典 */,
    "hd_rec_class_name" text  /* 血透记录段落分类名称 */,
    "hd_rec_class_code" text  /* 血透记录段落分类代码 */,
    "hd_rec_item_sys_code" integer  /* 血透记录项目字典 */,
    "hd_rec_item_name" text  /* 血透记录项目名称 */,
    "hd_rec_item_code" text  /* 血透记录项目代码 */,
    "value_one" text  /* 值1 */,
    "value_one_html_content" text  /* 值1html格式结果 */,
    "value_one_xml_content" text  /* 值1xml格式结果 */,
    "value_one_text_content" text  /* 值1text格式结果 */,
    "value_one_other_content" text  /* 值1other格式结果 */,
    "unit_one_std_sys_code" integer  /* 单位1标准字典 */,
    "unit_one_name" text  /* 单位1名称 */,
    "unit_one_code" text  /* 单位1代码 */,
    "value_two" text  /* 值2 */,
    "value_two_html_content" text  /* 值2html格式结果 */,
    "value_two_xml_content" text  /* 值2xml格式结果 */,
    "value_two_text_content" text  /* 值2text格式结果 */,
    "value_two_other_content" text  /* 值2other格式结果 */,
    "unit_two_std_sys_code" integer  /* 单位2标准字典 */,
    "unit_two_name" text  /* 单位2名称 */,
    "unit_two_code" text  /* 单位2代码 */,
    "value_three" text  /* 值3 */,
    "value_three_html_content" text  /* 值3html格式结果 */,
    "value_three_xml_content" text  /* 值3xml格式结果 */,
    "value_three_text_content" text  /* 值3text格式结果 */,
    "value_three_other_content" text  /* 值3other格式结果 */,
    "unit_three_std_sys_code" integer  /* 单位3标准字典 */,
    "unit_three_name" text  /* 单位3名称 */,
    "unit_three_code" text  /* 单位3代码 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_hd_pat_record" IS '血液透析患者记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_hd_treat_record
-- 注释: 血液透析治疗记录主表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_hd_treat_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号,自增 */,
    "hd_treat_number" text NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗单主编号 */,
    "hd_evaluation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗单编号 */,
    "order_number" text NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "treat_dept_sys_code" integer  /* 治疗科室值域 */,
    "treat_dept_code" text  /* 治疗科室代码 */,
    "treat_dept_name" text  /* 治疗科室名称 */,
    "treat_date" text  /* 治疗日期 */,
    "dialysis_shift" text  /* 透析班次 */,
    "dialysis_bed" text  /* 透析床号 */,
    "bd_temperature" text  /* 透前体温 */,
    "bd_heart_rate" text  /* 透前心率 */,
    "bd_breathe" text  /* 透前呼吸频率 */,
    "ad_temperature" text  /* 透后体温 */,
    "ad_heart_rate" text  /* 透后心率 */,
    "ad_breathe" text  /* 透后呼吸频率 */,
    "bd_pressure_high" text  /* 透前收缩压 */,
    "bd_pressure_low" text  /* 透前舒张压 */,
    "ad_pressure_high" text  /* 透后收缩压 */,
    "ad_pressure_low" text  /* 透后舒张压 */,
    "plan_treat_time" text  /* 预计治疗时长 */,
    "reality_treat_time" text  /* 实际治疗时长 */,
    "blood_flow" text  /* 血流量 */,
    "dry_weight" text  /* 干体重 */,
    "dialysis_before_weight" text  /* 透前体重（脱衣体重） */,
    "dialysis_after_weight" text  /* 透后体重 */,
    "is_dry_weight_reached" text  /* 是否达干体重 */,
    "period_weight_change" text  /* 期间体重变化 */,
    "period_weight_change_rate" text  /* 期间体重变化率（%） */,
    "ultrafiltration_is_greater_than_five" text  /* 超滤大于5（%） */,
    "filter_out_preset_value" text  /* 滤出量预设值 */,
    "reality_ultrafiltration_total" text  /* 实际超滤总量 */,
    "treat_mode" text  /* 治疗模式 */,
    "purifier" text  /* 净化器 */,
    "dialyzer" text  /* 透析机 */,
    "irrigator" text  /* 灌流器 */,
    "catheter_model" text  /* 导管型号 */,
    "dialysate_composition" text  /* 透析液成分 */,
    "vascular_access_des" text  /* 血管通路描述 */,
    "dialysate_flow" text  /* 透析液流量 */,
    "dialysate_state" text  /* 透析中情况 */,
    "anticoagulant_summary" text  /* 抗凝总结 */,
    "filter_coagulation" text  /* 滤器凝血情况 */,
    "blood_coagulation_pipeline" text  /* 管路凝血情况 */,
    "oxy_time" text  /* 吸氧时长 */,
    "ecg_nurse_time" text  /* 心电护理时长 */,
    "nurse_summary" text  /* 护理小结 */,
    "treat_summary" text  /* 治疗小结 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值值域 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" text  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" text  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "cathet_nurse_code" text  /* 穿刺/导管护士代码 */,
    "cathet_nurse_name" text  /* 穿刺/导管护士姓名 */,
    "check_nurse_code" text  /* 核查护士代码 */,
    "check_nurse_name" text  /* 核查护士姓名 */,
    "duty_doc_code" text  /* 责任医生代码 */,
    "duty_doc_name" text  /* 责任医生姓名 */,
    "duty_user_code" text  /* 责任人代码 */,
    "duty_user_name" text  /* 责任人姓名 */,
    "last_update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_hd_treat_record" IS '血液透析治疗记录主表';
|
|-- ========================================

    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
