,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_hd_treat_record_h_detail" IS '血液透析治疗处置明细表';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_hd_treat_record_t_detail
-- 注释: 血液透析治疗明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_hd_treat_record_t_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号,自增 */,
    "hd_treat_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗明细主编号 */,
    "hd_treat_number" text NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗单主编号 */,

    "treat_pressure_high" text  /* 治疗时收缩压 */,
    "treat_pressure_low" text  /* 治疗时舒张压 */,
    "treat_heart_rate" text  /* 治疗时心率 */,
    "treat_blood_flow" text  /* 治疗时血流量 */,
    "ultrafiltration_rate" text  /* 超滤率 */,
    "ultrafiltration_volumne" text  /* 超滤量 */,
    "pressure_venous" text  /* 静脉压 */,
    "conductivity" text  /* 电导度 */,
    "dialysate_temperature" text  /* 透析液温度 */,
    "illness_treat" text  /* 病情处理 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_hd_treat_record_t_detail" IS '血液透析治疗明细表';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_reh_assess_detail_rec
-- 注释: 康复评估明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_reh_assess_detail_rec" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "reh_assess_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 康复明细评估编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "reh_assess_master_number" text NOT NULL  /* 康复评估编号 */,
    "scale_item_sys_code" integer  /* 明细项目值域 */,
    "scale_item_code" text  /* 明细项目代码 */,
    "scale_item_name" text  /* 明细项目名称 */,
    "result_score" text  /* 结果分数 */,
    "result_description" text  /* 结果描述 */,
    "result_html_content" text  /* html格式结果 */,
    "result_xml_content" text  /* xml格式结果 */,
    "result_text_content" text  /* text格式结果 */,
    "result_other_content" text  /* other格式结果 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_reh_assess_detail_rec" IS '康复评估明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_reh_assess_master_rec
-- 注释: 康复评估表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_reh_assess_master_rec" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "reh_assess_master_number" text NOT NULL  /* 康复评估编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "eva_scale_sys_code" integer  /* 评定量表字典 */,
    "eva_scale_code" text  /* 评定量表代码 */,
    "eva_scale_file_name" text  /* 评定记录名称 */,
    "diagnose_description" text  /* 测评前判断 */,
    "scale_status_sys_code" integer  /* 评估状态值域 */,
    "scale_status_code" text  /* 评估状态代码 */,
    "phase_record_type_sys_code" integer  /* 治疗阶段类型值域 */,
    "phase_record_type_code" text  /* 治疗阶段类型代码 */,
    "evaluation_percent" text  /* 评估进度 */,
    "total_scale_item_count" text  /* 总计评估技术数量 */,
    "finished_scale_item_count" text  /* 完成的评估技术数量 */,
    "cure_phase_record_sys_code" integer  /* 阶段记录值域 */,
    "cure_phase_record_code" text  /* 阶段记录编码 */,
    "start_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始评估时间 */,
    "evaluation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 测评日期 */,
    "user_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "evaluation_user_code" text  /* 测评医生编码 */,
    "creation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "creation_user_code" text  /* 创建人编码 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_code" text  /* 最后修改人编码 */,
    "audit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "audit_user_code" text  /* 审核人编码 */,
    "audit_remark" text  /* 审核备注 */,
    "result_score" text  /* 结果分数 */,
    "result_description" text  /* 结果描述 */,
    "result_html_content" text  /* html格式结果 */,
    "result_xml_content" text  /* xml格式结果 */,
    "result_text_content" text  /* text格式结果 */,
    "result_other_content" text  /* other格式结果 */,
    "result_remark" text  /* 分析结果备注 */,
    "close_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 归档日期 */,
    "last_submit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后提交时间 */,
    "last_report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后输出报告的日期 */,
    "warning_result_content" text  /* 量表评估警告信息 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_reh_assess_master_rec" IS '康复评估表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: cure_rehab_treat_rec
-- 注释: 康复治疗记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cure_rehab_treat_rec" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "reh_treat_number" text NOT NULL  /* 康复治疗记录编号 */,
    "reh_assess_master_number" text NOT NULL  /* 康复评估编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "treat_item_sys_code" integer  /* 治疗项目值域 */,
    "treat_item_name" text  /* 治疗项目名称 */,
    "treat_item_code" text  /* 治疗项目代码 */,
    "treat_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 治疗日期 */,
    "treat_cycle_date" text  /* 治疗周期 */,
    "treat_rec" text  /* 治疗记录 */,
    "start_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "exec_treat_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 执行治疗时间 */,
    "exec_status" text  /* 执行状态 */,
    "user_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "plan_doc_user_code" text  /* 计划安排治疗师代码 */,
    "plan_doc_user_name" text  /* 计划安排治疗师姓名 */,
    "exec_doc_user_code" text  /* 实际执行的治疗师代码 */,
    "exec_doc_user_name" text  /* 实际执行的治疗师姓名 */,
    "create_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "create_user_code" text  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_user_name" text  /* 创建人姓名 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_code" text  /* 最后修改人代码 */,
    "last_edit_user_name" text  /* 最后修改人姓名 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "cure_rehab_treat_rec" IS '康复治疗记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: data_control_log
-- 注释: 数据控制日志，用于记录settle质控日志
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data_control_log" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('dqc_v3.data_control_log_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 自增主键 */,
    "description" text NOT NULL  /* 描述 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "data_control_log" IS '数据控制日志，用于记录settle质控日志';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: data_error_record
-- 注释: 数据抽取错误记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data_error_record" (
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 记录编号 */,
    "database_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 数据库名称 */,
    "source_database" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 数据源数据库 */,
    "error_id" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 错误编号 */,
    "schame_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 模式名称 */,
    "table_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 表名称 */,
    "column_name" character varying(50)  /* 列名称 */,
    "error_note" text  /* 错误备注 */,
    "error_type" character varying(50)  /* 错误类型 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "data_error_record" IS '数据抽取错误记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: data_error_type
-- 注释: 数据抽取错误类型记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data_error_type" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增列 */,
    "error_type" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 错误类型 */,
    "error_note" character varying(2000) NOT NULL  /* 错误备注 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "data_error_type" IS '数据抽取错误类型记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: data_governance_record
-- 注释: 数据治理记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data_governance_record" (
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 记录编号 */,
    "schema_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 域名 */,
    "table_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 表名 */,
    "column_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 列名 */,
    "data_record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据记录编号 */,
    "source_data" text  /* 源数据 */,
    "governance_data" text  /* 治理后数据 */,
    "governance_fun" text  /* 治理函数 */,
    "governance_type" character varying(50)  /* 治理类型 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "original_column" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 原始列名 */,
    "original_record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 原始记录编号 */,
    "original_data" character varying(50)  /* 原始数据 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "data_governance_record" IS '数据治理记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: data_governance_type
-- 注释: 数据治理类型
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data_governance_type" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "governance_type" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 治理类型 */,
    "governance_note" character varying(2000) NOT NULL  /* 治理备注 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "data_governance_type" IS '数据治理类型';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: date_type
-- 注释: 日期类型
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "date_type" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 主键 */,
    "date" date  /* 日期 */,
    "type" integer  /* 类型 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "date_type" IS '日期类型';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: department
-- 注释: 科室信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "department" (
    "dept_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 科室编号，自增号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 科室名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" integer  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "is_clinical" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否临床,true:临床，false:非临床 */,
    "patent_dept_code" character varying(20)  /* 上级科室编码 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 机构代码 */,
    "org_id" integer  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "department" IS '科室信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: department0902
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "department0902" (
    "dept_id" bigint  /*  */,
    "dept_code" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "spell_code" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "wb_code" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "code_sys_id" integer  /*  */,
    "is_std" boolean  /*  */,
    "state" smallint  /*  */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /*  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /*  */,
    "is_clinical" boolean  /*  */,
    "patent_dept_code" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "org_id" integer  /*  */

);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: dept_summary
-- 注释: 科室小结
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dept_summary" (
    "summary_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 小结信息序号，自增号 */,
    "phyexam_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 科室名称 */,
    "title" character varying(50)  /* 标题 */,
    "dept_summary" text NOT NULL  /* 科室小结信息 */,
    "doc_id" integer  /* 检查医生编号 */,
    "doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查医生代码 */,
    "doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查医生姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "dept_summary" IS '科室小结';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: diag_patient_diagnose
-- 注释: 病人诊断记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "diag_patient_diagnose" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "pat_diag_number" text NOT NULL  /* 病人诊断序号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "diag_class_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断类别值域 */,
    "diag_class_code" text  /* 诊断类别编号 */,
    "diag_class_name" text  /* 诊断类别名称 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "diag_code" text  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "is_primary" text  /* 是否主要诊断 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "diag_doc_code" text  /* 诊断医生编号 */,
    "diag_doc_name" text  /* 诊断医生姓名 */,
    "diag_time" text  /* 诊断时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "diag_patient_diagnose" IS '病人诊断记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: diagnose
-- 注释: 诊断字典表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "diagnose" (
    "diag_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 诊断编号，自增号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" integer  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "diag_code2" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编码2 */,
    "icd_name1" character varying(100)  /* 疾病名称1 */,
    "icd_name2" character varying(100)  /* 疾病名称2 */,
    "parent_code" character varying(50)  /* 上级编码 */,
    "disease_id" integer  /* 疾病分类编号 */,
    "disease30_flag" boolean  /* 30种疾病标志 */,
    "infect_flag" boolean  /* 传染病标志 */,
    "cancer_flag" boolean  /* 肿瘤标志 */,
    "sex_type" character varying(1)  /* 适用性别 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "std_calss_id" integer  /* 基准分类编号 */,
    "state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("diag_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "diagnose" IS '诊断字典表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: dianping
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dianping" (
    "batch_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "prescription_number" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "prescription_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "prescription_date" date  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "registration_number" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "birth_date" date  /*  */,
    "gender" character(1)  /*  */,
    "diagnosis" text  /*  */,
    "department_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "department_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "doctor_id" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "doctor_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "dispensary" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "pharmacist_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "drug_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "dosage_form" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "specification" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "hisid" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "packaging" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "tcm_western_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dispensing_quantity" integer  /*  */,
    "dose" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "frequency" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "usage_instructions" text  /*  */,
    "unit_price" numeric(10,2)  /*  */,
    "amount" numeric(10,2)  /*  */,
    "total_prescription_amount" numeric(10,2)  /*  */,
    "review_result" text  /*  */,
    "reviewer" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "review_date" date  /*  */,
    "pre_review_result" text  /*  */,
    "point_id" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(200)  /*  */

);

    "icd10" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "mc" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "sx" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "lrxx" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "国临编码" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临名称" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "国临类别" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "国临录入选项" character varying(20)  /*  */,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: dicicdss_dz_ej
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dicicdss_dz_ej" (
    "icd10" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "mc" text  /*  */,
    "sx" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "bbh" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临编码" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临名称" text  /*  */,
    "国临类别" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临录入选项" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临四级手术" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临微创手术" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临版本" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "国临三级手术" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "中医操作" character varying(50)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("icd10")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: discharge_record
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "discharge_record" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院时间 */,
    "out_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 出院时间 */,
    "in_hospital_time" character varying(50)  /* 住院时长 */,
    "admission_diagnose" character varying(500)  /* 入院诊断 */,
    "discharge_diagnose" character varying(500)  /* 出院诊断 */,
    "admission_conditon" text  /* 入院时情况 */,
    "treatment_course" text  /* 治疗经过 */,
    "discharge_condition" text  /* 出院时情况 */,
    "treatment_effect" text  /* 治疗效果 */,
    "discharge_order" text  /* 出院医嘱 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "auditor_id" integer  /* 文书审核人编号 */,
    "auditor_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "auditor_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书审核人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: djps_dsz_zyzbb
-- 注释: 专业指标表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "djps_dsz_zyzbb" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('user_defined.djps_dsz_zyzbb_id_seq'::regclass)  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying  /* 年龄 */,
    "out_dept_id" integer  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" character varying  /* 科室名称 */,
    "out_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 出院日期 */,
    "director_doc_id" character varying  /* 医生编号 */,
    "director_doc_name" character varying  /* 医生名称 */,
    "inpat_id" character varying  /* 就诊号 */,
    "patient_id" character varying  /* 患者编号 */,
    "source_inpat_no" character varying  /* 住院号 */,
    "in_days" numeric  /* 住院天数 */,
    "in_num" numeric  /* 住院次数 */,
    "memo1" character varying  /* 备注1 */,
    "memo2" character varying  /* 备注2 */,
    "memo3" character varying  /* 备注3 */,
    "zymc" character varying  /* 专业名称 */,
    "zbmc" character varying  /* 指标名称 */,
    "zbfz_fm" character varying  /* 指标分子 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "djps_dsz_zyzbb" IS '专业指标表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: drug
-- 注释: 药品字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "drug" (
    "drug_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 药品编号，自增号 */,
    "drug_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 药品代码 */,
    "trade_name" character varying(50)  /* 商品名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 商品名拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 商品名五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" integer  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "regular_name" character varying(50)  /* 通用名 */,
    "specs" character varying(40)  /* 规格 */,
    "dose_model_name" character varying(100)  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "dose_unit_name" character varying(100)  /* 剂量单位名称 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "producer_name" character varying(100)  /* 生产厂家名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "component" jsonb  /* 成分代码 */,
    "product_name" jsonb  /* 商品名称 */,
    "doseunit" jsonb  /* 剂量 */,
    "form" jsonb  /* 剂型 */,
    "decoration" jsonb  /* 修饰代码 */,
    "fangji" jsonb  /* 方剂 */,
    "location" jsonb  /* 产地 */,
    "manufacturer" jsonb  /* 厂家 */,
    "yaocai" jsonb  /* 药材 */,
    "chemical" jsonb  /* 化学成分 */,
    "class" jsonb  /* 分类 */,
    "nodeid" jsonb  /* 归一ID */,
    "standardch" jsonb  /* 归一中文名 */,
    "extend1" character varying  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "extend4" character varying  /* 扩展字段4 */,
    "extend5" character varying  /* 扩展字段5 */,
    "extend6" character varying  /* 扩展字段6 */,
    "extend7" character varying  /* 扩展字段7 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "drug" IS '药品字典';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ecg_report
-- 注释: 心电报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ecg_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20)  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(150) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告小分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告小分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告小分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text NOT NULL  /* 检查结论 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "image_no" character varying(100)  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_id" integer  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查人代码 */,
    "check_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "item_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检查项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" character varying(40)  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ecg_report" IS '心电报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ecg_report_item
-- 注释: 心电报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ecg_report_item" (
    "ecg_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源心电报告结果明细项目编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("ecg_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ecg_report_item" IS '心电报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ecg_result_detail
-- 注释: 心电报告结果明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ecg_result_detail" (
    "ecg_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "ecg_item_id" bigint  /* 心电项目编号 */,
    "ecg_item_code" character varying(20)  /* 心电项目代码 */,
    "ecg_item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 心电项目名称 */,
    "value" character varying(20)  /* 数值 */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源心电报告检查项目编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("ecg_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ecg_result_detail" IS '心电报告结果明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: emc_tri_patient
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "emc_tri_patient" (
    "id" numeric(19,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "address" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "age" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "age_type" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "birthday" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "gender" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "id_card" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "is_native" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "name" character varying(255) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "telephone" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "treatment_card" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "city_id" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "county_id" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "province_id" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "race" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "jzhm" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "outhosp_index_no" character varying(20)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: emc_tri_triage_record
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "emc_tri_triage_record" (
    "id" numeric(19,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "allergy_history_text" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "arrival_way" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "audit_state" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "breathing_rate" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "change_level_reason" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "conscious_score" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "crowd_type" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "destination" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "diastolic" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "glucose" numeric(5,2)  /*  */,
    "is_spec_access" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "is_trauma" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "the_level" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "pain_score" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "pmhy_text" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "pulse" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "remark" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "spo2" numeric(5,2)  /*  */,
    "symptom" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "symptom_text" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "systolic" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "temperature" numeric(5,1)  /*  */,
    "trauma_score" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "triage_state" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "triage_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "audit_nurse" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "destination_dept" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "event_id" numeric(19,0)  /*  */,
    "outpatient_record_id" numeric(19,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_id" numeric(19,0)  /*  */,
    "triage_nurse" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "vitalremark" character varying(450)  /*  */,
    "special_patient" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "fall_assessment" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "conscious_grade" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "conscious_grade1" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "isdelete" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "seq_no" character varying(6)  /*  */,
    "destination_new" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "fall_score" numeric(10,0)  /*  */,
    "arrival_way_other" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "three_non_id" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "stroke_patient_id" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "chest_pain_id" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "rescue_towards" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "direct_deptname" character varying(100)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: employee
-- 注释: 员工信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "employee" (
    "empl_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 员工编号,自增号 */,
    "empl_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 员工工号 */,
    "empl_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 员工姓名 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" integer  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 所属科室编号 */,
    "empl_type_code" character varying(20)  /* 员工类别代码 */,
    "empl_type_name" character varying(20)  /* 员工类别名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("empl_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "employee" IS '员工信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: emr_inpat_medical_record
-- 注释: 住院病历
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "emr_inpat_medical_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 文书编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "record_type_sys_code" integer  /* 文书类型值域 */,
    "record_type_code" text  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" text  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" text  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" text  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" text  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" text  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "create_code" text  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_name" text  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" text  /* 文书创建时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "record_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "inprec_state_sys_code" integer  /* 病历状态值域 */,
    "inprec_state_code" text  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" text  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "emr_inpat_medical_record" IS '住院病历';
|

    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "record_type_sys_code" integer  /* 文书类型值域 */,
    "record_type_code" text  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" text  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" text  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" text  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" text  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" text  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "create_code" text  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_name" text  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" text  /* 文书创建时间 */,
    "is_valid" text NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "nurserec_state_sys_code" integer  /* 病历状态值域 */,
    "nurserec_state_code" text  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "nurserec_state_name" text  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: emr_outpat_medical_record
-- 注释: 门诊病历
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "emr_outpat_medical_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "source_record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,

    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,

    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 科室名称 */,
    "record_type_sys_code" integer  /* 文书类型值域 */,
    "record_type_code" text  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" text  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" text  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" text  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" text  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" text  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "create_code" text  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_name" text  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" text  /* 文书创建时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "outrec_state_sys_code" integer  /* 病历状态值域 */,

    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,

,

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: endoscopy_report
-- 注释: 内窥镜报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "endoscopy_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20)  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(150) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告小分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告小分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告小分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text NOT NULL  /* 检查结论 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" character varying(200)  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" character varying(100)  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_id" integer  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查人代码 */,
    "check_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "item_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检查项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统数据创建时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" character varying(40)  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "biopsy_site" character varying(40)  /* 活检部位 */,
    "hp_test" character varying(20)  /* HP检验 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "endoscopy_report" IS '内窥镜报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: endoscopy_report_item
-- 注释: 内窥镜报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "endoscopy_report_item" (
    "endoscopy_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源内窥镜报告检查项目编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("endoscopy_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "endoscopy_report_item" IS '内窥镜报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: endoscopy_result_detail
-- 注释: 内窥镜报告结果明细 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "endoscopy_result_detail" (
    "endoscopy_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "endoscopy_item_id" bigint  /* 内窥镜结果项目编号 */,
    "endoscopy_item_code" character varying(20)  /* 内窥镜结果项目代码 */,
    "endoscopy_item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 内窥镜结果项目名称 */,
    "value" character varying(20)  /* 结果值 */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "reference_range" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围 */,
    "reference_range_man" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围（男） */,
    "reference_range_woman" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围（女） */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源内窥镜报告结果明细项目编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("endoscopy_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "endoscopy_result_detail" IS '内窥镜报告结果明细 ';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: event_map
-- 注释: 事件对照表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "event_map" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "source_event_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源事件编号 */,
    "source_event_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源事件名称 */,
    "event_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 事件编号 */,
    "event_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 事件名称 */,
    "relationship" smallint NOT NULL  /* 对照关系 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "event_map" IS '事件对照表';
|

    "guarantor_phone_num" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "bill_checked_date_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "settled_indicator" boolean  /*  */,
    "frequency_nurse" integer  /*  */,
    "reserved_date01" date  /*  */,
    "reserved_date02" date  /*  */,
    "inpat_id" bigint  /*  */

);

    "id" smallint  /*  */,
    "parentid" smallint  /*  */,
    "dept_code" character varying(16) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "contagious" boolean DEFAULT false  /*  */,
    "hospital_no" character varying(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '01110002'::character varying  /*  */,

    "discharge_conditions" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "infection" boolean DEFAULT false  /*  */,
    "parent_id" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "parent_sign_date" date  /*  */,
    "parent_user_id" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "diagnosis_lefts_desc" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "diagnosis_ms_desc" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "diagnosis_group" smallint  /*  */,
    "diagnosis_only_id" character varying(30)  /*  */,

);

    "orderno" character varying(80) NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "endtime" character varying(40)  /*  */,

    "doctor_level" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "goal" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "reason" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "dosage" double precision  /*  */,
    "dosage_units" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "frequency" character varying(40)  /*  */,

,
    PRIMARY KEY ("orderno", "caseid", "aname")
);

,

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: f_nis5_routine2
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "f_nis5_routine2" (
    "caseid" character varying(128) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "testno" character varying(128) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "rindex" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "specimen" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "reporttime" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "requesttime" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "rtype" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "ritem" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "rvalue" character varying(80)  /*  */,
    "abnormal" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "dept" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "outside" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "lastmodifytime" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "ihint" character varying(400)  /*  */,
    "firstinserttime" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "md5no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "reference" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "units" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "abnormal_original" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "report_item_original" character varying(200)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("caseid", "testno", "rindex")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: fee_inpat_balance
-- 注释: 住院结算表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "fee_inpat_balance" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "balance_number" text NOT NULL  /* 住院结算编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "trans_type" text NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "balance_no" text  /* 结算序号 */,
    "invoice_no" text  /* 发票号 */,
    "pay_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 结算类别值域 */,
    "pay_kind_code" text  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" text  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 保险类别值域 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" text  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" text  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "balance_type_sys_code" integer  /* 结算类型值域 */,
    "balance_type_name" text  /* 结算类型名称 */,
    "prepay_cost" text NOT NULL  /* 预交金额 */,
    "total_cost" text NOT NULL  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" text  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" text  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" text  /* 自付金额 */,
    "eco_cost" text  /* 优惠金额 */,
    "der_cost" text  /* 减免金额 */,
    "return_cost" text  /* 返还金额 */,
    "cash_cost" text  /* 现金支付 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 结算人员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "fee_inpat_balance" IS '住院结算表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: fee_inpat_fee_detail
-- 注释: 住院费用明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "fee_inpat_fee_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "inpat_fee_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 收费明细编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "trans_type" text NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "balance_number" text  /* 结算编号 */,
    "invoice_no" text  /* 发票号 */,
    "order_number" text NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "min_fee_sys_code" integer  /* 最小费用值域 */,
    "min_fee_code" text  /* 最小费用代码 */,
    "min_fee_name" text  /* 最小费用名称 */,
    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" text  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" text NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "drug_flag" text NOT NULL  /* 药品标志 */,
    "unit" text  /* 计价单位 */,
    "unit_price" text  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" text  /* 数量 */,
    "total_cost" text NOT NULL  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" text  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" text  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" text  /* 自付金额 */,
    "eco_cost" text  /* 优惠金额 */,
    "balance_flag" text  /* 结算标志 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 收费员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "fee_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 收费时间 */,
    "fee_state" text  /* 收费状态 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "fee_dept_sys_id" integer  /* 申请科室值域 */,
    "fee_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "fee_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "fee_ward_sys_id" integer  /* 申请病区值域 */,
    "fee_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "fee_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "fee_inpat_fee_detail" IS '住院费用明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: fee_outpat_fee
-- 注释: 门诊费用汇总表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "fee_outpat_fee" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "fee_number" text NOT NULL  /* 门诊收费编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_number" text NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "trans_type" text NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "invoice_no" text  /* 发票号 */,
    "pay_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 结算类别值域 */,
    "pay_kind_code" text  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" text  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 保险类别值域 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" text  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" text  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "total_cost" text NOT NULL  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" text  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" text  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" text  /* 自付金额 */,
    "real_cost" text  /* 实付金额 */,
    "phyexam_flag" text  /* 体检标志 */,
    "fee_state" text  /* 收费状态 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 收费员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 收费员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "fee_outpat_fee" IS '门诊费用汇总表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: fee_outpat_fee_detail
-- 注释: 门诊费用明细表

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "fee_outpat_fee_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,

    "source_recipe_detail_id" text  /* 源系统处方明细编号 */,
    "min_fee_sys_code" integer  /* 最小费用值域 */,
    "min_fee_code" text  /* 最小费用代码 */,

    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" text  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" text NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "drug_flag" text NOT NULL  /* 药品标志 */,
    "unit" text  /* 计价单位 */,
    "unit_price" text  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" text  /* 数量 */,
    "total_cost" text NOT NULL  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" text  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" text  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" text  /* 自付金额 */,
    "fee_state" text  /* 收费状态 */,
    "phyexam_flag" text  /* 体检标志 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 收费员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "fee_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 收费时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "fee_dept_sys_id" integer  /* 申请科室值域 */,
    "fee_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "fee_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "fee_ward_sys_id" integer  /* 申请病区值域 */,
    "fee_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区代码 */,

,

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: followup_record
-- 注释: 随访记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "followup_record" (
    "followup_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "contact_phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系电话 */,
    "is_linkman" boolean  /* 是否联系人 */,
    "contact_relation_id" integer  /* 联系人关系编号 */,
    "contact_relation_code" character varying(10)  /* 联系人关系代码 */,
    "contact_relation_name" character varying(20)  /* 联系人关系名称 */,
    "followup_doc_code" character varying(20)  /* 随访医生编码 */,
    "followup_doc_name" character varying(20)  /* 随访医生名称 */,
    "followup_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 随访日期 */,
    "followup_way" character varying(20)  /* 随访方式 */,
    "followup_status" character varying(2)  /* 随访状态 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(20)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "followup_rule_code" character varying(20)  /* 随访规则编码 */,
    "followup_rule_name" character varying(20)  /* 随访规则名称 */,
    "followup_content" character varying(200)  /* 随访内容 */,
    "followup_html_content" text  /* html格式随访内容 */,
    "followup_xml_content" text  /* xml格式随访内容 */,
    "followup_text_content" text  /* text格式随访内容 */,
    "followup_other_content" text  /* other格式随访内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 随访记录原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 随访记录原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 随访记录原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 随访记录原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("followup_record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "followup_record" IS '随访记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_evaluation_record
-- 注释: 血液透前评估表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_evaluation_record" (
    "hd_evaluation_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透前评估编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_hd_evaluation_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统血透评估单编号 */,
    "source_order_number" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "evaluation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 评估日期 */,
    "entry_mode" character varying(20)  /* 入室方式 */,
    "consciousness" character varying(20)  /* 意识 */,
    "body_temperature" character varying(20)  /* 体温状况 */,
    "self_care_ability" character varying(20)  /* 生活自理能力 */,
    "bd_pressure_status" character varying(20)  /* 透前血压状况 */,
    "bd_pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前收缩压 */,
    "bd_pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前舒张压 */,
    "bd_heart_rate_status" character varying(20)  /* 透前心率状况 */,
    "bd_heart_rate" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前心率 */,
    "breathe_status" character varying(20)  /* 呼吸状况 */,
    "physical_status" character varying(20)  /* 体力状况 */,
    "recumbent_pos" character varying(20)  /* 卧位 */,
    "appetite" character varying(20)  /* 食欲 */,
    "drink_water_quantity_ctl" character varying(20)  /* 饮水量控制 */,
    "sleep" character varying(20)  /* 睡眠 */,
    "defecate_frequency" character varying(10)  /* 大便频次（次/日） */,
    "defecate_status" character varying(20)  /* 大便状态 */,
    "defecate_color" character varying(20)  /* 大便颜色 */,
    "urine_volume" character varying(10)  /* 尿量 */,
    "bleeding_status" character varying(20)  /* 出血状况 */,
    "user_drug" text  /* 用药情况 */,
    "pd_status" character varying(100)  /* 前次透析后情况 */,
    "pd_dehyd_status" character varying(100)  /* 前次透析脱水情况 */,
    "pd_fistula_status" character varying(100)  /* 前次透析内瘘穿刺点情况 */,
    "is_first_dialysis" boolean  /* 是否首次透析 */,
    "asnb_cathete_post" character varying(100)  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-位置 */,
    "asnb_cathete_wound_appear" character varying(100)  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-伤口外观 */,
    "asnb_cathete_dresse" character varying(100)  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-换药 */,
    "asnb_cathete_flow" character varying(100)  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-导管流量 */,
    "asnb_cathete_is_fever" boolean  /* 单针双向导管置管术后-有无发热 */,
    "aafa_pos" character varying(100)  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-位置及术后状况 */,
    "aafa_last_dialysis_puncture" character varying(100)  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-上次透析穿刺情况 */,
    "aafa_anastomosis_tactus" character varying(100)  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-触诊/听诊血管杂音 */,
    "aafa_anastomosis_ripe" character varying(100)  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-内瘘成熟训练 */,
    "aafa_service_life" character varying(100)  /* 动静脉内瘘吻合术后-内瘘使用年限 */,
    "health_education_method" character varying(100)  /* 健康教育方式 */,
    "diet_guid" character varying(100)  /* 饮食指导 */,
    "sport_guid" character varying(100)  /* 运动指导 */,
    "vascular_access_guid" character varying(100)  /* 血管通路指导 */,
    "anti_slip_guid" character varying(100)  /* 防管路滑脱指导 */,
    "weight_manage_guid" character varying(100)  /* 体重管理指导 */,
    "health_edu_recipients" character varying(10)  /* 健康教育受教人 */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 责任护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "duty_user_id" integer  /* 责任人编号 */,
    "duty_user_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任人代码 */,
    "duty_user_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任人姓名 */,
    "last_update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 操作时间 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("hd_evaluation_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hd_evaluation_record" IS '血液透前评估表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_fback
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_fback" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying  /*  */,
    "old_transfer_state" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "current_transfer_state" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cd_transfer_reason" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "nm_transfer_reason" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "transfer_time" date  /*  */,
    "remarks" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "create_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "create_time" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /*  */,
    "modify_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "modify_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_mark" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "delete_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "delete_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_client" character varying(50) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "tenant_id" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "nm_out_type" character varying(256)  /*  */,
    "cd_out_location" character varying(256)  /*  */,
    "nm_out_location" character varying(256)  /*  */,
    "cd_department" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_department" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "bed_no" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "hd_flag" smallint DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "ckd_flag" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "pd_flag" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "hospital_name" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "rp_flag" smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_fla
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_fla" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying  /*  */,
    "req_no" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "report_no" character varying(1000) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "barcode_rep" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "report_type" integer  /*  */,
    "cd_rep_type" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_rep_type" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "cd_em_item" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_em_item" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "cd_em_org" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_em_org" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cd_em_dep" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_em_dep" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "cd_rep_psn" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_rep_psn" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "date_em" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "date_rep" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "note_rep" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "flag_bb" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "merge_id" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "is_merge_main" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "tou_around_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "create_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "modify_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "modify_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_mark" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "delete_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "delete_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_client" character varying(50) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "tenant_id" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "system_source" character varying(128)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_flab
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_flab" (
    "report_lab_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "report_id" bigint  /*  */,

    "report_no" character varying(1000) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "sri_no" integer  /*  */,
    "cd_em_item" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cd_index_lis" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_index_lis" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "en_index_lis" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "value_lis" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "cd_quanti_unit" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_quanti_unit" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "limit_high" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "limit_low" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "desc_rrs" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cd_result" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_result" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "from_result" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "date_em" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "flag_critical_val" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "val_type" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "val_enum" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "flag_chart" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "create_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "create_time" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "modify_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "modify_time" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "delete_mark" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "delete_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "delete_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_client" character varying(50) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "tenant_id" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "rinse_value_lis" character varying(128)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_lab_id")
);
