|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_fpatient
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_fpatient" (
    "patient_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "cd_sex" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "nm_sex" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "cd_job" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_job" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "birth_date" date  /*  */,
    "cd_cert" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "nm_cert" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cert_no_mask" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cert_no_md5" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "cert_no_cip" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "mobile_phone_mask" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "patient_case_no" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "men_zhen_no" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "in_hospital_id" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "dialysis_id" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "medical_insurance_id" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nation" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "height" integer  /*  */,
    "patient_source" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "blood_type" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "rh_blood_type" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "first_dialysis_type" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "first_hd_date" date  /*  */,
    "first_pd_date" date  /*  */,
    "cd_group_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_group_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "dialyse_count" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "cd_infection_status" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "nm_infection_status" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "cd_dialysis_cycle" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_dialysis_cycle" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "dialysis_center_time" date  /*  */,
    "duty_nurse" bigint  /*  */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "duty_doctor" bigint  /*  */,
    "duty_doctor_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "treat_status" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "create_user" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "modify_user" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "modify_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_mark" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "delete_user" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "delete_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "tenant_id" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "cd_dialysis_type" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_dialysis_type" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "hospital_area_id" bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 100000000  /*  */,
    "hospital_area_name" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "center_type" smallint DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "his_patient_id" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cd_dept" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_dept" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "first_visit_date" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "cd_project_group" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_project_group" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "ncd_follow_count" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "hd_flag" smallint DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "ckd_flag" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "pd_flag" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "cd_treat_status" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "pd_treat_status" smallint DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "cd_duty_nurse" bigint  /*  */,
    "cd_duty_nurse_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cd_duty_doctor" bigint  /*  */,
    "cd_duty_doctor_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "pd_duty_nurse" bigint  /*  */,
    "pd_duty_nurse_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "pd_duty_doctor" bigint  /*  */,
    "pd_duty_doctor_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cd_ckd_stages" character varying(125)  /*  */,
    "nm_ckd_stages" character varying(300)  /*  */,
    "in_hospital_area" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "in_hospital_bed_no" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "dialysis_card_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "zj_qc_pat_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "transfer_date" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "patient_height" smallint  /*  */,
    "hd_medical_history_number" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "pd_medical_history_number" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "cd_medical_history_number" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "rp_flag" smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "rp_treat_status" smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "rp_duty_nurse" bigint  /*  */,
    "rp_duty_nurse_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "rp_duty_doctor" bigint  /*  */,
    "rp_duty_doctor_name" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "rp_medical_history_number" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "rp_follow_count" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "rp_pathology_confirmed_date" date  /*  */,
    "birth_place" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cd_province_birth" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_province_birth" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "cd_city_birth" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "nm_city_birth" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "priority_process" smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "weight" integer  /*  */,
    "bmi" numeric(10,5)  /*  */,
    "gfr" character varying(125)  /*  */,
    "person_id" character varying(128)  /*  */,
    "pd_follow_count" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "remark" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cd_county" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "nm_county" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "cd_pd_treat_period" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "nm_pd_treat_period" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "crrt_dialysis_count" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "risk_stratification" character varying(255)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_frecord
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_frecord" (
    "record_base_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying  /*  */,
    "dry_weight" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "add_weight" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "befor_weight_way" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "befor_weight" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_clean_weight" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_raise_weight" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_systolic_pressure" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_diastolic_pressure" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_pulse" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_pressure_way" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "befor_breath" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_temperature" numeric(12,1)  /*  */,
    "befor_urine_24" integer  /*  */,
    "befor_time" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "condition" text  /*  */,
    "huixue_num" integer  /*  */,
    "max_tuoshui_num" integer  /*  */,
    "touxi_long" integer  /*  */,
    "intake" integer  /*  */,
    "target_warter" integer  /*  */,
    "store_warter" integer  /*  */,
    "after_weight_way" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "after_weight" integer  /*  */,
    "after_clean_weight" integer  /*  */,
    "actual_warter" integer  /*  */,
    "screen_actual_warter" integer  /*  */,
    "differ" integer  /*  */,
    "actual_touxi_long" integer  /*  */,
    "total_flush_water" integer  /*  */,
    "after_systolic_pressure" integer  /*  */,
    "after_diastolic_pressure" integer  /*  */,
    "after_pulse" integer  /*  */,
    "after_pressure_way" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "after_time" character varying(32)  /*  */,
    "create_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "create_time" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "modify_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "modify_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_mark" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "delete_user" bigint  /*  */,
    "delete_time" timestamp with time zone  /*  */,
    "delete_client" integer  /*  */,
    "tenant_id" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "after_temperature" numeric(12,1)  /*  */,
    "ktv" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "befor_raise_weight_percentage" numeric(12,2) DEFAULT NULL::numeric  /*  */,
    "last_after_clean_weight" integer  /*  */,
    "after_breath" integer  /*  */,
    "complication_finish_status" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "records_back_type" character varying(64)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_base_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_pat_record
-- 注释: 血液透析患者记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_pat_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_hd_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的血透编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "hd_rec_type" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 血透记录类型 */,
    "hd_rec_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 血透记录段落分类名称 */,
    "hd_rec_class_code" character varying(10)  /* 血透记录段落分类代码 */,
    "hd_rec_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 血透记录项目名称 */,
    "hd_rec_item_code" character varying(10)  /* 血透记录项目代码 */,
    "value_one" character varying(100)  /* 值1 */,
    "value_one_html_content" text  /* 值1html格式结果 */,
    "value_one_xml_content" text  /* 值1xml格式结果 */,
    "value_one_text_content" text  /* 值1text格式结果 */,
    "value_one_other_content" text  /* 值1other格式结果 */,
    "unit_one_std_id" integer  /* 单位1标准编号 */,
    "unit_one_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位1名称 */,
    "value_two" character varying(100)  /* 值2 */,
    "value_two_html_content" text  /* 值2html格式结果 */,
    "value_two_xml_content" text  /* 值2xml格式结果 */,
    "value_two_text_content" text  /* 值2text格式结果 */,
    "value_two_other_content" text  /* 值2other格式结果 */,
    "unit_two_std_id" integer  /* 单位2标准编号 */,
    "unit_two_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位2名称 */,
    "value_three" character varying(100)  /* 值3 */,
    "value_three_html_content" text  /* 值3html格式结果 */,
    "value_three_xml_content" text  /* 值3xml格式结果 */,
    "value_three_text_content" text  /* 值3text格式结果 */,
    "value_three_other_content" text  /* 值3other格式结果 */,
    "unit_three_std_id" integer  /* 单位3标准编号 */,
    "unit_three_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位3名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 操作时间 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hd_pat_record" IS '血液透析患者记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_treat_record
-- 注释: 血液透析治疗记录主表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_treat_record" (
    "hd_treat_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗主编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_hd_treat_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的血透治疗单编号 */,
    "source_order_number" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "hd_evaluation_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透前评估编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "treat_dept_id" integer  /* 治疗科室编号 */,
    "treat_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 治疗科室代码 */,
    "treat_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 治疗科室名称 */,
    "treat_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 治疗日期 */,
    "dialysis_shift" character varying(20)  /* 透析班次 */,
    "dialysis_bed" character varying(20)  /* 透析床号 */,
    "bd_temperature" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前体温 */,
    "bd_heart_rate" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前心率 */,
    "bd_breathe" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前呼吸频率 */,
    "ad_temperature" numeric(12,4)  /* 透后体温 */,
    "ad_heart_rate" numeric(12,4)  /* 透后心率 */,
    "ad_breathe" numeric(12,4)  /* 透后呼吸频率 */,
    "bd_pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前收缩压 */,
    "bd_pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 透前舒张压 */,
    "ad_pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 透后收缩压 */,
    "ad_pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 透后舒张压 */,
    "plan_treat_time" character varying(10)  /* 预计治疗时长 */,
    "reality_treat_time" character varying(10)  /* 实际治疗时长 */,
    "blood_flow" character varying(10)  /* 血流量 */,
    "dry_weight" character varying(10)  /* 干体重 */,
    "dialysis_before_weight" character varying(10)  /* 透前体重（脱衣体重） */,
    "dialysis_after_weight" character varying(10)  /* 透后体重 */,
    "is_dry_weight_reached" boolean  /* 是否达干体重 */,
    "period_weight_change" character varying(10)  /* 期间体重变化 */,
    "period_weight_change_rate" character varying(10)  /* 期间体重变化率（%） */,
    "ultrafiltration_is_greater_than_five" character varying(10)  /* 超滤大于5（%） */,
    "filter_out_preset_value" character varying(10)  /* 滤出量预设值 */,
    "reality_ultrafiltration_total" character varying(10)  /* 实际超滤总量 */,
    "treat_mode" character varying(20)  /* 治疗模式 */,
    "purifier" character varying(20)  /* 净化器 */,
    "dialyzer" character varying(20)  /* 透析机 */,
    "irrigator" character varying(20)  /* 灌流器 */,
    "catheter_model" character varying(20)  /* 导管型号 */,
    "dialysate_composition" character varying(20)  /* 透析液成分 */,
    "vascular_access_des" character varying(20)  /* 血管通路描述 */,
    "dialysate_flow" character varying(20)  /* 透析液流量 */,
    "dialysate_state" character varying(20)  /* 透析中情况 */,
    "anticoagulant_summary" character varying(100)  /* 抗凝总结 */,
    "filter_coagulation" character varying(100)  /* 滤器凝血情况 */,
    "blood_coagulation_pipeline" character varying(100)  /* 管路凝血情况 */,
    "oxy_time" character varying(10)  /* 吸氧时长 */,
    "ecg_nurse_time" character varying(10)  /* 心电护理时长 */,
    "nurse_summary" text  /* 护理小结 */,
    "treat_summary" text  /* 治疗小结 */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 责任护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "cathet_nurse_id" integer  /* 穿刺/导管护士编号 */,
    "cathet_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 穿刺/导管护士代码 */,
    "cathet_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 穿刺/导管护士姓名 */,
    "check_nurse_id" integer  /* 核查护士编号 */,
    "check_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 核查护士代码 */,
    "check_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 核查护士姓名 */,
    "duty_doc_id" integer  /* 责任医生编号 */,
    "duty_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任医生代码 */,
    "duty_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任医生姓名 */,
    "duty_user_id" integer  /* 责任人编号 */,
    "duty_user_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任人代码 */,
    "duty_user_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任人姓名 */,
    "last_update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 操作时间 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("hd_treat_record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hd_treat_record" IS '血液透析治疗记录主表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_treat_record_h_detail
-- 注释: 血液透析治疗处置明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_treat_record_h_detail" (
    "hb_handle_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗处置主编号，自增号 */,
    "hd_treat_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗主编号 */,
    "source_hd_treat_handle_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的治疗明细处置编号 */,
    "disposal_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 处置时间 */,
    "medical_nurse_ope_des" text  /* 医嘱、护理操作描述 */,
    "input_user_id" integer  /* 下达人编号 */,
    "input_user_code" character varying(50)  /* 下达人代码 */,
    "input_user_name" character varying(50)  /* 下达人姓名 */,
    "excute_user_id" integer  /* 执行人编号 */,
    "excute_user_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行人代码 */,
    "excute_user_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 操作时间 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("hb_handle_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hd_treat_record_h_detail" IS '血液透析治疗处置明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hd_treat_record_t_detail
-- 注释: 血液透析治疗明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hd_treat_record_t_detail" (
    "hb_treat_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗明细主编号，自增号 */,
    "hd_treat_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 血透治疗主编号 */,
    "source_hd_treat_detail_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的治疗明细编号 */,
    "treat_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 治疗时间 */,
    "treat_pressure_high" character varying(10)  /* 治疗时收缩压 */,
    "treat_pressure_low" character varying(10)  /* 治疗时舒张压 */,
    "treat_heart_rate" character varying(10)  /* 治疗时心率 */,
    "treat_blood_flow" character varying(10)  /* 治疗时血流量 */,
    "ultrafiltration_rate" character varying(10)  /* 超滤率 */,
    "ultrafiltration_volumne" character varying(10)  /* 超滤量 */,
    "pressure_venous" character varying(10)  /* 静脉压 */,
    "conductivity" character varying(10)  /* 电导度 */,
    "dialysate_temperature" character varying(10)  /* 透析液温度 */,
    "illness_treat" text  /* 病情处理 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 操作时间 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("hb_treat_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hd_treat_record_t_detail" IS '血液透析治疗明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_columns
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_columns" (
    "tablename" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "tablenamech" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "schema" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "schemach" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "tablecomment" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "serialnumber" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "columnname" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "columncomment" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "datatype" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "isnulled" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "foreignkey" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "codesystem" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "isstandard" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "description" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "exampledata" text  /*  */,
    "opertime" timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now()  /*  */

);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_complex_rule
-- 注释: 质控复合规则表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_complex_rule" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describe" character varying  /* 规则描述 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name" character varying  /* 字段名 */,
    "field_comment" character varying  /* 字段说明  */,
    "criteria_type" character varying  /* 限制条件 */,
    "criteria" text  /* 限制规则 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_complex_rule" IS '质控复合规则表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_empi
-- 注释: 质控EMPI规则表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_empi" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describe" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则说明 */,
    "threshold" numeric NOT NULL  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean  /* 是否有效 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_empi" IS '质控EMPI规则表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_logical_norm
-- 注释: 数据逻辑性规则表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_logical_norm" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describe" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则描述 */,
    "domain_table_a" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment_a" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name_a" character varying NOT NULL  /* a表判断字段 */,
    "field_comment_a" character varying  /* 字段说明  */,
    "relate_field_a" character varying  /* a表关联字段 */,
    "logical_type" character varying  /* 逻辑类型 */,
    "operate_type" character varying  /* 逻辑操作符类型 */,
    "domain_table_b" character varying  /* 比较表域表名 */,
    "table_comment_b" character varying  /* 比较表说明 */,
    "relate_field_b" character varying  /* 比较表关联字段 */,
    "table_b_field_a" character varying  /* 比较表字段a */,
    "table_b_field_b" character varying  /* 比较表字段b */,
    "criteria" character varying  /* 限制规则 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_logical_norm" IS '数据逻辑性规则表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_medical
-- 注释: 医学质控规则存放表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_medical" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则id */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "field_name" character varying  /* 字段名 */,
    "field_comment" character varying NOT NULL  /* 字段说明  */,
    "relate_product" character varying  /* 关联产品 */,
    "instance" character varying  /* 实例  */,
    "medical_rule" text  /* 医学规则逻辑 */,
    "rule_type" character varying  /* 规则类型 */,
    "relate_commen_rule" text  /* 关联基本规则编号 */,
    "execute_sql" character varying  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "warning_flag" character varying  /* 预警标签 */,
    "warning_comment" character varying  /* 预警结果描述 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying  /* 医院名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_medical" IS '医学质控规则存放表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_medical_related
-- 注释: 医学规则映射表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_medical_related" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('dqc_v3.hdr_qc_medical_related_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 自增列 */,
    "medical_rule_id" text  /* 医学规则编号 */,
    "medical_threshold" numeric  /* 医学规则阈值 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 阈值 */,
    "result" text  /* 质控结果 */,
    "rule_id" text  /* 规则编号 */,
    "rule_describe" text  /* 规则描述 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "rule_type" character varying(255)  /* 规则类型 */,
    "warning_flag" boolean  /* 警告标识 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_medical_related" IS '医学规则映射表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_medical_related_result
-- 注释: 医学规则映射结果表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_medical_related_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 自增列 */,
    "medical_rule_id" text  /* 医学规则编号 */,
    "medical_threshold" numeric  /* 医学规则阈值 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 阈值 */,
    "result" text  /* 质控结果 */,
    "rule_id" text  /* 规则编号 */,
    "rule_describe" text  /* 规则描述 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "rule_type" character varying(255)  /* 规则类型 */,
    "warning_flag" boolean  /* 警告标识 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying(255)  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying(255)  /* 医院名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_medical_related_result" IS '医学规则映射结果表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_normal_dict_base
-- 注释: 业务数据分类情况基础表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_normal_dict_base" (
    "dict_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 字典ID */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "cat" character varying NOT NULL  /* 分类说明 */,
    "id" character varying  /* 字典分类映射的ID字段 */,
    "code" character varying  /* 字典分类映射的code字段 */,
    "name" character varying  /* 字典分类映射的name字段 */,
    "dict_sys" character varying  /* 映射的mdm字典系统 */,
    "etl_table" character varying  /* 映射的mdm表名 */,
    "code_sys_code" character varying  /* code_set_all中对应的code_sys_code字段值 */,
    "dict_etl_field" character varying  /* etl转换涉及mdm字段 */,
    "non_etl_range" character varying  /* 非mdm映射字段值域 */,
    "range_comment" character varying  /* 非mdm映射字段值域说明  */,
    "etl_flag" integer  /* etl映射标签 */,
    "is_exist" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 表存在性 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("dict_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_normal_dict_base" IS '业务数据分类情况基础表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_normal_dict_result
-- 注释: 业务数据分类情况结果表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_normal_dict_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "dict_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 字典id */,
    "hospital_code" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院名称 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "cat" character varying NOT NULL  /* 分类说明 */,
    "mdm_id" character varying  /* 字典分类映射的ID字段 */,
    "code" character varying  /* 字典分类映射的code字段 */,
    "name" character varying  /* 字典分类映射的name字段 */,
    "cnt" integer  /* 统计计数 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "source_app" character varying  /* 系统代码 */,
    "org_code" character varying  /* 机构代码 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_normal_dict_result" IS '业务数据分类情况结果表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_product_relate_field
-- 注释: 产品/医学关联字段即完整性阈值标签表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_product_relate_field" (
    "id" character varying NOT NULL  /* HDR字段唯一ID */,
    "domain_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域名 */,
    "domain_comment" character varying  /* 域说明 */,
    "table_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "field_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 字段名 */,
    "field_comment" character varying  /* 字段说明 */,
    "r_m_360" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-360产品相关表 */,
    "r_m_cdss" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-cdss产品相关表 */,
    "r_m_singled" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-单病种产品相关表 */,
    "r_m_sci" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-科研产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_360" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-360产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_cdss" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-cdss产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_singled" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-单病种产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_sci" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-科研产品相关表 */,
    "threshold_l0" numeric  /* 阈值0：正常阈值 */,
    "threshold_l1" numeric  /* 阈值1：轻度缺失阈值 */,
    "threshold_l2" numeric  /* 阈值2：中度缺失阈值 */,
    "threshold_l3" numeric  /* 阈值3：重度/完全缺失阈值 */,
    "is_exist" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 字段存在性 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "extend1" character varying  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_product_relate_field" IS '产品/医学关联字段即完整性阈值标签表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_product_relate_table
-- 注释: 产品/医学关联标签表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_product_relate_table" (
    "id" character varying NOT NULL  /* HDR表唯一ID */,
    "domain_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域名 */,
    "domain_comment" character varying  /* 域说明 */,
    "table_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "time_field" character varying  /* 时间字段标签 */,
    "logical_key" character varying  /* 逻辑主键标签 */,
    "patient_rid" character varying  /* 表患者id */,
    "visit_rid" character varying  /* 表流水id */,
    "report_rid" character varying  /* 表报告id */,
    "source_rid" character varying  /* 表源系统id */,
    "r_time_ratio_table" character varying  /* 关联按时间统计字段 */,
    "r_m_360" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-360产品相关表 */,
    "r_m_cdss" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-cdss产品相关表 */,
    "r_m_singled" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-单病种产品相关表 */,
    "r_m_sci" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 医学-科研产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_360" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-360产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_cdss" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-cdss产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_singled" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-单病种产品相关表 */,
    "r_p_sci" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 产品-科研产品相关表 */,
    "count_by_month" integer  /* 是否按月统计 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "is_exist" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 表存在性 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "extend1" character varying  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "time_field_etl" character varying  /* ETL时间字段标签 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_product_relate_table" IS '产品/医学关联标签表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_r_table
-- 注释: 表关联性规则/结果表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_r_table" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describle" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则描述 */,
    "domain_table_a" character varying NOT NULL  /* 表a域表名 */,
    "table_comment_a" character varying  /* 表a说明 */,
    "seri_no_a" character varying  /* 表a相关键字段 */,
    "domain_table_b" character varying NOT NULL  /* 表b域表名 */,
    "table_comment_b" character varying  /* 表b说明 */,
    "seri_no_b" character varying  /* 表b相关键字段 */,
    "key_no_a" character varying  /* a表关联b表键字段 */,
    "key_no_b" character varying  /* b表关联a表键字段 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "data_comment" character varying NOT NULL  /* 关联数据类型 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "reverse_threshold" numeric  /* 反向关联阈值 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 正向关联，规则分数 */,
    "score_r" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 反向关联，规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_r_table" IS '表关联性规则/结果表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_r_table_result
-- 注释: 表关联性规则检查结果表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_r_table_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 自增编号 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */,
    "rule_id" character varying  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "hospital_code" character varying  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying  /* 医院名称 */,
    "sum_cnt" integer  /* 总计数 */,
    "r_cnt_n" integer  /* 关联计数 */,
    "r_cnt_r" numeric  /* 关联计数比例 */,
    "person_time" integer  /* 总人次 */,
    "r_person_time" integer  /* 关联人次 */,
    "r_person_time_r" numeric  /* 关联人次比例 */,
    "person" integer  /* 总人数 */,
    "r_person" integer  /* 关联人数 */,
    "r_person_r" numeric  /* 关联人数比例 */,
    "reverse_ratio" numeric  /* 反向关联比例 */,
    "etl_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 抽取数据的开始时间 */,
    "etl_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 抽取数据的结束时间 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer  /* 正向关联，规则分数 */,
    "score_r" integer  /* 反向关联，规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_r_table_result" IS '表关联性规则检查结果表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_range_cover
-- 注释: 数据完整性-字段覆盖规则表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_range_cover" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describe" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则描述 */,
    "domain_table_a" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名a */,
    "table_comment_a" character varying  /* 表说明a */,
    "field_name_a" character varying NOT NULL  /* 字段名a */,
    "field_comment_a" character varying  /* 字段说明a  */,
    "field_range_a" character varying  /* 字段值域a */,
    "relate_field_a" character varying  /* 关联字段a */,
    "relate_domain_table" character varying  /* 关联域表b */,
    "relate_field_b" character varying  /* 关联字段b */,
    "criteria" character varying  /* 限制条件 */,
    "compare_field" character varying  /* 比较字段 */,
    "range_low" numeric  /* 值域低值 */,
    "range_high" numeric  /* 值域高值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_range_cover" IS '数据完整性-字段覆盖规则表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_result
-- 注释: 质控结果明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 自增键，唯一ID */,
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则id */,
    "rule_describe" character varying  /* 规则描述 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying  /* 医院名称 */,
    "domain_table" character varying  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name" character varying  /* 字段名 */,
    "field_comment" character varying  /* 字段说明  */,
    "rule_type" character varying  /* 规则类型 */,
    "rule_name" character varying  /* 规则名称 */,
    "sum_cnt" numeric  /* 总验证数 */,
    "err_cnt" numeric  /* 异常数 */,
    "err_ratio" character varying  /* 错误率 */,
    "warning_flag" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 预警标签 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行SQL */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */,
    "score" integer  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_result" IS '质控结果明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_result_errlog
-- 注释: 质控结果错误日志表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_result_errlog" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增序号 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 编号，来自hdr_qc_result_master */,
    "aspect" integer  /* 维度，示例，1，2，3 */,
    "proc_name" character varying  /* 存储过程名称 */,
    "rule_id" character varying  /* 规则编号  */,
    "error_text" text  /* 错误文本 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(0) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /*  创建时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_result_errlog" IS '质控结果错误日志表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_result_master
-- 注释: 质控结果主表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_result_master" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "hospital_code" text  /* 医疗机构代码 */,
    "hospital_name" text  /* 医疗机构名称 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "aspect" character varying(60)  /* 规则过滤：维度 */,
    "product" character varying(30)  /* 规则过滤：产品 */,
    "domain_table" text  /* 规则过滤：域表 */,
    "data_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据过滤开始时间 */,
    "data_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据过滤结束时间 */,
    "org_code" text  /* 医院编码 */,
    "source_app" text  /* 系统编码 */,
    "is_continue" boolean  /* 是否继续执行，默认false，不继续执行，true为继续执行，继续执行批次号需要写入 */,
    "continue_result_master_id" integer  /* 继续执行批次号，is_continue为true时需写入 */,
    "is_etl_time_field" boolean  /* 时间字段是否使用etl_time字段,默认false，不使用；true为使用 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "qc_task_name" character varying(255)  /* 质控任务名称,Settle传入 */,
    "produce_integration_time" integer  /* 产品要求集成时间,单位：年 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_result_master" IS '质控结果主表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_rule_result
-- 注释: 库表基本信息结果表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_rule_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院名称 */,
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则id */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "is_exist" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 表存在性 */,
    "record_cnt" integer  /* 表总记录数 */,
    "person_time" integer  /* 患者人次数 */,
    "person" integer  /* 患者人数 */,
    "start_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 表数据起始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 表数据结束时间 */,
    "pr_key_num" integer  /* 逻辑主键数量 */,
    "pr_rep_ratio" numeric  /* 逻辑主键重复率 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行SQL */,
    "pr_rep_num" character varying(255)  /* 逻辑主键重复数量 */,
    "score" integer  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_rule_result" IS '库表基本信息结果表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_rules_relate_dict
-- 注释: 维度关系依赖字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_rules_relate_dict" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('dqc_v3.hdr_qc_aspect_relate_dict_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 编号 */,
    "rule_type" character varying(255)  /* 规则类型 */,
    "type_name" character varying(255)  /* 类型名称 */,
    "rule_id" character varying(32)  /* 唯一规则编号 */,
    "rely_rule_type" character varying(255)  /* 依赖规则类型 */,
    "rely_type_name" character varying(255)  /* 依赖规则名称 */,
    "rely_rule_id" character varying(32)  /* 依赖规则ID */,
    "extend1" character varying(255)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(255)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(255)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_rules_relate_dict" IS '维度关系依赖字典';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_score_dict
-- 注释: 质控评分字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_score_dict" (
    "aspect" character varying(2) NOT NULL  /* 质控维度 */,
    "rule_type" character varying  /* 质控规则类型 */,
    "rule_name" character varying  /* 质控规则名称 */,
    "is_valid_rules_cnt" numeric  /* 有效规则数据量 */,
    "weight" numeric  /* 权重值 */,
    "max_unusual_ratio" numeric  /* 最高异常比例 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("aspect")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_score_dict" IS '质控评分字典';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_special_formats
-- 注释: 数据格式规范性规则表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_special_formats" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describe" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则描述 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name" character varying  /* 字段名 */,
    "field_comment" character varying  /* 字段说明 */,
    "format_type" character varying  /* 格式类型 */,
    "format_comment" character varying  /* 格式说明 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "criteria" text  /* 限制规则 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_special_formats" IS '数据格式规范性规则表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_sycode_blank
-- 注释: 数据字典归一率规则表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_sycode_blank" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describe" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则描述 */,
    "syncode_ic" integer  /* 森亿字典码 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name_a" character varying  /* 归一前字段名 */,
    "field_comment_a" character varying  /* 归一前字段说明  */,
    "field_name_b" character varying  /* 归一后字段名 */,
    "field_comment_b" character varying  /* 归一后字段说明  */,
    "is_exist" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否存在 */,
    "criteria" text  /* 限制规则 */,
    "theresold" numeric  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_sycode_blank" IS '数据字典归一率规则表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_sycode_result
-- 注释: 数据字典结果统计表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_sycode_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "syncode_ic" character varying NOT NULL  /* 森亿字典码 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院名称 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name_a" character varying  /* 归一前字段名 */,
    "field_comment_a" character varying  /* 归一前字段说明 */,
    "field" character varying  /* 归一前字段名值 */,
    "field_name_b" character varying  /* 归一后字段名 */,
    "field_comment_b" character varying  /* 归一后字段说明  */,
    "cat" character varying  /* 归一后字段值 */,
    "cnt" integer  /* 统计计数 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_sycode_result" IS '数据字典结果统计表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_table_daily
-- 注释: 库表按日数据量统计表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_table_daily" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 自增长ID */,
    "hospital_code" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院名称 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "time_field" character varying  /* 时间字段标签 */,
    "time" character varying  /* 比较时间点/日 */,
    "time_count" character varying  /* 时间点计数 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_table_daily" IS '库表按日数据量统计表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_table_ratio
-- 注释: 库表按月数据量统计表(月度同比/环比)
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_table_ratio" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 自增长ID */,
    "hospital_code" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 医院名称 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "time_field" character varying  /* 时间字段标签 */,
    "time" character varying  /* 比较时间点/月 */,
    "time_count" character varying  /* 时间点计数 */,
    "time_count_m" character varying  /* 时间点环比计数 */,
    "time_count_y" character varying  /* 时间点同比计数 */,
    "mom_ratio" character varying  /* 时间点环比计数 */,
    "yoy_ratio" character varying  /* 时间点同比计数 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */,
    "score" integer  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_table_ratio" IS '库表按月数据量统计表(月度同比/环比)';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_time_record
-- 注释: 质控执行时间记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_time_record" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "运行时长" interval(6)  /* 运行时长 */,
    "质控内容" character varying  /* 质控内容 */,
    "开始执行时间" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 开始执行时间 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying  /* 医院名称 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying  /* 医院编码 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_time_record" IS '质控执行时间记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_qc_validity_range
-- 注释: 字段值域有效性规则表（除MDM）
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_qc_validity_range" (
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则唯一ID */,
    "rule_describle" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则描述 */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "table_comment" character varying  /* 表说明 */,
    "field_name" character varying NOT NULL  /* 字段名 */,
    "filed_comment" character varying  /* 字段说明 */,
    "range_type" integer  /* 值域类型 */,
    "text_range" character varying  /* 文本类值域 */,
    "text_range_comment" character varying  /* 文本类值域说明 */,
    "range_low" character varying  /* 日期时间/数值下限 */,
    "range_high" character varying  /* 日期时间/数值上限 */,
    "criteria" character varying  /* 限制条件 */,
    "threshold" numeric  /* 预警阈值 */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 是否有效 */,
    "create_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 创建日期 */,
    "update_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 更新日期 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "score" integer DEFAULT 1  /* 规则分数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_qc_validity_range" IS '字段值域有效性规则表（除MDM）';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_versions
-- 注释: HDR版本信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_versions" (
    "version_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* HDR版本号 */,
    "version_releasedate" date  /* HDR发布日期 */,
    "version_publisher" character varying(20)  /* HDR发布人 */,
    "version_auditdate" date  /* HDR审核日期 */,
    "version_auditor" character varying(20)  /* HDR审核人 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_versions" IS 'HDR版本信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hdr_versions_modify_rec
-- 注释: HDR版本变更记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hdr_versions_modify_rec" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('hdr_versions_modify_rec_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 自增列，主键 */,
    "version_id" character varying(20)  /* HDR版本号 */,
    "source_of_demand" text  /* 需求来源 */,
    "change_script" text  /* 变更脚本 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hdr_versions_modify_rec" IS 'HDR版本变更记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: health_record
-- 注释: 健康档案
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "health_record" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('ehr.health_record_record_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "source_health_record_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 健康档案号 */,
    "source_record_number" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "record_type_id" integer  /* 文书类型编码 */,
    "record_type_code" character varying(30)  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" xml  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "inprec_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 健康档案状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 健康档案状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 健康档案状态名称 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "health_record" IS '健康档案';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hemodialysis_pat_record
-- 注释: 血液透析患者记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hemodialysis_pat_record" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('cure.hemodialysis_pat_record_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_hd_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的血透编号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "hd_rec_type" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 血透记录类型 */,
    "hd_rec_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 血透记录段落分类名称 */,
    "hd_rec_class_code" character varying(10)  /* 血透记录段落分类代码 */,
    "hd_rec_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 血透记录项目名称 */,
    "hd_rec_item_code" character varying(10)  /* 血透记录项目代码 */,
    "value_one" character varying(100)  /* 值1 */,
    "value_one_html_content" text  /* 值1html格式结果 */,
    "value_one_xml_content" text  /* 值1xml格式结果 */,
    "value_one_text_content" text  /* 值1text格式结果 */,
    "value_one_other_content" text  /* 值1other格式结果 */,
    "unit_one_std_id" integer  /* 单位1标准编号 */,
    "unit_one_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位1名称 */,
    "value_two" character varying(100)  /* 值2 */,
    "value_two_html_content" text  /* 值2html格式结果 */,
    "value_two_xml_content" text  /* 值2xml格式结果 */,
    "value_two_text_content" text  /* 值2text格式结果 */,
    "value_two_other_content" text  /* 值2other格式结果 */,
    "unit_two_std_id" integer  /* 单位2标准编号 */,
    "unit_two_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位2名称 */,
    "value_three" character varying(100)  /* 值3 */,
    "value_three_html_content" text  /* 值3html格式结果 */,
    "value_three_xml_content" text  /* 值3xml格式结果 */,
    "value_three_text_content" text  /* 值3text格式结果 */,
    "value_three_other_content" text  /* 值3other格式结果 */,
    "unit_three_std_id" integer  /* 单位3标准编号 */,
    "unit_three_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位3名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 操作时间 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "hemodialysis_pat_record" IS '血液透析患者记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: hepatitis_b_test_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hepatitis_b_test_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "relationship_between_trustee_and_patient" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人与患者关系 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "trustee_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人签名 */,
    "trustee_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 受托人签名时间 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|

    "ctjx17" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "ctjx18" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "ctjx19" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "ctjx20" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "ihisorder_iid" numeric(20,0)  /*  */,
    "creport2dicom_dttm" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "czczt" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cxgysxm" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "czdh" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "czdlsh" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cver" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "csjly" character varying(500) DEFAULT '0'::character varying  /*  */,
    "cyqbm" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cksbm" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cdjrybm" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cdjryxm" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cjczt2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "cyysjd" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "ccrisis_value" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "ccrisis" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "chis_sqd_info" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "cisfollowup" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "cquality_report_season" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cquality_report" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cquality_img_season" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cquality_img" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cishavevideo" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cvideoupsate" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cyxl" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ctsbg_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ddjsj2" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "now_state" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cyqmc" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cksmc" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "isold" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "assign" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "czysx" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ccrb" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ccrb_content" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cfhl" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cis_view_vip" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "cjczt1" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "dcheckdate1" date  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("iid")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: icnris_uis_exam_bg

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "icnris_uis_exam_bg" (

    "ccasinginfo" text  /*  */,

,

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: icu_icu_transfer_histories
-- 注释: ICU入出记录业务表,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "icu_icu_transfer_histories" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：jy_nurse，小写，下划线命名法
 */,
    "icu_transfer_number" text NOT NULL  /* ICU入出记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所在病区代码  */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所在病区名称  */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码  */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称  */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院时间  */,
    "adm_icu_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入ICU时间  */,
    "card_name" text  /* 证件名称  */,
    "card_no" text  /* 证件号码  */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "attending_doc_code" text  /* 主治医师代码  */,
    "attending_doc_name" text  /* 主治医师姓名  */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重  */,
    "height" text  /* 身高  */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期  */,
    "is_in_icu" character varying(1)  /* 是否在icu  */,
    "operating_sys_code" integer  /* 手术名称值域 */,
    "operating_code" text  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operating_name" text  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operating_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 手术时间  */,
    "nursing_sys_code" integer  /* 护理级别值域 */,
    "nursing_level_code" text  /* 护理级别代码 */,
    "nursing_level_name" text  /* 护理级别名称 */,
    "patient_condition" text  /* 患者状况  */,
    "duty_nurse_code" text  /* 责任护士代码  */,
    "duty_nurse_name" text  /* 责任护士姓名  */,
    "abnormal_condition" text  /* 异常情况  */,
    "abnormal_reaction" text  /* 异常反应  */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间  */,
    "prepayments" numeric(12,4)  /* 预付款  */,
    "total_costs" numeric(12,4)  /* 总花费  */,
    "blood_type" text  /* 血型  */,
    "bed_no_change" text  /* 床位变更  */,
    "dept_from_code" text  /* 患者转入前的科室代码 */,
    "dept_from_name" text  /* 患者转入前的科室名称 */,
    "dept_to_code" text  /* 患者转出后的科室代码 */,
    "dept_to_name" text  /* 患者转出后的科室名称 */,
    "informed_consent" text  /* 知情同意  */,
    "doctor_patient_com" text  /* 医患沟通  */,
    "hospital_span" text  /* 住院时间是否大于5天  */,
    "antibiotic" text  /* 抗生素  */,
    "special_note" text  /* 特别提示  */,
    "billing_date_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结账日期  */,
    "guarantor_code" text  /* 担保人代码  */,
    "guarantor_name" text  /* 担保人姓名  */,
    "guarantor_org" text  /* 担保组织  */,
    "guarantor_phone_num" text  /* 担保人电话  */,
    "bill_checked_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 核单日期  */,
    "is_settled_indicator" character varying(1)  /* 患者是否稳定  */,
    "frequency_nurse" text  /* 护理频率  */,
    "discharge_icu_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 出ICU时间  */,
    "note" text  /* 备注  */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "icu_icu_transfer_histories" IS 'ICU入出记录业务表,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: icu_scr_scoring
-- 注释: 评分主记录,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "icu_scr_scoring" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：jy_nurse，小写，下划线命名法 */,
    "scr_scoring_number" text NOT NULL  /* 评分主记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所在病区代码  */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所在病区名称  */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码  */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称  */,
    "clinic_sys_code" integer  /* 临床诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 临床诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "scoring_sys_code" integer  /* 评分分类值域 */,
    "scoring_item_code" text  /* 评分分类代码  */,
    "scoring_item_name" text  /* 评分分类名称 包含各种评分类别 */,
    "scoring_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 评分时间  */,
    "total_score_value" text  /* 总评分值  */,
    "total_score_low_value" text  /* 总评分合理值下限  */,
    "total_score_high_value" text  /* 总评分合理值上限  */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注  */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "icu_scr_scoring" IS '评分主记录,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: icu_scr_scoring_items
-- 注释: 评分记录明细表,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "icu_scr_scoring_items" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码  */,
    "scr_scoring_number" text NOT NULL  /* 评分主记录编号 */,
    "scr_scoring_items_number" text NOT NULL  /* 评分记录明细编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "scoring_content" text  /* 评分内容 评分小项以及对应评分值 */,
    "scoring_method" text  /* 评分标准  */,
    "scoring_item_sys_code" integer  /* 评分项目值域 */,
    "scoring_item_code" text  /* 评分项目代码  */,
    "scoring_item_name" text  /* 评分项目名称 包含评分各个小项 */,
    "scoring_item_value" text  /* 评分项目分值 各个小项评分值 */,
    "scoring_item_low_value" text  /* 评分项目合理值下限  */,
    "scoring_item_high_value" text  /* 评分项目合理值上限  */,
    "degree" text  /* 危重程度  */,
    "death_probability" text  /* 死亡率  */,
    "pat_condition" text  /* 病情描述  */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "scoring_oper_code" text  /* 评份人代码  */,
    "scoring_oper_name" text  /* 评份人姓名  */,
    "scoring_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 评分时间  */,
    "enter_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 录入时间  */,
    "note" character varying(50)  /* 备注  */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "icu_scr_scoring_items" IS '评分记录明细表,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: icu_transfer_histories
-- 注释: ICU入出记录业务表,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "icu_transfer_histories" (
    "icu_transfer_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* ICU入出记录业务表唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：jy_nurse，小写，下划线命名法
 */,
    "source_icu_transfer_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统ICU入出记录业务表唯一标识符 原始业务系统为联合主键时，以'&#124;'分隔    */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 患者所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 患者所在病区编号  */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所在病区代码  */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所在病区名称  */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码  */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称  */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "in_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 入院时间  */,
    "adm_icu_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 入ICU时间  */,
    "card_name" character varying(50)  /* 证件名称  */,
    "card_no" character varying(50)  /* 证件号码  */,
    "attending_doc_id" integer  /* 主治医师编号  */,
    "attending_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主治医师代码  */,
    "attending_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主治医师姓名  */,
    "weight" character varying(20)  /* 体重  */,
    "height" character varying(20)  /* 身高  */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期  */,
    "is_in_icu" character varying(1)  /* 是否在icu  */,
    "operating_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operating_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operating_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术时间  */,
    "nursing_level_code" character varying(50)  /* 护理级别代码 */,
    "nursing_level_name" character varying(50)  /* 护理级别名称 */,
    "patient_condition" character varying(500)  /* 患者状况  */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 责任护士编号  */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士代码  */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任护士姓名  */,
    "abnormal_condition" character varying(50)  /* 异常情况  */,
    "abnormal_reaction" character varying(50)  /* 异常反应  */,
    "begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 开始时间  */,
    "prepayments" numeric(12,4)  /* 预付款  */,
    "total_costs" numeric(12,4)  /* 总花费  */,
    "blood_type" character varying(50)  /* 血型  */,
    "bed_no_change" character varying(50)  /* 床位变更  */,
    "dept_from_id" integer  /* 患者转入前的科室编号 */,
    "dept_from_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者转入前的科室代码 */,
    "dept_from_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者转入前的科室名称 */,
    "dept_to_id" integer  /* 患者转出后的科室编号 */,
    "dept_to_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者转出后的科室代码 */,
    "dept_to_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者转出后的科室名称 */,
    "informed_consent" character varying(500)  /* 知情同意  */,
    "doctor_patient_com" character varying(500)  /* 医患沟通  */,
    "hospital_span" character varying(50)  /* 住院时间是否大于5天  */,
    "antibiotic" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素  */,
    "special_note" character varying(50)  /* 特别提示  */,
    "billing_date_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 结账日期  */,
    "guarantor_id" integer  /* 担保人编号  */,
    "guarantor_code" character varying(50)  /* 担保人代码  */,
    "guarantor_name" character varying(50)  /* 担保人姓名  */,
    "guarantor_org" character varying(50)  /* 担保组织  */,
    "guarantor_phone_num" character varying(50)  /* 担保人电话  */,
    "bill_checked_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 核单日期  */,
    "is_settled_indicator" character varying(1)  /* 患者是否稳定  */,
    "frequency_nurse" character varying(50)  /* 护理频率  */,
    "discharge_icu_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 出ICU时间  */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注  */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("icu_transfer_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "icu_transfer_histories" IS 'ICU入出记录业务表,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: icu_vit_vital_signs
-- 注释: 生命体征表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "icu_vit_vital_signs" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：jy_nurse，小写，下划线命名法
 */,
    "vit_vital_signs_number" text NOT NULL  /* 生命体征业务编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院时间  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 患者所在科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所在病区代码  */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所在病区名称  */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码  */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称  */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 记录时间  */,
    "measure_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 测量时间  */,
    "item_code" text  /* 项目代码  */,
    "item_name" text  /* 项目名称  */,
    "low_item_value" text  /* 合理值下限  */,
    "high_item_value" text  /* 合理值上限  */,
    "item_values" text  /* 项目数值  */,
    "units" text  /* 项目单位  */,
    "exam_method" text  /* 监测方法  */,
    "nurse_indicator" text  /* 护理记录单标志  */,
    "note" text  /* 备注  */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "recorder_code" text  /* 记录者代码  */,
    "recorder_name" text  /* 记录者姓名  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "icu_vit_vital_signs" IS '生命体征表';
|
