|-- ========================================
-- 表名: infection_nis_bacteria_report
-- 注释: 细菌感染上报,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "infection_nis_bacteria_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "nis_monitor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录编号 */,
    "bacteria_report_number" text NOT NULL  /* 细菌感染上报记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "id_card_no" text  /* 身份证号  */,
    "infeciton_type" text  /* 感染类型  */,
    "infection_body_part" text  /* 感染发生部位  */,
    "infection_body_part_code" text  /* 感染发生部位编码  */,
    "pathogen_test_flag" character(1)  /* 是否做了病原学检查  */,
    "specimen" text  /* 做病原学检查时所采集标本的名称  */,
    "pathogen_name" text  /* 病原学检查中检出的病原体名称  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 报告者所在科室值域 */,
    "dic_report_dept_code" text  /* 报告者所在科室代码 */,
    "dic_report_dept_name" text  /* 报告者所在科室名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "dic_reporter_code" text  /* 报告者代码  */,
    "dic_reporter_name" text  /* 报告者名称  */,
    "report_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 报告时间  */,
    "dic_confirmer_code" text  /* 确认者代码  */,
    "dic_confirmer_name" text  /* 确认者名称  */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 确认时间  */,
    "relation_vs_death" text  /* 本例感染事件与患者死亡的关系  */,
    "infection_outcome" text  /* 感染转归情况  */,
    "infection_outcome_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 感染转归日期  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "infection_nis_bacteria_report" IS '细菌感染上报,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: infection_nis_device_monitors
-- 注释: 器械引起的院内感染情况,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "infection_nis_device_monitors" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "nis_monitor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录编号 */,
    "device_monitor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 器械感染记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "id_card_no" text  /* 身份证号  */,
    "device_name" text  /* 器械名称  */,
    "device_treament_type" text  /* 院内感染监测基本数据集定义的器械相关治疗标准名称  */,
    "insertion_site" text  /* 器械插入(植入)部位  */,
    "insertion_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 器械插入(植入)时间  */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "insertion_operator_code" text  /* 器械插入(植入)操作者代码  */,
    "insertion_operator_name" text  /* 器械插入(植入)操作者名称  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "insertion_dept_code" text  /* 执行器械插入(植入)操作的科室代码 */,
    "insertion_dept_name" text  /* 执行器械插入(植入)操作的科室名称 */,
    "extubaion_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 器械拔出(取出)时间  */,
    "extubaion_operator_code" text  /* 器械拔出(取出)操作者代码  */,
    "extubaion_operator_name" text  /* 器械拔出(取出)操作者名称  */,
    "extubaion_dept_code" text  /* 执行器械拔出(取出)操作的科室代码 */,
    "extubaion_dept_name" text  /* 执行器械拔出(取出)操作的科室名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "infection_nis_device_monitors" IS '器械引起的院内感染情况,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: infection_nis_factors_record
-- 注释: 院内感染发生原因记录,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "infection_nis_factors_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('sd.infection_nis_factors_record_id_seq'::regclass)  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "nis_monitor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录编号 */,
    "nis_factor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 院内感染发生原因编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "id_card_no" text  /* 身份证号  */,
    "his_visit_id" text  /* HIS就诊标识  */,
    "dic_nis_factor_name" text  /* 院内感染原因  */,
    "dic_nis_factor_code" text  /* 院内感染原因编码  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "infection_nis_factors_record" IS '院内感染发生原因记录,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: infection_nis_monitor_records
-- 注释: 院内感染监测记录,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "infection_nis_monitor_records" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "nis_monitor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "id_card_no" text  /* 身份证号  */,
    "infection_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 感染发生日期  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dic_occured_dept_code" text  /* 感染发生时患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dic_occured_dept_name" text  /* 感染发生时患者所在科室名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "infection_nis_monitor_records" IS '院内感染监测记录,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: infection_nis_oper_incision_monitor
-- 注释: 手术切口院内感染监测记录表,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "infection_nis_oper_incision_monitor" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "nis_monitor_number" text NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录编号 */,
    "nis_oper_incision_number" text NOT NULL  /* 医院感染手术编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "operation_doc_code" text  /* 手术医生代码  */,
    "operation_doc_name" text  /* 手术医生姓名  */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "operation_dept_code" text  /* 手术科室代码 */,
    "operation_dept_name" text  /* 手术科室名称 */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis" text  /* 术前诊断 患者手术前的诊断描述 */,
    "operation_sys_code" integer  /* 手术名称值域 */,
    "operation_code" text  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" text  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operation_type_sys_code" integer  /* 手术类型值域 */,
    "operation_type_code" text  /* 手术类型代码 例如：普通手术、介入手术 */,
    "operation_type_name" text  /* 手术类型名称  */,
    "operation_class_sys_code" integer  /* 手术类别值域 */,
    "operation_class_code" text  /* 手术类别代码  */,
    "operation_class_name" text  /* 手术类别名称 例如：日间：手术简单无需住院、
 急诊：需要立刻安排手术、
 择期：手术有风险，需住院手术 */,
    "operation_level_sys_code" integer  /* 手术级别值域 */,
    "operation_level_code" text  /* 手术级别代码  */,
    "operation_level_name" text  /* 手术级别名称  */,
    "incision_type_sys_code" integer  /* 切口类型值域 */,
    "incision_type_code" text  /* 切口类型代码 值域：1：I类切口、2：II类切口、3：III类切口 、4：IV类切口 */,
    "incision_type_name" text  /* 切口类型名称  */,
    "begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术开始时间  */,
    "end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术结束时间  */,
    "incision_infect_code" character(1)  /* 切口感染代码 0：无，1： 浅层，2：深层 */,
    "oper_site_infect_type_code" character(1)  /* 手术部位感染类型代码 1:表浅切口手术感染 2:深部手术切口感染 3:器官(或腔隙)感染 */,
    "infect_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 感染日期  */,
    "incision_cnt" character(3)  /* 切口个数  */,
    "note" text  /* 备注  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 0-初始化；1-已变更；2-未关联；3-处理错误； */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "infection_nis_oper_incision_monitor" IS '手术切口院内感染监测记录表,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: infection_record
-- 注释: 感染记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "infection_record" (
    "infection_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据序号 */,
    "infection_dept_id" integer  /* 感染科室编号 */,
    "infection_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 感染科室代码 */,
    "infection_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 感染科室名称 */,
    "infecrion_date" date  /* 感染日期 */,
    "report_doc_id" integer  /* 上报医生编号 */,
    "report_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 上报医生代码 */,
    "report_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 上报医生姓名 */,
    "report_date" timestamp(0) without time zone  /* 上报日期 */,
    "duty_doc_id" integer  /* 责任医生编号 */,
    "duty_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 责任医生代码 */,
    "duty_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 责任医生姓名 */,
    "confirm_doc_id" integer  /* 确认医生编号 */,
    "confirm_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认医生代码 */,
    "confirm_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认医生姓名 */,
    "infection_diagnose_id" integer  /* 感染诊断编码 */,
    "infection_diagnose_code" character varying(50)  /* 感染诊断代码 */,
    "infection_diagnose_name" character varying(50)  /* 感染诊断名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 感染部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 感染部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(50)  /* 感染部位名称 */,
    "body_temperature" character varying(20)  /* 体温 */,
    "body_temperature_days" character varying(20)  /* 体温天数 */,
    "infection_symptom" text  /* 感染症状 */,
    "is_pathogeny_check" boolean  /* 病原体送检情况 */,
    "pathogeny_check_content" character varying(200)  /* 送检内容 */,
    "pathogeny_check_date" date  /* 送检日期 */,
    "antibiotic_used1_id" integer  /* 抗生素使用编号1 */,
    "antibiotic_used1_code" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素使用代码1 */,
    "antibiotic_used1_name" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素使用药名1 */,
    "antibiotic_used2_id" integer  /* 抗生素使用编号2 */,
    "antibiotic_used2_code" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素使用代码2 */,
    "antibiotic_used2_name" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素使用药名2 */,
    "antibiotic_used3_id" integer  /* 抗生素使用编号3 */,
    "antibiotic_used3_code" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素使用代码3 */,
    "antibiotic_used3_name" character varying(50)  /* 抗生素使用药名3 */,
    "antibiotic_used_days" numeric(12,4)  /* 抗生素使用天数 */,
    "is_aud_preventive" boolean  /* 抗生素使用目的预防性 */,
    "is_aud_therapeutic" boolean  /* 抗生素使用目的治疗性 */,
    "is_operate" boolean  /* 是否手术 */,
    "operation_id" integer  /* 手术编号 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(20)  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术名称 */,
    "is_emergency_operate" boolean  /* 是否急诊手术 */,
    "operate_date" date  /* 手术日期 */,
    "operate_hours" numeric(12,4)  /* 手术时间小时数 */,
    "operation_doc_id" integer  /* 手术医生编号 */,
    "operation_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生代码 */,
    "operation_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_id" integer  /* 麻醉医生编号 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生代码 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 麻醉医生姓名 */,
    "is_blood_transfusion" boolean  /* 是否输血 */,
    "is_chemotherapy" boolean  /* 是否化疗 */,
    "is_actinotherapy" boolean  /* 是否放疗 */,
    "is_icu" boolean  /* 是否ICU */,
    "is_urethral_catheter" boolean  /* 是否尿管 */,
    "is_arteriovenous_catheter" boolean  /* 是否动静脉通道 */,
    "is_use_breathing_machine" boolean  /* 是否使用呼吸机 */,
    "is_use_immunodepressant" boolean  /* 是否使用免疫制剂 */,
    "intervene_measures" text  /* 干预措施 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(10)  /* 愈后编码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 愈后名称 */,
    "infection_death_relation_id" integer  /* 感染与死亡关系编号 */,
    "infection_death_relation_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "infection_death_relation_name" character varying(20)  /* 感染与死亡关系名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("infection_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "infection_record" IS '感染记录';
|

);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_antimicrobial_drugs_ranking" (

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_baby_info
-- 注释: 住院婴儿信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_baby_info" (
    "baby_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 婴儿编号，自增号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_baby_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统婴儿编号 */,
    "mother_inpat_id" integer  /* 母亲住院编号 */,
    "baby_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 婴儿姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "height" integer  /* 身长 (单位 cm) */,
    "weight" integer  /* 体重 (单位 g) */,
    "birth_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 出生时间 */,
    "birth_weight" integer  /* 出生体重 (单位 g) */,
    "in_weight" integer  /* 入院体重 (单位 g) */,
    "father_name" character varying(50)  /* 父亲姓名 */,
    "father_idno" character varying(20)  /* 父亲身份证号 */,
    "mother_name" character varying(50)  /* 母亲姓名 */,
    "mother_idno" character varying(20)  /* 母亲身份证号 */,
    "delivery_mode_code" character varying(10)  /* 分娩方式代码 */,
    "delivery_mode_name" character varying(10)  /* 分娩方式名称 */,
    "fetus_num" smallint  /* 胎次 */,
    "parity_num" smallint  /* 产次 */,
    "ch" boolean  /* CH 甲低 */,
    "pku" boolean  /* PKU */,
    "listening" boolean  /* 听力 */,
    "cah" boolean  /* CAH */,
    "g6pd" boolean  /* G6PD */,
    "is_die" boolean  /* 七日死亡 */,
    "die_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 死亡时间 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断代码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "delivery_mode_id" integer  /* 分娩方式编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("baby_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_baby_info" IS '住院婴儿信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_balance
-- 注释: 住院结算表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_balance" (
    "balance_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 结算编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_balance_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统结算编号 */,
    "trans_type" smallint NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "balance_no" smallint  /* 结算序号 */,
    "invoice_no" character varying(20)  /* 发票号 */,
    "pay_kind_id" integer  /* 结算类别编号 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "balance_type_id" integer  /* 结算类型编号 */,
    "balance_type_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类型代码 */,
    "balance_type_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类型名称 */,
    "prepay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 预交金额 */,
    "total_cost" numeric(12,4) NOT NULL  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自付金额 */,
    "eco_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 优惠金额 */,
    "der_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 减免金额 */,
    "return_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 返还金额 */,
    "cash_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 现金支付 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_balance" IS '住院结算表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_discharged_count
-- 注释:

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_discharged_count" (
    "ksmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "sl" integer  /*  */,
    "out_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */

);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_drug_order
-- 注释: 住院用药医嘱
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_drug_order" (
    "order_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "group_no" character varying(200)  /* 成组序号 */,
    "order_class_id" integer  /* 医嘱类别编号 */,
    "order_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 医嘱类别代码 */,
    "order_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 医嘱类别名称 */,
    "order_type_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱类型代码 */,
    "order_type_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱类型名称 */,
    "drug_id" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_code" character varying(20)  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 药品名称 */,
    "specs" character varying(50)  /* 规格 */,
    "dose_model_id" integer  /* 剂型编号 */,
    "dose_model_code" character varying(50)  /* 剂型代码 */,
    "dose_model_name" character varying(20)  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "unit_price" numeric(12,4)  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 数量 */,
    "once_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_id" integer  /* 用量单位 */,
    "dose_unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 用量代码 */,
    "dose_unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "frequency_id" integer  /* 频次编号 */,
    "frequency_code" character varying(50)  /* 频次代码 */,
    "frequency_name" character varying(30)  /* 频次名称 */,
    "special_exec_time" character varying(100)  /* 特殊执行时间（特殊频次） */,
    "special_exec_dose" character varying(100)  /* 特殊执行用量（特殊频次） */,
    "usage_id" integer  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_code" character varying(50)  /* 用法代码 */,
    "usage_name" character varying(30)  /* 用法名称 */,
    "days" smallint  /* 草药付数 */,
    "exec_dept_id" integer  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "exec_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行科室代码 */,
    "exec_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "skin_test" boolean  /* 皮试标志 */,
    "urgent_flag" smallint  /* 加急标志 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 医嘱开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 医嘱结束时间 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "input_dept_id" integer  /* 开立医嘱科室编号 */,
    "input_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 开立医嘱科室代码 */,
    "input_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 开立医嘱科室名称 */,
    "input_doc_id" integer  /* 开立医嘱医生编号 */,
    "input_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 开立医嘱医生编码 */,
    "input_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 开立医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "input_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开立医嘱时间 */,
    "confirm_nurse_id" integer  /* 确认护士编号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认护士代码 */,
    "confirm_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认护士姓名 */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认时间 */,
    "stop_doc_id" integer  /* 停止医嘱医生编号 */,
    "stop_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 停止医嘱医生代码 */,
    "stop_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 停止医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "stop_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 停止时间 */,
    "exec_nurse_id" integer  /* 执行护士编号 */,
    "exec_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行护士代码 */,
    "exec_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行护士姓名 */,
    "exec_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 执行时间 */,
    "order_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 医嘱状态编号 */,
    "order_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱状态代码 */,
    "order_state_name" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "drug_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 森亿药品标准编码集 */,
    "chemical" jsonb  /* 化学成分（森亿标准编码） */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 组内排序 */,
    "qty_unit" character varying(20)  /* 数量单位 */,
    "order_verify_state_name" character varying(10)  /* 医嘱审核状态 */,
    "order_verify_num" integer  /* 审核条目数 */,
    "order_eval_num" integer  /* 医嘱点评次数 */,
    "extend4" character varying(50)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_drug_order" IS '住院用药医嘱';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_fee_detail
-- 注释: 住院费用明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_fee_detail" (
    "detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 收费明细编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_detail_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统收费明细编号 */,
    "trans_type" smallint NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "balance_id" bigint  /* 结算编号 */,
    "invoice_no" character varying(20)  /* 发票号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "min_fee_id" integer  /* 最小费用编号 */,
    "min_fee_code" character varying(10)  /* 最小费用代码 */,
    "min_fee_name" character varying(20)  /* 最小费用名称 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "drug_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 药品标志 */,
    "unit_price" numeric(12,4)  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 数量 */,
    "total_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自付金额 */,
    "eco_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 优惠金额 */,
    "balance_flag" smallint  /* 结算标志 */,
    "fee_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "fee_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "fee_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "fee_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "fee_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "fee_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "fee_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 收费时间 */,
    "fee_state" smallint  /* 收费状态 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "unit" character varying(20)  /* 计价单位 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_fee_detail" IS '住院费用明细表';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_medical_record
-- 注释: 住院病历
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_medical_record" (
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "record_type_id" integer  /* 文书类型编码 */,
    "record_type_code" character varying(30)  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" xml  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag_zs" smallint  /* 主诉结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_flag_xbs" smallint  /* 现病史结化标志 */,
    "nlp_flag_jws" smallint  /* 既往史结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_flag_tgjc" smallint  /* 体格检查结构化标志 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 抢救次数 */,
    "nlp_flag_grs" smallint  /* 个人史结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_flag_hys" smallint  /* 婚育史结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_flag_jzs" smallint  /* 家族史结构化标志 */,
    "extend4" character varying  /* 抢救成功次数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_medical_record" IS '住院病历';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_record
-- 注释: 住院就诊记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_record" (
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('visit.outpatient_inpat_seq'::regclass)  /* 住院就诊编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_inpat_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统住院流水号 */,
    "source_inpat_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统住院号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "is_baby" boolean  /* 是否婴儿 */,
    "pay_kind_id" integer  /* 结算类别编号 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "in_dept_id" integer  /* 入院科室编号 */,
    "in_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院科室代码 */,
    "in_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 入院科室名称 */,
    "in_ward_id" integer  /* 入院病区编号 */,
    "in_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 入院病区代码 */,
    "in_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 入院病区名称 */,
    "in_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 入院时间 */,
    "in_source_id" integer  /* 入院来源编号 */,
    "in_source_code" character varying(10)  /* 入院来源代码 */,
    "in_source_name" character varying(10)  /* 入院来源名称 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 门诊诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 门诊诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 门诊诊断名称 */,
    "major_diag_id" integer  /* 主要诊断编号 */,
    "major_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 主要诊断代码 */,
    "major_diag_name" text  /* 主要诊断名称 */,
    "current_dept_id" integer  /* 当前科室编号 */,
    "current_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 当前科室代码 */,
    "current_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 当前科室名称 */,
    "current_ward_id" integer  /* 当前病区编号 */,
    "current_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 当前病区代码 */,
    "current_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 当前病区名称 */,
    "room_id" integer  /* 病房编号 */,
    "room_code" character varying(50)  /* 病房代码 */,
    "room_name" character varying(20)  /* 病房名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(50)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "bed_doc_id" integer  /* 床位医生编号 */,
    "bed_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位医生代码 */,
    "bed_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 床位医生姓名 */,
    "attending_doc_id" integer  /* 主治医生编号 */,
    "attending_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主治医生代码 */,
    "attending_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主治医生姓名 */,
    "director_doc_id" integer  /* 主任医生编号 */,
    "director_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 主任医生代码 */,
    "director_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 主任医生姓名 */,
    "bed_nurse_id" integer  /* 床位护士编号 */,
    "bed_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位护士代码 */,
    "bed_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 床位护士姓名 */,
    "out_dept_id" integer  /* 出院科室编号 */,
    "out_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 出院科室代码 */,
    "out_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 出院科室名称 */,
    "out_ward_id" integer  /* 出院病区编号 */,
    "out_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 出院病区代码 */,
    "out_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 出院病区名称 */,
    "out_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 出院时间 */,
    "baby_flag" smallint  /* 有婴儿标志 */,
    "nurse_level_id" integer  /* 护理级别编号 */,
    "nurse_level_code" character varying(50)  /* 护理级别代码 */,
    "nurse_level_name" character varying(20)  /* 护理级别名称 */,
    "diet_type_id" integer  /* 饮食类型编号 */,
    "diet_type_code" character varying(50)  /* 饮食类型代码 */,
    "diet_type_name" character varying(10)  /* 饮食类型名称 */,
    "inpat_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院状态编号 */,
    "inpat_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 住院状态代码 */,
    "inpat_state_name" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 住院状态名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "reg_id" integer  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "in_illness_state_id" integer  /* 在院病情编号 */,
    "in_illness_state_code" character varying(50)  /* 在院病情代码 */,
    "in_illness_state_name" character varying(50)  /* 在院病情名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("inpat_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_record" IS '住院就诊记录';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_shift_dept
-- 注释: 住院转科记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_shift_dept" (
    "shift_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 转科编号，自增号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_shift_id" character varying(100)  /* 源系统转科号 */,
    "old_dept_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 原科室编号 */,
    "old_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 原科室代码 */,
    "old_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 原科室名称 */,
    "old_ward_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 原病区编号 */,
    "old_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 原病区代码 */,
    "old_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 原病区名称 */,
    "old_bed_id" integer  /* 原床位编号 */,
    "old_bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 原床位代码 */,
    "old_bed_name" character varying(50)  /* 原床位名称 */,
    "new_dept_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 新科室编号 */,
    "new_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 新科室代码 */,
    "new_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 新科室名称 */,
    "new_ward_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 新病区编号 */,
    "new_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 新病区代码 */,
    "new_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 新病区名称 */,
    "new_bed_id" integer  /* 新床位编号 */,
    "new_bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 新床位代码 */,
    "new_bed_name" character varying(50)  /* 新床位名称 */,
    "shift_state_id" integer  /* 转科状态编号 */,
    "shift_state_code" character varying(50)  /* 转科状态代码 */,
    "shift_state_name" character varying(10)  /* 转科状态名称 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "shift_oper_id" integer  /* 转科操作员编号 */,
    "shift_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 转科操作员代码 */,
    "shift_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 转科操作员姓名 */,
    "shift_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 转科操作时间 */,
    "confirm_oper_id" integer  /* 确认操作员编号 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认操作员代码 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认操作员姓名 */,
    "confirm_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认操作时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "shift_diag_id" integer  /* 转入诊断编号 */,
    "shift_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 转入诊断代码 */,
    "shift_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 转入诊断名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_shift_dept" IS '住院转科记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_special_antimicrobial_drugs
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_special_antimicrobial_drugs" (
    "ksmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "sl" integer  /*  */,
    "out_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpat_undrug_order
-- 注释: 住院非药品医嘱
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpat_undrug_order" (
    "order_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "group_no" character varying(20)  /* 成组序号 */,
    "order_class_id" integer  /* 医嘱类别编号 */,
    "order_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 医嘱类别代码 */,
    "order_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 医嘱类别名称 */,
    "order_type_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱类型代码 */,
    "order_type_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱类型名称 */,
    "order_item_id" integer  /* 医嘱编号（项目编号） */,
    "order_code" character varying(50)  /* 医嘱代码 */,
    "order_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱名称 */,
    "specs" character varying(40)  /* 规格 */,
    "unit_price" numeric(12,4)  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 数量 */,
    "once_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_id" integer  /* 用量单位 */,
    "dose_unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 用量代码 */,
    "dose_unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "frequency_id" integer  /* 频次编号 */,
    "frequency_code" character varying(50)  /* 频次代码 */,
    "frequency_name" character varying(30)  /* 频次名称 */,
    "special_exec_time" character varying(100)  /* 特殊执行时间（特殊频次） */,
    "special_exec_dose" character varying(100)  /* 特殊执行用量（特殊频次） */,
    "usage_id" integer  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_code" character varying(50)  /* 用法代码 */,
    "usage_name" character varying(30)  /* 用法名称 */,
    "exec_dept_id" integer  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "exec_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行科室代码 */,
    "exec_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "urgent_flag" smallint  /* 加急标志 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(20)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_code" character varying(50)  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "note" character varying(500)  /* 备注 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 医嘱开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 医嘱结束时间 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "input_dept_id" integer  /* 开立医嘱科室编号 */,
    "input_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 开立医嘱科室编码 */,
    "input_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 开立医嘱科室名称 */,
    "input_doc_id" integer  /* 开立医嘱医生编号 */,
    "input_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 开立遗嘱医生代码 */,
    "input_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 开立医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "input_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开立医嘱时间 */,
    "confirm_nurse_id" integer  /* 确认护士编号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认护士代码 */,
    "confirm_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认护士姓名 */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认时间 */,
    "stop_doc_id" integer  /* 停止医嘱医生编号 */,
    "stop_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 停止医嘱医生代码 */,
    "stop_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 停止医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "stop_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 停止时间 */,
    "exec_nurse_id" integer  /* 执行护士编号 */,
    "exec_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行护士代码 */,
    "exec_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行护士姓名 */,
    "exec_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 执行时间 */,
    "order_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 医嘱状态编号 */,
    "order_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱状态代码 */,
    "order_state_name" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "undrug_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 诊疗项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" character varying(50)  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 组内排序 */,
    "qty_unit" character varying(20)  /* 数量单位 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inpat_undrug_order" IS '住院非药品医嘱';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpatdept_to_outpat_dept
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpatdept_to_outpat_dept" (
    "dept_id" integer  /*  */,
    "dept_code" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "outpat_dept_id" integer  /*  */,
    "outpat_dept_code" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "outpat_dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  */

);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inpatient_condition_assessment_form
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inpatient_condition_assessment_form" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院时间 */,
    "chief_complaint_structured_flag" character varying(1)  /* 主诉结构化标志 0:否 ; 1:是  ;  */,
    "clinical_manifestation" text  /* 临床表现 */,
    "supplementary_examination" text  /* 辅助检查 */,
    "illness_severity" character varying(50)  /* 病情严重程度 */,
    "illness_urgency" character varying(50)  /* 病情紧急程度 */,
    "nutrition_state" character varying(50)  /* 营养状况 */,
    "mentality_condition" character varying(50)  /* 心理状态 */,
    "consciousness_state" character varying(50)  /* 意识状态 */,
    "is_hospital_transfer treatment" character varying(1)  /* 是否需要转院治疗 0:否 ; 1:是   */,
    "initial_diagnose" character varying(500)  /* 初步诊断 */,
    "treatment_plan" character varying(500)  /* 诊疗计划 */,
    "assessor_name" character varying(50)  /* 评估人姓名 */,
    "assessor_id" character varying(50)  /* 评估人编号 */,
    "assessor_code" integer  /* 评估人代码 */,
    "evaluation_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 评估时间 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "auditor_id" integer  /* 文书审核人编号 */,
    "auditor_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "auditor_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书审核人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inputbingfang
-- 注释: 病房日报录入
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inputbingfang" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "rq" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "ksid" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "ksmc" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "kfcs" integer  /*  */,
    "skcs" integer  /*  */,
    "zrly" integer  /*  */,
    "brry" integer  /*  */,
    "tkzr" integer  /*  */,
    "knzr" integer  /*  */,
    "brcy" integer  /*  */,
    "qzsw" integer  /*  */,
    "zwtk" integer  /*  */,
    "knzc" integer  /*  */,
    "brly" integer  /*  */,
    "brkc" integer  /*  */,
    "brjc" integer  /*  */,
    "pzrs" integer  /*  */,
    "dtyr" integer  /*  */,
    "sjzy" integer  /*  */,
    "gtyr" integer  /*  */,
    "point_id" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(200)  /*  */

);
COMMENT ON TABLE "inputbingfang" IS '病房日报录入';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inputbingren
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inputbingren" (
    "baid" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "kh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "mzh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "x" character varying(20) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "fffs" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "zycs" integer  /*  */,
    "xm" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "xb" character(2)  /*  */,
    "csrq" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "hyzt" character varying(4)  /*  */,
    "zydm" character varying(10) DEFAULT ''::character varying  /*  */,
    "zy" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "csds" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "csdx" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "mz" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "gj" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "sfzh" character varying(18)  /*  */,
    "gzdw" character varying(80)  /*  */,
    "dwdh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "dwyb" character varying(6)  /*  */,
    "xzz" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "xyb" character varying(6)  /*  */,
    "lxrxm" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "lxrgx" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "lxrdz" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "lxrdh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "brly" character varying(20)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("baid")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: inputhuli
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inputhuli" (
    "id" text NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('user_defined.inputhuli_id_seq'::regclass)  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "created_by" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "created_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "created_date" timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "last_updated_by" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "last_updated_name" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "last_updated_date" timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  /*  */,
    "template_id" integer  /*  */,
    "template_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "is_valid" boolean DEFAULT true  /*  */,
    "patient_uid" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "form_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "bed_no" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "client" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "total_score" integer  /*  */,
    "next_page_enable" boolean DEFAULT false  /*  */,
    "lock_count" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "point_id" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "patient_id" text  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: isfjhss
-- 注释: 术后恢复相关质控统计中间表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "isfjhss" (
    "xm" character varying(50)  /* 姓名 */,
    "baid" character varying(20)  /* 病案号 */,
    "zycs" smallint  /* 住院次数 */,
    "cyrq" timestamp without time zone  /* 出院日期 */,
    "cyks" character varying(100)  /* 出院科室 */,
    "zyzdicd" character varying(20)  /* 主要诊断ICD */,
    "zyzdmc" character varying(200)  /* 主要诊断名称 */,
    "zyts" numeric(8,2)  /* 住院天数 */,
    "rytj" character varying(50)  /* 入院途径 */,
    "zyss_qzyr" numeric(8,2)  /* 主要手术术前住院日 */,
    "zyssicd" character varying(20)  /* 主要手术编码 */,
    "zyssmc" character varying(200)  /* 主要手术名称 */,
    "zyssjb" character varying(20)  /* 主要手术级别 */,
    "zyssqkdj" character varying(20)  /* 主要手术切口 */,
    "lyfs" character varying(50)  /* 离院方式 */

);
COMMENT ON TABLE "isfjhss" IS '术后恢复相关质控统计中间表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: item_result
-- 注释: 项目结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "item_result" (
    "item_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "phyexam_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "summary_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 小结信息序号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 科室名称 */,
    "group_id" integer  /* 组合编号 */,
    "group_code" character varying(50)  /* 组合代码 */,
    "group_name" character varying(50)  /* 组合名称 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "result" text NOT NULL  /* 检查结果 */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "reference_range" character varying(100)  /* 参考范围 */,
    "hint" character varying(200)  /* 提示信息 */,
    "doc_id" integer  /* 检查医生编号 */,
    "doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查医生代码 */,
    "doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查医生姓名 */,
    "report_type" character varying(50)  /* 报告类型 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "numerical_value" numeric(20,4)  /* 数值结果 */,
    "source_url" character varying(200)  /* 调阅地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("item_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "item_result" IS '项目结果';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: jhcdas_pat_archive_info
-- 注释: 归档信息表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "jhcdas_pat_archive_info" (
    "patient_id" character varying(16) NOT NULL  /* 病案号 */,
    "visit_id" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 住院次 */,
    "reception_numeric" character varying(10) DEFAULT 0  /* 打印接待次数 */,
    "reception_date_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 打印接待时间 */,
    "archive_state" character varying(2) DEFAULT 0  /* 病案状态（0:未归档，1:归档，2:被修改，3:已签收，-1:归档中，-2:封存,-3:取消确认） */,
    "inp_no" character varying(10)  /* 住院号 */,
    "doctor_submit" character varying(2) DEFAULT 0  /* 医生提交状态（0:未提交，1:提交，-1:病案室审核未通过，2:病案室审核通过） */,
    "doctor_submit_data_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 医生提交时间 */,
    "doctor_submit_id" character varying(10)  /* 提交人ID */,
    "archive_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 归档时间（后台程序操作） */,
    "describe_content" character varying(10)  /* 审核未通过原因（环节质控与病案室操作） */,
    "describe_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 审核人ID（环节质控与病案室操作） */,
    "describe_data_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间（环节质控与病案室操作） */,
    "archive_process_state" character varying(20)  /* 环节质控审核状态编码 */,
    "archive_datetime_emr" timestamp without time zone  /* 电子病历归档时间 */,
    "mr_file_count" numeric(3,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 书写病历数量【新添加】 */,
    "ca_file_count" numeric(3,0) DEFAULT 0  /* CA签名文件数量【新添加】 */,
    "ca_error_count" numeric(3,0) DEFAULT 0  /* CA归档错误数【新添加】 */,
    "ca_change_count" numeric(3,0) DEFAULT 0  /* CA转换成功数【新添加】 */,
    "order_item_count" numeric(5,0) DEFAULT 0  /* HIS医嘱总条数【新添加】 */,
    "order_ca_item_count" numeric(5,0) DEFAULT 0  /* HIS医嘱签名数量【新添加】 */,
    "order_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* HIS医嘱转换成功数量【新添加】 */,
    "lis_item_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* LIS条目总数【新添加】 */,
    "lis_ca_item_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* LIS签名条目总数【新添加】 */,
    "lis_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* LIS签名条目总数【新添加】 */,
    "pacs_item_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* PACS条目总数【新添加】 */,
    "pacs_ca_item_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* PACS签名条目总数【新添加】 */,
    "pacs_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* PACS转换条目总数【新添加】 */,
    "huli_item_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 护理系统文件总数【新添加】 */,
    "huli_ca_item_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 护理系统CA签名文件数【新添加】 */,
    "huli_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 护理系统CA归档文件数【新添加】 */,
    "change_confirm_flag" numeric(1,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 归档后有修改：0代表未修改，1代表修改【新添加】 */,
    "fengcun_flag" numeric(1,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 0代表不封存，1代表封存【新添加】 */,
    "xindian_file_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 心电系统文件总数【新添加】 */,
    "xindian_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 心电系统CA归档数【新添加】 */,
    "shoums_file_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 手麻系统文件总数【新添加】 */,
    "shouma_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 手麻系统CA归档数【新添加】 */,
    "order_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /* HIS医嘱总文件数【新添加】 */,
    "ca_verify_archive_records" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "bingli_file_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "bingli_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "sw_bingli_change_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "sw_bingli_file_count" numeric(4,0) DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "paper_mr_receive_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 病案归档审核日期 */,
    "paper_mr_receive_opr" character varying(16)  /* 病案归档审核人 */,
    "paper_mr_sign_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 病案签收日期 */,
    "paper_mr_sign_opr" character varying(16)  /* 病案签收人 */,
    "hospital_no" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 医院编码 */,
    "archive_percent" numeric(3,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 归档百分比 */,
    "is_archiveok2" numeric DEFAULT 1  /* 1=服务端归档处于完成状态,客户端可直接读取或计算归档率 0=正在归档或未归档 */,
    "first_archive_date_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 首次归档时间 */,
    "last_archive_user" character varying(16)  /* 最后手动归档人 */,
    "is_overtime" numeric(1,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 是否超期 */,
    "notice_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 通知时间 */,
    "notice_user" character varying(16)  /* 通知人 */,
    "readed_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 已阅时间 */,
    "readed_user" character varying(16)  /* 已阅人 */,
    "new_inpno" character varying(16)  /* 新病案号 */,
    "ishospital" numeric(4,0)  /* 是否退院（北京医院定制） */,
    "bjnopaper" numeric(1,0)  /* 无纸（0是 1否） */,
    "is_archiveok" numeric(1,0) DEFAULT 1  /* 1=服务端归档处于完成状态,客户端可直接读取或计算归档率 0=正在归档或未归档 */,
    "archive_datetime_ofd" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "archive_datetime_emr_ofd" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "first_archive_date_time_ofd" timestamp without time zone  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "visit_id", "hospital_no")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "jhcdas_pat_archive_info" IS '归档信息表';
|

-- 表名: jshzl

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "jshzl" (

    "order_date" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "unix_order_date" bigint  /*  */

);

    "c4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "c5" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "c6" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "c7" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "c8" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "point_id" integer  /*  */,
    "mapping_type" integer  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

,

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_antibiotic_result
-- 注释: 药敏结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_antibiotic_result" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "result_number" text NOT NULL  /* 结果编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "bacteria_result_number" text  /* 细菌结果编号 */,
    "drug_sys_code" integer  /* 药品值域 */,
    "drug_code" text  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" text  /* 药品名称 */,
    "test_result_sys_code" integer  /* 药敏结果值域 */,
    "test_result_code" text  /* 药敏结果代码 */,
    "test_result_name" text  /* 药敏结果名称 */,
    "mic" text  /* 最低抑菌浓度 */,
    "text_value" text  /* 文本结果（打印结果） */,
    "sort_no" text  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "antibiotic_method_sys_code" integer  /* 药敏方法值域 */,
    "antibiotic_method_code" text  /* 药敏方法编号 */,
    "antibiotic_method_name" text  /* 药敏方法名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_antibiotic_result" IS '药敏结果';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_apply
-- 注释: 检验申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_apply" (
    "apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_apply_number" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 源系统申请单编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 就诊类型 例如：门诊、急诊、住院 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 值域：岁，月，日 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "apply_class_id" integer  /* 检验类别 */,
    "apply_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验类别编码 */,
    "apply_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验类别名称 */,
    "apply_item_id" integer  /* 检验项目名称 */,
    "apply_item_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验项目编码 */,
    "apply_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验项目名称 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_code" character varying(20)  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "barcode" character varying(50)  /* 条形码 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "apply_doc_id" integer  /* 医生编号 */,
    "apply_doc_code" character varying(20)  /* 医生编码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" character varying(20)  /* 医生名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 患者所属病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所属病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 患者所属科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所属科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认时间 */,
    "confirm_oper_id" integer  /* 确认人编号 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认人代码 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认人名称 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请检验日期 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检验科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验科室编码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验科室名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检验方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验方法名称 */,
    "is_urgent" boolean  /* 是否加急 */,
    "order_no" character varying(50)  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "attention" character varying(500)  /* 注意事项 */,
    "check_status_id" integer  /* 申请单状态编号 */,
    "check_status_code" character varying(10)  /* 申请单状态编码 */,
    "check_status_name" character varying(10)  /* 申请单状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作人编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("apply_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_apply" IS '检验申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_bacteria_result
-- 注释: 细菌结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_bacteria_result" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "result_number" text NOT NULL  /* 结果编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 检验报告编号 */,
    "bacteria_sys_code" integer  /* 细菌值域 */,
    "bacteria_code" text  /* 细菌项目代码 */,
    "bacteria_name" text  /* 细菌项目名称 */,
    "colony_counting" text  /* 菌落计数 */,
    "text_value" text  /* 文本结果（打印结果） */,
    "sort_no" text  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "is_positive" text  /* 是否阳性 */,
    "antibiotic_method_sys_code" integer  /* 药敏方法值域 */,
    "antibiotic_method_code" text  /* 药敏方法编号 */,
    "antibiotic_method_name" text  /* 药敏方法名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_bacteria_result" IS '细菌结果';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_closed_cycle
-- 注释: 患者检验闭环节点信息表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_closed_cycle" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增列，主键 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊id */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者id */,
    "lab_name" text NOT NULL  /* 检验名称 */,
    "order_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 医嘱id */,
    "drug_execute_id" text  /* 执行记录id */,
    "drug_expect_execute_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 预计执行时间 */,
    "order_type_code" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱类型 */,
    "executor_employee_id" integer  /* 执行人id */,
    "executor_employee_name" text  /* 执行人名称 */,
    "node_type" integer NOT NULL  /* 节点类型 */,
    "node_name" text NOT NULL  /* 节点名称 */,
    "executor_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 节点数据产生时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* etl 抽取时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_closed_cycle" IS '患者检验闭环节点信息表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_lab_apply
-- 注释: 检验申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_lab_apply" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统申请单编号 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 源就诊号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 就诊类型 例如：门诊、急诊、住院 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 源病人基本信息编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 值域：岁，月，日 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "apply_class_sys_code" integer  /* 检验类别值域 */,
    "apply_class_code" text  /* 检验类别编码 */,
    "apply_class_name" text  /* 检验类别名称 */,
    "apply_item_sys_code" integer  /* 检验项目值域 */,
    "apply_item_code" text  /* 检验项目编码 */,
    "apply_item_name" text  /* 检验项目名称 */,
    "sample_sys_code" integer  /* 样本值域 */,
    "sample_code" text  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" text  /* 样本名称 */,
    "barcode" text  /* 条形码 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "apply_doc_code" text  /* 医生编码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" text  /* 医生名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所属病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所属科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "confirm_time" text  /* 确认时间 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" text  /* 确认人代码 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" text  /* 确认人名称 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 申请检验日期 */,
    "check_dept_code" text  /* 检验科室编码 */,
    "check_dept_name" text  /* 检验科室名称 */,
    "check_method_sys_code" integer  /* 检验方法值域 */,
    "check_method_code" text  /* 检验方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" text  /* 检验方法名称 */,
    "is_urgent" boolean  /* 是否加急 */,
    "order_no" text  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "attention" text  /* 注意事项 */,
    "check_status_sys_code" integer  /* 申请单状态值域 */,
    "check_status_code" text  /* 申请单状态编码 */,
    "check_status_name" text  /* 申请单状态名称 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_lab_apply" IS '检验申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_lab_report
-- 注释: 检验报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_lab_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 检验报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "test_instrument_sys_code" integer  /* 检验仪器值域 */,
    "test_instrument_code" text  /* 检验仪器编号 */,
    "test_instrumentt_name" text  /* 检验仪器名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "barcode" text  /* 条码号 */,
    "sample_sys_code" integer  /* 样本值域 */,
    "sample_code" text  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_name" text  /* 样本名称 */,
    "sampling_oper_code" text  /* 采样人编号 */,
    "sampling_oper_name" text  /* 采样人姓名 */,
    "sampling_time" text  /* 采样时间 */,
    "receive_oper_code" text  /* 接收人编号 */,
    "receive_oper_name" text  /* 接收人姓名 */,
    "receive_time" text  /* 接收时间 */,
    "test_dept_code" text  /* 检验科室编号 */,
    "test_dept_name" text  /* 检验科室名称 */,
    "test_oper_code" text  /* 检验人编号 */,
    "test_oper_name" text  /* 检验人姓名 */,
    "test_time" text  /* 检验时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_sample_cancel" boolean  /* 样本是否退回 */,
    "sample_cancel_result" text  /* 样本退回原因 */,
    "sample_num" integer  /* 样本数量 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_lab_report" IS '检验报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_lab_report_result
-- 注释: 检验报告结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_lab_report_result" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "result_number" text NOT NULL  /* 结果编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 检验报告编号 */,
    "test_item_sys_code" integer  /* 检验项目值域 */,
    "test_item_code" text  /* 检验项目代码 */,
    "test_item_name" text NOT NULL  /* 检验项目名称 */,
    "text_value" text  /* 文本结果 */,
    "text_value_show" text  /* 文本结果显示 */,
    "numerical_value" text  /* 数值结果 */,
    "unit_sys_code" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" text  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_name" text  /* 单位名称 */,
    "result_type" text  /* 结果类型 */,
    "sort_no" text  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "normal_low" text  /* 正常低值 */,
    "normal_high" text  /* 正常高值 */,
    "reference_range" text  /* 参考范围 */,
    "critical_low" text  /* 危急低值 */,
    "critical_high" text  /* 危急高值 */,
    "absurd_low" text  /* 荒诞低值 */,
    "absurd_high" text  /* 荒诞高值 */,
    "abnormal_flag_sys_code" integer  /* 异常标志值域 */,
    "abnormal_flag_code" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "abnormal_flag_name" text  /* 异常标志说明 */,
    "critical_flag" text  /* 危急值标志 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_lab_report_result" IS '检验报告结果';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_microbe_report
-- 注释: 微生物报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_microbe_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 检验报告编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "report_class_sys_code" integer  /* 报告分类值域 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "test_instrument_sys_code" integer  /* 检验仪器值域 */,
    "test_instrument_code" text  /* 检验仪器编号 */,
    "test_instrumentt_name" text  /* 检验仪器名称 */,
    "culture_purpose" text  /* 培养目的 */,
    "text_value" text  /* 文本结果（打印结果） */,
    "is_bacteria" text  /* 是否有细菌 */,
    "apply_bill_no" text  /* 申请单号 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "apply_ward_code" text  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_name" text  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "barcode" text  /* 条码号 */,
    "sample_sys_code" integer  /* 样本值域 */,
    "sample_code" text  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_name" text  /* 样本名称 */,
    "sampling_oper_code" text  /* 采样人编号 */,
    "sampling_oper_name" text  /* 采样人姓名 */,
    "sampling_time" text  /* 采样时间 */,
    "receive_oper_code" text  /* 接收人编号 */,
    "receive_oper_name" text  /* 接收人姓名 */,
    "receive_time" text  /* 接收时间 */,
    "test_dept_code" text  /* 检验科室编号 */,
    "test_dept_name" text  /* 检验科室名称 */,
    "test_oper_code" text  /* 检验人编号 */,
    "test_oper_name" text  /* 检验人姓名 */,
    "test_time" text  /* 检验时间 */,
    "report_oper_code" text  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" text  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" text  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" text  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" text  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
