|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_report
-- 注释: 检验报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "test_instrument_id" character varying(10)  /* 检验仪器编号 */,
    "test_instrument_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查仪器代码 */,
    "test_instrument_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验仪器名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "barcode" character varying(50)  /* 条码号 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_code" character varying(50)  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "sampling_oper_id" integer  /* 采样人编号 */,
    "sampling_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 采样人代码 */,
    "sampling_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 采样人姓名 */,
    "sampling_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 采样时间 */,
    "receive_oper_id" integer  /* 接收人编号 */,
    "receive_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 接收人代码 */,
    "receive_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 接收人姓名 */,
    "receive_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 接收时间 */,
    "test_dept_id" integer  /* 检验科室编号 */,
    "test_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "test_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检验科室名称 */,
    "test_oper_id" integer  /* 检验人编号 */,
    "test_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验人代码 */,
    "test_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验人姓名 */,
    "test_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检验时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "gregation_flag" integer  /* 聚合标志 */,
    "report_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 常规检验大项森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_sample_cancel" boolean  /* 样本是否退回 */,
    "sample_cancel_result" character varying(200)  /* 样本退回原因 */,
    "sample_num" integer  /* 样本数量 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_report" IS '检验报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_report_result
-- 注释: 检验报告结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_report_result" (
    "lab_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "source_result_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统结果编号 */,
    "test_item_id" integer  /* 检验项目编号 */,
    "test_item_code" character varying(20)  /* 检验项目代码 */,
    "test_item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 检验项目名称 */,
    "text_value" character varying(100)  /* 文本结果 */,
    "text_value_show" character varying(100)  /* 文本结果显示 */,
    "numerical_value" numeric(20,4)  /* 数值结果 */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "result_type" smallint  /* 结果类型 */,
    "sort_no" character varying(10)  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "normal_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 正常低值 */,
    "normal_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 正常高值 */,
    "reference_range" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围 */,
    "critical_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 危急低值 */,
    "critical_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 危急高值 */,
    "absurd_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 荒诞低值 */,
    "absurd_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 荒诞高值 */,
    "abnormal_flag_id" integer  /* 异常标志 */,
    "abnormal_flag_code" character varying(50)  /* 异常标志代码 */,
    "abnormal_flag_name" character varying(50)  /* 异常标志说明 */,
    "critical_flag" smallint  /* 危急值标志 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "abnormal_flag" integer  /* 异常标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "result_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检验小项森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "test_item_english_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验项目英文名 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_report_result" IS '检验报告结果';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lab_result_show
-- 注释: 检验结果展示表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lab_result_show" (
    "lab_result_show_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "code_sys_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "code_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 代码编号 */,
    "code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 代码 */,
    "name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 名称 */,
    "important_level" smallint  /* 异常等级 */,
    "color" character varying(50)  /* 颜色 */,
    "show_text" character varying(50)  /* 显示文本 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_show_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lab_result_show" IS '检验结果展示表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lhb_oa_renshidtxx

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lhb_oa_renshidtxx" (

    "l_gengxinrq" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "l_danweiid" integer  /*  */,

,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

|-- ========================================

-- 注释:

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: lis_report_item
-- 注释: 检验报告项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "lis_report_item" (
    "lis_report_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("lis_report_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "lis_report_item" IS '检验报告项目';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: med_values_changed_rec
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "med_values_changed_rec" (
    "patient_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "visit_id" numeric(2,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "dep_id" numeric(2,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "recording_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "time_point" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "change_item" character varying(16) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "type" numeric(2,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "values_signs" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "log_date_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "old_values" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "new_values" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "units" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "memo" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "old_memo" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "operator" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "old_operator" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "order_no" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "order_sub_no" numeric(12,0)  /*  */,
    "duty_name" character varying(8)  /*  */,
    "duty_date" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "item_no" character varying(2)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "visit_id", "dep_id", "recording_date", "time_point", "change_item", "type", "values_signs", "log_date_time")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: microbe_report
-- 注释: 微生物报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "microbe_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "test_instrument_id" character varying(10)  /* 检验仪器编号 */,
    "test_instrument_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验仪器代码 */,
    "test_instrument_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验仪器名称 */,
    "culture_purpose" character varying(100)  /* 培养目的 */,
    "text_value" character varying(500)  /* 文本结果（打印结果） */,
    "is_bacteria" boolean  /* 是否有细菌 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "barcode" character varying(50)  /* 条码号 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_code" character varying(50)  /* 采样人代码 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "sampling_oper_id" integer  /* 采样人编号 */,
    "sampling_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 采样人代码 */,
    "sampling_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 采样人姓名 */,
    "sampling_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 采样时间 */,
    "receive_oper_id" integer  /* 接收人编号 */,
    "receive_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 接收人代码 */,
    "receive_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 接收人姓名 */,
    "receive_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 接收时间 */,
    "test_dept_id" integer  /* 检验科室编号 */,
    "test_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "test_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检验科室名称 */,
    "test_oper_id" integer  /* 检验人编号 */,
    "test_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检验人代码 */,
    "test_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检验人姓名 */,
    "test_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检验时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "microbe_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 微生物检验大项森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "microbe_report" IS '微生物报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: microbe_report_item
-- 注释: 微生物报告项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "microbe_report_item" (
    "microbe_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(20)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("microbe_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "microbe_report_item" IS '微生物报告项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: mr_file_index_callback
-- 注释: 病历召回申请
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "mr_file_index_callback" (
    "patient_id" character varying(16) NOT NULL  /* 病人ID号 */,
    "visit_id" numeric(4,0) NOT NULL  /* 病人住院次 */,
    "apply_date_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 申请日期 */,
    "apply_time_limit" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请期限 */,
    "apply_user_id" character varying(16)  /* 申请人用户号 */,
    "apply_user_name" character varying(8)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(16)  /* 申请人部门 */,
    "status" numeric(1,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 状态 0 申请 1批准 4作废 */,
    "approve_user_id" character varying(16)  /* 批准人用户号 */,
    "approve_user_name" character varying(8)  /* 批准人姓名 */,
    "approve_dept_code" character varying(16)  /* 批准人部门 */,
    "approve_date_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 批准日期 */,
    "apply_reason" character varying(200)  /* 申请事由 */,
    "clinic_type" numeric(1,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 0医疗护理，1临床护理 */,
    "hospital_no" character varying(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1110002  /* 医院编码 */,
    "operator_type" numeric(1,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 0 修改 1 新建 2打印 */,
    "limit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作期限日期 */,
    "approve_reason" character varying(200)  /* 批准事由 2013.5.23 林凯 */,
    "iscopyback" numeric(4,0)  /* 复印标记 */,
    "finish_status" numeric(1,0)  /* 0,未修改 1修改完成 */,
    "is_firstpage" numeric(2,0)  /* 0,不修改首页 1修改首页 */,
    "mrback_status" character varying(16)  /* 病案打回前的病案状态 */,
    "is_approve" numeric(2,0)  /* 0为召回,1为病案室打回 */,
    "inp_no" character varying(30)  /* 病案号 */,
    "back_type" numeric(2,0)  /* 0文书  1只是首页 2病历+首页 */,
    "finish_date_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 提交时间 */,
    "approve_user_id_director" character varying(16)  /* 科主任ID */,
    "apply_user_name_director" character varying(16)  /* 科主任姓名 */,
    "approve_dept_code_director" character varying(16)  /* 科主任所在科室 */,
    "approve_date_time_director" timestamp without time zone  /* 科主任审批时间 */,
    "apply_reason_director" character varying(200)  /* 科主任审批原因 */,
    "approve_user_id_medical" character varying(16)  /* 医教部ID */,
    "apply_user_name_medical" character varying(16)  /* 医教部姓名 */,
    "approve_dept_code_medical" character varying(16)  /* 医教部所在科室 */,
    "approve_date_time_medical" timestamp without time zone  /* 医教部审批时间 */,
    "apply_reason_medical" character varying(200)  /* 医教部审批原因 */,
    "approve_host_ip" character varying(50)  /* 审批电脑IP(通用) */,
    "approve_host_name" character varying(50)  /* 审批电脑名(通用) */,
    "approve_host_mac_add" character varying(50)  /* 审批电脑MAC(通用) */,
    "firstpage_name" character varying(100)  /* 召回附页附页名称，中间用,隔开 */,
    "operator_type_name" character varying(100)  /* 打回类别名称(组合打回显示的) */,
    "is_papar_back" numeric(2,0) DEFAULT 0  /* 纸质病历是否回收 0否 1是 */,
    "papar_back_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 纸质病历回收时间 */,
    "papar_back_man_id" character varying(100)  /* 纸质病历回收人ID */,
    "papar_back_man_name" character varying(100)  /* 纸质病历回收人姓名 */,
    "approve_reason_director" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "approve_reason_medical" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "approve_user_name_director" character varying(16)  /*  */,
    "approve_user_name_medical" character varying(16)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "visit_id", "apply_date_time", "clinic_type", "hospital_no")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "mr_file_index_callback" IS '病历召回申请';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ms_cf01
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ms_cf01" (
    "cfsb" numeric(18,0) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "jgid" numeric(8,0)  /*  */,
    "cfhm" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "fphm" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "mzxh" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "cflx" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "brid" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "brxm" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "kfrq" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "cfts" numeric(2,0)  /*  */,
    "ksdm" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "ysdm" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "fyrq" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "fyck" numeric(2,0)  /*  */,
    "hjgh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "pygh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "fygh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "pybz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "fybz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "cfgl" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "zfpb" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "dybz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "yfsb" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "tscf" numeric(2,0)  /* 1、协定处方；2、免费处方 */,
    "tslx" numeric  /*  */,
    "tybz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "cfbz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "jzxh" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "yxpb" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "jzkh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "djybz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "zfsj" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "hdgh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "hdrq" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "djly" numeric(8,0)  /*  */,
    "tysm" numeric(8,0)  /*  */,
    "kjly" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "kjlyly" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "brxz" numeric(18,0)  /*  */,
    "cflb" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "wgybz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "wgyscbz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "wgyscsj" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "wgyscgh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "jmbz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "klcf" numeric(1,0)  /* 颗粒处方 */,
    "mzcf" numeric(2,0)  /* 精麻处方 */,
    "bdbz" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "bdsj" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "bdlsh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "cyff" numeric(8,0)  /* 草药服法 */,
    "xdcfmc" character varying(40)  /* 协定处方名称 */,
    "ifty" numeric(1,0)  /*  */,
    "shgh" character varying(10)  /* 审核人 */,
    "shrq" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "shpb" numeric(1,0)  /* 审核判别：0不需要审核 1待审核2审核通过-1审核不通过 */,
    "mtbz" numeric(1,0)  /* 门特标志 */,
    "xfhm" character varying(20)  /* 续方号码 */,
    "bydlsh" character varying(20)  /* 摆药单当日流水号 */,
    "cyycyl" numeric  /* 草药一次用量 */,
    "illcode" character varying(20)  /* 门慢特病种 */,
    "cflsh" numeric(18,0)  /* 处方流水号 */,
    "dmsyz" numeric(8,0)  /*  */,
    "fyjck" character varying(20)  /* 发药机窗口 */,
    "qyfs" numeric(2,0)  /* 取药方式  1 到院自取  2 物流配送 */,
    "expressorderid" character varying(30)  /* 快递单号 */,
    "kddz" character varying(150)  /* 快递地址 */,
    "sjr" character varying(40)  /* 收件人 */,
    "sjdh" character varying(16)  /* 收件电话 */,
    "fyjbj" numeric(1,0)  /* 发热门诊发药机处方标记 */,
    "ccfbz" numeric(1,0)  /* 长处方标志 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("cfsb")
);
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ms_yy_plan_main
-- 注释: 排班计划主表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ms_yy_plan_main" (
    "jlxh" numeric(18,0) NOT NULL  /* 记录序号 */,
    "gzrq" date NOT NULL  /* 值班日期 */,
    "ksdm" character varying(6) NOT NULL  /* 科室代码 */,
    "ysdm" character varying(8)  /* 医生代码 */,
    "zblb" numeric(10,0) NOT NULL  /* 班次代码 */,
    "tzpb" character varying DEFAULT 0  /* 停诊标志 */,
    "point_id" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "ksmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "mzks" character varying  /*  */,
    "ygxm" character varying  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("jlxh")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ms_yy_plan_main" IS '排班计划主表';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: myblood
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "myblood" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "isdelete" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "createdt" date  /*  */,
    "ac_id" integer  /*  */,
    "on_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "patient_mrn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "patient_number" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "drug_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "drug_begintime" date  /*  */,
    "drug_endtime" date  /*  */,
    "drug_dose" integer  /*  */,
    "drug_unit" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_mode" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "drug_type" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "user_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "user_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "type_code" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "type_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "spect" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "point_time" date  /*  */,
    "drug_flag" integer DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "y_index" integer DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "transfusion_type" integer  /*  */,
    "sortno" integer  /*  */,
    "drug_lname" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "concentration" integer  /*  */,
    "concentration_unit" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "causes_code" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "causes_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drug_count" integer  /*  */,
    "custom_property" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "drug_speed" integer  /*  */,
    "drug_speedunit" character varying(50)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
|

-- 表名: n_request_form
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "n_request_form" (
    "serial_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "receive_flag" character(1)  /*  */,
    "status_no" integer  /*  */,
    "sample_type_no" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "pat_no" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "cname" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "refuse_opinion" text  /*  */,
    "refuse_reason" text  /*  */,
    "sign_flag" character(1)  /*  */,

,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nis_bacteria_report
-- 注释: 细菌感染上报,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nis_bacteria_report" (
    "bacteria_report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 细菌感染上报记录唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码  */,
    "source_bacteria_report_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统细菌感染上报记录唯一标识符  */,
    "nis_monitor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "id_card_no" character varying(20)  /* 身份证号  */,
    "infeciton_type" character varying(20)  /* 感染类型  */,
    "infection_body_part" character varying(20)  /* 感染发生部位  */,
    "infection_body_part_code" character varying(20)  /* 感染发生部位编码  */,
    "pathogen_test_flag" character varying(20)  /* 是否做了病原学检查  */,
    "specimen" character varying(20)  /* 做病原学检查时所采集标本的名称  */,
    "pathogen_name" character varying(20)  /* 病原学检查中检出的病原体名称  */,
    "dic_report_dept_id" integer  /* 报告者所在科室编号 */,
    "dic_report_dept_code" character varying(20)  /* 报告者所在科室代码 */,
    "dic_report_dept_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告者所在科室名称 */,
    "dic_reporter_id" integer  /* 报告者编号  */,
    "dic_reporter_code" character varying(20)  /* 报告者代码  */,
    "dic_reporter_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告者名称  */,
    "report_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 报告时间  */,
    "dic_confirmer_id" integer  /* 确认者编号  */,
    "dic_confirmer_code" character varying(20)  /* 确认者代码  */,
    "dic_confirmer_name" character varying(20)  /* 确认者名称  */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 确认时间  */,
    "relation_vs_death" character varying(40)  /* 本例感染事件与患者死亡的关系  */,
    "infection_outcome" character varying(10)  /* 感染转归情况  */,
    "infection_outcome_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 感染转归日期  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("bacteria_report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nis_bacteria_report" IS '细菌感染上报,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nis_device_monitors
-- 注释: 器械引起的院内感染情况,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nis_device_monitors" (
    "device_monitor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 器械感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码  */,
    "source_device_monitor_id" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 源系统器械感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "nis_monitor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "id_card_no" character varying(32)  /* 身份证号  */,
    "device_name" character varying(30)  /* 器械名称  */,
    "device_treament_type" character varying(30)  /* 院内感染监测基本数据集定义的器械相关治疗标准名称  */,
    "insertion_site" character varying(30)  /* 器械插入(植入)部位  */,
    "insertion_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 器械插入(植入)时间  */,
    "insertion_operator_id" integer  /* 器械插入(植入)操作者编号  */,
    "insertion_operator_code" character varying(30)  /* 器械插入(植入)操作者代码  */,
    "insertion_operator_name" character varying(30)  /* 器械插入(植入)操作者名称  */,
    "insertion_dept_id" integer  /* 执行器械插入(植入)操作的科室编号 */,
    "insertion_dept_code" character varying(30)  /* 执行器械插入(植入)操作的科室代码 */,
    "insertion_dept_name" character varying(30)  /* 执行器械插入(植入)操作的科室名称 */,
    "extubaion_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 器械拔出(取出)时间  */,
    "extubaion_operator_id" integer  /* 器械拔出(取出)操作者编号  */,
    "extubaion_operator_code" character varying(30)  /* 器械拔出(取出)操作者代码  */,
    "extubaion_operator_name" character varying(30)  /* 器械拔出(取出)操作者名称  */,
    "extubaion_dept_id" integer  /* 执行器械拔出(取出)操作的科室编号  */,
    "extubaion_dept_code" character varying(30)  /* 执行器械拔出(取出)操作的科室代码 */,
    "extubaion_dept_name" character varying(30)  /* 执行器械拔出(取出)操作的科室名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("device_monitor_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nis_device_monitors" IS '器械引起的院内感染情况,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nis_factors_record
-- 注释: 院内感染发生原因记录,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nis_factors_record" (
    "nis_factor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 院内感染发生原因唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码  */,
    "source_nis_factor_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统院内感染发生原因唯一标识符  */,
    "nis_monitor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "id_card_no" character varying(32)  /* 身份证号  */,
    "his_visit_id" character varying(20)  /* HIS就诊标识  */,
    "dic_nis_factor_name" character varying(20)  /* 院内感染原因  */,
    "dic_nis_factor_code" character varying(20)  /* 院内感染原因编码  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("nis_factor_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nis_factors_record" IS '院内感染发生原因记录,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nis_monitor_records
-- 注释: 院内感染监测记录,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nis_monitor_records" (
    "nis_monitor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码  */,
    "source_nis_monitor_id" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 源系统院内感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "id_card_no" character varying(32)  /* 身份证号  */,
    "infection_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 感染发生日期  */,
    "dic_occured_dept_id" integer  /* 感染发生时患者所在科室编号 */,
    "dic_occured_dept_code" character varying(30)  /* 感染发生时患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dic_occured_dept_name" character varying(30)  /* 感染发生时患者所在科室名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("nis_monitor_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nis_monitor_records" IS '院内感染监测记录,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nis_oper_incision_monitor
-- 注释: 手术切口院内感染监测记录表,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nis_oper_incision_monitor" (
    "nis_oper_incision_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 医院感染手术唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：syzn_his5，小写，下划线命名法 */,
    "source_nis_oper_incision_id" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 源系统医院感染手术唯一标识符 原始业务系统为联合主键时，以'&#124;'分隔  */,
    "nis_monitor_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 院内感染记录唯一标识符  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "operation_doc_id" integer  /* 手术医生编号  */,
    "operation_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生代码  */,
    "operation_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术医生姓名  */,
    "operation_dept_id" integer  /* 手术科室编号 */,
    "operation_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术科室代码 */,
    "operation_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术科室名称 */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 术前诊断 患者手术前的诊断描述 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(20)  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operation_type_code" character varying(2) NOT NULL  /* 手术类型代码 例如：普通手术、介入手术 */,
    "operation_type_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 手术类型名称  */,
    "operation_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术类别代码  */,
    "operation_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术类别名称 例如：日间：手术简单无需住院、
 急诊：需要立刻安排手术、
 择期：手术有风险，需住院手术 */,
    "operation_level_code" character varying(3)  /* 手术级别代码  */,
    "operation_level_name" character varying(10)  /* 手术级别名称  */,
    "incision_type_code" character varying(10)  /* 切口类型代码 值域：1：I类切口、2：II类切口、3：III类切口 、4：IV类切口 */,
    "incision_type_name" character varying(10)  /* 切口类型名称  */,
    "begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术开始时间  */,
    "end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术结束时间  */,
    "incision_infect_code" character varying(1)  /* 切口感染代码 0：无，1： 浅层，2：深层 */,
    "oper_site_infect_type_code" character varying(1)  /* 手术部位感染类型代码 1:表浅切口手术感染 2:深部手术切口感染 3:器官(或腔隙)感染 */,
    "infect_date" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 感染日期  */,
    "incision_cnt" character varying(3)  /* 切口个数  */,
    "note" character varying(64)  /* 备注  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("nis_oper_incision_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nis_oper_incision_monitor" IS '手术切口院内感染监测记录表,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nlp_abdominal_xray_report
-- 注释: 腹部X线报告结构化数据
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nlp_abdominal_xray_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_text" text  /* 原文字段 */,
    "report_json" jsonb  /* 报告结构化数据 */,
    "report_yes_json" jsonb  /* 报告结构化肯定数据 */,
    "report_no_json" jsonb  /* 报告结构化否定数据 */,
    "report_num_json" jsonb  /* 报告结构化数值数据 */,
    "nlp_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nlp_abdominal_xray_report" IS '腹部X线报告结构化数据';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nlp_discharge_summary
-- 注释: 出院小结记录结构化数据
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nlp_discharge_summary" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 文档流水号 */,
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 文书编号 */,
    "type" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文档类型 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "health_problem_json" jsonb  /* 主要健康问题结构化数据 */,
    "health_problem_yes_json" jsonb  /* 主要健康问题结构化肯定数据 */,
    "health_problem_no_json" jsonb  /* 主要健康问题结构化否定数据 */,
    "discharge_diagnosis_json" jsonb  /* 出院诊断结构化数据 */,
    "discharge_diagnosis_yes_json" jsonb  /* 出院诊断结构化肯定数据 */,
    "discharge_diagnosis_no_json" jsonb  /* 出院诊断结构化否定数据 */,
    "operation_technique_json" jsonb  /* 手术操作结构化数据 */,
    "operation_technique_yes_json" jsonb  /* 手术操作结构化肯定数据 */,
    "operation_technique_no_json" jsonb  /* 手术操作结构化否定数据 */,
    "treatment_plan_json" jsonb  /* 治疗计划结构化数据 */,
    "treatment_plan_yes_json" jsonb  /* 治疗计划结构化肯定数据 */,
    "treatment_plan_no_json" jsonb  /* 治疗计划结构化否定数据 */,
    "hospital_course_json" jsonb  /* 住院过程结构化数据 */,
    "hospital_course_yes_json" jsonb  /* 住院过程结构化肯定数据 */,
    "hospital_course_no_json" jsonb  /* 住院过程结构化否定数据 */,
    "laboratory_examination_json" jsonb  /* 实验检查结构化数据 */,
    "laboratory_examination_yes_json" jsonb  /* 实验检查结构化肯定数据 */,
    "laboratory_examination_no_json" jsonb  /* 实验检查结构化否定数据 */,
    "nlp_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "health_problem_num_json" jsonb  /* 主要健康问题结构化数值数据 */,
    "hospital_course_num_json" jsonb  /* 住院过程结构化数值数据 */,
    "laboratory_examination_num_json" jsonb  /* 实验检查结构化数值数据 */,
    "discharge_course_json" jsonb  /* 出院情况结构化数据 */,
    "discharge_course_yes_json" jsonb  /* 出院情况结构化肯定数据 */,
    "discharge_course_no_json" jsonb  /* 出院情况结构化否定数据 */,
    "discharge_course_num_json" jsonb  /* 出院情况结构化数值数据 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nlp_discharge_summary" IS '出院小结记录结构化数据';
|

    "report_no_json" jsonb  /* 搜索结构化否定数据 */,
    "report_num_json" jsonb  /* 搜索结构化数值数据 */,
    "nlp_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nlp_pulsenlp_the_points" IS '中医切诊';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_catheters
-- 注释: 护理导管记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_catheters" (
    "catheter_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  导管记录序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  姓名 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /*  病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /*  病人就诊编号 */,
    "source_catheter_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  源系统导管记录序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  源系统代码 */,
    "catheter_no" character varying(20)  /*  导管编号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /*  科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /*  病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /*  病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(50)  /*  病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /*  床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /*  床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(50)  /*  床位名称 */,
    "catheter_source" character varying(50)  /*  导管来源 */,
    "catheter_name" character varying(50)  /*  导管名称 */,
    "catheter_brand" character varying(50)  /*  导管品牌 */,
    "catheter_model" character varying(50)  /*  导管型号 */,
    "catheter_body_parts" character varying(50)  /*  导管部位 */,
    "mark_scale" character varying(50)  /*  标识刻度 */,
    "built_in_scale" character varying(50)  /*  内置刻度 */,
    "catheter_mode" character varying(50)  /*  置管方式 */,
    "risk_level" character varying(50)  /*  风险等级 */,
    "catheterization_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  置管时间 */,
    "entry_flag" integer  /*  入出标识 */,
    "catheter_nurse_id" integer  /*  置管护士编号 */,
    "catheter_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /*  置管护士代码 */,
    "catheter_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /*  置管护士姓名 */,
    "extubation_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  拔管时间 */,
    "extubation_nurse_id" integer  /*  拔管护士编号 */,
    "extubation_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /*  拔管护士代码 */,
    "extubation_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /*  拔管护士姓名 */,
    "height" character varying(10)  /*  身高(cm) */,
    "weight" character varying(10)  /*  体重(kg) */,
    "left_upper_arm_length" character varying(10)  /*  左上臂长 */,
    "right_upper_arm_length" character varying(10)  /*  右上臂长 */,
    "built_in_length" character varying(10)  /*  内置长度 */,
    "exposure_length" character varying(10)  /*  外露长度 */,
    "left_arm_circumference" character varying(10)  /*  左臂围 */,
    "right_arm_circumference" character varying(10)  /*  右臂围 */,
    "right_sternoclavicular" character varying(10)  /*  右胸锁关节到剑突 */,
    "puncture_count" character varying(10)  /*  穿刺次数 */,
    "catheter_abnormal" character varying(150)  /*  置管中异常 */,
    "pro_catheter_abnormal" character varying(150)  /*  置管后早期异常 */,
    "end_position" character varying(50)  /*  导管末端位置 */,
    "flat_ribs" character varying(10)  /*  平第几根肋 */,
    "adjustment_from" character varying(10)  /*  摄片后末端调整从 */,
    "adjustment_to" character varying(10)  /*  摄片后末端调整到 */,
    "adjustment_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  摄片后末端调整日期 */,
    "compute_right" character varying(20)  /*  测量公式右计算 */,
    "estimate_right" character varying(20)  /*  测量公式右手测 */,
    "compute_left" character varying(20)  /*  测量公式左计算 */,
    "estimate_left" character varying(20)  /*  测量公式左手测 */,
    "formula_add" character varying(20)  /*  测量公式加减 */,
    "formula_adult" character varying(20)  /*  测量公式成人 */,
    "formula_other" character varying(50)  /*  测量公式其他 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /*  操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /*  操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /*  操作员名称 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  操作时间 */,
    "update_oper_id" integer  /*  更新人编号 */,
    "update_oper_code" character varying(50)  /*  更新人代码 */,
    "update_oper_name" character varying(50)  /*  更新人名称 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  操作时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean  /*  有效 */,
    "renewal_flag" boolean  /*  续用标志 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /*  数据抽取时间 */,
    "using_state" character varying(2)  /* 使用状态 */,
    "is_abnormal" boolean  /* 是否异常 */,
    "operation_content" character varying(200)  /* 操作内容 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("catheter_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_catheters" IS '护理导管记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_data_record
-- 注释: 护理数据记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_data_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_id" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据序号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 记录时间 */,
    "record_type_id" integer  /* 护理记录类型编号 */,
    "record_type_name" character varying(20)  /* 护理记录类型名称 */,
    "value1" character varying(5000)  /* 值1 */,
    "unit1_std_id" integer  /* 单位1标准编号 */,
    "unit1_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位1名称 */,
    "value2" character varying(50)  /* 值2 */,
    "unit2_std_id" integer  /* 单位2标准编号 */,
    "unit2_name" character varying(10)  /* 单位2名称 */,
    "value_class_code" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 值类别代码 */,
    "value_code_system_id" integer  /* 值代码系统编号 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(20)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "value_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 值类别名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_data_record" IS '护理数据记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_nurse_catheters
-- 注释: 护理导管记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_nurse_catheters" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "catheter_number" text  /* 源系统导管记录序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "catheter_no" text  /* 导管编号 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典编码 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位字典编码 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "catheter_source" text  /* 导管来源 */,
    "catheter_name" text  /* 导管名称 */,
    "catheter_brand" text  /* 导管品牌 */,
    "catheter_model" text  /* 导管型号 */,
    "catheter_body_parts" text  /* 导管部位 */,
    "mark_scale" text  /* 标识刻度 */,
    "built_in_scale" text  /* 内置刻度 */,
    "catheter_mode" text  /* 置管方式 */,
    "risk_level" text  /* 风险等级 */,
    "catheterization_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 置管时间 */,
    "entry_flag" text  /* 入出标识 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典编码 */,
    "catheter_nurse_code" text  /* 置管护士代码 */,
    "catheter_nurse_name" text  /* 置管护士姓名 */,
    "extubation_time" text  /* 拔管时间 */,
    "extubation_nurse_code" text  /* 拔管护士代码 */,
    "extubation_nurse_name" text  /* 拔管护士姓名 */,
    "height" text  /* 身高(cm) */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重(kg) */,
    "left_upper_arm_length" text  /* 左上臂长 */,
    "right_upper_arm_length" text  /* 右上臂长 */,
    "built_in_length" text  /* 内置长度 */,
    "exposure_length" text  /* 外露长度 */,
    "left_arm_circumference" text  /* 左臂围 */,
    "right_arm_circumference" text  /* 右臂围 */,
    "right_sternoclavicular" text  /* 右胸锁关节到剑突 */,
    "puncture_count" text  /* 穿刺次数 */,
    "catheter_abnormal" text  /* 置管中异常 */,
    "pro_catheter_abnormal" text  /* 置管后早期异常 */,
    "end_position" text  /* 导管末端位置 */,
    "flat_ribs" text  /* 平第几根肋 */,
    "adjustment_from" text  /* 摄片后末端调整从 */,
    "adjustment_to" text  /* 摄片后末端调整到 */,
    "adjustment_time" text  /* 摄片后末端调整日期 */,
    "compute_right" text  /* 测量公式右计算 */,
    "estimate_right" text  /* 测量公式右手测 */,
    "compute_left" text  /* 测量公式左计算 */,
    "estimate_left" text  /* 测量公式左手测 */,
    "formula_add" text  /* 测量公式加减 */,
    "formula_adult" text  /* 测量公式成人 */,
    "formula_other" text  /* 测量公式其他 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员名称 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "update_oper_code" text  /* 更新人代码 */,
    "update_oper_name" text  /* 更新人名称 */,
    "update_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "is_valid" text NOT NULL  /* 有效标志 */,
    "renewal_flag" text  /* 续用标志 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 数据标志 */,
    "using_state" text  /* 使用状态 */,
    "is_abnormal" boolean  /* 是否异常 */,
    "operation_content" text  /* 操作内容 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_nurse_catheters" IS '护理导管记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_nurse_data_record
-- 注释: 护理数据记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_nurse_data_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "record_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "record_type_sys_code" integer  /* 护理记录类型值域 */,
    "record_type_code" text  /* 护理记录类型编号 */,
    "record_type_name" text  /* 护理记录类型名称 */,
    "value1" text NOT NULL  /* 值1 */,
    "unit1_std_code" text  /* 单位1标准编号 */,
    "unit1_name" text  /* 单位1名称 */,
    "value2" text  /* 值2 */,
    "unit2_std_code" text  /* 单位2标准编号 */,
    "unit2_name" text  /* 单位2名称 */,
    "value_code_system_code" integer  /* 值代码值域 */,
    "value_class_code" text  /* 值类别代码 */,
    "value_class_name" text  /* 值类别名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_nurse_data_record" IS '护理数据记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_nurse_plan
-- 注释: 护理照护计划
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_nurse_plan" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典编码 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位字典编码 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "plan_number" text  /* 照顾计划序号(原始系统） */,
    "happen_time" text  /* 发生日期 */,
    "shifts_date" text  /* 班次日期 */,
    "shifts_no" text  /* 班次编号 */,
    "shifts_name" text  /* 班次名称 */,
    "symptom_no" text  /* 症状编号 */,
    "symptom" text  /* 症状 */,
    "diagnosis_no" text  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diagnosis" text  /* 诊断 */,
    "target_no" text  /* 目标编号 */,
    "target" text  /* 目标 */,
    "expect_solve_time" text  /* 预期解决日期 */,
    "expect_solve_time_scope" text  /* 预期解决时间段 */,
    "real_solve_time" text  /* 实际解决日期 */,
    "nurse_plan_state" text  /* 照护计划状态 */,
    "nurse_submit_state" text  /* 护士提交状态 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典编码 */,
    "submit_nurse_code" text  /* 提交护士工号 */,
    "submit_nurse_name" text  /* 提交护士姓名 */,
    "create_nurse_code" text  /* 创建护士工号 */,
    "create_nurse_name" text  /* 创建护士姓名 */,
    "nurse_confirm_state" text  /* 护士审核状态 */,
    "confirm_nurse_code" text  /* 审核护士工号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_name" text  /* 审核护士姓名 */,
    "nurse_confirm_time" text  /* 护士审核日期 */,
    "duty_nurse_confirm_state" text  /* 总责提交状态 */,
    "duty_nurse_confirm_time" text  /* 总责提交日期 */,
    "submit_duty_nurse_code" text  /* 总责提交工号 */,
    "submit_duty_nurse_name" text  /* 总责提交姓名 */,
    "doctor_confirm_state" text  /* 医生审核状态 */,
    "confirm_doctor_code" text  /* 审核医生工号 */,
    "confirm_doctor_name" text  /* 审核医生姓名 */,
    "doctor_confirm_time" text  /* 医生审核日期 */,
    "update_nurse_code" text  /* 更新护士工号 */,
    "update_nurse_name" text  /* 更新护士姓名 */,
    "create_time" text  /* 生成日期 */,
    "original_plan_no" text  /* 原始计划编号 */,
    "notes" text  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" text NOT NULL  /* 有效状态 */,
    "plan_source" text  /* 计划来源 */,
    "evaluate_result" text  /* 评价结果 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束日期 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  /* 数据标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_nurse_plan" IS '护理照护计划';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_nurse_record_sheet
-- 注释: 护理记录单
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_nurse_record_sheet" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "record_sheet_number" text NOT NULL  /* 护理记录单编号 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 源患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位字典 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "breathe" text  /* 呼吸 */,
    "pulse" text  /* 脉搏 */,
    "heart_rate" text  /* 心率 */,
    "temperaturet_type" text  /* 体温类型 */,
    "temperature" text  /* 体温值 */,
    "pressure_high" text  /* 血压（高） */,
    "pressure_low" text  /* 血压（低） */,
    "complexion" text  /* 面色 */,
    "consciousness" text  /* 神志 */,
    "spo2" text  /* 血氧饱和度 */,
    "breathe_support" text  /* 呼吸支持及氧疗 */,
    "respirator_mode" text  /* 呼吸机模式 */,
    "respirator_frequenc" text  /* 呼吸机频率 */,
    "fio2" text  /* 吸氧浓度 */,
    "vein_catheter_type_sys_code" integer  /* 静脉置管类型字典 */,
    "vein_catheter_type_code" text  /* 静脉置管类型代码 */,
    "vein_catheter_type_name" text  /* 静脉置管类型名称 */,
    "vein_catheter_sys_code" integer  /* 静脉置管字典 */,
    "vein_catheter_code" text  /* 静脉置管代码 */,
    "vein_catheter_name" text  /* 静脉置管名称 */,
    "income_volume_sys_code" integer  /* 入量类型字典 */,
    "income_volume_code" text  /* 入量类型代码 */,
    "income_volume_name" text  /* 入量类型名称 */,
    "income_volume" text  /* 入量 */,
    "income_volume_type" text  /* 入量的结果类型 */,
    "income_volume_unit" text  /* 入量单位 */,
    "defecate_frequency" text  /* 大便次数 */,
    "urine_frequency" text  /* 小便次数 */,
    "urine_volume" text  /* 小便量 */,
    "output_volume_item_sys_code" integer  /* 其他出量项目字典 */,
    "output_volume_item_code" text  /* 其他出量项目代码 */,
    "output_volume_item_name" text  /* 其他出量项目名称 */,
    "output_volume" text  /* 其他出量量 */,
    "condition_measure" text  /* 病情及措施 */,
    "measure_nurse_code" text  /* 执行护士代码 */,
    "measure_nurse_name" text  /* 执行护士姓名 */,
    "measure_time" text  /* 执行时间 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作人代码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "verify_nurse_code" text  /* 审核护士代码 */,
    "verify_nurse_name" text  /* 审核护士姓名 */,
    "verify_oper_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_nurse_record_sheet" IS '护理记录单';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_plan
-- 注释: 护理照护计划
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_plan" (
    "plan_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "source_plan_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统照顾计划序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(50)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "happen_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 发生日期 */,
    "shifts_date" character varying(50)  /* 班次日期 */,
    "shifts_no" character varying(50)  /* 班次编号 */,
    "shifts_name" character varying(50)  /* 班次名称 */,
    "symptom_no" character varying(50)  /* 症状编号 */,
    "symptom" character varying(200)  /* 症状 */,
    "diagnosis_no" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diagnosis" character varying(500)  /* 诊断 */,
    "target_no" character varying(50)  /* 目标编号 */,
    "target" character varying(500)  /* 目标 */,
    "expect_solve_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 预期解决日期 */,
    "expect_solve_time_scope" character varying(20)  /* 预期解决时间段 */,
    "real_solve_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 实际解决日期 */,
    "nurse_plan_state" smallint  /* 照护计划状态 */,
    "nurse_submit_state" smallint  /* 护士提交状态 */,
    "submit_nurse_id" integer  /* 提交护士编号 */,
    "submit_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 提交护士工号 */,
    "submit_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 提交护士姓名 */,
    "create_nurse_id" integer  /* 创建护士编号 */,
    "create_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建护士工号 */,
    "create_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 创建护士姓名 */,
    "nurse_confirm_state" smallint  /* 护士审核状态 */,
    "confirm_nurse_id" integer  /* 审核护士编号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核护士工号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核护士姓名 */,
    "nurse_confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 护士审核日期 */,
    "duty_nurse_confirm_state" smallint  /* 总责提交状态 */,
    "duty_nurse_confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 总责提交日期 */,
    "submit_duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 总责提交编号 */,
    "submit_duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 总责提交工号 */,
    "submit_duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 总责提交姓名 */,
    "doctor_confirm_state" smallint  /* 医生审核状态 */,
    "confirm_doctor_id" integer  /* 审核医生编号 */,
    "confirm_doctor_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核医生工号 */,
    "confirm_doctor_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核医生姓名 */,
    "doctor_confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 医生审核日期 */,
    "update_nurse_id" integer  /* 更新护士编号 */,
    "update_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 更新护士工号 */,
    "update_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 更新护士姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 生成日期 */,
    "original_plan_no" character varying(20)  /* 原始计划编号 */,
    "notes" character varying(500)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean  /* 有效状态 */,
    "plan_source" character varying(50)  /* 计划来源 */,
    "evaluate_result" character varying(50)  /* 评价结果 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束日期 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_plan" IS '护理照护计划';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_record
-- 注释: 护理病历
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_record" (
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "record_type_id" integer  /* 文书类型编码 */,
    "record_type_code" character varying(30)  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" xml  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "nurserec_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "nurserec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "nurserec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_record" IS '护理病历';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_record_sheet
-- 注释: 护理记录单
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_record_sheet" (
    "record_sheet_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 护理记录单编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院编号 */,
    "sourec_record_sheet_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统护理记录单编号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(50)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "breathe" numeric(12,4)  /* 呼吸 */,
    "pulse" numeric(12,4)  /* 脉搏 */,
    "heart_rate" numeric(12,4)  /* 心率 */,
    "temperaturet_type" character varying(50)  /* 体温类型 */,
    "temperature" numeric(12,4)  /* 体温值 */,
    "pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 血压（高） */,
    "pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 血压（低） */,
    "complexion" character varying(50)  /* 面色 */,
    "consciousness" character varying(50)  /* 神志 */,
    "spo2" character varying(50)  /* 血氧饱和度 */,
    "breathe_support" integer  /* 呼吸支持及氧疗 */,
    "respirator_mode" character varying(50)  /* 呼吸机模式 */,
    "respirator_frequenc" character varying(50)  /* 呼吸机频率 */,
    "fio2" character varying(50)  /* 吸氧浓度 */,
    "vein_catheter_type_id" integer  /* 静脉置管类型编号 */,
    "vein_catheter_type_code" character varying(50)  /* 静脉置管类型代码 */,
    "vein_catheter_type_name" character varying(50)  /* 静脉置管类型名称 */,
    "vein_catheter_id" integer  /* 静脉置管编号 */,
    "vein_catheter_code" character varying(50)  /* 静脉置管代码 */,
    "vein_catheter_name" character varying(50)  /* 静脉置管名称 */,
    "income_volume_id" integer  /* 入量类型编号 */,
    "income_volume_code" character varying(50)  /* 入量类型代码 */,
    "income_volume_name" character varying(50)  /* 入量类型名称 */,
    "income_volume" character varying(50)  /* 入量 */,
    "income_volume_type" integer  /* 入量的结果类型 */,
    "income_volume_unit" character varying(50)  /* 入量单位 */,
    "defecate_frequency" integer  /* 大便次数 */,
    "urine_frequency" integer  /* 小便次数 */,
    "urine_volume" integer  /* 小便量 */,
    "output_volume_item_id" integer  /* 其他出量项目编号 */,
    "output_volume_item_code" character varying(50)  /* 其他出量项目代码 */,
    "output_volume_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 其他出量项目名称 */,
    "output_volume" integer  /* 其他出量量 */,
    "condition_measure" text  /* 病情及措施 */,
    "measure_nurse_id" integer  /* 执行护士编号 */,
    "measure_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行护士代码 */,
    "measure_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 执行护士姓名 */,
    "measure_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 执行时间 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作人编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作人代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "verify_nurse_id" integer  /* 审核护士编号 */,
    "verify_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核护士代码 */,
    "verify_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核护士姓名 */,
    "verify_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_sheet_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_record_sheet" IS '护理记录单';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: nurse_vital_sign
-- 注释: 体征记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nurse_vital_sign" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "plan_time" text  /* 计划时间 */,
    "measure_time" text  /* 测量时间 */,
    "breathe" text  /* 呼吸 */,
    "pulse" text  /* 脉搏 */,
    "heart_rate" text  /* 心率 */,
    "temperaturet_type" text  /* 体温类型代码 */,
    "temperature" text  /* 温度 */,
    "pressure_high" text  /* 血压（高） */,
    "pressure_low" text  /* 血压（低） */,
    "height" text  /* 身高 */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重 */,
    "defecate_frequency" text  /* 大便次数 */,
    "urine_volume" text  /* 尿量 */,
    "sputum_volume" text  /* 痰量 */,
    "drainage_volume" text  /* 引流量 */,
    "emesis_volume" text  /* 呕吐量 */,
    "output_total_volume" text  /* 出量总量 */,
    "income_volume" text  /* 入量 */,
    "postoperative_days" text  /* 手术后天数 */,
    "delivery_after_days" text  /* 分娩后天数 */,
    "stay_days" text  /* 住院天数 */,
    "time_flag" text  /* 时间点标记 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "nurse_vital_sign" IS '体征记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: obstetric_delivery_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "obstetric_delivery_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "other_complications_of_vaginal_delivery" text NOT NULL  /* 阴道分娩并发症其他情况 */,
    "other_intraoperative_injuries" text NOT NULL  /* 术中损伤其他情况 */,
    "cesarean_section_and_complications_of_forceps_delivery_other_ma" text NOT NULL  /* 剖宫产及剖宫产产钳助产并发症其他事项 */,
    "is_patient_agree_with_medical_measures" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 患者是否同意医疗措施标记 0:否 ; 1:是 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_tel" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属联系电话 */,
    "patient_family_id_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 家属身份证号 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: on_cus_result
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "on_cus_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "isdelete" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "createdt" date  /*  */,
    "parent_id" integer  /*  */,
    "control_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "control_value" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "on_id" integer  /*  */,
    "form_code" integer  /*  */,
    "form_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_number" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_mrn" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "control_type" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operativesite" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "form_custom_code" character varying(50)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operating_room
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operating_room" (
    "room_num" character varying  /*  */,
    "DAY" character varying  /*  */,
    "point_id" character varying  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(255)  /*  */

);
