|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_anesthesia_record
-- 注释: 麻醉记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_anesthesia_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "urine_volume" text  /* 尿量 */,
    "blood_lossed" text  /* 出血量 */,
    "asa_grade" text  /* asa分级 */,
    "surgical_position_sys_code" integer  /* 手术体位字典 */,
    "surgical_position_code" text  /* 手术体位代码 */,
    "surgical_position" text  /* 手术体位 */,
    "is_fasting" text  /* 是否术前禁食 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断字典 */,
    "fore_diag_code" text  /* 术前诊断代码 */,
    "fore_diag_name" text  /* 术前诊断名称 */,
    "operation_sys_code" integer  /* 手术字典 */,
    "intend_operation_code" text  /* 拟施手术代码 */,
    "intend_operation_name" text  /* 拟施手术名称 */,
    "during_operation_code" text  /* 术中手术代码 */,
    "during_operation_name" text  /* 术中手术名称 */,
    "breath_type" text  /* 呼吸类型名称 */,
    "drug_before_anes" text  /* 麻醉前用药 */,
    "anes_begin_time" text  /* 麻醉开始时间 */,
    "anes_end_time" text  /* 麻醉结束时间 */,
    "anesthesia_type_sys_code" integer  /* 麻醉方式字典 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" text  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" text  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "anes_real_duation" text  /* 麻醉实际用时(小时) */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" text  /* 麻醉医师代码 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" text  /* 麻醉医师姓名 */,
    "go_after_operation" text  /* 术后去向 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_anesthesia_record" IS '麻醉记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_apply
-- 注释: 手术申请单表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_apply" (
    "operation_apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术申请单编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_operation_apply_id" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 源系统申请单编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 患者所属病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所属病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 患者所属科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所属科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "height" character varying(10)  /* 患者身高(CM) */,
    "weight" character varying(10)  /* 患者体重(KG) */,
    "appointment_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 手术预约日期 */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 术前诊断 */,
    "main_doctor_id" integer  /* 主刀医师编号  */,
    "main_doctor_code" character varying(50)  /* 主刀医师代码 */,
    "main_doctor_name" character varying(50)  /* 主刀医师姓名 */,
    "first_assistant_id" integer  /* 一助医生编号 */,
    "first_assistant_code" character varying(50)  /* 一助医生代码 */,
    "first_assistant_name" character varying(50)  /* 一助医生姓名 */,
    "second_assistant_id" integer  /* 二助医生编号 */,
    "second_assistant_code" character varying(50)  /* 二助医生代码 */,
    "second_assistant_name" character varying(50)  /* 二助医生姓名 */,
    "third_assistant_id" integer  /* 三助医生编号 */,
    "third_assistant_code" character varying(50)  /* 三助医生代码 */,
    "third_assistant_name" character varying(50)  /* 三助医生姓名 */,
    "special_requirement" character varying(200)  /* 特殊要求 */,
    "operation_type_code" character varying(2) NOT NULL  /* 手术类型代码 */,
    "operation_type_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 手术类型名称 */,
    "operation_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 手术名称编号 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operation_level_code" character varying(3)  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" character varying(10)  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "body_site" character varying(200)  /* 手术部位 */,
    "operation_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术类别代码 */,
    "operation_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术类别名称 */,
    "anesthesia_type_id" integer  /* 麻醉方式编号 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" character varying(10)  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" character varying(30)  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "operation_dept_id" integer  /* 手术科室编号 */,
    "operation_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 手术科室代码 */,
    "operation_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 手术科室名称 */,
    "is_major_operation" boolean  /* 是否重大手术 */,
    "is_unplanned_operation" boolean  /* 是否非计划手术 */,
    "operation_apply_state" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 手术申请单状态 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_apply_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_apply" IS '手术申请单表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_detail
-- 注释: 手术明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_detail" (
    "operation_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(48) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 序号 */,
    "operation_id" integer  /* 手术项目编号 */,
    "operation_code" character varying(20)  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 手术名称 */,
    "incision_type" character varying(3)  /* 切口类型 */,
    "incision_type_name" character varying(10)  /* 切口类型名称 */,
    "operation_level_code" character varying(3)  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" character varying(10)  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "main_flag" boolean  /* 主手术标记 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "operation_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 手术项目森亿标准编码 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_detail" IS '手术明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_diagnose
-- 注释: 手术诊断明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_diagnose" (
    "operation_diagnose_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(48) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 序号 */,
    "diag_class_id" integer  /* 诊断类型编号 */,
    "diag_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断类型代码 */,
    "diag_class_name" character varying(32)  /* 诊断类型名称 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(200)  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "main_flag" boolean  /* 主诊断 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "diag_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 诊断标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_diagnose_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_diagnose" IS '手术诊断明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_document
-- 注释: 手麻文书
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_document" (
    "operation_document_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手麻文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "document_type_id" integer  /* 文书类型编号 */,
    "document_type_code" character varying(30)  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "document_type_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "document_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_type" character varying(10)  /* 原始其他格式类型 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_xml" xml  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(100)  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 按钮展示类型 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 文书展示类型 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_document_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_document" IS '手麻文书';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_document_detail
-- 注释: 手术文书数据明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_document_detail" (
    "operation_doc_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "operation_document_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手麻文书编号 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 序号 */,
    "document_element_id" integer  /* 文书元素编号 */,
    "document_element_code" character varying(20)  /* 文书元素代码 */,
    "document_element_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书元素标题 */,
    "document_type_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "element_data_type" character varying(10)  /* 元素数据类型 */,
    "element_data" text  /* 元素数据 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_doc_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_document_detail" IS '手术文书数据明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_employee
-- 注释: 手术人员
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_employee" (
    "operation_employee_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(48) NOT NULL  /* 源系统编号 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "role_id" integer  /* 手术角色编号 */,
    "role_code" character varying(32)  /* 手术角色代码 */,
    "role_name" character varying(32) NOT NULL  /* 手术角色名称 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "supersede_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 接替时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_employee_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_employee" IS '手术人员';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_event
-- 注释: 手术事件
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_event" (
    "operation_event_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "source_event_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 原始手术事件编号 */,
    "event_type_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 事件类别编号 */,
    "event_type_code" character varying(50)  /* 事件类别代码 */,
    "event_type_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 事件类别名称 */,
    "event_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 事件发生时间 */,
    "result" character varying(50)  /* 事件操作结果 */,
    "result_unit" character varying(50)  /* 结果单位 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "drug_id" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_name" character varying(50)  /* 药品名称 */,
    "drug_code" character varying(20)  /* 药品代码 */,
    "once_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_id" integer  /* 用量单位 */,
    "dose_unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 用量代码 */,
    "dose_unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "dose_model_id" integer  /* 剂型编号 */,
    "dose_model_code" character varying(50)  /* 剂型代码 */,
    "dose_model_name" character varying(20)  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "usage_id" integer  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_code" character varying(50)  /* 用法代码 */,
    "usage_name" character varying(30)  /* 用法名称 */,
    "drug_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 森亿药品标准编码集 */,
    "chemical" jsonb  /* 化学成分（森亿标准编码） */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_event_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_event" IS '手术事件';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_apply
-- 注释: 手术申请单表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_apply" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术申请单编号 */,
    "patient_id" text NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所属病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所属科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "height" text  /* 患者身高(CM) */,
    "weight" text  /* 患者体重(KG) */,
    "appointment_time" text  /* 手术预约日期 */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis" text  /* 术前诊断 */,
    "main_doctor_code" text  /* 主刀医师代码 */,
    "main_doctor_name" text  /* 主刀医师姓名 */,
    "first_assistant_code" text  /* 一助医生代码 */,
    "first_assistant_name" text  /* 一助医生姓名 */,
    "second_assistant_code" text  /* 二助医生代码 */,
    "second_assistant_name" text  /* 二助医生姓名 */,
    "third_assistant_code" text  /* 三助医生代码 */,
    "third_assistant_name" text  /* 三助医生姓名 */,
    "special_requirement" text  /* 特殊要求 */,
    "operation_type_sys_code" integer  /* 手术类型值域 */,
    "operation_type_code" text  /* 手术类型代码 */,
    "operation_type_name" text  /* 手术类型名称 */,
    "operation_sys_code" integer  /* 手术值域 */,
    "operation_code" text  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" text  /* 手术名称 */,
    "operation_level_sys_code" integer  /* 手术级别值域 */,
    "operation_level_code" text  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" text  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "body_site" text  /* 手术部位 */,
    "operation_class_sys_code" integer  /* 手术类别值域 */,
    "operation_class_code" text  /* 手术类别代码 */,
    "operation_class_name" text  /* 手术类别名称 */,
    "anesthesia_type_sys_code" integer  /* 麻醉方式值域 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" text  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" text  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "operation_dept_code" text  /* 手术科室代码 */,
    "operation_dept_name" text  /* 手术科室名称 */,
    "is_major_operation" boolean  /* 是否重大手术 */,
    "is_unplanned_operation" boolean  /* 是否非计划手术 */,
    "operation_apply_state" text  /* 手术申请单状态 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 记录人编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 记录人人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_apply" IS '手术申请单表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_detail
-- 注释: 手术明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "operation_sys_code" integer  /* 手术值域 */,
    "operation_code" text  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" text  /* 手术名称 */,
    "incision_type_sys_code" integer  /* 切口类型值域 */,
    "incision_type_code" text  /* 切口类型代码 */,
    "incision_type_name" text  /* 切口类型名称 */,
    "operation_level_sys_code" integer  /* 手术级别值域 */,
    "operation_level_code" text  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" text  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "main_flag" text  /* 主手术 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_detail" IS '手术明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_diagnose
-- 注释: 手术诊断明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_diagnose" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "diag_class_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断类别值域 */,
    "diag_class_code" text  /* 诊断类别编号 */,
    "diag_class_name" text  /* 诊断类别名称 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 主要诊断值域 */,
    "diag_code" text  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "main_flag" text  /* 主诊断 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_diagnose" IS '手术诊断明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_document
-- 注释: 手麻文书
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_document" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 系统文书编号 */,
    "document_type_sys_code" integer  /* 文书类型值域 */,
    "document_type_code" text  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "document_type_name" text  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "document_title" text  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_type" text  /* 原始其他格式类型 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" text  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_xml" text  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" text  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "create_code" text  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_name" text  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,0 不显示 1web 2exe */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_document" IS '手麻文书';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_document_detail
-- 注释: 手术文书数据明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_document_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,

    "document_element_code" text  /* 文书元素代码 */,
    "document_element_title" text  /* 文书元素标题 */,
    "document_type_name" text  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "element_data_type" integer  /* 元素数据类型 */,
    "element_data" text  /* 元素数据 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,

    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_document_detail" IS '手术文书数据明细';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_employee
-- 注释: 手术人员
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_employee" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "role_sys_code" integer  /* 手术角色值域 */,
    "role_code" text  /* 手术角色代码 */,
    "role_name" text  /* 手术角色名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 人员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 人员姓名 */,
    "supersede_date" text  /* 接替时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_employee" IS '手术人员';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_event
-- 注释: 手术事件
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_event" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "event_number" text  /* 原始手术事件编号 */,
    "event_type_sys_code" integer  /* 事件类别值域 */,
    "event_type_code" text  /* 事件类别代码 */,
    "event_type_name" text  /* 事件类别名称 */,
    "event_time" text  /* 事件发生时间 */,
    "result" text  /* 事件操作结果 */,
    "result_unit" text  /* 结果单位 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "drug_name" text  /* 药品名称 */,
    "drug_code" text  /* 药品代码 */,
    "once_dose" text  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_code" text  /* 用量代码 */,
    "dose_unit_name" text  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "dose_model_code" text  /* 剂型代码 */,
    "dose_model_name" text  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "usage_code" text  /* 用法代码 */,
    "usage_name" text  /* 用法名称 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_event" IS '手术事件';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_record
-- 注释: 手术记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "operation_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术记录编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "operation_type_sys_code" integer  /* 手术类型值域 */,
    "operation_type_code" text  /* 手术类型编码 */,
    "operation_type_name" text  /* 手术类型名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 患者所属病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 患者所属科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_doc_code" text  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_doc_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" text  /* 申请时间 */,
    "approve_doc_code" text  /* 审批人编号 */,
    "approve_doc_name" text  /* 审批人姓名 */,
    "operation_dept_code" text  /* 手术科室编号 */,
    "operation_dept_name" text  /* 手术科室名称 */,
    "room_sys_code" integer  /* 手术房间值域 */,
    "room_code" text  /* 手术房间代码 */,
    "room_name" text  /* 手术房间名称 */,
    "operation_level_sys_code" integer  /* 手术级别值域 */,
    "operation_level_code" text  /* 手术级别代码 */,
    "operation_level_name" text  /* 手术级别名称 */,
    "abo_sys_code" integer  /* ABO血型值域 */,
    "abo_code" text  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" text  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "operation_doc_code" text  /* 手术医生编号 */,
    "operation_doc_name" text  /* 手术医生姓名 */,
    "operation_time" text  /* 手术时间 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 手术开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 手术结束时间 */,
    "real_duation" text  /* 手术实际用时(小时) */,
    "anesthesia_type_sys_code" integer  /* 麻醉方式值域 */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" text  /* 麻醉方式代码 */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" text  /* 麻醉方式名称 */,
    "helper_num" text  /* 助手数 */,
    "wash_nurse" text  /* 洗手护士数 */,
    "acco_nurse" text  /* 随台护士数 */,
    "prep_nurse" text  /* 巡回护士数 */,
    "console_code" text  /* 手术台代码 */,
    "is_bacteria" text  /* 有无细菌 */,
    "body_site" text  /* 手术部位 */,
    "incision_type_sys_code" integer  /* 切口类型值域 */,
    "incision_type_code" text  /* 切口类型代码 */,
    "incision_type_name" text  /* 切口类型名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "blood_type" text  /* 血液成分 */,
    "blood_num" text  /* 用血量 */,
    "blood_unit" text  /* 单位 */,
    "screen_up" text  /* 幕上幕下 */,
    "is_rescue" text  /* 是否抢救 */,
    "is_die" text  /* 是否死亡 */,
    "is_infection" text  /* 是否感染 */,
    "is_fore_sober" text  /* 术前意识 */,
    "is_step_sober" text  /* 术后意识 */,
    "fore_press" text  /* 术前血压 */,
    "step_press" text  /* 术后血压 */,
    "fore_pulse" text  /* 术前脉搏 */,
    "step_pulse" text  /* 术后脉搏 */,
    "scar_num" text  /* 褥疮数量 */,
    "transfusion_qty" text  /* 输液量 */,
    "sample_qty" text  /* 标本数量 */,
    "guidtube_num" text  /* 引流管个数 */,
    "before_ready" text  /* 术前准备 */,
    "tool_exam" text  /* 工具核对 */,
    "is_seperate" text  /* 是否隔离 */,
    "is_danger" text  /* 是否危重 */,
    "let_blood" text  /* 抽血次数 */,
    "main_line" text  /* 静注次数 */,
    "muscle_line" text  /* 肌注次数 */,
    "transfusion_num" text  /* 输液次数 */,
    "transoxyen_num" text  /* 输氧次数 */,
    "stale_num" text  /* 导尿次数 */,
    "i_infection" text  /* 一类切口感染 */,
    "special_comment" text  /* 特殊说明 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 记录人编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 记录人人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "oper_sys_code" integer  /* 手术状态值域 */,
    "oper_state_code" text  /* 手术状态代码 */,
    "oper_state_name" text  /* 手术状态名称 */,
    "operation_apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术申请单编号 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "operation_class_sys_code" integer  /* 手术类别值域 */,
    "operation_class_code" text  /* 手术类别代码 */,
    "operation_class_name" text  /* 手术类别名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_record" IS '手术记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_operation_vital_sign
-- 注释: 手术体征记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_operation_vital_sign" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "operation_record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "vital_number" text  /* 手术体征记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "fill_type" text  /* 体征记录填写类别 */,
    "set_no" text  /* 体征组号 */,
    "time_point" text  /* 体征采集时间点 */,
    "vital_sys_code" integer  /* 体征字典 */,
    "vital_code" text  /* 体征代码 */,
    "vital_name" text  /* 体征名称 */,
    "vital_type" text  /* 体征类型 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "vital_value" text  /* 体征值 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_operation_vital_sign" IS '手术体征记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_preoperative_visit_record
-- 注释: 术前访视记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_preoperative_visit_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "pre_visit_number" text  /* 访视记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "fore_diag_sys_code" integer  /* 术前诊断值域 */,
    "fore_diag_code" text  /* 术前诊断代码 */,
    "fore_diag_name" text  /* 术前诊断名称 */,
    "intend_operation_sys_code" integer  /* 拟施手术值域 */,
    "intend_operation_code" text  /* 拟施手术代码 */,
    "intend_operation_name" text  /* 拟施手术名称 */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重 */,
    "height" text  /* 身高 */,
    "breathe" text  /* 呼吸 */,
    "pulse" text  /* 脉搏 */,
    "temperature" text  /* 体温 */,
    "pressure_high" text  /* 血压（高） */,
    "pressure_low" text  /* 血压（低） */,
    "awareness_sys_code" integer  /* 意识编号 */,
    "awareness_code" text  /* 意识代码 */,
    "awareness_name" text  /* 意识名称 */,
    "past_history" text  /* 既往史 */,
    "present_history" text  /* 现病史 */,
    "drug_situation" text  /* 药物使用情况 */,
    "complication_situation" text  /* 并发症情况 */,
    "allergy_history" text  /* 过敏史 */,
    "allergy_sys_code" integer  /* 过敏源编号 */,
    "allergy_code" text  /* 过敏源代码 */,
    "allergy_name" text NOT NULL  /* 过敏源名称 */,
    "physical_condition" text NOT NULL  /* 身体状况 */,
    "pre_visit_conclusion" text  /* 访视结论 */,
    "pre_visit_time" text  /* 访视时间 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_preoperative_visit_record" IS '术前访视记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_record
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_record" (
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /*  */,
    "age_day" integer  /*  */,
    "bed_id" integer  /*  */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "visit_type" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "source_operation_id" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "operation_type_code" character varying(2) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "operation_type_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "ward_id" integer  /*  */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "dept_id" integer  /*  */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /*  */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "apply_doc_id" integer  /*  */,
    "apply_doc_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "apply_doc_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "approve_doc_id" integer  /*  */,
    "approve_doc_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "approve_doc_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_dept_id" integer  /*  */,
    "operation_dept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_dept_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "room_id" integer  /*  */,
    "room_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "room_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_level_code" character varying(3)  /*  */,
    "operation_level_name" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /*  */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "operation_doc_id" integer  /*  */,
    "operation_doc_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_doc_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "real_duation" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_type_id" integer  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_type_code" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_type_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "helper_num" smallint  /*  */,
    "wash_nurse" smallint  /*  */,
    "acco_nurse" smallint  /*  */,
    "prep_nurse" smallint  /*  */,
    "console_code" character varying(4)  /*  */,
    "is_bacteria" smallint  /*  */,
    "body_site" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "incision_type_code" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "incision_type_name" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "note" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "blood_type" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "blood_num" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "blood_unit" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "screen_up" smallint  /*  */,
    "is_rescue" boolean  /*  */,
    "is_die" boolean  /*  */,
    "is_infection" boolean  /*  */,
    "is_fore_sober" smallint  /*  */,
    "is_step_sober" smallint  /*  */,
    "fore_press" character varying(5)  /*  */,
    "step_press" character varying(5)  /*  */,
    "fore_pulse" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "step_pulse" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "scar_num" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "transfusion_qty" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "sample_qty" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "guidtube_num" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "before_ready" boolean  /*  */,
    "tool_exam" boolean  /*  */,
    "is_seperate" boolean  /*  */,
    "is_danger" boolean  /*  */,
    "let_blood" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "main_line" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "muscle_line" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "transfusion_num" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "transoxyen_num" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "stale_num" numeric(12,4)  /*  */,
    "i_infection" boolean  /*  */,
    "special_comment" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "oper_id" integer  /*  */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_class_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operation_class_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /*  */,
    "oper_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "oper_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "oper_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "operation_apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: operation_vital_sign
-- 注释: 手术体征记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "operation_vital_sign" (
    "operation_vital_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "operation_record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 手术编号 */,
    "source_vital_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 原始手术体征记录id */,
    "fill_type" smallint NOT NULL  /* 体征记录填写类别 */,
    "set_no" character varying(50)  /* 体征组号 */,
    "time_point" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 体征采集时间点 */,
    "vital_id" integer  /* 体征代码 */,
    "vital_code" character varying(20)  /* 体征编号 */,
    "vital_name" character varying(50)  /* 体征名称 */,
    "vital_type" character varying(1)  /* 体征类型 */,
    "vital_value" character varying(100)  /* 体征值 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("operation_vital_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "operation_vital_sign" IS '手术体征记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: opernotice
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "opernotice" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "createdt" date  /*  */,
    "isdelete" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "ac_id" integer  /*  */,
    "operationid" character varying(100) DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_method_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthesia_method_name" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "operationstate" integer DEFAULT '-1'::integer  /*  */,
    "operationflag" integer DEFAULT '-1'::integer  /*  */,
    "operationdate" date  /*  */,
    "operationlevel_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operationlevel_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "operatingroom_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operatingroom_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operationposition_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operationposition_name" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "plan_operation_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "plan_operation_name" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "planning_begintime" date  /*  */,
    "planning_endtime" date  /*  */,
    "pca" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "asa" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "complication_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "postoperativeto" integer  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_number" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_mrn" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_sex" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_birthday" date  /*  */,
    "patient_department_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_department_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_ward_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_ward_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_bed_code" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "patient_bed_name" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "patient_ageunit" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "patient_bloodtype" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "patient_height" integer  /*  */,
    "patient_weightvalue" integer  /*  */,
    "patient_age" integer  /*  */,
    "patient_weightstring" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "diagnosis" character varying(4000)  /*  */,
    "doctor_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "doctor_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operator_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operator_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "preceptor_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "preceptor_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "assistant1_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "assistant1_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "assistant2_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "assistant2_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "assistant3_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "assistant3_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "assistant4_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "assistant4_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_assistant_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_assistant_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "createuser_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "createuser_name" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operator_user_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operator_user_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "isautocreate" integer DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "isemergency" integer  /*  */,
    "isfast" integer DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "isvoluntary" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "ishidden" integer  /*  */,
    "achart_ischecked" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "achart_isstartmonitor" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "achart_isprinted" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "scheduling_finish_operate" integer DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "scheduling_finish_anesthetic" integer DEFAULT 1  /*  */,
    "sortno" integer  /*  */,
    "identificationnumber" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "patient_identity" character varying(50) DEFAULT '医保'::character varying  /*  */,
    "patientsource" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operator_total_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operator_total_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "vs_temperaturevalue" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "vs_pulsevalue" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "vs_bloodpressurevalue" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "vs_respvalue" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "on_comments" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "score" character varying(10) DEFAULT '9'::character varying  /*  */,
    "his_createdt" date  /*  */,
    "special_infect" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "special_position" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "special_equipment" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "visitors" character varying(1000)  /*  */,
    "operatingdept_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "operatingdept_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "istwo_plan_operation" integer  /*  */,
    "bmkyyxdm" integer  /*  */,
    "ssfx" integer  /*  */,
    "inhospitaldate" date  /*  */,
    "operation_fee" integer  /*  */,
    "canceled_reason" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "circulating_anesthetist_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulating_anesthetist_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "familyadress" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code5" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name5" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_code1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_name1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_name4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_code1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_name1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code1" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code2" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code3" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code4" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operator_other" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_other" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_other" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "instrumentnurse_other" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_other" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "on_comments1" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "on_comments2" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "patient_num_count" integer  /*  */,
    "serial_no" integer  /*  */,
    "classification" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "expect_start_time" date  /*  */,
    "patient_visit_no" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "canceled_reason_type" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_rh" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "scheduling_id" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "preoperative_diagnosis_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operationpart_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,

    "operator3_name" character varying(100)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
