|-- ========================================
-- 表名: oral_drug_closed_cycle
-- 注释: 患者口服药闭环节点信息表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "oral_drug_closed_cycle" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增列，主键 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊id */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者id */,
    "drug_name" text NOT NULL  /* 药物名称 */,
    "order_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 药物医嘱id */,
    "drug_execute_id" text  /* 执行记录id */,
    "drug_expect_execute_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 预计执行时间 */,
    "order_type_code" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 医嘱类型 */,
    "executor_employee_id" integer  /* 执行人id */,
    "executor_employee_name" text  /* 执行人名称 */,
    "node_type" integer NOT NULL  /* 节点类型 */,
    "node_name" text NOT NULL  /* 节点名称 */,
    "executor_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 节点数据产生时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* etl 抽取时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "oral_drug_closed_cycle" IS '患者口服药闭环节点信息表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: orders_inpat_drug_order
-- 注释: 住院用药医嘱
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "orders_inpat_drug_order" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "order_number" text NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpatient_no" text  /* 住院号 */,
    "group_no" text  /* 成组序号 */,
    "order_class_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱类别值域 */,
    "order_class_code" text  /* 医嘱类别编号 */,
    "order_class_name" text  /* 医嘱类别名称 */,
    "order_type_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱类型值域 */,
    "order_type_code" text  /* 医嘱类型代码 */,
    "order_type_name" text  /* 医嘱类型名称 */,
    "drug_sys_code" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_code" text  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" text  /* 药品名称 */,
    "specs" text  /* 规格 */,
    "dose_model_sys_code" integer  /* 剂型值域 */,
    "dose_model_code" text  /* 剂型编号 */,
    "dose_model_name" text  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "unit_price" text  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" text  /* 数量 */,
    "once_dose" text  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_sys_code" integer  /* 用量单位值域 */,
    "dose_unit_code" text  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_unit_name" text  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "frequency_sys_code" integer  /* 频次值域 */,
    "frequency_code" text  /* 频次编号 */,
    "frequency_name" text  /* 频次名称 */,
    "special_exec_time" text  /* 特殊执行时间（特殊频次） */,
    "special_exec_dose" text  /* 特殊执行用量（特殊频次） */,
    "usage_sys_code" integer  /* 用法值域 */,
    "usage_code" text  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_name" text  /* 用法名称 */,
    "days" text  /* 草药付数 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "exec_dept_code" text  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "exec_dept_name" text  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "skin_test" text  /* 皮试标志 */,
    "urgent_flag" text  /* 加急标志 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 医嘱开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 医嘱结束时间 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "input_dept_code" text  /* 开立医嘱科室编号 */,
    "input_dept_name" text  /* 开立医嘱科室名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "input_doc_code" text  /* 开立医嘱医生编号 */,
    "input_doc_name" text  /* 开立医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "input_time" text  /* 开立医嘱时间 */,
    "confirm_nurse_code" text  /* 确认护士编号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_name" text  /* 确认护士姓名 */,
    "confirm_time" text  /* 确认时间 */,
    "stop_doc_code" text  /* 停止医嘱医生编号 */,
    "stop_doc_name" text  /* 停止医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "stop_time" text  /* 停止时间 */,
    "exec_nurse_code" text  /* 执行护士编号 */,
    "exec_nurse_name" text  /* 执行护士姓名 */,
    "exec_time" text  /* 执行时间 */,
    "order_state_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱状态值域 */,
    "order_state_code" text  /* 医嘱状态编号 */,
    "order_state_name" text  /* 医嘱状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 成组顺序号 */,
    "qty_unit" text  /* 数量单位 */,
    "order_verify_state_name" text  /* 医嘱审核状态 */,
    "order_verify_num" integer  /* 审核条目数 */,
    "order_eval_num" integer  /* 医嘱点评次数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "orders_inpat_drug_order" IS '住院用药医嘱';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: orders_inpat_undrug_order
-- 注释: 住院非药品医嘱
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "orders_inpat_undrug_order" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "order_number" text NOT NULL  /* 医嘱编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "inpatient_no" text  /* 住院号 */,
    "group_no" text  /* 成组序号 */,
    "order_class_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱类别值域 */,
    "order_class_code" text  /* 医嘱类别编号 */,
    "order_class_name" text  /* 医嘱类别名称 */,
    "order_type_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱类型值域 */,
    "order_type_code" text  /* 医嘱类型代码 */,
    "order_type_name" text  /* 医嘱类型名称 */,
    "order_item_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱编号（项目编号）值域 */,
    "order_code" text  /* 医嘱代码 */,
    "order_name" text  /* 医嘱名称 */,
    "specs" text  /* 规格 */,
    "unit_price" text  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" text  /* 数量 */,
    "once_dose" text  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_sys_code" integer  /* 用量单位值域 */,
    "dose_unit_code" text  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_unit_name" text  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "frequency_sys_code" integer  /* 频次值域 */,
    "frequency_code" text  /* 频次编号 */,
    "frequency_name" text  /* 频次名称 */,
    "special_exec_time" text  /* 特殊执行时间（特殊频次） */,
    "special_exec_dose" text  /* 特殊执行用量（特殊频次） */,
    "usage_sys_code" integer  /* 用法值域 */,
    "usage_code" text  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_name" text  /* 用法名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "exec_dept_code" text  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "exec_dept_name" text  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "urgent_flag" text  /* 加急标志 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 检查部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "sample_sys_code" integer  /* 样本值域 */,
    "sample_code" text  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_name" text  /* 样本名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 医嘱开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 医嘱结束时间 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "input_dept_code" text  /* 开立医嘱科室编号 */,
    "input_dept_name" text  /* 开立医嘱科室名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "input_doc_code" text  /* 开立医嘱医生编号 */,
    "input_doc_name" text  /* 开立医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "input_time" text  /* 开立医嘱时间 */,
    "confirm_nurse_code" text  /* 确认护士编号 */,
    "confirm_nurse_name" text  /* 确认护士姓名 */,
    "confirm_time" text  /* 确认时间 */,
    "stop_doc_code" text  /* 停止医嘱医生编号 */,
    "stop_doc_name" text  /* 停止医嘱医生姓名 */,
    "stop_time" text  /* 停止时间 */,
    "exec_nurse_code" text  /* 执行护士编号 */,
    "exec_nurse_name" text  /* 执行护士姓名 */,
    "exec_time" text  /* 执行时间 */,
    "order_state_sys_code" integer  /* 医嘱状态值域 */,
    "order_state_code" text  /* 医嘱状态编号 */,
    "order_state_name" text  /* 医嘱状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 成组顺序号 */,
    "qty_unit" text  /* 数量单位 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "orders_inpat_undrug_order" IS '住院非药品医嘱';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: orders_outpat_recipe
-- 注释: 门诊处方
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "orders_outpat_recipe" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "recipe_number" text NOT NULL  /* 处方编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_number" text NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "invoice_no" text  /* 结算单号 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "recipe_dept_code" text  /* 开单科室编号 */,
    "recipe_dept_name" text  /* 开单科室名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "recipe_doc_code" text  /* 开单医生编号 */,
    "recipe_doc_name" text  /* 开单医生姓名 */,
    "recipe_state_sys_code" integer  /* 处方状态值域 */,
    "recipe_state_code" text  /* 处方状态编号 */,
    "recipe_state_name" text  /* 处方状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "recipe_time" text  /* 处方时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "recipe_verify_state_name" text  /* 处方审核状态 */,
    "recipe_verify_num" integer  /* 审核次数 */,
    "recipe_eval_num" integer  /* 处方点评次数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "orders_outpat_recipe" IS '门诊处方';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: orders_outpat_recipe_detail
-- 注释: 门诊处方明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "orders_outpat_recipe_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "recipe_number" text NOT NULL  /* 处方编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "recipe_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 处方明细编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_number" text NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "group_no" text  /* 成组序号 */,
    "recipe_class_sys_code" integer  /* 处方类别值域 */,
    "recipe_class_code" text  /* 处方类别编号 */,
    "recipe_class_name" text  /* 处方类别名称 */,
    "drug_sys_code" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_code" text  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" text  /* 药品名称 */,
    "drug_flag" text  /* 是否药品 */,
    "specs" text  /* 规格 */,
    "dose_model_sys_code" integer  /* 剂型编号值域 */,
    "dose_model_code" text  /* 剂型编号 */,
    "dose_model_name" text  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "unit_price" text  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" text  /* 数量 */,
    "total_unit" text  /* 总量单位 */,
    "frequency_sys_code" integer  /* 频次值域 */,
    "frequency_code" text  /* 频次编号 */,
    "frequency_name" text  /* 频次名称 */,
    "once_dose" text  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_sys_code" integer  /* 用量单位值域 */,
    "dose_unit_code" text  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_unit_name" text  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "usage_sys_code" integer  /* 用法值域 */,
    "usage_code" text  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_name" text  /* 用法名称 */,
    "days" text  /* 草药付数 */,
    "day_num" text  /* 天数 */,
    "exec_dept_code" text  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "exec_dept_name" text  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "skin_test" text  /* 皮试标志 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "recipe_state_sys_code" integer  /* 处方状态编号 */,
    "recipe_state_code" text  /* 处方状态编号 */,
    "recipe_state_name" text  /* 处方状态名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" text  /* 确认操作员编号 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" text  /* 确认操作员姓名 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "confirm_dept_code" text  /* 确认科室编号 */,
    "confirm_dept_name" text  /* 确认科室名称 */,
    "confirm_time" text  /* 确认时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 成组顺序号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "orders_outpat_recipe_detail" IS '门诊处方明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: organization
-- 注释: 机构信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "organization" (
    "org_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 机构编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "org_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 机构名称 */,
    "simple_name" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 机构简称 */,
    "org_type" character varying(2) NOT NULL  /* 机构类型 */,
    "address" json  /* 机构地址 */,
    "org_note" character varying(1000)  /* 机构描述 */,
    "sort_no" smallint  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "organization" IS '机构信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: orthopedic_surgery_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "orthopedic_surgery_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "latest_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 最新诊断 */,
    "planned_operation_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 拟行手术名称 */,
    "operation_purpose" text NOT NULL  /* 手术目的 */,
    "planned_operation_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 拟手术时间 */,
    "other_considerations" text NOT NULL  /* 其他注意事项 */,
    "new_technology_and_new_project_flag" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 新技术新项目标记 */,
    "special_risks_of_operation" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 手术特殊风险 */,
    "alternative_diagnosis_and_treatment" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 可替代的诊疗方式 */,
    "is_patient_agree_with_medical_measures" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 患者是否同意医疗措施标记 0:否 ; 1:是 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "relationship_between_family_mem" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属与病人关系 */,
    "patient_guardian_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者监护人签名 */,
    "patient_guardian_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者监护人签名时间 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_blood_apply
-- 注释: 输血申请单
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_blood_apply" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号,自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "blood_apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位字典值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "abo_sys_code" integer  /* ABO血型值域 */,
    "abo_code" text  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" text  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_sys_code" integer  /* RH血型值域 */,
    "rh_code" text  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" text  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断字典值域 */,
    "diag_code" text  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "transfusion_aim" text  /* 输血目的 */,
    "transfusion_plan_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 预定输血日期 */,
    "user_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典值域 */,
    "apply_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请日期 */,
    "apply_user_code" text  /* 申请人编码 */,
    "apply_user_name" text  /* 申请人名称 */,
    "creation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "creation_user_code" text  /* 创建人编码 */,
    "creation_user_name" text  /* 创建人名称 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_code" text  /* 最后修改人编码 */,
    "last_edit_user_name" text  /* 最后修改人名称 */,
    "audit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "audit_user_code" text  /* 审核人编码 */,
    "audit_user_name" text  /* 审核人名称 */,
    "audit_remark" text  /* 审核备注 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "height" text  /* 身高 */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重 */,
    "pressure_high" text  /* 收缩压 */,
    "pressure_low" text  /* 舒张压 */,
    "temperature" text  /* 体温 */,
    "pulse" text  /* 脉搏 */,
    "blood_mark" text  /* 采血标记 */,
    "blood_place" text  /* 输血地点 */,
    "blood_nature" text  /* 输血性质 */,
    "is_urgent" boolean  /* 加急标志 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史信息 */,
    "blood_history" text  /* 输血史 */,
    "blood_reaction_history" text  /* 输血反应史 */,
    "allergy_history" text  /* 药物过敏史 */,
    "gravidity" text  /* 孕次 */,
    "parity" text  /* 产次 */,
    "blood_volume" text  /* 输血量 */,
    "blood_volume_unit" text  /* 输血单位 */,
    "apply_item_name" text  /* 申请用血项目名称 */,
    "apply_number" integer NOT NULL  /* 申请数量 */,
    "use_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 用血时间 */,
    "sign_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 签收时间 */,
    "match_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 配血时间 */,
    "bloodlette_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 发血时间 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_dept_sys_code" integer  /* 申请科室值域 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_state" text  /* 申请状态 */,
    "sign_state" text  /* 签收状态 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_blood_apply" IS '输血申请单';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_blood_cases
-- 注释: 输血病案表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_blood_cases" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增列 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "blood_cases_number" text NOT NULL  /* 输血病案编号 */,
    "blood_apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */,
    "blood_bag_id" text NOT NULL  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "first_blood_transfusion_sttime" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 第一袋血输血开始时间 */,
    "user_sys_code" integer  /* 用户字典值域 */,
    "creation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "creation_user_code" text  /* 创建人编码 */,
    "creation_user_name" text  /* 创建人名称 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_code" text  /* 最后修改人编码 */,
    "last_edit_user_name" text  /* 最后修改人名称 */,
    "audit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "audit_user_code" text  /* 审核人标识编码 */,
    "audit_user_name" text  /* 审核人标识名称 */,
    "audit_remark" text  /* 审核备注 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_blood_cases" IS '输血病案表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_blood_match_record
-- 注释: 配血记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_blood_match_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号,自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "blood_match_number" text NOT NULL  /* 配血编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位字典值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "abo_sys_code" integer  /* ABO血型值域 */,
    "abo_code" text  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" text  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_sys_code" integer  /* RH血型值域 */,
    "rh_code" text  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" text  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "blood_bag_abo_code" text  /* 血袋ABO血型代码 */,
    "blood_bag_abo_name" text  /* 血袋ABO血型名称 */,
    "blood_bag_rh_code" text  /* 血袋RH血型代码 */,
    "blood_bag_rh_name" text  /* 血袋RH血型名称 */,
    "blood_pro_comp" text  /* 血制品成分 */,
    "blood_bag_number" text  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "blood_bag_effect_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 血袋有效日期 */,
    "match_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 配血时间 */,
    "blood_trans_type" text  /* 输血类型 */,
    "match_method" text  /* 配血方法 */,
    "user_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典值域 */,
    "apply_oper_code" text  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" text  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_dept_sys_code" integer  /* 申请科室值域 */,
    "apply_dept_code" text  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" text  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "match_doc_code" text  /* 配血医生代码 */,
    "match_doc_name" text  /* 配血医生名称 */,
    "confirm_doc_code" text  /* 审核医生代码 */,
    "confirm_doc_name" text  /* 审核医生名称 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "is_internal_qc" boolean  /* 是否室内质控 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_blood_match_record" IS '配血记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_blood_reaction
-- 注释: 输血不良反应报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_blood_reaction" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增列 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "blood_reaction_number" text NOT NULL  /* 不良反应编号 */,
    "blood_apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */,
    "blood_bag_id" text NOT NULL  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "adverse_reaction" text  /* 不良反应现象 */,
    "cause" text  /* 原因 */,
    "reaction_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 不良反应发生时间 */,
    "report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "user_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典值域 */,
    "report_user_code" text  /* 报告人编码 */,
    "report_user_name" text  /* 报告人名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典值域 */,
    "report_dept_code" text  /* 报告科室代码 */,
    "report_dept_name" text  /* 报告科室名称 */,
    "report_ward_code" text  /* 报告病区代码 */,
    "report_ward_name" text  /* 报告病区名称 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,默认0,0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "blood_pro_comp" text  /* 血制品成分 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_blood_reaction" IS '输血不良反应报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_blood_transfusion_record
-- 注释: 用血记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_blood_transfusion_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "abo_sys_code" integer  /* ABO血型标准字典 */,
    "abo_code" text  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" text  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_sys_code" integer  /* RH血型标准字典 */,
    "rh_code" text  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" text  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "diag_code" text  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "transfusion_history_flag" text  /* 输血史标志 */,
    "transfusion_nature_sys_code" integer  /* 输血性质值域 */,
    "transfusion_nature_code" text  /* 输血性质编号 */,
    "transfusion_nature_name" text  /* 输血性质名称 */,
    "transfusion_aim" text  /* 输血目的 */,
    "apply_abo_code" text  /* 申请ABO血型代码 */,
    "apply_abo_name" text  /* 申请ABO血型名称 */,
    "apply_rh_code" text  /* 申请RH血型代码 */,
    "apply_rh_name" text  /* 申请RH血型名称 */,
    "blood_type_sys_code" integer  /* 血液成分值域 */,
    "blood_type_code" text  /* 血液成分编号 */,
    "blood_type_name" text  /* 血液成分名称 */,
    "transfusion_num" text  /* 输血次数 */,
    "blood_bag_id" text  /* 血袋编号 */,
    "transfusion_amount" text  /* 输血量 */,
    "transfusion_amount_unit" text  /* 输血量单位 */,
    "transfusion_process_record" text  /* 输血过程记录 */,
    "transfusion_time" text  /* 输血日期 */,
    "transfusion_reaction_flag" text  /* 输血反应 */,
    "transfusion_reaction_type" text  /* 输血反应类型 */,
    "transfusion_reaction_note" text  /* 输血反应描述 */,
    "sign_doc_code" text  /* 签名医生编号 */,
    "sign_doc_name" text  /* 签名医生姓名 */,
    "sign_time" text  /* 签名时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "blood_apply_number" text NOT NULL  /* 输血申请单编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_blood_transfusion_record" IS '用血记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_followup_record
-- 注释: 随访记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_followup_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "followup_record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 随访记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "contact_phone" text  /* 联系电话 */,
    "is_linkman" boolean  /* 是否联系人 */,
    "contact_relation_sys_code" integer  /* 联系人关系值域 */,
    "contact_relation_code" text  /* 联系人关系代码 */,
    "contact_relation_name" text  /* 联系人关系名称 */,
    "followup_doc_sys_code" integer  /* 随访医生值域 */,
    "followup_doc_code" text  /* 随访医生编码 */,
    "followup_doc_name" text  /* 随访医生名称 */,
    "followup_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 随访日期 */,
    "followup_way" text  /* 随访方式 */,
    "followup_status" text  /* 随访状态 */,
    "outcome_sys_code" integer  /* 转归值域 */,
    "outcome_code" text  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" text  /* 转归名称 */,
    "followup_rule_sys_code" integer  /* 随访规则值域 */,
    "followup_rule_code" text  /* 随访规则编码 */,
    "followup_rule_name" text  /* 随访规则名称 */,
    "followup_content" text  /* 随访内容 */,
    "followup_html_content" text  /* html格式随访内容 */,
    "followup_xml_content" text  /* xml格式随访内容 */,
    "followup_text_content" text  /* text格式随访内容 */,
    "followup_other_content" text  /* other格式随访内容 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 随访记录原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 随访记录原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 随访记录原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 随访记录原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_followup_record" IS '随访记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_infection_record
-- 注释: 感染记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_infection_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "infection_dept_code" text  /* 感染科室编号 */,
    "infection_dept_name" text  /* 感染科室名称 */,
    "infecrion_date" text  /* 感染日期 */,
    "report_doc_code" text  /* 上报医生编号 */,
    "report_doc_name" text  /* 上报医生姓名 */,
    "report_date" text  /* 上报日期 */,
    "duty_doc_code" text  /* 责任医生编号 */,
    "duty_doc_name" text  /* 责任医生姓名 */,
    "confirm_doc_code" text  /* 确认医生编号 */,
    "confirm_doc_name" text  /* 确认医生姓名 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "infection_diagnose_code" text  /* 感染诊断编码 */,
    "infection_diagnose_name" text  /* 感染诊断名称 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 感染部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 感染部位编号 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 感染部位名称 */,
    "body_temperature" text  /* 体温 */,
    "body_temperature_days" text  /* 体温天数 */,
    "infection_symptom" text  /* 感染症状 */,
    "is_pathogeny_check" text  /* 病原体送检情况 */,
    "pathogeny_check_content" text  /* 送检内容 */,
    "pathogeny_check_date" text  /* 送检日期 */,
    "antibiotic_used_sys_code" integer  /* 抗生素使用值域 */,
    "antibiotic_used1_code" text  /* 抗生素使用编号1 */,
    "antibiotic_used1_name" text  /* 抗生素使用药名1 */,
    "antibiotic_used2_code" text  /* 抗生素使用编号2 */,
    "antibiotic_used2_name" text  /* 抗生素使用药名2 */,
    "antibiotic_used3_code" text  /* 抗生素使用编号3 */,
    "antibiotic_used3_name" text  /* 抗生素使用药名3 */,
    "antibiotic_used_days" text  /* 抗生素使用天数 */,
    "is_aud_preventive" text  /* 抗生素使用目的预防性 */,
    "is_aud_therapeutic" text  /* 抗生素使用目的治疗性 */,
    "is_operate" text  /* 是否手术 */,
    "operation_sys_code" integer  /* 手术值域 */,
    "operation_code" text  /* 手术代码 */,
    "operation_name" text  /* 手术名称 */,
    "is_emergency_operate" text  /* 是否急诊手术 */,
    "operate_date" text  /* 手术日期 */,
    "operate_hours" text  /* 手术时间小时数 */,
    "operation_doc_code" text  /* 手术医生编号 */,
    "operation_doc_name" text  /* 手术医生姓名 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_code" text  /* 麻醉医生编号 */,
    "anesthesia_doc_name" text  /* 麻醉医生姓名 */,
    "is_blood_transfusion" text  /* 是否输血 */,
    "is_chemotherapy" text  /* 是否化疗 */,
    "is_actinotherapy" text  /* 是否放疗 */,
    "is_icu" text  /* 是否ICU */,
    "is_urethral_catheter" text  /* 是否尿管 */,
    "is_arteriovenous_catheter" text  /* 是否动静脉通道 */,
    "is_use_breathing_machine" text  /* 是否使用呼吸机 */,
    "is_use_immunodepressant" text  /* 是否使用免疫制剂 */,
    "intervene_measures" text  /* 干预措施 */,
    "outcome_sys_code" integer  /* 愈后字典 */,
    "outcome_code" text  /* 愈后编码 */,
    "outcome_name" text  /* 愈后名称 */,
    "relation_sys_code" integer  /* 关系字典 */,
    "infection_death_relation_code" text  /* 感染与死亡关系编号 */,
    "infection_death_relation_name" text  /* 感染与死亡关系名称 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_infection_record" IS '感染记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_report
-- 注释: 其他检查报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20)  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(150) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告小分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告小分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告小分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text NOT NULL  /* 检查结论 */,
    "check_note" text  /* 检查表现 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" character varying(200)  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" character varying(100)  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_id" integer  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查人代码 */,
    "check_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "item_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检查项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" character varying(40)  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_report" IS '其他检查报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_report_item
-- 注释: 其他检查报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_report_item" (
    "other_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源其他检查报告检查项目编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("other_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_report_item" IS '其他检查报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: other_result_detail
-- 注释: 其他报告结果明细 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "other_result_detail" (
    "other_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "other_item_id" bigint  /* 其他结果项目编号 */,
    "other_item_code" character varying(20)  /* 其他结果项目代码 */,
    "other_item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 其他结果项目名称 */,
    "value" character varying(20)  /* 结果值 */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "reference_range" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源其他报告结果明细项目编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("other_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "other_result_detail" IS '其他报告结果明细 ';
|

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outp_injectable_drugs_count" (

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outp_schedule_record
-- 注释: 门诊排班记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outp_schedule_record" (
    "schedule_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 排班唯一标识，自增列 */,
    "schedule_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 排班日期 */,
    "schedule_name" text NOT NULL  /* 排班名称 */,
    "schedule_doctor_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 排班医生code */,
    "schedule_doctor_name" text NOT NULL  /* 排班医生姓名 */,
    "schedule_dept_code" text NOT NULL  /* 排班科室代码 */,
    "schedule_dept_name" text NOT NULL  /* 排班科室名 */,
    "schedule_type" integer NOT NULL  /* 排班类型(0普通号、1专家号、2专病号) */,
    "schedule_appoint_type" integer NOT NULL  /* 排班预约类型(0分时段预约 1按序号预约) */,
    "schedule_time_interval" integer NOT NULL  /* 排班时间段(0全天 1上午  2下午) */,
    "schedule_resource_count" integer NOT NULL  /* 排班资源数量(0为不限号) */,
    "schedule_state" text NOT NULL  /* 排班状态 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间(变更时间) */,
    "extend1" text NOT NULL  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text NOT NULL  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text NOT NULL  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outp_schedule_record" IS '门诊排班记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpat_fee
-- 注释: 门诊费用汇总表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpat_fee" (
    "fee_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 收费编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "source_fee_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统收费编号 */,
    "trans_type" smallint NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "invoice_no" character varying(20)  /* 发票号 */,
    "pay_kind_id" integer  /* 结算类别编号 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "total_cost" numeric(12,4) NOT NULL  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自付金额 */,
    "real_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 实付金额 */,
    "phyexam_flag" character varying(4)  /* 体检标志 */,
    "fee_state" smallint  /* 收费状态 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpat_fee" IS '门诊费用汇总表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpat_fee_detail
-- 注释: 门诊费用明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpat_fee_detail" (
    "detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 收费明细编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "source_detail_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统收费明细编号 */,
    "trans_type" smallint NOT NULL  /* 交易类型 */,
    "fee_id" bigint  /* 收费编号 */,
    "invoice_no" character varying(20)  /* 发票号 */,
    "source_recipe_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统处方编号 */,
    "source_recipe_detail_id" character varying(20)  /* 源系统处方明细编号 */,
    "min_fee_id" integer  /* 最小费用编号 */,
    "min_fee_code" character varying(10)  /* 最小费用代码 */,
    "min_fee_name" character varying  /* 最小费用名称 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "drug_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 药品标志 */,
    "unit_price" numeric(12,4)  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 数量 */,
    "total_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 总金额 */,
    "pub_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 公费金额 */,
    "own_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自费金额 */,
    "pay_cost" numeric(12,4)  /* 自付金额 */,
    "fee_state" smallint  /* 收费状态 */,
    "phyexam_flag" character varying(4)  /* 体检标志 */,
    "fee_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "fee_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "fee_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "fee_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "fee_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "fee_ward_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "fee_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 收费时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "unit" character varying(20)  /* 计价单位 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpat_fee_detail" IS '门诊费用明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpat_medical_record
-- 注释: 门诊病历
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpat_medical_record" (
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "reg_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 科室名称 */,
    "record_type_id" integer  /* 文书类型编码 */,
    "record_type_code" character varying(30)  /* 文书类型代码 */,
    "record_type_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 文书类型名称 */,
    "record_title" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 文书标题 */,
    "original_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "original_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "original_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "original_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "std_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 文书标准化程度 */,
    "std_content" xml  /* 标准的文书内容 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* 文书调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_note" text  /* 结构化调用标志 */,
    "emr_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 病历显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "outrec_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "outrec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "outrec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpat_medical_record" IS '门诊病历';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpat_recipe
-- 注释: 门诊处方
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpat_recipe" (
    "recipe_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 处方编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "source_recipe_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统处方编号 */,
    "recipe_dept_id" integer  /* 开单科室编号 */,
    "recipe_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 开单科室代码 */,
    "recipe_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 开单科室名称 */,
    "recipe_doc_id" integer  /* 开单医生编号 */,
    "recipe_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 开单医生代码 */,
    "recipe_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 开单医生姓名 */,
    "recipe_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 处方状态编号 */,
    "recipe_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 处方状态代码 */,
    "recipe_state_name" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 处方状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "recipe_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 开方时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "recipe_verify_state_name" character varying(10)  /* 处方审核状态 */,
    "recipe_verify_num" integer  /* 审核次数 */,
    "recipe_eval_num" integer  /* 处方点评次数 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpat_recipe" IS '门诊处方';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpat_recipe_detail
-- 注释: 门诊处方明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpat_recipe_detail" (
    "outpat_recipe_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 处方明细编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "reg_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "recipe_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 处方编号 */,
    "source_detail_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统处方明细编号 */,
    "group_no" character varying(20)  /* 成组序号 */,
    "recipe_class_id" integer  /* 处方类别编号 */,
    "recipe_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 处方类别代码 */,
    "recipe_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 处方类别名称 */,
    "drug_id" integer  /* 药品编号 */,
    "drug_code" character varying(20)  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 药品名称 */,
    "drug_flag" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否药品 */,
    "specs" character varying(40)  /* 规格 */,
    "dose_model_id" integer  /* 剂型编号 */,
    "dose_model_code" character varying(50)  /* 剂型代码 */,
    "dose_model_name" character varying(20)  /* 剂型名称 */,
    "unit_price" numeric(12,4)  /* 单价 */,
    "qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 总量 */,
    "frequency_id" integer  /* 频次编号 */,
    "frequency_code" character varying(50)  /* 频次代码 */,
    "frequency_name" character varying(30)  /* 频次名称 */,
    "once_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 每次用量 */,
    "dose_unit_id" integer  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 用量单位代码 */,
    "dose_unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "usage_id" integer  /* 用法编号 */,
    "usage_code" character varying(50)  /* 用法代码 */,
    "usage_name" character varying(30)  /* 用法名称 */,
    "days" smallint  /* 草药付数 */,
    "day_num" integer  /* 天数 */,
    "exec_dept_id" integer  /* 执行科室编号 */,
    "exec_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 执行科室代码 */,
    "exec_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 执行科室名称 */,
    "skin_test" boolean  /* 皮试标志 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "recipe_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 处方状态编号 */,
    "recipe_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 处方状态代码 */,
    "recipe_state_name" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 处方状态名称 */,
    "confirm_oper_id" integer  /* 确认操作员编号 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认操作员代码 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认操作员姓名 */,
    "confirm_dept_id" integer  /* 确认科室编号 */,
    "confirm_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认科室代码 */,
    "confirm_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 确认科室名称 */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(50)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "drug_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 药品森亿编码集 */,
    "chemical" jsonb  /* 化学成分 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "total_unit" character varying(20)  /* 总量单位 */,
    "sort_no" integer  /* 组内排序 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("outpat_recipe_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpat_recipe_detail" IS '门诊处方明细';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpatient_appointment_record
-- 注释: 门诊预约记录表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpatient_appointment_record" (
    "appoint_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 门诊预约唯一标识符，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 患者唯一标识符 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 年龄单位(值域 岁、月、日) */,
    "appoint_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约申请号 */,
    "appoint_class" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约类别名 */,
    "appoint_route" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约途径 */,
    "appoint_id_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约证件号 */,
    "appoint_schedule_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 预约排版id */,
    "appoint_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 预约日期 */,
    "appoint_time_interval" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 预约时间段 */,
    "appoint_queue_no" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 预约排队序号 */,
    "appoint_doctor_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约医生编码 */,
    "appoint_doctor_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约医生名 */,
    "appoint_dept_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 预约科室代码 */,
    "appoint_dept_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约科室名 */,
    "appoint_oper_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 预约操作人代码 */,
    "appoint_oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约操作人姓名 */,
    "record_state" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 预约状态 */,
    "appoint_oper_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 预约操作时间 */,
    "note" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 备注 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间(变更时间) */,
    "link_show_type" integer NOT NULL  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "extend1" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 扩展字符1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 扩展字符2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 扩展字符3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("appoint_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpatient_appointment_record" IS '门诊预约记录表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: outpatient_record
-- 注释: 门诊就诊记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outpatient_record" (
    "reg_id" bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('visit.outpatient_inpat_seq'::regclass)  /* 挂号编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_outpat_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统门诊号 */,
    "source_reg_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统挂号编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "pay_kind_id" integer  /* 结算类别编号 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "level_id" integer  /* 挂号级别编号 */,
    "level_code" character varying(20)  /* 挂号级别代码 */,
    "level_name" character varying(20)  /* 挂号级别名称 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 挂号科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 挂号科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 挂号科室名称 */,
    "doc_id" integer  /* 挂号医生编号 */,
    "doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 挂号医生代码 */,
    "doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 挂号医生姓名 */,
    "is_emergency" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否急诊 */,
    "is_again" smallint  /* 初诊/复诊标志 */,
    "reg_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 挂号时间 */,
    "visit_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊状态编号 */,
    "visit_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 就诊状态代码 */,
    "visit_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 就诊状态名称 */,
    "visit_dept_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊科室编号 */,
    "visit_dept_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 就诊科室代码 */,
    "visit_dept_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 就诊科室名称 */,
    "visit_doc_id" integer  /* 就诊医生编号 */,
    "visit_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 就诊医生代码 */,
    "visit_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 就诊医生姓名 */,
    "reg_source_id" integer  /* 挂号来源编号 */,
    "reg_source_code" character varying(50)  /* 挂号来源代码 */,
    "reg_source_name" character varying(20)  /* 挂号来源名称 */,
    "see_no" character varying(20)  /* 看诊序号 */,
    "major_diag_id" integer  /* 主要诊断编号 */,
    "major_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 主要诊断代码 */,
    "major_diag_name" text  /* 主要诊断名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "observation_flag" integer  /* 是否留观 */,
    "time_scope" character varying(50)  /* 挂号时间段 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "visit_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 就诊时间 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("reg_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "outpatient_record" IS '门诊就诊记录';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pathology_apply
-- 注释: 病理申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pathology_apply" (
    "apply_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_apply_number" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 源系统申请单编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 就诊类型 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系电话 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "apply_doc_id" integer  /* 医生编号 */,
    "apply_doc_code" character varying(20)  /* 医生编码 */,
    "apply_doc_name" character varying(20)  /* 医生名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 患者所属病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所属病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所属病区名称 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 患者所属科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所属科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所属科室名称 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室编码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "operation_desc" character varying(500)  /* 手术所见描述 */,
    "check_desc" character varying(500)  /* 影像学检查结果 */,
    "sample_number" integer  /* 标本数据 */,
    "sample_unit" character varying(100)  /* 数量单位 */,
    "sample_body" character varying(500)  /* 取材部位及组织名称 */,
    "sample_invitro_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 标本离体时间 */,
    "check_purpose" character varying(500)  /* 检查目的 */,
    "apply_class_id" integer  /* 检查类别 */,
    "apply_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查类别编码 */,
    "apply_class_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查类别名称 */,
    "apply_item_id" integer  /* 检查项目名称 */,
    "apply_item_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查项目编码 */,
    "apply_item_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查项目名称 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "barcode" character varying(50)  /* 标本条码号 */,
    "sample_fixative" character varying(100)  /* 标本固定液 */,
    "book_no" character varying(20)  /* 预约号 */,
    "appointment_time" character varying(100)  /* 预约时间 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查日期 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "confirm_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认时间 */,
    "confirm_oper_id" integer  /* 确认人编号 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 确认人编码 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 确认人姓名 */,
    "send_sample_number" integer  /* 送检组织数量 */,
    "send_sample_unit" character varying(100)  /* 送检组织数量单位 */,
    "send_sample_body" character varying(500)  /* 送检组织 */,
    "recive_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 接收时间 */,
    "recive_doc_id" integer  /* 接收人编号 */,
    "recive_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 接收人编码 */,
    "recive_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 接收人名称 */,
    "attention" character varying(500)  /* 注意事项 */,
    "is_urgent" boolean  /* 是否加急 */,
    "in_hospital" boolean  /* 是否院内 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying(100)  /* 医院名称 */,
    "check_status_id" integer  /* 申请单状态编号 */,
    "check_status_code" character varying(10)  /* 申请单状态编码 */,
    "check_status_name" character varying(10)  /* 申请单状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作人编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作人编码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作人姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("apply_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "pathology_apply" IS '病理申请单,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pathology_report
-- 注释: 病理报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pathology_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20)  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(150) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告小分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告小分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告小分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 检查名称 */,
    "eye_find" text  /* 肉眼所见 */,
    "microscope_find" text  /* 镜下所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" character varying(200)  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" character varying(100)  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(160)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_id" integer  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查人代码 */,
    "check_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "item_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检查项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" character varying(40)  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "immunohistochemical_des" character varying(100)  /* 免疫组化描述 */,
    "sample_receive_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 样本接收时间 */,
    "is_frozen_comp" boolean  /* 是否为冰冻报告 */,
    "is_frozen_report" boolean  /*  */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "pathology_report" IS '病理报告';
|
