|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pathology_report_item
-- 注释: 病理报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pathology_report_item" (
    "pathology_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源病理报告检查项目编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("pathology_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "pathology_report_item" IS '病理报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pathology_section_report
-- 注释: 病理切片报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pathology_section_report" (
    "pathology_section_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病理切理报告编号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "source_report_section_number" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 原始切片报告编号 */,
    "section_barcode" character varying(50)  /* 切片条码 */,
    "section_type" character varying(10)  /* 切片类型 */,
    "section_level" character varying(10)  /* 切片等级 */,
    "section_note" character varying(100)  /* 切片说明 */,
    "section_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 切片时间 */,
    "section_state" character varying(10)  /* 切片状态 */,
    "section_oper_id" integer  /* 切片操作人员 */,
    "section_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 切片操作代码 */,
    "section_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 切片操作姓名 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("pathology_section_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "pathology_section_report" IS '病理切片报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_allergy
-- 注释: 病人过敏记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_allergy" (
    "pat_allergy_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 过敏编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_allergy_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统过敏编号 */,
    "allergy_class_id" integer  /* 过敏类别编号 */,
    "allergy_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 过敏类别代码 */,
    "allergy_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 过敏类别名称 */,
    "allergy_id" integer  /* 过敏源编号 */,
    "allergy_code" character varying(50)  /* 过敏源编码 */,
    "allergy_name" character varying(400) NOT NULL  /* 过敏源名称 */,
    "allergy_symptom_id" integer  /* 过敏症状编号 */,
    "allergy_symptom_code" character varying(50)  /* 过敏症状代码 */,
    "allergy_symptom_name" character varying(50)  /* 过敏症状名称 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员编码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("pat_allergy_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_allergy" IS '病人过敏记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_base_info_20240201bak
-- 注释: 病人基本信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_base_info_20240201bak" (
    "pat_base_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人基本信息编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "card_type" character varying(20)  /* 卡类型 */,
    "card_no" character varying(50)  /* 卡号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "last_name" character varying(50)  /* 姓 */,
    "first_name" character varying(50)  /* 名 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" date  /* 出生日期 */,
    "birth_address" character varying(100)  /* 出生地 */,
    "birth_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 出生地行政区代码 */,
    "birth_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "birth_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "birth_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址县（区） */,
    "birth_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "birth_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "birth_address_house_no" character varying(100)  /* 出生地址-门牌号码 */,
    "id_type_code" character varying(2)  /* 证件类型代码 */,
    "id_type_name" character varying(20)  /* 证件类型名称 */,
    "id_no" character varying(30)  /* 证件编号 */,
    "country_code" character varying(5)  /* 国籍代码 */,
    "country_name" character varying(50)  /* 国籍名称 */,
    "nation_code" character varying(5)  /* 民族代码 */,
    "nation_name" character varying(50)  /* 民族名称 */,
    "marriage_code" character varying(5)  /* 婚姻状况 */,
    "marriage_name" character varying(20)  /* 婚姻名称 */,
    "profession_id" integer  /* 职业编号 */,
    "profession_code" character varying(50)  /* 职业代码 */,
    "profession" character varying(50)  /* 职业 */,
    "abo_code" character varying(1)  /* ABO血型代码 */,
    "abo_name" character varying(10)  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_code" character varying(1)  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" character varying(10)  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "native_place" character varying(20)  /* 籍贯 */,
    "account_address" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址 */,
    "account_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 户口地址行政区代码 */,
    "account_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "account_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "account_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-县（区） */,
    "account_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "account_address_vllage" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_card_info
-- 注释: 病人卡信息,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_card_info" (
    "card_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病人卡信息编号,自增主键 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "source_card_number" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 源系统卡号 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "card_state_id" integer  /* 状态编号 */,
    "card_state_code" character varying(20)  /* 状态代码 */,
    "card_state_name" character varying(20)  /* 状态名称 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "last_update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_card_info" IS '病人卡信息,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_diagnose
-- 注释: 病人诊断记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_diagnose" (
    "pat_diag_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 病人诊断序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "happen_no" smallint  /* 发生序号 */,
    "source_pat_diag_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统病人诊断序号 */,
    "diag_class_id" integer  /* 诊断类别编号 */,
    "diag_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断类别代码 */,
    "diag_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 诊断类别名称 */,
    "diag_id" integer  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断编码 */,
    "diag_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "diag_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 诊断森亿标准编码集 */,
    "is_primary" boolean  /* 是否主要诊断 */,
    "diag_doc_id" integer  /* 诊断医生编号 */,
    "diag_doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 诊断医生代码 */,
    "diag_doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 诊断医生姓名 */,
    "diag_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 诊断时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "bzxx" character varying  /* 备注诊断信息 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("pat_diag_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_diagnose" IS '病人诊断记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_id_relationship
-- 注释: 病人标识关系表

    "relationship_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 对照序号，自增号 */,

    "map_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 对照数据编号 */,

    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_id_relationship" IS '病人标识关系表';

|-- ========================================

,

);

,

);

    "account_address_house_no" character varying(100)  /* 户口地址-门牌号码 */,
    "phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系电话 */,
    "telephone" character varying(20)  /* 座机号码 */,
    "mobile" character varying(20)  /* 手机号码 */,
    "mail" character varying(50)  /* 邮箱 */,
    "qq" character varying(50)  /* QQ */,
    "wechat" character varying(50)  /* 微信 */,
    "contact_name" character varying(50)  /* 联系人姓名 */,
    "contact_relation_id" integer  /* 联系人关系编号 */,
    "contact_relation_code" character varying(10)  /* 联系人关系代码 */,
    "contact_relation_name" character varying(20)  /* 联系人关系名称 */,
    "contact_phone" character varying(20)  /* 联系人电话 */,
    "contact_address" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址 */,
    "contact_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 联系人地址行政区代码 */,
    "contact_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "contact_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "contact_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-县（区） */,
    "contact_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "contact_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "contact_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 联系人地址-门牌号码 */,
    "contact_zip" character varying(6)  /* 联系邮编 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */,
    "home_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 家庭地址行政区代码 */,
    "home_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "home_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "home_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-县（区） */,
    "home_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "home_address_vllage" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "home_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址-门牌号码 */,
    "home_phone" character varying(20)  /* 家庭电话 */,
    "home_zip" character varying(6)  /* 家庭邮编 */,
    "work_address" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址 */,
    "work_address_district" character varying(6)  /* 工作单位地址行政区代码 */,
    "work_address_province" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "work_address_city" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "work_address_county" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-县（区） */,
    "work_address_township" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "work_address_village" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "work_address_houseno" character varying(100)  /* 工作单位地址-门牌号码 */,
    "work_phone" character varying(20)  /* 工作单位电话 */,
    "work_zip" character varying(6)  /* 工作单位邮编 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "system_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 建档系统代码 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 建档者编码 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 建档者代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 建档者姓名 */,
    "update_oper_id" integer  /* 最后更新者编号 */,
    "update_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 最后更新者编码 */,
    "update_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 最后更新者姓名 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50)  /* ,为适配程序增加 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_master_info_20240201bak" IS '病人主信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_patient_base_info
-- 注释: 病人基本信息

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_patient_base_info" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "card_sys_code" integer  /* 卡类型值域 */,
    "card_type_code" text  /* 卡类型编码 */,
    "card_type_name" text  /* 卡类型名称 */,
    "card_no" text  /* 卡号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "last_name" text  /* 姓 */,
    "first_name" text  /* 名 */,

    "wb_code" text NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,

    "nation_name" text  /* 民族名称 */,

    "marriage_name" text  /* 婚姻名称 */,

    "abo_name" text  /* ABO血型名称 */,
    "rh_sys_code" integer  /* RH血型标准字典 */,
    "rh_code" text  /* RH血型代码 */,
    "rh_name" text  /* RH血型名称 */,
    "native_place" text  /* 籍贯 */,

    "account_address_province" text  /* 户口地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,

    "account_address_house_no" text  /* 户口地址-门牌号码 */,

    "mobile" text  /* 手机号码 */,

    "qq" text  /* QQ */,
    "wechat" text  /* 微信 */,
    "contact_name" text  /* 联系人姓名 */,
    "contact_relation_sys_code" integer  /* 联系人关系值域 */,
    "contact_relation_code" text  /* 联系人关系代码 */,
    "contact_relation_name" text  /* 联系人关系名称 */,
    "contact_phone" text  /* 联系人电话 */,
    "contact_address" text  /* 联系人地址 */,
    "contact_address_district" text  /* 联系人地址行政区代码 */,
    "contact_address_province" text  /* 联系人地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "contact_address_city" text  /* 联系人地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "contact_address_county" text  /* 联系人地址-县（区） */,
    "contact_address_township" text  /* 联系人地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "contact_address_village" text  /* 联系人地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "contact_address_houseno" text  /* 联系人地址-门牌号码 */,
    "contact_zip" text  /* 联系邮编 */,
    "home_address" text  /* 家庭地址 */,
    "home_address_district" text  /* 家庭地址行政区代码 */,
    "home_address_province" text  /* 家庭地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "home_address_city" text  /* 家庭地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "home_address_county" text  /* 家庭地址-县（区） */,

    "home_address_village" text  /* 家庭地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "home_address_houseno" text  /* 家庭地址-门牌号码 */,

    "home_zip" text  /* 家庭邮编 */,
    "work_address" text  /* 工作单位地址 */,
    "work_address_district" text  /* 工作单位地址行政区代码 */,
    "work_address_province" text  /* 工作单位地址-省（自治区、直辖市） */,
    "work_address_city" text  /* 工作单位地址-市（地区、州） */,
    "work_address_county" text  /* 工作单位地址-县（区） */,
    "work_address_township" text  /* 工作单位地址-乡（镇、街道办事处） */,
    "work_address_village" text  /* 工作单位地址-村（街、路、弄等） */,
    "work_address_houseno" text  /* 工作单位地址-门牌号码 */,
    "work_phone" text  /* 工作单位电话 */,
    "work_zip" text  /* 工作单位邮编 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "create_time" text  /* 业务建档时间 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 业务建档者编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 业务建档者姓名 */,
    "update_oper_code" text  /* 业务最后更新者编号 */,
    "update_oper_name" text  /* 业务最后更新者姓名 */,
    "update_time" text  /* 业务最后更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "empi" text  /* EMPI号 */,
    "empi_flag" integer  /* empi标志位 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "source_health_record_number" text  /* 源业务系统健康档案号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_patient_base_info" IS '病人基本信息';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_patient_card_info
-- 注释: 病人卡信息,[ESB标准服务集成]
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_patient_card_info" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 病人基本信息编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "card_number" text NOT NULL  /* 源系统卡号 */,
    "insurance_sys_code" integer  /* 保险类别值域 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" text  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" text  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "card_state_sys_code" integer  /* 状态值域 */,
    "card_state_code" text  /* 状态代码 */,
    "card_state_name" text  /* 状态名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工字典值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "last_update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_patient_card_info" IS '病人卡信息,[ESB标准服务集成]';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_sample
-- 注释: 患者样本信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_sample" (
    "patient_sample_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者样本编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "source_sample_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统样本编号 */,
    "sample_group_no" character varying(20)  /* 样本组序号 */,
    "sample_class_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 样本类别编号 */,
    "sample_class_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 样本类别编码 */,
    "sample_class_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 样本类别名称 */,
    "sample_id" integer  /* 样本编号 */,
    "sample_code" character varying(50)  /* 样本代码 */,
    "sample_name" character varying(50)  /* 样本名称 */,
    "qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 数量 */,
    "remained_qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 剩余数量 */,
    "description" character varying(200)  /* 样本描述 */,
    "create_oper_id" integer  /* 建档者编号 */,
    "create_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 建档者代码 */,
    "create_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 建档者姓名 */,
    "sample_oper_id" integer  /* 样本采集者编号 */,
    "sample_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 样本采集者代码 */,
    "sample_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 建档者姓名 */,
    "sample_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 样本采集时间 */,
    "sample_dept_id" integer  /* 样本采集科室编号 */,
    "sample_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 样本采集科室代码 */,
    "sample_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 样本采集科室名称 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 更新时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("patient_sample_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_sample" IS '患者样本信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patient_simple_location
-- 注释: 患者样本存放位置
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patient_simple_location" (
    "sample_location_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 样本位置编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_sample_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者样本编号  */,
    "source_sample_location_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统样本位置编号 */,
    "location" character varying(50)  /* 标本存放位置 */,
    "box_location_id" integer  /* 盒子位置编号 */,
    "box_location_name" character varying(30)  /* 盒子位置名称 */,
    "box_coordinate" point  /* 盒子坐标点 */,
    "rfid_tag" character varying(30)  /* rfid标签 */,
    "barcode_tag" character varying(30)  /* 盒子条码号 */,
    "update_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 更新时间 */,
    "output_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 领用时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("sample_location_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "patient_simple_location" IS '患者样本存放位置';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: patients_use_purchased_drugs_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "patients_use_purchased_drugs_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "purpose_and_basis_of_using_the_drug" text NOT NULL  /* 使用该药物的目的和依据 */,
    "description_of_adverse_drug_reactions" text NOT NULL  /* 药品不良反应描述 */,
    "latest_diagnosis" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 最新诊断 */,
    "purchased_drugs_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 外购药品名称 */,
    "specs" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 规格 */,
    "batch_number" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 批号 */,
    "validity_term" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 有效期 */,
    "dose" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 剂量 */,
    "patient_comments" text NOT NULL  /* 患者意见 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_comments" text NOT NULL  /* 患者家属意见 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "relationship_between_family_members_and_patient" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属与病人关系 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pg_aggregate
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pg_aggregate" (
    "aggfnoid" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggkind" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggnumdirectargs" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggtransfn" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggfinalfn" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "aggdeserialfn" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggmtransfn" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggminvtransfn" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggmfinalfn" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggfinalextra" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggmfinalextra" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggfinalmodify" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggmfinalmodify" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggsortop" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggtranstype" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggtransspace" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggmtranstype" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "aggmtransspace" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "agginitval" text  /*  */,
    "aggminitval" text  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("aggfnoid")
);

,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pg_policy
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pg_policy" (
    "oid" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "polname" name NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "polrelid" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "polcmd" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "polpermissive" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "polroles" oid[] NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "polqual" pg_node_tree  /*  */,
    "polwithcheck" pg_node_tree  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("oid")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pg_proc
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pg_proc" (
    "oid" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proname" name NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "pronamespace" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proowner" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "prolang" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "procost" real NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "prorows" real NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "provariadic" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "prosupport" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "prokind" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "prosecdef" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proleakproof" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proisstrict" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proretset" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "provolatile" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proparallel" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "pronargs" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "pronargdefaults" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "prorettype" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proargtypes" oidvector NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "proallargtypes" oid[]  /*  */,
    "proargmodes" "char"[]  /*  */,
    "proargnames" text[]  /*  */,
    "proargdefaults" pg_node_tree  /*  */,
    "protrftypes" oid[]  /*  */,
    "prosrc" text NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "probin" text  /*  */,
    "prosqlbody" pg_node_tree  /*  */,
    "proconfig" text[]  /*  */,
    "proacl" aclitem[]  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("oid")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pg_publication
-- 注释:

    "pubdelete" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "pubtruncate" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,

,

);

,

,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pg_statistic
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pg_statistic" (
    "starelid" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "staattnum" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stainherit" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stanullfrac" real NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stawidth" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stadistinct" real NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stakind1" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stakind2" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stakind3" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stakind4" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stakind5" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "staop1" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "staop2" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "staop3" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "staop4" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "staop5" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stacoll1" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stacoll2" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stacoll3" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stacoll4" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stacoll5" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stanumbers1" real[]  /*  */,
    "stanumbers2" real[]  /*  */,
    "stanumbers3" real[]  /*  */,
    "stanumbers4" real[]  /*  */,
    "stanumbers5" real[]  /*  */,
    "stavalues1" anyarray  /*  */,
    "stavalues2" anyarray  /*  */,
    "stavalues3" anyarray  /*  */,
    "stavalues4" anyarray  /*  */,
    "stavalues5" anyarray  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("starelid", "staattnum", "stainherit")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pg_statistic_ext
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pg_statistic_ext" (
    "oid" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "stxrelid" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "stxnamespace" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,

,

);

,
    PRIMARY KEY ("stxoid", "stxdinherit")
);

    "subtwophasestate" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "subpasswordrequired" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "subrunasowner" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "subconninfo" text NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "subslotname" name  /*  */,
    "subsynccommit" text NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "subpublications" text[] NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "suborigin" text  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("oid")
);

    "typowner" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "typbyval" boolean NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typtype" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typcategory" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,

    "typsubscript" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typelem" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typarray" oid NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typinput" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typoutput" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typreceive" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typsend" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typmodin" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typmodout" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typanalyze" regproc NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typalign" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "typstorage" "char" NOT NULL  /*  */,

,

-- 表名: pg_user_mapping
-- 注释:

,
    PRIMARY KEY ("oid")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: phyexam_check_report
-- 注释: 体检检查报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phyexam_check_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增主键标识 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "phyexam_number" text NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "report_number" text NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "report_class_code" text  /* 报告分类编号 */,
    "report_class_name" text  /* 报告分类名称 */,
    "report_name" text  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_name" text  /* 报告人姓名 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 报告时间 */,
    "abnormal_flag" text  /* 异常标志 */,
    "image_url" text  /* 图像url */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  跳转显示类型,默认0,0不显示，1web 2 exe */,
    "report_state" text  /* 状态 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "phyexam_check_report" IS '体检检查报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: phyexam_dept_summary
-- 注释: 科室小结
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phyexam_dept_summary" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号(小结信息) */,
    "phyexam_number" text NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 科室名称 */,
    "title" text  /* 标题 */,
    "dept_summary" text  /* 科室小结信息 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "doc_code" text  /* 检查医生编号 */,
    "doc_name" text  /* 检查医生姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "sort_no" text  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "phyexam_dept_summary" IS '科室小结';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: phyexam_item_result
-- 注释: 项目结果
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phyexam_item_result" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "phyexam_number" text NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "dept_summary_id" text  /* 小结信息序号 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 科室名称 */,
    "item_sys_code" integer  /* 项目值域 */,
    "group_code" text  /* 组合代码 */,
    "group_name" text  /* 组合名称 */,
    "item_code" text  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" text NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "result" text  /* 检查结果 */,
    "unit_code" text  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_name" text  /* 单位名称 */,
    "reference_range" text  /* 参考范围 */,
    "hint" text  /* 提示信息 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "doc_code" text  /* 检查医生编号 */,
    "doc_name" text  /* 检查医生姓名 */,
    "report_type_sys_code" integer  /* 报告类型值域 */,
    "report_type_code" text  /* 报告类型 */,
    "report_type" text  /* 报告类型名称 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 报告编号 */,
    "sort_no" text  /* 显示顺序 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "numerical_value" text  /* 数值结果 */,
    "source_url" text  /* 调阅地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "phyexam_item_result" IS '项目结果';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: phyexam_physical_examination_assess
-- 注释: 总检评估
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phyexam_physical_examination_assess" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "number" text NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "phyexam_number" text NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "dept_summary" text  /* 科室信息汇总 */,
    "check_assess" text  /* 总检评估 */,
    "check_propose" text  /* 总检建议 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "doc_code" text  /* 检查医生编号 */,
    "doc_name" text  /* 检查医生姓名 */,
    "check_time" text  /* 检查时间 */,
    "verify_oper_code" text  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_name" text  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" text  /* 审核时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "phyexam_physical_examination_assess" IS '总检评估';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: phyexam_physical_examination_record
-- 注释: 体检记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phyexam_physical_examination_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "phyexam_number" text NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "pay_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 结算类别值域 */,
    "pay_kind_code" text  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" text  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 保险类别值域 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" text  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" text  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "phyexam_type" text  /* 体检类型 */,
    "see_no" text  /* 看诊序号 */,
    "company_name" text  /* 单位名称 */,
    "combined_name" text  /* 套餐名称 */,
    "family_history" text  /* 家族史 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史 */,
    "previous_history" text  /* 既往史 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" text  /* 负责护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" text  /* 负责护士姓名 */,
    "phyexam_time" text  /* 体检时间 */,
    "phyexam_state_sys_code" integer  /* 体检状态值域 */,
    "phyexam_state_code" text  /* 体检状态编号 */,
    "phyexam_state_name" text  /* 体检状态名称 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,0 不显示 1web 2exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "phyexam_physical_examination_record" IS '体检记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: physical_examination_assess
-- 注释: 总检评估
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "physical_examination_assess" (
    "physical_examination_assess_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "phyexam_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "dept_summary" text NOT NULL  /* 科室信息汇总 */,
    "check_assess" text NOT NULL  /* 总检评估 */,
    "check_propose" text NOT NULL  /* 总检建议 */,
    "doc_id" integer  /* 检查医生编号 */,
    "doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查医生代码 */,
    "doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查医生姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("physical_examination_assess_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "physical_examination_assess" IS '总检评估';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: physical_examination_record
-- 注释: 体检记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "physical_examination_record" (
    "phyexam_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 体检记录编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "source_phyexam_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统体检记录编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "pay_kind_id" integer  /* 结算类别编号 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "phyexam_type" smallint  /* 体检类型 */,
    "see_no" character varying(20)  /* 看诊序号 */,
    "company_name" character varying(50)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "combined_name" character varying(50)  /* 套餐名称 */,
    "family_history" text  /* 家族史 */,
    "medical_history" text  /* 病史 */,
    "previous_history" text  /* 既往史 */,
    "duty_nurse_id" integer  /* 负责护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" character varying(50)  /* 负责护士代码 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" character varying(50)  /* 负责护士姓名 */,
    "phyexam_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 体检时间 */,
    "phyexam_state_id" integer  /* 体检状态编号 */,
    "phyexam_state_code" character varying(50)  /* 体检状态代码 */,
    "phyexam_state_name" character varying(10)  /* 体检状态名称 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型,0 不显示 1web 2exe */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("phyexam_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "physical_examination_record" IS '体检记录';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: pl_his_ssmx
-- 注释: HIS手术记录明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pl_his_ssmx" (
    "ssid" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 手术id */,
    "ssxh" integer  /* 手术序号 */,
    "zyh" character varying(30)  /* 住院号 */,
    "brxm" character varying(50)  /* 病人姓名 */,
    "ssbm" character varying(30)  /* 手术编码 */,
    "ssmc" character varying(200)  /* 手术名称 */,
    "start_time" timestamp(0) without time zone  /* 手术开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp(0) without time zone  /* 手术结束时间 */,
    "asa_level" integer  /* 麻醉手术分级 */,
    "mzbz" integer  /* 门诊、住院标识 */,
    "ksbm" character varying(30)  /* 科室编码 */,
    "ksmc" character varying(100)  /* 科室名称 */,
    "sssbm" character varying(30)  /* 手术室编码 */,
    "sssmc" character varying(100)  /* 手术室名称 */,
    "ssjid" character varying(30)  /* 手术间id */,
    "ssjmc" character varying(100)  /* 手术间名称 */,
    "ssdj" character varying(20)  /* 手术等级 */,
    "jzbz" integer  /* 急诊标志 */,
    "rjssbz" integer  /* 日间手术标志 */,
    "zdysid" character varying(30)  /* 主刀医生id */,
    "zdysxm" character varying(50)  /* 主刀医生姓名 */,
    "yzysid" character varying(30)  /* 一助医生id */,
    "yzysxm" character varying(50)  /* 一助医生姓名 */,
    "ezysid" character varying(30)  /* 二助医生id */,
    "ezys" character varying(50)  /* 二助医生姓名 */,
    "mzysid" character varying(30)  /* 麻醉医生id */,
    "mzysxm" character varying(50)  /* 麻醉医生姓名 */,
    "ymysxm" character varying(50)  /* 一麻医生姓名 */,
    "emysxm" character varying(50)  /* 二麻医生姓名 */,
    "xshsid" character varying(30)  /* 洗手护士id */,
    "xshsxm" character varying(50)  /* 洗手护士姓名 */,
    "xhhsid" character varying(30)  /* 巡回护士id */,
    "xhhsxm" character varying(50)  /* 巡回护士姓名 */,
    "qxhsid" character varying(30)  /* 器械护士id */,
    "qxhsxm" character varying(50)  /* 器械护士姓名 */,
    "mzfs" character varying(100)  /* 麻醉方式 */,
    "sfwcss" integer  /* 是否微创手术 */,
    "sqksmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "sqksbm" character varying  /*  */,
    "bqmc" character varying  /*  */,
    "bqbm" character varying  /*  */,
    "zyhm" character varying  /*  */

);
COMMENT ON TABLE "pl_his_ssmx" IS 'HIS手术记录明细';
|

    "sflh" integer  /*  */,
    "sffp" integer  /*  */,
    "ygbh" character varying  /*  */,
    "zfpb" character varying  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: plat_middle_task
-- 注释: VTE变更数据中间表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "plat_middle_task" (
    "task_no" bigint NOT NULL  /* 任务编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "task_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 任务类别 */,
    "pk_fda" character varying(20)  /* 业务系统主键 */,
    "pk_fdb" character varying(20)  /* 业务系统主键（联合主健使用） */,
    "pk_fdc" character varying(20)  /* 业务系统主键（联合主健使用） */,
    "pk_fdd" character varying(20)  /* 业务系统主键（联合主健使用） */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "status_result" integer  /* 同步状态：0未同步1已同步 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "poc_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 消息处理时间 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("task_no")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "plat_middle_task" IS 'VTE变更数据中间表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: preoperative_visit_record
-- 注释: 术前访视记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "preoperative_visit_record" (
    "preoperative_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_pre_visit_id" character varying(50)  /* 原始访视记录编号 */,
    "fore_diag_id" integer  /* 术前诊断编号 */,
    "fore_diag_code" character varying(200)  /* 术前诊断代码 */,
    "fore_diag_name" character varying(100)  /* 术前诊断名称 */,
    "intend_operation_id" integer  /* 拟施手术编号 */,
    "intend_operation_code" character varying(200)  /* 拟施手术代码 */,
    "intend_operation_name" character varying(100)  /* 拟施手术名称 */,
    "weight" character varying(50)  /* 体重 */,
    "height" character varying(50)  /* 身高 */,
    "breathe" numeric(12,4)  /* 呼吸 */,
    "pulse" numeric(12,4)  /* 脉搏 */,
    "temperature" numeric(12,4)  /* 体温 */,
    "pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 血压（高） */,
    "pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 血压（低） */,
    "awareness_id" integer  /* 意识编号 */,
    "awareness_code" character varying(20)  /* 意识代码 */,
    "awareness_name" character varying(50)  /* 意识名称 */,
    "past_history" character varying(2000)  /* 既往史 */,
    "present_history" character varying(2000)  /* 现病史 */,
    "drug_situation" character varying(2000)  /* 药物使用情况 */,
    "complication_situation" character varying(2000)  /* 并发症情况 */,
    "allergy_history" character varying(2000)  /* 过敏史 */,
    "allergy_id" integer  /* 过敏源编号 */,
    "allergy_code" character varying(50)  /* 过敏源代码 */,
    "allergy_name" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 过敏源名称 */,
    "physical_condition" character varying(2000) NOT NULL  /* 身体状况 */,
    "pre_visit_conclusion" character varying(2000)  /* 访视结论 */,
    "pre_visit_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 访视时间 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("preoperative_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "preoperative_visit_record" IS '术前访视记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: progress_note
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "progress_note" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "disease_course_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病程记录名称 */,
    "disease_course_content" text NOT NULL  /* 病程记录内容 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "auditor_id" integer  /* 文书审核人编号 */,
    "auditor_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "auditor_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书审核人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: proxy_authorize
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "proxy_authorize" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "in_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 入院时间 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "trustee_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人姓名 */,
    "trustee_sex" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人性别 */,
    "trustee_age" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人年龄 */,
    "trustee_tel" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人联系电话 */,
    "trustee_id_no" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人身份证号 */,
    "trustee_address" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 受托人住址 */,
    "relationship_between_trustee_an" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人与患者关系 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "trustee_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 受托人签名 */,
    "trustee_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 受托人签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: radiology_report
-- 注释: 放射学报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "radiology_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1)  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20)  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20)  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(150) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(5000)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告小分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告小分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告小分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text  /* 检查结论 */,
    "radiology_note" text  /* 放射学表现 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" character varying(200)  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" character varying(100)  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_id" integer  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查人代码 */,
    "check_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "item_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检查项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" character varying(40)  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "scan_seq" character varying(100)  /* 扫描序列 */,
    "scan_position" character varying(20)  /* 扫描方位 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "radiology_report" IS '放射学报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: radiology_report_item
-- 注释: 放射学报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "radiology_report_item" (
    "radiology_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源放射学报告检查项目编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("radiology_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "radiology_report_item" IS '放射学报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: radiologyreport
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "radiologyreport" (
    "iexam_iid" numeric NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "cbrlx" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dcheckdate" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "ijch" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "czyh" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "cname" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "csex" character varying(25)  /*  */,
    "cage" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "csqks" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "dbgsj" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "cbwmc" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "cbgzd" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "cshysxm" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "visit_id" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "cbgsj_hl7" character varying(2000)  /*  */,
    "cmodality" character varying(255)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("iexam_iid")
);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: radiologyreport
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "radiologyreport" (
    "iexam_iid" numeric NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "cbrlx" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "dcheckdate" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "ijch" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "czyh" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "cname" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "csex" character varying(25)  /*  */,
    "cage" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "csqks" character varying(100)  /*  */,

,
