|-- ========================================
-- 表名: radiotherapy_detail
-- 注释: 放疗明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "radiotherapy_detail" (
    "radiotherapy_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 明细序号，自增号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "radiotherapy_id" bigint  /* 放疗记录编号 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 放疗部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 放疗部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(20)  /* 放疗部位名称 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "use_time" character varying(100)  /* 使用时间（文字） */,
    "once_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 单次剂量 */,
    "all_dose" numeric(12,4)  /* 总剂量 */,
    "dose_unit" integer  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_code" character varying(50)  /* 用量单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "all_qty" numeric(12,4)  /* 总次数 */,
    "repair_time" character varying(20)  /* 伴修复时间 */,
    "irradiation_interval_time" character varying(20)  /* 照射间隔时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("radiotherapy_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "radiotherapy_detail" IS '放疗明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: radiotherapy_record
-- 注释: 放疗记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "radiotherapy_record" (
    "radiotherapy_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 放疗记录编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "program_name" character varying(50)  /* 放疗方案 */,
    "type_id" integer  /* 放疗类型编号 */,
    "type_code" character varying(50)  /* 放疗类型代码 */,
    "type_name" character varying(30)  /* 放疗类型名称 */,
    "quality_id" integer  /* 放疗性质编号 */,
    "quality_code" character varying(50)  /* 放疗性质代码 */,
    "quality_name" character varying(30)  /* 放疗性质名称 */,
    "radiotherapy_method_id" integer  /* 放疗方法编号 */,
    "radiotherapy_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 放疗方法代码 */,
    "radiotherapy_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 放疗方法名称 */,
    "irradiation_method_id" integer  /* 照射方法编号 */,
    "irradiation_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 照射方法代码 */,
    "irradiation_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 照射方法名称 */,
    "segmentation_method_id" integer  /* 分割方法编号 */,
    "segmentation_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 分割方法代码 */,
    "segmentation_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 分割方法名称 */,
    "device_id" integer  /* 放疗装置编号 */,
    "device_code" character varying(50)  /* 放疗装置代码 */,
    "device_name" character varying(30)  /* 放疗装置名称 */,
    "is_chemotherapy" boolean  /* 是否同期化疗 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("radiotherapy_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "radiotherapy_record" IS '放疗记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: record_fragment
-- 注释: 结构化数据拆分表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "record_fragment" (
    "record_fragment_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增号 */,
    "record_title" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 文本标题 */,
    "fragment_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 类别代码 */,
    "fragment_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 类别名称 */,
    "content" text NOT NULL  /* 病历章节内容 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者就诊类型 */,
    "record_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 文书编号 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "nlp_note" jsonb  /* 结构化结果 */,
    "nlp_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 结构化抽取时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "extend4" character varying  /*  */,
    "extend5" character varying  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_fragment_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "record_fragment" IS '结构化数据拆分表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: recover_patient
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "recover_patient" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "isdelete" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "createdt" date  /*  */,
    "sortno" integer  /*  */,
    "on_id" integer  /*  */,
    "ac_id" integer  /*  */,
    "operationid" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "operationdate" date  /*  */,
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "patient_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_number" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "patient_mrn" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "time_print" date  /*  */,
    "time_check" date  /*  */,
    "time_uncheck" date  /*  */,
    "time_startmonitor" date  /*  */,
    "time_stopmonitor" date  /*  */,
    "monitorinterval" integer DEFAULT 5  /*  */,
    "isautocreate" integer  /*  */,
    "isstartmonitor" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "ischecked" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "isprinted" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "checker_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "checker_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "unchecker_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "unchecker_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "printer_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "printer_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "print_number" integer DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "print_pdfpath" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "bed_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "bed_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "enter_time" date  /*  */,
    "leave_time" date  /*  */,
    "intubate_time" date  /*  */,
    "extubate_time" date  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "anesthetist_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "circulatingnurse_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_code" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scrubnurse_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "department_code" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "department_name" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "comments1" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "comments2" character varying(500)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: refusal_treatment_notification
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "refusal_treatment_notification" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "latest_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 最新诊断 */,
    "rejected_medical_measures" text NOT NULL  /* 拒绝的医疗措施 */,
    "other_risks" text NOT NULL  /* 其他风险 */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "relationship_between_family_members_and_patient" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属与病人关系 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: reh_assess_detail_rec
-- 注释: 康复评估明细表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reh_assess_detail_rec" (
    "reh_assess_detail_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_reh_assess_detail_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的评估ID */,
    "reh_assess_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 评估表ID */,
    "scale_item_code" character varying(20)  /* 明细项目代码 */,
    "scale_item_name" character varying(20)  /* 明细项目名称 */,
    "result_score" integer  /* 结果分数 */,
    "result_description" character varying(500)  /* 结果描述 */,
    "result_html_content" text  /* html格式结果 */,
    "result_xml_content" text  /* xml格式结果 */,
    "result_text_content" text  /* text格式结果 */,
    "result_other_content" text  /* other格式结果 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("reh_assess_detail_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "reh_assess_detail_rec" IS '康复评估明细表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: reh_assess_master_rec
-- 注释: 康复评估表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reh_assess_master_rec" (
    "reh_assess_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_reh_assess_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源始系统的评估ID */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "eva_scale_code" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 评定量表代码 */,
    "eva_scale_file_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 评定记录名称 */,
    "diagnose_description" character varying(400)  /* 测评前判断 */,
    "scale_status_code" character varying(10)  /* 评估状态代码 */,
    "phase_record_type_code" character varying(10)  /* 治疗阶段类型代码 */,
    "evaluation_percent" integer  /* 评估进度 */,
    "total_scale_item_count" integer  /* 总计评估技术数量 */,
    "finished_scale_item_count" integer  /* 完成的评估技术数量 */,
    "cure_phase_record_id" character varying(35)  /* 阶段记录标识 */,
    "start_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始评估时间 */,
    "evaluation_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 测评日期 */,
    "evaluation_user_id" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 测评医生 */,
    "creation_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "creation_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 创建人标识 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 最后修改人标识 */,
    "audit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核日期 */,
    "audit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 审核人标识 */,
    "audit_remark" character varying(500)  /* 审核备注 */,
    "result_score" integer NOT NULL  /* 结果分数 */,
    "result_description" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 结果描述 */,
    "result_html_content" text  /* html格式结果 */,
    "result_xml_content" text  /* xml格式结果 */,
    "result_text_content" text  /* text格式结果 */,
    "result_other_content" text  /* other格式结果 */,
    "result_remark" character varying(500)  /* 分析结果备注 */,
    "close_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 归档日期 */,
    "last_submit_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 最后提交时间 */,
    "last_report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后输出报告的日期 */,
    "warning_result_content" character varying(500)  /* 量表评估警告信息 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("reh_assess_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "reh_assess_master_rec" IS '康复评估表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: rehab_treat_rec
-- 注释: 康复治疗记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "rehab_treat_rec" (
    "reh_treat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_reh_treat_id" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源系统的康复治疗编号 */,
    "source_reh_assess_id" character varying(40)  /* 源始系统的评估ID */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "treat_item_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 治疗项目名称 */,
    "treat_item_code" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 治疗项目代码 */,
    "treat_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 治疗日期 */,
    "treat_rec" character varying(200)  /* 治疗记录 */,
    "treat_cycle_date" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 治疗周期 */,
    "start_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 结束时间 */,
    "exec_treat_date" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 执行治疗时间 */,
    "exec_status" character varying(2)  /* 执行状态 */,
    "plan_doc_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 计划安排治疗师编号 */,
    "plan_doc_user_name" character varying(20)  /* 计划安排治疗师姓名 */,
    "exec_doc_user_id" character varying(10) NOT NULL  /* 实际执行的治疗师编号 */,
    "exec_doc_user_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 实际执行的治疗师姓名 */,
    "create_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 创建时间 */,
    "create_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 创建人编号 */,
    "create_user_name" character varying(20)  /* 创建人姓名 */,
    "last_edit_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 修改时间 */,
    "last_edit_user_id" character varying(10)  /* 最后修改人编号 */,
    "last_edit_user_name" character varying(20)  /* 最后修改人姓名 */,
    "web_url" character varying(200)  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" character varying(100)  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "record_xml_content" text  /* 原始xml内容 */,
    "record_html_content" text  /* 原始html内容 */,
    "record_txt_content" text  /* 原始txt内容 */,
    "record_other_content" text  /* 原始其他格式内容 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "record_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 记录显示类型,默认显示html 0 html, 1xml 2text 3pdf 4结构化展示 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("reh_treat_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "rehab_treat_rec" IS '康复治疗记录';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: report_critical
-- 注释: 报告危急值
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "report_critical" (
    "report_critical_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 危急值编号，自增号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_report_critical_number" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 源系统危急值编号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号 */,
    "report_type" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 报告类别 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 危急值发布人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 危急值发布人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 危急值发布人姓名 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 危急值发布时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_critical_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "report_critical" IS '报告危急值';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: reportcard_badness_incident_report
-- 注释: 不良事件报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reportcard_badness_incident_report" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "report_number" text  /* 不良事件报告编号 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_code" text  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_name" text  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "nurse_level_sys_code" integer  /* 护理级别值域 */,
    "nurse_level_code" text  /* 护理级别编号 */,
    "nurse_level_name" text  /* 护理级别名称 */,
    "class_sys_code" integer  /* 不良事件类别值域 */,
    "class_code" text  /* 不良事件类别代码 */,
    "class_name" text  /* 不良事件类别名称 */,
    "report_state_sys_code" integer  /* 上报状态值域 */,
    "report_state_code" text  /* 上报状态编号 */,
    "report_state_name" text  /* 上报状态名称 */,
    "report_time" text  /* 上报时间 */,
    "report_dept_code" text  /* 上报科室编号 */,
    "report_dept_name" text  /* 上报科室名称 */,
    "report_ward_code" text  /* 上报病区编号 */,
    "report_ward_name" text  /* 上报病区名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "report_nurse_code" text  /* 床位护士编号 */,
    "report_nurse_name" text  /* 床位护士姓名 */,
    "duty_nurse_code" text  /* 责任护士编号 */,
    "duty_nurse_name" text  /* 责任护士姓名 */,
    "happen_time" text  /* 发生时间 */,
    "happen_address" text  /* 发生地点 */,
    "happen_reason" text  /* 发生原因 */,
    "note" text  /* 事件描述 */,
    "nursing_method" text  /* 护理措施及处理方法 */,
    "head_nurse_code" text  /* 护士长编号 */,
    "head_nurse_name" text  /* 护士长姓名 */,
    "head_nurse_record" text  /* 护士长记录 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_code" text  /* 科护士长工号 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_name" text  /* 科护士长姓名 */,
    "dept_head_nurse_record" text  /* 科护士长记录 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "happen_num" integer  /* 发生次数 */,
    "harm_level" text  /* 伤害程度 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "reportcard_badness_incident_report" IS '不良事件报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: reportcard_contagion_aids_detail
-- 注释: 传染病附卡艾滋病明细记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reportcard_contagion_aids_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "aids_card_number" text NOT NULL  /* 艾滋附卡编号 */,
    "contagion_number" text NOT NULL  /* 传染病记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "parent_name" text  /* 家长姓名 */,
    "nation_name" text  /* 民族名称 */,
    "marriage_name" text  /* 婚姻名称 */,
    "education" text  /* 文化程度 */,
    "account_address" text  /* 户籍住址 */,
    "sick_name" text  /* 疾病名称 */,
    "inject_drugs" text  /* 注射毒品史 */,
    "syringe_count" text  /* 共用过注射器的人数 */,
    "non_marital" text  /* 非婚异性性接触史 */,
    "non_marital_hc" text  /* 非婚性行为的人数 */,
    "aids_casp" text  /* 配偶/固定性伴阳性 */,
    "aids_msm" text  /* 男男性行为史 */,
    "aids_msm_count" text  /* 男男性行为人数 */,
    "outblood" text  /* 献血(浆)史 */,
    "inblood" text  /* 输血/血制品史 */,
    "mummasculine" text  /* 母亲阳性 */,
    "jobexpose" text  /* 职业暴露史 */,
    "operation_history" text  /* 手术史 */,
    "aids_other" text  /* 其他接触史 */,
    "aids_other_value" text  /* 其他接触史内容 */,
    "unknown_con_his" text  /* 不详接触史 */,
    "vd_history" text  /* 性病史 */,
    "infection_path" text  /* 最可能感染途径 */,
    "other_infection_path" text  /* 其他感染路径 */,
    "samples_tested" text  /* 检测样本来源 */,
    "other_samples_tested" text  /* 其他检测样本来源 */,
    "samples_result" text  /* 实验室检测及结论 */,
    "confirm_result_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 确认(替代策略)检测阳性日期 */,
    "confirm_result_agenc" text  /* 确认(替代策略)检测阳性单位 */,
    "confirm_aids_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 艾滋病确诊日期 */,
    "report_unit_name" text  /* 报告单位名称 */,
    "report_unit_phone" text  /* 报告单位联系电话 */,
    "report_doc_sys_code" integer  /* 报告医生值域 */,
    "report_doc_code" text  /* 报告医生代码 */,
    "report_doc_name" text  /* 报告医生 */,
    "report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告日期 */,
    "memo" text  /* 备注 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "reportcard_contagion_aids_detail" IS '传染病附卡艾滋病明细记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: reportcard_contagion_hepatitis_detail
-- 注释: 传染病附卡肝炎明细记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reportcard_contagion_hepatitis_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "hepatitis_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 肝炎附卡编号 */,
    "contagion_number" text NOT NULL  /* 传染病记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "hbsag_date" text  /* HBsAg 阳性时间 */,
    "sign_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 首次出现乙肝症状和体征的时间 */,
    "sign_flag" text  /* 首次出现乙肝症状和体征 */,
    "alt_denseness" text  /* 谷丙转氨酶浓度 */,
    "igm_result" text  /* 抗-HBc IgM 1:1000 检验结果 */,
    "liver_check" text  /* 肝穿监测结果 */,
    "hbs_flag" text  /* 恢复期血清 HBsAg 阴性,抗HBs 阳转  */,
    "contact_symptom_flag" text  /* 密切接触者有无相同症状  */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "reportcard_contagion_hepatitis_detail" IS '传染病附卡肝炎明细记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: reportcard_contagion_record
-- 注释: 传染病记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reportcard_contagion_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "contagion_number" text NOT NULL  /* 传染病记录编号 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_type" text NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "visit_number" text  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 患者姓名 */,
    "report_type" text  /* 报告类别 */,
    "parent_name" text  /* 家长姓名 */,
    "id_type_sys_code" integer  /* 证件类型值域 */,
    "id_type_code" text  /* 证件类型代码 */,
    "id_type_name" text  /* 证件类型名称 */,
    "id_no" text  /* 证件编号 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "birth_date" text  /* 出生日期 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "work_address" text  /* 工作单位地址 */,
    "contact_phone" text  /* 联系人电话 */,
    "belong_flag" text  /* 病人属于 */,
    "home_address" text  /* 家庭地址 */,
    "profession_type" text  /* 职业分类 */,
    "case_kind_one" text  /* 病例分类一 */,
    "case_kind_two" text  /* 病例分类二 */,
    "onset_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 发病日期 */,
    "diagnosis_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 诊断日期 */,
    "dead_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 死亡日期 */,
    "infectious_type" text  /* 传染病类型 */,
    "infectious_diag_sys_code" integer  /* 传染病诊断值域 */,
    "infectious_diag_name" text  /* 传染病诊断名称 */,
    "infectious_diag_code" text  /* 传染病诊断代码 */,
    "relatedinfectious_name" text  /* 订正病名 */,
    "status" text  /* 报告状态 */,
    "cancel_reason" text  /* 取消原因 */,
    "report_unit_name" text  /* 报告单位名称 */,
    "report_unit_phone" text  /* 报告单位联系电话 */,
    "report_doc_sys_code" integer  /* 报告医生值域 */,
    "report_doc_code" text  /* 报告医生代码 */,
    "report_doc_name" text  /* 报告医生姓名 */,
    "report_date" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告日期 */,
    "memo" text  /* 备注 */,
    "web_url" text  /* web调阅地址 */,
    "pdf_url" text  /* pdf调阅地址 */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "reportcard_contagion_record" IS '传染病记录';
|

    "jch1" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "cth1" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "mrh1" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "patientid" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "personid" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "pathologyid" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "xrayid" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "usoundid" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "inpatuid" character varying(15)  /*  */,
    "outpatuid" character varying(15)  /*  */,
    "dob" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "birthplace" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "nationality" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "nation" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "occupation" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "chargeclasses" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "dz" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "tel" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "patientremark" text  /*  */

);

    "calleduser" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "callpriority" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "calledcount" smallint NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "calllocked" text NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "medicalno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "studyno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "byy1" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "byy2" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "byy3" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "bzzd" text  /*  */,
    "clinicalrequest" text  /*  */,
    "physicalsign" text  /*  */,
    "labtest" text  /*  */,
    "reportgroup" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "hischargeitem" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "hischargecode" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "hischargeuser" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "hischargedatetime" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "hisfeestatus" smallint  /*  */,
    "examassistant" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "devno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "cleandate" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "cleanstarttime" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "cleanendtime" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "cleanuser" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "cleaner" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "devmodel" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "machineno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "cleansteps" character varying(120)  /*  */,
    "examassistant2" character varying(20)  /*  */

);
|

    "connecteddate" character varying(10)  /*  */,

    "tohis" text NOT NULL  /*  */,

-- 注释: 
-- ========================================

    "id" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('"CaseBase".rptbfzml_id_seq'::regclass)  /*  */,

    "bb" character varying(50)  /*  */
,

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: sample_class
-- 注释: 样本类别字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sample_class" (
    "sample_class_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 样本类别编号，自增号 */,
    "sample_class_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 样本类别代码 */,
    "sample_class_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 样本类别名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "code_sys_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 代码系统编号 */,
    "is_std" boolean  /* 是否基准 */,
    "std_class_id" integer  /* 基准分类编号 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("sample_class_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "sample_class" IS '样本类别字典';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: scr_scoring
-- 注释: 评分主记录,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "scr_scoring" (
    "scr_scoring_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 评分主记录唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：jy_nurse，小写，下划线命名法
 */,
    "source_scr_scoring_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统评分主记录唯一标识符 原始业务系统为联合主键时，以'&#124;'分隔    */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 患者所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 患者所在病区编号  */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所在病区代码  */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所在病区名称  */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码  */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称  */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断代码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "scoring_item_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 评分分类代码  */,
    "scoring_item_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 评分分类名称 包含各种评分类别 */,
    "scoring_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 评分时间  */,
    "total_score_value" character varying(500)  /* 总评分值  */,
    "total_score_low_value" character varying(30)  /* 总评分合理值下限  */,
    "total_score_high_value" character varying(30)  /* 总评分合理值上限  */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注  */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("scr_scoring_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "scr_scoring" IS '评分主记录,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: scr_scoring_items
-- 注释: 评分记录明细表,
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "scr_scoring_items" (
    "scr_scoring_items_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 评分记录明细表唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码  */,
    "source_scr_scoring_items_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统评分记录明细表唯一标识符  */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "scr_scoring_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 评分主记录唯一标识符  */,
    "scoring_content" text  /* 评分内容 评分小项以及对应评分值 */,
    "scoring_method" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 评分标准  */,
    "scoring_item_code" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 评分项目代码  */,
    "scoring_item_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 评分项目名称 包含评分各个小项 */,
    "scoring_item_value" character varying(500) NOT NULL  /* 评分项目分值 各个小项评分值 */,
    "scoring_item_low_value" character varying(30)  /* 评分项目合理值下限  */,
    "scoring_item_high_value" character varying(30)  /* 评分项目合理值上限  */,
    "degree" character varying(50)  /* 危重程度  */,
    "death_probability" character varying(50)  /* 死亡率  */,
    "pat_condition" text  /* 病情描述  */,
    "scoring_oper_id" integer  /* 评份人编号  */,
    "scoring_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 评份人代码  */,
    "scoring_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 评份人姓名  */,
    "scoring_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 评分时间  */,
    "enter_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 录入时间  */,
    "note" character varying(50)  /* 备注  */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("scr_scoring_items_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "scr_scoring_items" IS '评分记录明细表,';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: se_stores_brxh
-- 注释: 消耗库存表【类似科室库存表意思】
用于红单反退【类似出库冲红】
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "se_stores_brxh" (
    "id" numeric NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "kfid" character varying(10)  /* 库房ID */,
    "ejkfid" numeric NOT NULL  /* 二级库房ID */,
    "zbid" character varying(10)  /* 账簿ID */,
    "hsid" character varying(10)  /* 核算ID */,
    "sqlx" numeric  /* 申请类型 1.备货  2.跟台 */,
    "ywlxid" character varying(10)  /* 业务方式ID */,
    "ckdid" numeric  /*  */,
    "ckdjhm" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "ckdmxid" numeric  /*  */,
    "bah" character varying(30)  /* 病案号 */,
    "zymzh" character varying(30)  /* 住院号;门诊号 */,
    "ckdwid" character varying(10)  /* 使用科室ID */,
    "ckdwmc" character varying(100)  /* 使用科室 */,
    "brxm" character varying(30)  /* 病人姓名 */,
    "cwh" character varying(30)  /* 床位号 */,
    "ssmc" character varying(500)  /* 手术名称 */,
    "sssj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 手术时间 */,
    "ysgh" character varying(10)  /* 医生工号 */,
    "ssys" character varying(30)  /* 手术医生 */,
    "ghdwid" character varying(10)  /* 供货单位ID */,
    "ghdwmc" character varying(100)  /* 供货单位名称 */,
    "ejkcid" numeric  /* 二级库存ID */,
    "mcggid" character varying(10)  /* 名称规格ID */,
    "wzzm" character varying(100)  /* 物资主码 */,
    "wztm" character varying(3000)  /* 物资条码【完整码】 */,
    "wzmc" character varying(100)  /* 物资名称 */,
    "ggxh" character varying(200)  /* 规格型号 */,
    "wzdw" character varying(20)  /* 物资单位 */,
    "cksl" numeric(18,4)  /* 出库数量 */,
    "ckdj" numeric(18,4)  /* 出库单价 */,
    "ckje" numeric(18,4)  /* 出库金额 */,
    "sfxm" character varying(500)  /* 收费项目 */,
    "sfmc" character varying(500)  /* 收费名称 */,
    "sfje" numeric(18,4)  /* 收费金额 */,
    "scph" character varying(40)  /* 生产批号 */,
    "sxsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 失效时间 */,
    "mjph" character varying(50)  /* 灭菌批号 */,
    "mjsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 灭菌时间 */,
    "zzm" character varying(60)  /* 追踪码 */,
    "zczh" character varying(60)  /* 注册证号 */,
    "ppid" character varying(30)  /* 品牌ID */,
    "ppmc" character varying(100)  /* 品牌名称 */,
    "cdid" character varying(30)  /* 产地ID */,
    "cdmc" character varying(200)  /* 产地名称 */,
    "sccjid" character varying(30)  /* 生产厂家ID */,
    "sccjmc" character varying(200)  /* 生产厂家名称 */,
    "sl" numeric(18,4)  /*  */,
    "dj" numeric(18,4)  /* 库存单价 */,
    "je" numeric(18,4)  /*  */,
    "yxcksl" numeric(18,4)  /* 允许出库数量 */,
    "chsl" numeric(18,4)  /* 冲红数量 */,
    "chje" numeric(18,4)  /* 冲红金额 */,
    "zsbz" numeric  /* 是否赠送 */,
    "jzrid" character varying(10)  /* 记账人ID */,
    "jzr" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "jzsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 记账日期 */,
    "bz" character varying(600)  /* 备注 */,
    "jbrid" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "jbr" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "ejkfmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "zbmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "hsmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "brxb" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "jfbqdm" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "jfbqmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "jfksdm" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "jfksmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "his_jfid" numeric  /*  */,
    "ssdm" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "scsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /*  */,
    "tcid" numeric DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "tcmc" character varying(300)  /*  */,
    "ynm" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "kdksdm" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "kdksmc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "sfdw" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "tclx" numeric  /*  */,
    "lsj" numeric(18,4)  /*  */,
    "ssid" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "zxckrkdid" numeric  /* 中心仓库入库单据ID 默认 0 */,
    "is_fphm" numeric DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "fphms" character varying(1500)  /*  */,
    "fpjes" character varying(1500)  /*  */,
    "fpsj" date  /*  */,
    "charge_type" character varying(60)  /* 计费方式：比如本地医保，自费，异地医保等等 */,
    "fkbz" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 付款标志 0.未付 1.已付 */,
    "sswz" character varying(300)  /* 手术位置，如：牙位 */,
    "dphlx" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 材料使用合理性点评 0.未点评 1.合理 2.不合理 */,
    "dpbz" character varying(1000)  /* 材料使用合理性点评备注 */,
    "dprid" numeric  /* 材料使用合理性点评人ID */,
    "dprmc" character varying(30)  /* 材料使用合理性点评人名称 */,
    "dpsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 材料使用合理性点评时间 */,
    "yssfzh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "hzjzkh" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "jbzdbm" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "jbzdmc" character varying(300)  /*  */,
    "hzsfzh" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "ybbm" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "dp_cmlsy" numeric  /* 点评 超目录使用 1.是  0.否 */,
    "dp_cqxsy" numeric  /* 点评 超权限使用 1.是  0.否 */,
    "dp_cyzsy" numeric  /* 点评 超适应症使用 1.是  0.否 */,
    "dp_zqtyzxjwzx" numeric  /* 点评 知情同意执行及完整性 1.完整  2.缺项 3.无知情同意 */,
    "dp_bljlfhyq" numeric  /* 点评 病例记录符合要求 1.符合  0.不符合 */,
    "dp_txmgfnt" numeric  /* 点评 条形码规范黏贴 1.是  0.否 */,
    "dp_czwt" character varying(1000)  /* 点评 存在问题  */,
    "spt_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "sflx" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "taxno" numeric(14,4)  /* 税号 */,
    "tax" numeric(14,4)  /* 税率 */,
    "taxje" numeric(14,4)  /* 税额 */,
    "shdj" numeric(18,8)  /* 税后单价 */,
    "shje" numeric(14,4)  /* 税后金额 */,
    "zxzk" numeric(5,2)  /* 让利折扣率，如让利2折，0.2 表示金额*0.8 */,
    "zxzkje" numeric(14,4)  /* 让利折扣金额 */,
    "rktax" numeric(14,4)  /* 入库税率 */,
    "lsje" numeric(14,4)  /* 零售金额 */,
    "sfdlcg" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 是否带量采购,1.是 0.否 */,
    "spt_scbz" numeric DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "spt_scr" numeric  /*  */,
    "spt_scsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /*  */,
    "spt_department_id" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "spt_hospital_order_id" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "spt_distribute_address" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "spt_orderid" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "spt_zb_msg" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "spt_order_detail_id" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "spt_goods_id" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "spt_company_id_ps" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "spt_purchase_count" numeric  /*  */,
    "spt_outlookc" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "spt_goods_type" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "spt_order_custom_info" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "spt_status" numeric  /*  */,
    "spt_mx_msg" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "spt_mx_error_msg" character varying(500)  /*  */,
    "kpbz" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 开票标志:  0没有开票, 1等待开票, 2已经开票, 3.确认收票 */,
    "zlzmc" character varying(200)  /*  */,
    "zrbz" numeric  /*  */,
    "jrbz" numeric  /*  */,
    "ksqrbz" numeric DEFAULT 0  /*  */,
    "ksqrr" numeric  /*  */,
    "ksqrsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /*  */,
    "ksqrcxr" numeric  /*  */,
    "ksqrcxsj" timestamp(6) without time zone  /*  */,
    "zxssjid" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 使用手术间ID */,
    "zxssjmc" character varying(200)  /* 使用手术间名称 */,
    "sfdwdm" character varying(30)  /*  */,
    "bsfwbz" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 伴随服务标志 1.是 0.否 */,
    "kcgljb" numeric DEFAULT 2  /* 库存管理级别 默认2 手术间是3 */,
    "ydmxid" numeric DEFAULT 0  /* 关联预定明细ID 默认 0 */,
    "brid" character varying(60)  /* 病人ID */,
    "smmxid" character varying(30)  /* 手麻系统明细id */,
    "ldsmmxid" character varying(30)  /* 手麻系统蓝单明细id */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "se_stores_brxh" IS '消耗库存表【类似科室库存表意思】
用于红单反退【类似出库冲红】';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: shenhe
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "shenhe" (

    "age" text  /*  */,
    "diagnosis" text  /*  */,
    "doctordepartment" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "doctorid" text  /*  */,
    "doctorname" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "audituser" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "auditresultcode" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "drugcount" text  /*  */,
    "feeid" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "itemname" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "formulation" text  /*  */,
    "drugtype" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "drugspec" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "packing" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "phhc_drugid" character varying(255)  /*  */,
    "quantity" text  /*  */,
    "singledose" text  /*  */,
    "frequency" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "route" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "result" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */,
    "resultdesc" text  /*  */,
    "timeout" text  /*  */,
    "presstatus" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "doctorpresadvice" text  /*  */,
    "pharmascistpresadvice" text  /*  */,
    "opinioncomplaints" text  /*  */,
    "pharmascistauditresult" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "pharmascistfeedback" text  /*  */,
    "doctorauditresult" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "doctorfeedback" text  /*  */,
    "point_id" integer  /*  */,
    "point_name" character varying(200)  /*  */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: simple_location
-- 注释: 样本存放位置字典
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "simple_location" (
    "location_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 样本存放位置编号，自增号 */,
    "location_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 样本存放位置代码 */,
    "location_name" character varying(30) NOT NULL  /* 样本存放位置名称 */,
    "spell_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 拼音码 */,
    "wb_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 五笔码 */,
    "parent_location_id" integer  /* 上级位置编号 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "simple_location" IS '样本存放位置字典';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: source_crf_item
-- 注释: 源控件表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "source_crf_item" (
    "source_object_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源控件编号，自增号 */,
    "source_object_name" character varying(50)  /* 源控件名称名称 */,
    "source_app" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_database" character varying(50)  /* 来源数据库 */,
    "source_table" character varying(50)  /* 来源数据表 */,
    "source_column_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 来源数据列 */,
    "source_crf_page_id" bigint  /* 源页面编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("source_object_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "source_crf_item" IS '源控件表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: source_crf_page
-- 注释: 源页面表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "source_crf_page" (
    "source_crf_page_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源页面编号，自增号 */,
    "source_crf_page_name" character varying(50)  /* 源页面名称 */,
    "source_crf_page_note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "source_study_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源项目编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("source_crf_page_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "source_crf_page" IS '源页面表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: source_event
-- 注释: 源事件表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "source_event" (
    "source_event_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源事件编号，自增号 */,
    "source_study_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源项目编号 */,
    "source_event_name" character varying(50)  /* 源事件名称 */,
    "source_event_note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("source_event_id", "source_study_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "source_event" IS '源事件表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: source_event_crf_map
-- 注释: 页面事件对照表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "source_event_crf_map" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "source_event_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源事件编号 */,
    "source_event_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源事件名称 */,
    "source_crf_page_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源页面编号 */,
    "source_crf_page_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源页面名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "source_event_crf_map" IS '页面事件对照表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: source_qc_rule_result
-- 注释: 源表基本信息结果表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "source_qc_rule_result" (
    "id" integer NOT NULL  /* 编号 */,
    "hospital_code" character varying  /* 医院编码 */,
    "hospital_name" character varying  /* 医院名称 */,
    "rule_id" character varying NOT NULL  /* 规则id */,
    "domain_table" character varying NOT NULL  /* 域表名 */,
    "is_exist" boolean DEFAULT false  /* 表存在性 */,
    "record_cnt" integer  /* 表总记录数 */,
    "person_time" integer  /* 患者人次数 */,
    "person" integer  /* 患者人数 */,
    "start_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 表数据起始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 表数据结束时间 */,
    "execute_sql" text  /* 执行脚本 */,
    "execute_begin_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行开始时间 */,
    "execute_end_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 执行结束时间 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "result_master_id" integer  /* 结果主表的编号 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "source_qc_rule_result" IS '源表基本信息结果表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: source_study
-- 注释: 源项目表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "source_study" (
    "source_study_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源项目编号，自增号 */,
    "source_study_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 源项目名称 */,
    "source_database" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 来源数据库的名称 */,
    "source_app" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_study_note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("source_study_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "source_study" IS '源项目表';
|

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: study_map
-- 注释: 项目对照表

    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 编号，自增号 */,
    "source_study_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 源项目编号 */,
    "source_study_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 源项目名称 */,
    "study_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 项目编号 */,
    "study_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "relationship" smallint NOT NULL  /* 对照关系 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "study_map" IS '项目对照表';

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tblcmrsindex
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tblcmrsindex" (
    "accessionno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "studyuid" character varying(64)  /*  */,
    "patientid" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "inpatno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "outpatno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "casehistoryno" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "patientname" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "patientsex" character varying(6)  /*  */,
    "patientdob" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "examtype" character varying(40)  /*  */,
    "bodyparts" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "viewpositions" character varying(60)  /*  */,
    "clinicalsymptom" text  /*  */,
    "physicalsign" text  /*  */,
    "labtest" text  /*  */,
    "otherdiagnosis" text  /*  */,
    "clinicaldiagnosys" character varying(80)  /*  */,
    "exammode" character varying(10)  /*  */,
    "examroom" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "device" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "examdept" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "patientsource" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "facility" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "requesteddate" character varying  /*  */,
    "requesteddept" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "requestedphysician" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "scheduleddate" character varying  /*  */,
    "studydate" character varying  /*  */,
    "reporteddate" character varying  /*  */,
    "technician" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "reporter" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "authorizer" character varying(20)  /*  */,
    "examparameter" text  /*  */,
    "diagdescription" text  /*  */,
    "diagimpression" text  /*  */,
    "recommendation" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "isabnormal" character varying  /*  */,
    "studystatus" character varying(10)  /*  */,

-- 表名: test_result
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================

    "req_no" character varying(50)  /* 申请单号 */,

    "work_date" character varying(50)  /* 检测日期 */,
    "lis_en_name" character varying(50)  /* LIS系统项目英文名 */,
    "itemno" character varying(20)  /* 项目编号 */

);

|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tumor_chemotherapy_informed_consent
-- 注释: 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tumor_chemotherapy_informed_consent" (
    "record_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 文书编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_record_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统文书编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_no" character varying(50)  /* 床号 */,
    "current_diagnosis" character varying(100) NOT NULL  /* 当前诊断 */,
    "implemented_medical_plan" text NOT NULL  /* 拟实施的医疗方案 */,
    "implemented_chemotherapy_plan" text NOT NULL  /* 拟实施的化疗方案 */,
    "other_important_matters" text NOT NULL  /* 其他重要事项 */,
    "is_patient_agree_with_medical_measures" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 患者是否同意医疗措施标记  0:否 ; 1:是  */,
    "patient_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者签名 */,
    "patient_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者签名时间 */,
    "patient_family_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名 */,
    "patient_family_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者家属签名时间 */,
    "patient_guardian_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者监护人签名 */,
    "patient_guardian_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 患者监护人签名时间 */,
    "medical_staff_signature" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名 */,
    "medical_staff_signature_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 医务人员签名时间 */,
    "record_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 记录时间 */,
    "create_id" integer  /* 文书创建人编号 */,
    "create_code" character varying(50)  /* 创建人代码 */,
    "create_name" character varying(50)  /* 文书创建人姓名 */,
    "create_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 建档时间 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 源系统最后更新时间 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "inprec_state_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态编号 */,
    "inprec_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态代码 */,
    "inprec_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 病历状态名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tumour_chemotherapy_drug_detail
-- 注释: 化疗用药明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tumour_chemotherapy_drug_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "chemotherapy_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 化疗用药明细编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "chemotherapy_number" text  /* 化疗记录编号 */,
    "drug_sys_code" integer  /* 药品值域 */,
    "drug_code" text  /* 药品代码 */,
    "drug_name" text  /* 药品名称 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束时间 */,
    "use_time" text  /* 使用时间（文字） */,
    "standarde_dose" text  /* 标准剂量 */,
    "theory_dose" text  /* 理论剂量 */,
    "real_dose" text  /* 实际剂量 */,
    "dose_unit_sys_code" integer  /* 用量单位值域 */,
    "dose_unit_code" text  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_unit_name" text  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "is_decrease" text  /* 是否减少量 */,
    "decrease_reason" text  /* 减量原因 */,
    "is_postpone" text  /* 是否延期 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "tumour_chemotherapy_drug_detail" IS '化疗用药明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tumour_chemotherapy_record
-- 注释: 化疗记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tumour_chemotherapy_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "chemotherapy_number" text NOT NULL  /* 化疗记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "program_name" text  /* 化疗方案 */,
    "quality_sys_code" integer  /* 化疗性质值域 */,
    "quality_code" text  /* 化疗性质编码 */,
    "quality_name" text  /* 化疗性质名称 */,
    "all_period_num" text  /* 化疗期数 */,
    "period_num" text  /* 化疗周期 */,
    "program_interval_days" text  /* 方案间隔天数 */,
    "real_interval_days" text  /* 实际间隔天数 */,
    "is_radiotherapy" text  /* 是否同期放疗 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束时间 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 人员字典 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 记录人编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "tumour_chemotherapy_record" IS '化疗记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tumour_radiotherapy_detail
-- 注释: 放疗明细
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tumour_radiotherapy_detail" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "radiotherapy_detail_number" text NOT NULL  /* 放疗明细序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "radiotherapy_number" text NOT NULL  /* 放疗记录编号 */,
    "body_site_sys_code" integer  /* 放疗部位值域 */,
    "body_site_code" text  /* 放疗部位编码 */,
    "body_site_name" text  /* 放疗部位名称 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束时间 */,
    "use_time" text  /* 使用时间（文字） */,
    "once_dose" text  /* 单次剂量 */,
    "all_dose" text  /* 总剂量 */,
    "dose_unit_sys_code" integer  /* 用量单位值域 */,
    "dose_unit_code" text  /* 用量单位编号 */,
    "dose_unit_name" text  /* 用量单位名称 */,
    "all_qty" text  /* 总次数 */,
    "repair_time" text  /* 伴修复时间 */,
    "irradiation_interval_time" text  /* 照射间隔时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "tumour_radiotherapy_detail" IS '放疗明细';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tumour_radiotherapy_record
-- 注释: 放疗记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tumour_radiotherapy_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "radiotherapy_number" text NOT NULL  /* 放疗记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "program_name" text  /* 放疗方案 */,
    "type_sys_code" integer  /* 放疗类型值域 */,
    "type_code" text  /* 放疗类型代码 */,
    "type_name" text  /* 放疗类型名称 */,
    "quality_sys_code" integer  /* 放疗性质值域 */,
    "quality_code" text  /* 放疗性质代码 */,
    "quality_name" text  /* 放疗性质名称 */,
    "radiotherapy_method_sys_code" integer  /* 放疗方法值域 */,
    "radiotherapy_method_code" text  /* 放疗方法代码 */,
    "radiotherapy_method_name" text  /* 放疗方法名称 */,
    "irradiation_method_sys_code" integer  /* 照射方法值域 */,
    "irradiation_method_code" text  /* 照射方法代码 */,
    "irradiation_method_name" text  /* 照射方法名称 */,
    "segmentation_method_sys_code" integer  /* 分割方法值域 */,
    "segmentation_method_code" text  /* 分割方法代码 */,
    "segmentation_method_name" text  /* 分割方法名称 */,
    "device_sys_code" integer  /* 放疗装置值域 */,
    "device_code" text  /* 放疗装置代码 */,
    "device_name" text  /* 放疗装置名称 */,
    "is_chemotherapy" text  /* 是否同期化疗 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束时间 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "tumour_radiotherapy_record" IS '放疗记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: tumour_untoward_effect_record
-- 注释: 不良反应记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tumour_untoward_effect_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号自增 */,
    "effect_record_number" text NOT NULL  /* 不良反应记录编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "cure_type" text  /* 治疗类型 */,
    "cure_record_id" text  /* 治疗记录编号 */,
    "class_sys_code" integer  /* 反应类别编号 */,
    "class_code" text  /* 反应类别代码 */,
    "class_name" text  /* 反应类别名称 */,
    "untoward_effect_name" text  /* 反应名称 */,
    "organ_sys_code" integer  /* 器官字典 */,
    "acute_organ_code" text  /* 器官编号（急性期） */,
    "acute_organ_name" text  /* 器官名称（急性期） */,
    "rtog_acute_grade_sys_code" integer  /* RTOG急性期分级字典 */,
    "rtog_acute_grade_code" text  /* RTOG急性期分级编号 */,
    "rtog_acute_grade_name" text  /* RTOG急性期分级名称 */,
    "terminal_organ_code" text  /* 器官编号（晚期） */,
    "terminal_organ_name" text  /* 器官名称（晚期） */,
    "rtog_terminal_grade_sys_code" integer  /* RTOG/EORTC晚期分级字典 */,
    "rtog_terminal_grade_code" text  /* RTOG/EORTC晚期分级编号 */,
    "rtog_terminal_grade_name" text  /* RTOG/EORTC晚期分级名称 */,
    "begin_time" text  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" text  /* 结束时间 */,
    "grade_sys_code" integer  /* 不良反应等级值域 */,
    "grade_code" text  /* 不良反应等级代码 */,
    "grade_name" text  /* 不良反应等级名称 */,
    "pertinence_sys_code" integer  /* 与治疗相关性值域 */,
    "pertinence_code" text  /* 与治疗相关性代码 */,
    "pertinence_name" text  /* 与治疗相关性名称 */,
    "dispose_method_sys_code" integer  /* 处理方法值域 */,
    "dispose_method_code" text  /* 处理方法代码 */,
    "dispose_method_name" text  /* 处理方法名称 */,
    "outcome_sys_code" integer  /* 病情转归值域 */,
    "outcome_code" text  /* 病情转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" text  /* 病情转归名称 */,
    "untoward_effect_note" text  /* 不良反应描述 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 记录人编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 记录时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "tumour_untoward_effect_record" IS '不良反应记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ultrasound_report
-- 注释: 超声报告
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ultrasound_report" (
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "source_id_type" character varying(20)  /* 源系统患者标识符类型 */,
    "source_patient_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统患者编号 */,
    "visit_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊编号 */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_report_id" character varying(150) NOT NULL  /* 源系统报告编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_id" integer  /* 临床诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 临床诊断编码 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" character varying(500)  /* 临床诊断名称 */,
    "medical_history" character varying(500)  /* 病史摘要 */,
    "report_class_id" integer  /* 报告小分类编号 */,
    "report_class_code" character varying(50)  /* 报告小分类代码 */,
    "report_class_name" character varying(20)  /* 报告小分类名称 */,
    "report_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 报告名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "check_name" character varying(200) NOT NULL  /* 检查名称 */,
    "check_find" text  /* 检查所见 */,
    "check_conclusion" text NOT NULL  /* 检查结论 */,
    "ultrasound_note" text  /* 超声学表现 */,
    "summary_note" text  /* 总体描述 */,
    "verify_note" character varying(200)  /* 审核意见 */,
    "image_no" character varying(100)  /* 影像号 */,
    "image_url" character varying(400)  /* 影像浏览地址 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(100)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "apply_ward_id" integer  /* 申请病区编号 */,
    "apply_ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请病区代码 */,
    "apply_ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请病区名称 */,
    "apply_dept_id" integer  /* 申请科室编号 */,
    "apply_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请科室代码 */,
    "apply_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 申请科室名称 */,
    "apply_oper_id" integer  /* 申请人编号 */,
    "apply_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 申请人代码 */,
    "apply_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 申请人姓名 */,
    "apply_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 申请时间 */,
    "check_dept_id" integer  /* 检查科室编号 */,
    "check_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查科室代码 */,
    "check_dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 检查科室名称 */,
    "check_oper_id" integer  /* 检查人编号 */,
    "check_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查人代码 */,
    "check_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查人姓名 */,
    "check_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 检查时间 */,
    "report_oper_id" integer  /* 写报告人编号 */,
    "report_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人代码 */,
    "report_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 写报告人姓名 */,
    "write_report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 写报告时间 */,
    "verify_oper_id" integer  /* 审核人编号 */,
    "verify_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 审核人代码 */,
    "verify_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 审核人姓名 */,
    "verify_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 审核时间 */,
    "report_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 报告时间 */,
    "note" character varying(200)  /* 备注 */,
    "abnormal_flag" smallint  /* 异常标志 */,
    "report_state" smallint NOT NULL  /* 状态 */,
    "cancel_oper_id" integer  /* 回收人编号 */,
    "cancel_oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 回收人代码 */,
    "cancel_oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 回收人姓名 */,
    "cancel_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 回收时间 */,
    "last_oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 最后更新时间 */,
    "nlp_flag" smallint NOT NULL  /* 结构化标志 */,
    "item_sycode_set" jsonb  /* 检查项目森亿标准编码集 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "link_show_type" integer DEFAULT 0  /* 跳转显示类型  0 不显示 1 web 2  exe */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "exam_no" character varying(40)  /* 医技检查号 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */,
    "source_url" character varying(400)  /* 原始报告url */,
    "source_link_show_type" integer  /* 原始报告链接类型 0不显示 1web 2exe */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ultrasound_report" IS '超声报告';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ultrasound_report_item
-- 注释: 超声报告检查项目
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ultrasound_report_item" (
    "ultrasound_item_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "item_id" integer  /* 项目编号 */,
    "item_code" character varying(20)  /* 项目代码 */,
    "item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 项目名称 */,
    "body_site_id" integer  /* 检查部位编号 */,
    "body_site_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查部位代码 */,
    "body_site_name" character varying(500)  /* 检查部位名称 */,
    "check_method_id" integer  /* 检查方法编号 */,
    "check_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法代码 */,
    "check_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查方法名称 */,
    "check_tech_id" integer  /* 检查技术编号 */,
    "check_tech_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术代码 */,
    "check_tech_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查技术名称 */,
    "check_equipment_id" integer  /* 检查设备编号 */,
    "check_equipment_code" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备代码 */,
    "check_equipment_name" character varying(50)  /* 检查设备名称 */,
    "apply_bill_no" character varying(20)  /* 申请单号 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源超声报告检查项目编号 */,
    "source_order_id" character varying(50)  /* 源系统医嘱编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("ultrasound_item_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ultrasound_report_item" IS '超声报告检查项目';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: ultrasound_result_detail
-- 注释: 超声报告检查结果报告 
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ultrasound_result_detail" (
    "ultrasound_result_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "report_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 报告编号，自增号 */,
    "ultrasound_item_id" bigint  /* 超声结果项目编号 */,
    "ultrasound_item_code" character varying(20)  /* 超声结果项目代码 */,
    "ultrasound_item_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 超声结果项目名称 */,
    "value" character varying(20)  /* 结果值 */,
    "unit_id" integer  /* 单位编号 */,
    "unit_code" character varying(50)  /* 单位代码 */,
    "unit_name" character varying(20)  /* 单位名称 */,
    "reference_range" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围 */,
    "reference_range_man" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围（男） */,
    "reference_range_woman" character varying(200)  /* 参考范围（女） */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "source_report_item_id" character varying(50)  /* 源超声报告结果明细项目编号 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 表示该条记录的有效性：true表示有效，false表示删除 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("ultrasound_result_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "ultrasound_result_detail" IS '超声报告检查结果报告 ';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: untoward_effect_record
-- 注释: 不良反应记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "untoward_effect_record" (
    "untoward_effect_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统数据编号 */,
    "class_id" integer  /* 反应类别编号 */,
    "class_code" character varying(50)  /* 反应类别代码 */,
    "class_name" character varying(20)  /* 反应类别名称 */,
    "untoward_effect_name" character varying(50)  /* 反应名称 */,
    "acute_organ_id" integer  /* 器官编号（急性期） */,
    "acute_organ_code" character varying(50)  /* 器官代码（急性期） */,
    "acute_organ_name" character varying(50)  /* 器官名称（急性期） */,
    "rtog_acute_grade_id" integer  /* RTOG急性期分级编号 */,
    "rtog_acute_grade_code" character varying(50)  /* RTOG急性期分级代码 */,
    "rtog_acute_grade_name" character varying(30)  /* RTOG急性期分级名称 */,
    "terminal_organ_id" integer  /* 器官编号（晚期） */,
    "terminal_organ_code" character varying(50)  /* 器官代码（晚期） */,
    "terminal_organ_name" character varying(50)  /* 器官名称（晚期） */,
    "rtog_terminal_grade_id" integer  /* RTOG/EORTC晚期分级编号 */,
    "rtog_terminal_grade_code" character varying(50)  /* RTOG/EORTC晚期分级代码 */,
    "rtog_terminal_grade_name" character varying(30)  /* RTOG/EORTC晚期分级名称 */,
    "begin_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 开始时间 */,
    "end_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 结束时间 */,
    "grade_id" integer  /* 等级编号 */,
    "grade_code" character varying(50)  /* 等级代码 */,
    "grade_name" character varying(10)  /* 等级名称 */,
    "pertinence_id" integer  /* 与治疗相关性编号 */,
    "pertinence_name" character varying(30)  /* 与治疗相关性名称 */,
    "dispose_method_id" integer  /* 处理方法编号 */,
    "dispose_method_code" character varying(50)  /* 处理方法代码 */,
    "dispose_method_name" character varying(50)  /* 处理方法名称 */,
    "outcome_id" integer  /* 转归编号 */,
    "outcome_code" character varying(50)  /* 转归代码 */,
    "outcome_name" character varying(20)  /* 转归名称 */,
    "untoward_effect_note" character varying(2000)  /* 不良反应描述 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("untoward_effect_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "untoward_effect_record" IS '不良反应记录';
|

-- 表名: view_tohis_b07_1
-- 注释:
