CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "view_tohis_b07_1" (
    "patient_id" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "visit_sn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "medical_record_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "inpatient_no" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "hospitalization_times" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "record_sn" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "record_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "admission_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "discharge_order" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "discharge_datetime" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "length_of_stay" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "kps_score" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "ecog_score" character varying(50)  /*  */,
    "record_text" bytea  /*  */,
    "admission_condition" bytea  /*  */,
    "treatment_info" bytea  /*  */,
    "discharge_condition" bytea  /*  */,
    "admission_maindiag_code1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_maindiag_name1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_code2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_code3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_code4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_name4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_code5" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_name5" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_coden" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "admission_diag_namen" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_maindiag_code1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_maindiag_name1" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_code2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_name2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_code3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_name3" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_code4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_name4" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_code5" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_name5" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_coden" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "discharge_diag_namen" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "extend_data1" timestamp without time zone  /*  */,
    "extend_data2" character varying(100)  /*  */,
    "record_status" character varying(100)  /*  */

);
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: visit_inpat_baby_info
-- 注释: 住院婴儿信息
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "visit_inpat_baby_info" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序号 */,
    "baby_number" text NOT NULL  /* 婴儿编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "mother_inpat_number" text  /* 母亲住院流水号 */,
    "baby_name" text  /* 婴儿姓名 */,
    "sex_sys_code" integer  /* 性别值域 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "height" text  /* 身长 (单位 cm) */,
    "weight" text  /* 体重 (单位 g) */,
    "birth_date" text  /* 出生时间 */,
    "birth_weight" text  /* 出生体重 (单位 g) */,
    "in_weight" text  /* 入院体重 (单位 g) */,
    "father_name" text  /* 父亲姓名 */,
    "father_idno" text  /* 父亲身份证号 */,
    "mother_name" text  /* 母亲姓名 */,
    "mother_idno" text  /* 母亲身份证号 */,
    "delivery_mode_sys_code" integer  /* 分娩方式值域 */,
    "delivery_mode_code" text  /* 分娩方式编号 */,
    "delivery_mode_name" text  /* 分娩方式名称 */,
    "fetus_num" text  /* 胎次 */,
    "parity_num" text  /* 产次 */,
    "ch" text  /* CH 甲低 */,
    "pku" text  /* PKU */,
    "listening" text  /* 听力 */,
    "cah" text  /* CAH */,
    "g6pd" text  /* G6PD */,
    "is_die" text  /* 七日死亡 */,
    "die_time" text  /* 死亡时间 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 主要诊断编号 */,
    "diag_code" text  /* 诊断编号 */,
    "diag_name" text  /* 诊断名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "visit_inpat_baby_info" IS '住院婴儿信息';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: visit_inpat_record
-- 注释: 住院就诊记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "visit_inpat_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "inpat_patient_no" text  /* 住院号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "is_baby" text  /* 是否婴儿 */,
    "pay_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 结算类别值域 */,
    "pay_kind_code" text  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" text  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 保险类别值域 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" text  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" text  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "in_dept_code" text  /* 入院科室编号 */,
    "in_dept_name" text  /* 入院科室名称 */,
    "in_ward_code" text  /* 入院病区编号 */,
    "in_ward_name" text  /* 入院病区名称 */,
    "in_time" text  /* 入院时间 */,
    "in_source_sys_code" integer  /* 入院来源值域 */,
    "in_source_code" text  /* 入院来源代码 */,
    "in_source_name" text  /* 入院来源名称 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "clinic_diag_code" text  /* 门诊诊断编号 */,
    "clinic_diag_name" text  /* 门诊诊断名称 */,
    "major_diag_code" text  /* 主要诊断编号 */,
    "major_diag_name" text  /* 主要诊断名称 */,
    "current_dept_code" text  /* 当前科室编号 */,
    "current_dept_name" text  /* 当前科室名称 */,
    "current_ward_code" text  /* 当前病区编号 */,
    "current_ward_name" text  /* 当前病区名称 */,
    "room_sys_code" integer  /* 病房字典 */,
    "room_code" text  /* 病房代码 */,
    "room_name" text  /* 病房名称 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "bed_code" text  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_name" text  /* 床位名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "bed_doc_code" text  /* 床位医生编号 */,
    "bed_doc_name" text  /* 床位医生姓名 */,
    "attending_doc_code" text  /* 主治医生编号 */,
    "attending_doc_name" text  /* 主治医生姓名 */,
    "director_doc_code" text  /* 主任医生编号 */,
    "director_doc_name" text  /* 主任医生姓名 */,
    "bed_nurse_code" text  /* 床位护士编号 */,
    "bed_nurse_name" text  /* 床位护士姓名 */,
    "out_dept_code" text  /* 出院科室编号 */,
    "out_dept_name" text  /* 出院科室名称 */,
    "out_ward_code" text  /* 出院病区编号 */,
    "out_ward_name" text  /* 出院病区名称 */,
    "out_time" text  /* 出院时间 */,
    "baby_flag" text  /* 有婴儿标志 */,
    "nurse_level_sys_code" integer  /* 护理级别值域 */,
    "nurse_level_code" text  /* 护理级别编号 */,
    "nurse_level_name" text  /* 护理级别名称 */,
    "diet_type_sys_code" integer  /* 饮食类型值域 */,
    "diet_type_code" text  /* 饮食类型编号 */,
    "diet_type_name" text  /* 饮食类型名称 */,
    "inpat_state_sys_code" integer  /* 住院状态编号 */,
    "inpat_state_code" text  /* 住院状态编号 */,
    "inpat_state_name" text  /* 住院状态名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "reg_number" text NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "in_illness_state_sys_code" integer  /* 在院病情字典 */,
    "in_illness_state_code" text  /* 在院病情代码 */,
    "in_illness_state_name" text  /* 在院病情名称 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "home_address" text  /* 家庭地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "visit_inpat_record" IS '住院就诊记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: visit_inpat_shift_dept
-- 注释: 住院转科记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "visit_inpat_shift_dept" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "patient_name" text  /* 姓名 */,
    "happen_no" text  /* 发生序号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "inpat_number" text  /* 住院流水号 */,
    "shift_number" text  /* 原始转科号 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室值域 */,
    "bed_sys_code" integer  /* 床位值域 */,
    "old_dept_code" text  /* 原科室编号 */,
    "old_dept_name" text  /* 原科室名称 */,
    "old_ward_code" text  /* 原病区编号 */,
    "old_ward_name" text  /* 原病区名称 */,
    "old_bed_code" text  /* 原床位编号 */,
    "old_bed_name" text  /* 原床位名称 */,
    "new_dept_code" text  /* 新科室编号 */,
    "new_dept_name" text  /* 新科室名称 */,
    "new_ward_code" text  /* 新病区编号 */,
    "new_ward_name" text  /* 新病区名称 */,
    "new_bed_code" text  /* 新床位编号 */,
    "new_bed_name" text  /* 新床位名称 */,
    "shift_state_sys_code" integer  /* 转科状态编号 */,
    "shift_state_code" text  /* 转科状态编号 */,
    "shift_state_name" text  /* 转科状态名称 */,
    "note" text  /* 备注 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "shift_oper_code" text  /* 转科操作员编号 */,
    "shift_oper_name" text  /* 转科操作员姓名 */,
    "shift_oper_time" text  /* 转科操作时间 */,
    "confirm_oper_code" text  /* 确认操作员编号 */,
    "confirm_oper_name" text  /* 确认操作员姓名 */,
    "confirm_oper_time" text  /* 确认操作时间 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "shift_diag_sys_code" integer  /* 转入诊断值域 */,
    "shift_diag_code" text  /* 转入诊断代码 */,
    "shift_diag_name" text  /* 转入诊断名称 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "visit_inpat_shift_dept" IS '住院转科记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: visit_outpatient_record
-- 注释: 门诊就诊记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "visit_outpatient_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 自增序列 */,
    "reg_number" text NOT NULL  /* 挂号编号 */,
    "org_code" text NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "system_code" text NOT NULL  /* 系统代码 */,
    "patient_id_type" text  /* 患者标识符类型 */,
    "patient_no" text  /* 系统患者编号 */,
    "patient_name" text NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "age" text  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" text  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" text  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "pay_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 结算类别值域 */,
    "pay_kind_code" text  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" text  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_sys_code" integer  /* 保险类别值域 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" text  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" text  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "level_sys_code" integer  /* 挂号级别值域 */,
    "level_code" text  /* 挂号级别代码 */,
    "level_name" text  /* 挂号级别名称 */,
    "dept_sys_code" integer  /* 科室字典 */,
    "dept_code" text  /* 挂号科室编号 */,
    "dept_name" text  /* 挂号科室名称 */,
    "empl_sys_code" integer  /* 员工值域 */,
    "doc_code" text  /* 挂号医生编号 */,
    "doc_name" text  /* 挂号医生姓名 */,
    "is_emergency" text  /* 是否急诊 */,
    "is_again" text  /* 初诊/复诊标志 */,
    "reg_time" text  /* 挂号时间 */,
    "visit_state_sys_code" integer  /* 就诊状态值域 */,
    "visit_state_code" text  /* 就诊状态编号 */,
    "visit_state_name" text  /* 就诊状态名称 */,
    "visit_dept_code" text  /* 就诊科室编号 */,
    "visit_dept_name" text  /* 就诊科室名称 */,
    "visit_doc_code" text  /* 就诊医生编号 */,
    "visit_doc_name" text  /* 就诊医生姓名 */,
    "reg_source_sys_code" integer  /* 挂号来源编号 */,
    "reg_source_code" text  /* 挂号来源编号 */,
    "reg_source_name" text  /* 挂号来源名称 */,
    "see_no" text  /* 看诊序号 */,
    "diag_sys_code" integer  /* 诊断值域 */,
    "major_diag_code" text  /* 主要诊断编号 */,
    "major_diag_name" text  /* 主要诊断名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_code" text  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_name" text  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "observation_flag" text  /* 是否留观 */,
    "time_scope" text  /* 挂号时间段 */,
    "oper_time" text  /* 操作时间 */,
    "data_createtime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据生成时间 */,
    "data_updatetime" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 数据最后更新时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据ETL时间 */,
    "etl_flag" integer NOT NULL  /* 数据标志 */,
    "sex_code" text  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" text  /* 性别名称 */,
    "outpat_patient_no" text  /* 门诊号 */,
    "extend1" text  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" text  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" text  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "visit_time" text  /* 就诊时间 */,
    "home_address" text  /* 家庭地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "visit_outpatient_record" IS '门诊就诊记录';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: visit_record
-- 注释: 就诊总表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "visit_record" (
    "id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "visit_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 就诊编号（挂号编号，住院就诊编号） */,
    "visit_type" character varying(4) NOT NULL  /* 病人就诊类型 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "source_visit_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统就诊编号（挂号编号，住院流水号） */,
    "source_outpat_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统门诊号 */,
    "source_inpat_no" character varying(50)  /* 源系统住院号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 姓名 */,
    "sex_code" character varying(1) NOT NULL  /* 性别代码 */,
    "sex_name" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 性别名称 */,
    "age" character varying(10)  /* 年龄 */,
    "age_unit" character varying(2)  /* 年龄单位 */,
    "age_day" integer  /* 年龄换算（天） */,
    "pay_kind_id" integer  /* 结算类别编号 */,
    "pay_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别代码 */,
    "pay_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 结算类别名称 */,
    "insurance_kind_id" integer  /* 保险类别编号 */,
    "insurance_kind_code" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别代码 */,
    "insurance_kind_name" character varying(20)  /* 保险类别名称 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 就诊科室编号（入院科室） */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 就诊科室代码（入院科室） */,
    "dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 就诊科室名称（入院科室） */,
    "doc_id" integer  /* 就诊医生编号（主治医生） */,
    "doc_code" character varying(50)  /* 就诊医生代码（主治医生） */,
    "doc_name" character varying(50)  /* 就诊医生姓名（主治医生） */,
    "is_emergency" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否急诊 */,
    "visit_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 就诊时间（挂号时间，入院日期） */,
    "out_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 出院时间 */,
    "major_diag_id" integer  /* 主要诊断编号 */,
    "major_diag_code" character varying(50)  /* 主要诊断代码 */,
    "major_diag_name" text  /* 主要诊断名称 */,
    "visit_state_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 就诊状态编号 */,
    "visit_state_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 就诊状态代码 */,
    "visit_state_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 就诊状态名称 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "current_dept_id" integer  /* 当前科室编号 */,
    "current_dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 当前科室代码 */,
    "current_dept_name" character varying(50)  /* 当前科室名称 */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 无纸化病案链接地址 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 翻拍病历链接地址 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "home_address" character varying(100)  /* 家庭地址 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "visit_record" IS '就诊总表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: vit_vital_signs
-- 注释: 生命体征表
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "vit_vital_signs" (
    "vit_vital_signs_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 生命体征业务表唯一标识符  */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码  */,
    "source_app" character varying(40) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 规则：厂商简称_系统英文简称[版本]，例如：jy_nurse，小写，下划线命名法
 */,
    "source_vit_vital_signs_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统生命体征业务表唯一标识符 原始业务系统为联合主键时，以'&#124;'分隔    */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 患者姓名  */,
    "in_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 入院时间  */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 患者所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 患者所在病区编号  */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 患者所在病区代码  */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 患者所在病区名称  */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码  */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称  */,
    "record_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 记录时间  */,
    "measure_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 测量时间  */,
    "item_code" character varying(50)  /* 项目代码  */,
    "item_name" character varying(50)  /* 项目名称  */,
    "low_item_value" character varying(50)  /* 合理值下限  */,
    "high_item_value" character varying(50)  /* 合理值上限  */,
    "item_values" character varying(50)  /* 项目数值  */,
    "units" character varying(50)  /* 项目单位  */,
    "exam_method" character varying(50)  /* 监测方法  */,
    "nurse_indicator" character varying(50)  /* 护理记录单标志  */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注  */,
    "recorder_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 记录者编号  */,
    "recorder_code" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 记录者代码  */,
    "recorder_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 记录者姓名  */,
    "oper_time" timestamp(6) without time zone  /* 操作时间 源业务系统操作时间 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间）  */,
    "extend1" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("vit_vital_signs_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "vit_vital_signs" IS '生命体征表';
|
|-- ========================================
-- 表名: vital_sign
-- 注释: 体征记录
-- ========================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "vital_sign" (
    "vital_sign_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 序号，自增号 */,
    "patient_id" bigint NOT NULL  /* 患者编号 */,
    "inpat_id" integer NOT NULL  /* 住院就诊编号 */,
    "source_id" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /* 源系统体征序号 */,
    "dept_id" integer  /* 病人所在科室编号 */,
    "dept_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在科室代码 */,
    "dept_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在科室名称 */,
    "ward_id" integer  /* 病人所在病区编号 */,
    "ward_code" character varying(50)  /* 病人所在病区代码 */,
    "ward_name" character varying(40)  /* 病人所在病区名称 */,
    "bed_id" integer  /* 床位编号 */,
    "bed_code" character varying(50)  /* 床位代码 */,
    "bed_name" character varying(30)  /* 床位名称 */,
    "plan_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 计划时间 */,
    "measure_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 测量时间 */,
    "breathe" numeric(12,4)  /* 呼吸 */,
    "pulse" numeric(12,4)  /* 脉搏 */,
    "heart_rate" numeric(12,4)  /* 心率 */,
    "temperaturet_type" character varying(10)  /* 体温类型代码 */,
    "temperature" numeric(12,4)  /* 体温 */,
    "pressure_high" numeric(12,4)  /* 血压（高） */,
    "pressure_low" numeric(12,4)  /* 血压（低） */,
    "height" character varying(10)  /* 身高 */,
    "weight" character varying(10)  /* 体重 */,
    "defecate_frequency" character varying(10)  /* 大便次数 */,
    "urine_volume" character varying(10)  /* 尿量 */,
    "sputum_volume" numeric(12,4)  /* 痰量 */,
    "drainage_volume" numeric(12,4)  /* 引流量 */,
    "emesis_volume" numeric(12,4)  /* 呕吐量 */,
    "output_total_volume" numeric(12,4)  /* 出量总量 */,
    "income_volume" numeric(12,4)  /* 入量 */,
    "postoperative_days" numeric(12,4)  /* 手术后天数 */,
    "delivery_after_days" numeric(12,4)  /* 分娩后天数 */,
    "stay_days" numeric(12,4)  /* 住院天数 */,
    "time_flag" smallint  /* 时间点标记 */,
    "note" character varying(100)  /* 备注 */,
    "oper_id" integer  /* 操作员编号 */,
    "oper_code" character varying(50)  /* 操作员代码 */,
    "oper_name" character varying(50)  /* 操作员姓名 */,
    "extend1" character varying(500)  /* 扩展字段1 */,
    "extend2" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段2 */,
    "extend3" character varying(100)  /* 扩展字段3 */,
    "is_valid" boolean NOT NULL  /* 是否有效 */,
    "oper_time" timestamp without time zone  /* 操作时间 */,
    "org_code" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 机构代码 */,
    "source_app" character varying(20) NOT NULL  /* 源系统代码 */,
    "etl_time" timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  /* 数据抽取时间（变更时间） */,
    "patient_name" character varying(50) NOT NULL  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("vital_sign_id")
);
COMMENT ON TABLE "vital_sign" IS '体征记录';
|

    "bfgg_qc" character varying(100)  /* 病房规格全称 */,

    "hlwzlmc" character varying(250)  /*  */
,
    PRIMARY KEY ("ypxh")
);

,

);
